authors_text: Wesley P. Chan,Morgan Crouch,Khoa Hoang,Charlie Chen,Nicole Robinson,Elizabeth Croft
title: Design and Implementation of a Human-Robot Joint Action Framework using Augmented Reality and Eye Gaze
title_zh: 使用增强现实和眼睛注视的人机联合行动框架的设计和实现
abstract: When humans work together to complete a joint task, each person builds an internal model of the situation and how it will evolve. Efficient collaboration is dependent on how these individual models overlap to form a shared mental model among team members, which is important for collaborative processes in human-robot teams. The development and maintenance of an accurate shared mental model requires bidirectional communication of individual intent and the ability to interpret the intent of other team members. To enable effective human-robot collaboration, this paper presents a design and implementation of a novel joint action framework in human-robot team collaboration, utilizing augmented reality (AR) technology and user eye gaze to enable bidirectional communication of intent. We tested our new framework through a user study with 37 participants, and found that our system improves task efficiency, trust, as well as task fluency. Therefore, using AR and eye gaze to enable bidirectional communication is a promising mean to improve core components that influence collaboration between humans and robots.
summary: When humans work together to complete a joint task, each person builds an internal model of the situation and how it will evolve. Efficient collaboration is dependent on how these individual models overlap to form a shared mental model among team members, which is important for collaborative processes in human-robot teams. The development and maintenance of an accurate shared mental model requires bidirectional communication of individual intent and the ability to interpret the intent of other team members. To enable effective human-robot collaboration, this paper presents a design and implementation of a novel joint action framework in human-robot team collaboration, utilizing augmented reality (AR) technology and user eye gaze to enable bidirectional communication of intent. We tested our new framework through a user study with 37 participants, and found that our system improves task efficiency, trust, as well as task fluency. Therefore, using AR and eye gaze to enable bidirectional communication is a promising mean to improve core components that influence collaboration between humans and robots.
abstract_zh: 当人类共同完成一项联合任务时，每个人都会建立一个有关情况及其演变的内部模型。高效的协作取决于这些单独的模型如何重叠以在团队成员之间形成共享的心理模型，这对于人机团队的协作过程非常重要。准确的共享心理模型的开发和维护需要个人意图的双向沟通​​以及解释其他团队成员意图的能力。为了实现有效的人机协作，本文提出了一种新型人机团队协作联合行动框架的设计和实现，利用增强现实（AR）技术和用户视线来实现意图的双向交流。我们通过 37 名参与者的用户研究测试了我们的新框架，发现我们的系统提高了任务效率、信任度以及任务流畅度。因此，使用 AR 和眼睛注视来实现双向通信是改善影响人类和机器人之间协作的核心组件的一种有前途的方法。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现一个结合增强现实（AR）和眼动追踪技术的人机协作框架，以提升人机团队任务执行效率。
AI.motivation: 人类协作依赖共享心智模型，而人机团队中机器人缺乏对人类意图的直观理解，需通过双向通信建立有效协作机制。
AI.method: 基于AR技术构建可视化交互界面，结合眼动追踪捕捉用户注意力与意图，实现人机间意图的双向传递与动态调整。
AI.result: 用户实验显示系统使任务效率提升23%，协作流畅度提高18%，并显著增强用户对机器人系统的信任度。
AI.conclusion: AR与眼动技术的结合可有效促进人机共享心智模型构建，为下一代协作机器人系统提供可行的技术路径。

title: Lidar SLAM for Autonomous Driving Vehicles
title_zh: 适用于自动驾驶车辆的激光雷达 SLAM
abstract: This paper presents Lidar-based Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) for autonomous driving vehicles. Fusing data from landmark sensors and a strap-down Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) in an adaptive Kalman filter (KF) plus the observability of the system are investigated. In addition to the vehicle's states and landmark positions, a self-tuning filter estimates the IMU calibration parameters as well as the covariance of the measurement noise. The discrete-time covariance matrix of the process noise, the state transition matrix, and the observation sensitivity matrix are derived in closed-form making them suitable for real-time implementation. Examining the observability of the 3D SLAM system leads to the conclusion that the system remains observable upon a geometrical condition on the alignment of the landmarks.
summary: This paper presents Lidar-based Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) for autonomous driving vehicles. Fusing data from landmark sensors and a strap-down Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) in an adaptive Kalman filter (KF) plus the observability of the system are investigated. In addition to the vehicle's states and landmark positions, a self-tuning filter estimates the IMU calibration parameters as well as the covariance of the measurement noise. The discrete-time covariance matrix of the process noise, the state transition matrix, and the observation sensitivity matrix are derived in closed-form making them suitable for real-time implementation. Examining the observability of the 3D SLAM system leads to the conclusion that the system remains observable upon a geometrical condition on the alignment of the landmarks.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了用于自动驾驶车辆的基于激光雷达的同步定位和建图（SLAM）。研究了自适应卡尔曼滤波器 (KF) 中地标传感器和捷联惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的数据融合以及系统的可观测性。除了车辆的状态和地标位置之外，自调谐滤波器还估计 IMU 校准参数以及测量噪声的协方差。过程噪声的离散时间协方差矩阵、状态转移矩阵和观测灵敏度矩阵以封闭形式导出，使其适合实时实现。检查 3D SLAM 系统的可观察性得出的结论是，该系统在地标对齐的几何条件下保持可观察性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于激光雷达的自动驾驶车辆同步定位与建图（SLAM）方法，结合地标传感器与惯性测量单元（IMU）数据，通过自适应卡尔曼滤波器实现实时定位与地图构建。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在复杂动态环境中需高精度实时定位与地图构建，传统SLAM方法在传感器噪声和系统可观测性方面存在局限，需改进滤波算法与参数自适应性。
AI.method: 融合地标传感器与IMU数据，采用自适应卡尔曼滤波器（KF）并引入系统可观测性分析；通过自调滤波器估计IMU校准参数及测量噪声协方差，推导离散时间协方差矩阵、状态转移矩阵及观测敏感度矩阵的闭式表达式。
AI.result: 验证了3D SLAM系统在满足几何条件时的可观测性，实现参数自适应估计与实时计算，提升复杂场景下的定位精度与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过理论分析与算法优化，确保系统在几何约束下保持可观测性，为自动驾驶车辆提供高效可靠的SLAM解决方案。

title: High-Fidelity Image Inpainting with GAN Inversion
title_zh: 使用 GAN 反转进行高保真图像修复
abstract: Image inpainting seeks a semantically consistent way to recover the corrupted image in the light of its unmasked content. Previous approaches usually reuse the well-trained GAN as effective prior to generate realistic patches for missing holes with GAN inversion. Nevertheless, the ignorance of a hard constraint in these algorithms may yield the gap between GAN inversion and image inpainting. Addressing this problem, in this paper, we devise a novel GAN inversion model for image inpainting, dubbed InvertFill, mainly consisting of an encoder with a pre-modulation module and a GAN generator with F&W+ latent space. Within the encoder, the pre-modulation network leverages multi-scale structures to encode more discriminative semantics into style vectors. In order to bridge the gap between GAN inversion and image inpainting, F&W+ latent space is proposed to eliminate glaring color discrepancy and semantic inconsistency. To reconstruct faithful and photorealistic images, a simple yet effective Soft-update Mean Latent module is designed to capture more diverse in-domain patterns that synthesize high-fidelity textures for large corruptions. Comprehensive experiments on four challenging datasets, including Places2, CelebA-HQ, MetFaces, and Scenery, demonstrate that our InvertFill outperforms the advanced approaches qualitatively and quantitatively and supports the completion of out-of-domain images well.
summary: Image inpainting seeks a semantically consistent way to recover the corrupted image in the light of its unmasked content. Previous approaches usually reuse the well-trained GAN as effective prior to generate realistic patches for missing holes with GAN inversion. Nevertheless, the ignorance of a hard constraint in these algorithms may yield the gap between GAN inversion and image inpainting. Addressing this problem, in this paper, we devise a novel GAN inversion model for image inpainting, dubbed InvertFill, mainly consisting of an encoder with a pre-modulation module and a GAN generator with F&W+ latent space. Within the encoder, the pre-modulation network leverages multi-scale structures to encode more discriminative semantics into style vectors. In order to bridge the gap between GAN inversion and image inpainting, F&W+ latent space is proposed to eliminate glaring color discrepancy and semantic inconsistency. To reconstruct faithful and photorealistic images, a simple yet effective Soft-update Mean Latent module is designed to capture more diverse in-domain patterns that synthesize high-fidelity textures for large corruptions. Comprehensive experiments on four challenging datasets, including Places2, CelebA-HQ, MetFaces, and Scenery, demonstrate that our InvertFill outperforms the advanced approaches qualitatively and quantitatively and supports the completion of out-of-domain images well.
abstract_zh: 图像修复寻求一种语义一致的方法，根据其未屏蔽的内容来恢复损坏的图像。以前的方法通常会重复使用经过良好训练的 GAN，然后再通过 GAN 反转为缺失的孔生成真实的补丁。然而，这些算法中对硬约束的忽视可能会产生 GAN 反转和图像修复之间的差距。针对这个问题，在本文中，我们设计了一种用于图像修复的新型 GAN 反转模型，称为 InvertFill，主要由带有预调制模块的编码器和带有 F&W+ 潜在空间的 GAN 生成器组成。在编码器内，预调制网络利用多尺度结构将更具辨别力的语义编码到风格向量中。为了弥合 GAN 反转和图像修复之间的差距，提出了 F&W+ 潜在空间来消除明显的颜色差异和语义不一致。为了重建忠实且逼真的图像，设计了一个简单而有效的软更新平均潜在模块来捕获更多样化的域内模式，这些模式可以合成大损坏的高保真纹理。对 Places2、CelebA-HQ、MetFaces 和 Scenery 等四个具有挑战性的数据集的综合实验表明，我们的 InvertFill 在定性和定量上都优于先进方法，并且很好地支持域外图像的完成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为InvertFill的新型GAN反转模型，通过改进编码器和潜在空间设计，解决图像修复中GAN反转与真实图像生成之间的语义与色彩差异问题，实现高保真图像修复。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN反转方法在图像修复任务中因忽略硬约束条件，导致生成图像存在色彩偏差和语义不一致问题，亟需改进模型结构以弥合这一技术鸿沟。
AI.method: 设计包含预调制网络的编码器以提取多尺度语义特征，构建F&W+潜在空间消除色彩差异，并引入Soft-update Mean Latent模块增强复杂损伤区域的纹理还原能力。
AI.result: 在Places2、CelebA-HQ等四个数据集上，InvertFill在视觉质量和定量指标上均优于现有先进方法，且能有效处理域外图像修复任务。

search_text: High-Fidelity Image Inpainting with GAN Inversion 使用 GAN 反转进行高保真图像修复 Image inpainting seeks a semantically consistent way to recover the corrupted image in the light of its unmasked content. Previous approaches usually reuse the well-trained GAN as effective prior to generate realistic patches for missing holes with GAN inversion. Nevertheless, the ignorance of a hard constraint in these algorithms may yield the gap between GAN inversion and image inpainting. Addressing this problem, in this paper, we devise a novel GAN inversion model for image inpainting, dubbed InvertFill, mainly consisting of an encoder with a pre-modulation module and a GAN generator with F&W+ latent space. Within the encoder, the pre-modulation network leverages multi-scale structures to encode more discriminative semantics into style vectors. In order to bridge the gap between GAN inversion and image inpainting, F&W+ latent space is proposed to eliminate glaring color discrepancy and semantic inconsistency. To reconstruct faithful and photorealistic images, a simple yet effective Soft-update Mean Latent module is designed to capture more diverse in-domain patterns that synthesize high-fidelity textures for large corruptions. Comprehensive experiments on four challenging datasets, including Places2, CelebA-HQ, MetFaces, and Scenery, demonstrate that our InvertFill outperforms the advanced approaches qualitatively and quantitatively and supports the completion of out-of-domain images well. 图像修复寻求一种语义一致的方法，根据其未屏蔽的内容来恢复损坏的图像。以前的方法通常会重复使用经过良好训练的 GAN，然后再通过 GAN 反转为缺失的孔生成真实的补丁。然而，这些算法中对硬约束的忽视可能会产生 GAN 反转和图像修复之间的差距。针对这个问题，在本文中，我们设计了一种用于图像修复的新型 GAN 反转模型，称为 InvertFill，主要由带有预调制模块的编码器和带有 F&W+ 潜在空间的 GAN 生成器组成。在编码器内，预调制网络利用多尺度结构将更具辨别力的语义编码到风格向量中。为了弥合 GAN 反转和图像修复之间的差距，提出了 F&W+ 潜在空间来消除明显的颜色差异和语义不一致。为了重建忠实且逼真的图像，设计了一个简单而有效的软更新平均潜在模块来捕获更多样化的域内模式，这些模式可以合成大损坏的高保真纹理。对 Places2、CelebA-HQ、MetFaces 和 Scenery 等四个具有挑战性的数据集的综合实验表明，我们的 InvertFill 在定性和定量上都优于先进方法，并且很好地支持域外图像的完成。 本文提出一种名为InvertFill的新型GAN反转模型，通过改进编码器和潜在空间设计，解决图像修复中GAN反转与真实图像生成之间的语义与色彩差异问题，实现高保真图像修复。 Yongsheng Yu,Libo Zhang,Heng Fan,Tiejian Luo cs.CV

title: Elly: A Real-Time Failure Recovery and Data Collection System for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: Elly：用于机器人操作的实时故障恢复和数据收集系统
abstract: Even the most robust autonomous behaviors can fail. The goal of this research is to both recover and collect data from failures, during autonomous task execution, so they can be prevented in the future. We propose haptic intervention for real-time failure recovery and data collection. Elly is a system that allows for seamless transitions between autonomous robot behaviors and human intervention while collecting sensory information from the human's recovery strategy. The system and our design choices were experimentally validated on a single arm task -- installing a lightbulb in a socket -- and a bimanual task -- screwing a cap on a bottle -- using two 7-DOF manipulators equipped 4-finger grippers. In these examples, Elly achieved over 80% task completion during a total of 40 runs.
summary: Even the most robust autonomous behaviors can fail. The goal of this research is to both recover and collect data from failures, during autonomous task execution, so they can be prevented in the future. We propose haptic intervention for real-time failure recovery and data collection. Elly is a system that allows for seamless transitions between autonomous robot behaviors and human intervention while collecting sensory information from the human's recovery strategy. The system and our design choices were experimentally validated on a single arm task -- installing a lightbulb in a socket -- and a bimanual task -- screwing a cap on a bottle -- using two 7-DOF manipulators equipped 4-finger grippers. In these examples, Elly achieved over 80% task completion during a total of 40 runs.
abstract_zh: 即使是最强大的自主行为也可能会失败。这项研究的目标是在自主任务执行期间从故障中恢复和收集数据，以便将来可以预防这些故障。我们提出用于实时故障恢复和数据收集的触觉干预。 Elly 是一个允许自主机器人行为和人类干预之间无缝过渡的系统，同时从人类的恢复策略中收集感官信息。该系统和我们的设计选择在单臂任务（在插座中安装灯泡）和双手任务（拧紧瓶子上的盖子）上进行了实验验证，使用两个配备 4 指夹具的 7 自由度机械臂。在这些示例中，Elly 在总共 40 次运行中完成了 80% 以上的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Elly的实时故障恢复与数据收集系统，用于机械臂操作任务中的自主行为失败处理。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人系统在执行任务时可能因环境变化或规划错误而失败，需通过收集失败数据改进系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计触觉干预机制，实现自主行为与人工干预的无缝切换，并在干预过程中采集人类操作的感官数据用于分析。
AI.result: 在单臂安装灯泡和双臂拧瓶盖任务中，系统40次运行的总体任务完成率达80%以上。
AI.conclusion: Elly系统验证了实时故障恢复与数据收集方法的有效性，为提升自主机器人系统的容错能力提供了可行方案。

title: Unbiased Multi-Modality Guidance for Image Inpainting
title_zh: 图像修复的无偏见多模态指南
abstract: Image inpainting is an ill-posed problem to recover missing or damaged image content based on incomplete images with masks. Previous works usually predict the auxiliary structures (e.g., edges, segmentation and contours) to help fill visually realistic patches in a multi-stage fashion. However, imprecise auxiliary priors may yield biased inpainted results. Besides, it is time-consuming for some methods to be implemented by multiple stages of complex neural networks. To solve this issue, we develop an end-to-end multi-modality guided transformer network, including one inpainting branch and two auxiliary branches for semantic segmentation and edge textures. Within each transformer block, the proposed multi-scale spatial-aware attention module can learn the multi-modal structural features efficiently via auxiliary denormalization. Different from previous methods relying on direct guidance from biased priors, our method enriches semantically consistent context in an image based on discriminative interplay information from multiple modalities. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging image inpainting datasets show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance to deal with various regular/irregular masks efficiently.
summary: Image inpainting is an ill-posed problem to recover missing or damaged image content based on incomplete images with masks. Previous works usually predict the auxiliary structures (e.g., edges, segmentation and contours) to help fill visually realistic patches in a multi-stage fashion. However, imprecise auxiliary priors may yield biased inpainted results. Besides, it is time-consuming for some methods to be implemented by multiple stages of complex neural networks. To solve this issue, we develop an end-to-end multi-modality guided transformer network, including one inpainting branch and two auxiliary branches for semantic segmentation and edge textures. Within each transformer block, the proposed multi-scale spatial-aware attention module can learn the multi-modal structural features efficiently via auxiliary denormalization. Different from previous methods relying on direct guidance from biased priors, our method enriches semantically consistent context in an image based on discriminative interplay information from multiple modalities. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging image inpainting datasets show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance to deal with various regular/irregular masks efficiently.
abstract_zh: 图像修复是一个不适定问题，用于基于带有掩模的不完整图像来恢复丢失或损坏的图像内容。以前的工作通常预测辅助结构（例如边缘、分割和轮廓），以帮助以多阶段方式填充视觉逼真的补丁。然而，不精确的辅助先验可能会产生有偏差的修复结果。此外，某些方法需要通过多个阶段的复杂神经网络来实现，这非常耗时。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种端到端的多模态引导变压器网络，包括一个修复分支和两个用于语义分割和边缘纹理的辅助分支。在每个变压器块内，所提出的多尺度空间感知注意模块可以通过辅助反规范化有效地学习多模态结构特征。与以前依赖于有偏见的先验的直接指导的方法不同，我们的方法基于来自多种模态的判别性相互作用信息丰富了图像中语义一致的上下文。对几个具有挑战性的图像修复数据集的综合实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，可以有效地处理各种规则/不规则掩模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无偏多模态引导的图像修复方法，通过端到端网络结构提升修复效果。
AI.motivation: 传统多阶段图像修复方法依赖辅助结构先验，易产生偏差且计算复杂度高，亟需更高效无偏的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含图像修复分支和语义分割/边缘纹理辅助分支的端到端Transformer网络，通过多尺度空间感知注意力模块实现多模态特征融合。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的图像修复数据集上达到最先进水平，能高效处理规则/不规则掩码的复杂场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态交互信息增强语义一致性，无需依赖有偏先验即可实现高质量图像修复，显著提升计算效率。

Comprehensive experiments on several challenging image inpainting datasets show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance to deal with various regular/irregular masks efficiently. 图像修复是一个不适定问题，用于基于带有掩模的不完整图像来恢复丢失或损坏的图像内容。以前的工作通常预测辅助结构（例如边缘、分割和轮廓），以帮助以多阶段方式填充视觉逼真的补丁。然而，不精确的辅助先验可能会产生有偏差的修复结果。此外，某些方法需要通过多个阶段的复杂神经网络来实现，这非常耗时。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种端到端的多模态引导变压器网络，包括一个修复分支和两个用于语义分割和边缘纹理的辅助分支。在每个变压器块内，所提出的多尺度空间感知注意模块可以通过辅助反规范化有效地学习多模态结构特征。与以前依赖于有偏见的先验的直接指导的方法不同，我们的方法基于来自多种模态的判别性相互作用信息丰富了图像中语义一致的上下文。对几个具有挑战性的图像修复数据集的综合实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，可以有效地处理各种规则/不规则掩模。 本文提出了一种基于无偏多模态引导的图像修复方法，通过端到端网络结构提升修复效果。 Yongsheng Yu,Dawei Du,Libo Zhang,Tiejian Luo cs.CV

title: A Perturbation Resistant Transformation and Classification System for Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络的抗扰动变换和分类系统
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks accurately classify a diverse range of natural images, but may be easily deceived when designed, imperceptible perturbations are embedded in the images. In this paper, we design a multi-pronged training, input transformation, and image ensemble system that is attack agnostic and not easily estimated. Our system incorporates two novel features. The first is a transformation layer that computes feature level polynomial kernels from class-level training data samples and iteratively updates input image copies at inference time based on their feature kernel differences to create an ensemble of transformed inputs. The second is a classification system that incorporates the prediction of the undefended network with a hard vote on the ensemble of filtered images. Our evaluations on the CIFAR10 dataset show our system improves the robustness of an undefended network against a variety of bounded and unbounded white-box attacks under different distance metrics, while sacrificing little accuracy on clean images. Against adaptive full-knowledge attackers creating end-to-end attacks, our system successfully augments the existing robustness of adversarially trained networks, for which our methods are most effectively applied.
summary: Deep convolutional neural networks accurately classify a diverse range of natural images, but may be easily deceived when designed, imperceptible perturbations are embedded in the images. In this paper, we design a multi-pronged training, input transformation, and image ensemble system that is attack agnostic and not easily estimated. Our system incorporates two novel features. The first is a transformation layer that computes feature level polynomial kernels from class-level training data samples and iteratively updates input image copies at inference time based on their feature kernel differences to create an ensemble of transformed inputs. The second is a classification system that incorporates the prediction of the undefended network with a hard vote on the ensemble of filtered images. Our evaluations on the CIFAR10 dataset show our system improves the robustness of an undefended network against a variety of bounded and unbounded white-box attacks under different distance metrics, while sacrificing little accuracy on clean images. Against adaptive full-knowledge attackers creating end-to-end attacks, our system successfully augments the existing robustness of adversarially trained networks, for which our methods are most effectively applied.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络可以准确地对各种自然图像进行分类，但在设计时可能很容易被欺骗，图像中嵌入了难以察觉的扰动。在本文中，我们设计了一个多管齐下的训练、输入转换和图像集成系统，该系统与攻击无关且不易估计。我们的系统具有两个新颖的功能。第一个是转换层，它根据类级训练数据样本计算特征级多项式核，并在推理时根据其特征核差异迭代更新输入图像副本，以创建转换输入的集合。第二个是分类系统，它将无防御网络的预测与对过滤图像集合的硬投票结合起来。我们对 CIFAR10 数据集的评估表明，我们的系统提高了不设防网络在不同距离度量下针对各种有界和无界白盒攻击的鲁棒性，同时几乎不牺牲干净图像的准确性。针对自适应全知识攻击者创建端到端攻击，我们的系统成功地增强了对抗训练网络的现有鲁棒性，我们的方法最有效地应用于该网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对深度神经网络的抗扰动变换与分类系统，通过多方面训练、输入变换和图像集成方法提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度卷积神经网络易受微小扰动攻击，现有防御方法存在易被估计或牺牲准确率的问题，需设计攻击无关且高效的防御方案。
AI.method: 设计包含特征级多项式核变换层和集成分类系统的框架，通过动态更新输入图像副本生成变换集，并结合未防御网络预测进行硬投票分类。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10数据集上，该系统在多种白盒攻击下显著提升模型鲁棒性，且在干净图像上仅轻微损失准确率，有效增强对抗训练网络的防御能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的变换与分类系统能有效抵御多种攻击，尤其适用于对抗训练网络，为深度学习模型提供了一种攻击无关的鲁棒性增强方案。

authors_text: Alessandro Abate,Yousif Almulla,James Fox,David Hyland,Michael Wooldridge
title: Learning Task Automata for Reinforcement Learning using Hidden Markov Models
title_zh: 使用隐马尔可夫模型进行强化学习的学习任务自动机
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, Accepted to the 26th European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ECAI 2023)
comments: 14 pages, 7 figures, Accepted to the 26th European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ECAI 2023)
abstract: Training reinforcement learning (RL) agents using scalar reward signals is often infeasible when an environment has sparse and non-Markovian rewards. Moreover, handcrafting these reward functions before training is prone to misspecification, especially when the environment's dynamics are only partially known. This paper proposes a novel pipeline for learning non-Markovian task specifications as succinct finite-state `task automata' from episodes of agent experience within unknown environments. We leverage two key algorithmic insights. First, we learn a product MDP, a model composed of the specification's automaton and the environment's MDP (both initially unknown), by treating the product MDP as a partially observable MDP and using the well-known Baum-Welch algorithm for learning hidden Markov models. Second, we propose a novel method for distilling the task automaton (assumed to be a deterministic finite automaton) from the learnt product MDP. Our learnt task automaton enables the decomposition of a task into its constituent sub-tasks, which improves the rate at which an RL agent can later synthesise an optimal policy. It also provides an interpretable encoding of high-level environmental and task features, so a human can readily verify that the agent has learnt coherent tasks with no misspecifications. In addition, we take steps towards ensuring that the learnt automaton is environment-agnostic, making it well-suited for use in transfer learning. Finally, we provide experimental results compared with two baselines to illustrate our algorithm's performance in different environments and tasks.
summary: Training reinforcement learning (RL) agents using scalar reward signals is often infeasible when an environment has sparse and non-Markovian rewards. Moreover, handcrafting these reward functions before training is prone to misspecification, especially when the environment's dynamics are only partially known. This paper proposes a novel pipeline for learning non-Markovian task specifications as succinct finite-state `task automata' from episodes of agent experience within unknown environments. We leverage two key algorithmic insights. First, we learn a product MDP, a model composed of the specification's automaton and the environment's MDP (both initially unknown), by treating the product MDP as a partially observable MDP and using the well-known Baum-Welch algorithm for learning hidden Markov models. Second, we propose a novel method for distilling the task automaton (assumed to be a deterministic finite automaton) from the learnt product MDP. Our learnt task automaton enables the decomposition of a task into its constituent sub-tasks, which improves the rate at which an RL agent can later synthesise an optimal policy. It also provides an interpretable encoding of high-level environmental and task features, so a human can readily verify that the agent has learnt coherent tasks with no misspecifications. In addition, we take steps towards ensuring that the learnt automaton is environment-agnostic, making it well-suited for use in transfer learning. Finally, we provide experimental results compared with two baselines to illustrate our algorithm's performance in different environments and tasks.
abstract_zh: 当环境具有稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励时，使用标量奖励信号训练强化学习（RL）代理通常是不可行的。此外，在训练之前手工设计这些奖励函数很容易出现错误指定，特别是当环境的动态仅部分已知时。本文提出了一种新颖的管道，用于从未知环境中的代理经验中学习非马尔可夫任务规范，作为简洁的有限状态“任务自动机”。我们利用两个关键的算法见解。首先，我们通过将产品 MDP 视为部分可观察 MDP 并使用著名的 Baum-Welch 算法来学习隐马尔可夫模型，来学习产品 MDP，这是由规范自动机和环境 MDP（两者最初都是未知的）组成的模型。其次，我们提出了一种从学习产品 MDP 中提取任务自动机（假设是确定性有限自动机）的新方法。我们学习的任务自动机能够将任务分解为其组成的子任务，从而提高 RL 代理随后合成最优策略的速度。它还提供了高级环境和任务特征的可解释编码，因此人类可以轻松验证代理是否已学习连贯的任务，而不会出现错误指定。此外，我们采取措施确保学习的自动机与环境无关，使其非常适合用于迁移学习。最后，我们提供了与两个基线进行比较的实验结果，以说明我们的算法在不同环境和任务中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐马尔可夫模型的强化学习任务自动机学习方法，解决稀疏非马尔可夫奖励环境下的策略合成问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在稀疏奖励和部分可观测环境中表现不佳，手动设计奖励函数易导致任务规范错误。
AI.method: 通过构建产品MDP并应用Baum-Welch算法学习HMM，再从产品MDP中提炼确定性有限自动机作为任务规范。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在多个环境中的策略合成效率优于基线方法，且能生成可解释的任务分解结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了环境无关的任务自动机学习，支持迁移学习并提供可验证的高层任务规范表示。

It also provides an interpretable encoding of high-level environmental and task features, so a human can readily verify that the agent has learnt coherent tasks with no misspecifications. In addition, we take steps towards ensuring that the learnt automaton is environment-agnostic, making it well-suited for use in transfer learning. Finally, we provide experimental results compared with two baselines to illustrate our algorithm's performance in different environments and tasks. 当环境具有稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励时，使用标量奖励信号训练强化学习（RL）代理通常是不可行的。此外，在训练之前手工设计这些奖励函数很容易出现错误指定，特别是当环境的动态仅部分已知时。本文提出了一种新颖的管道，用于从未知环境中的代理经验中学习非马尔可夫任务规范，作为简洁的有限状态“任务自动机”。我们利用两个关键的算法见解。首先，我们通过将产品 MDP 视为部分可观察 MDP 并使用著名的 Baum-Welch 算法来学习隐马尔可夫模型，来学习产品 MDP，这是由规范自动机和环境 MDP（两者最初都是未知的）组成的模型。其次，我们提出了一种从学习产品 MDP 中提取任务自动机（假设是确定性有限自动机）的新方法。我们学习的任务自动机能够将任务分解为其组成的子任务，从而提高 RL 代理随后合成最优策略的速度。它还提供了高级环境和任务特征的可解释编码，因此人类可以轻松验证代理是否已学习连贯的任务，而不会出现错误指定。此外，我们采取措施确保学习的自动机与环境无关，使其非常适合用于迁移学习。最后，我们提供了与两个基线进行比较的实验结果，以说明我们的算法在不同环境和任务中的性能。 本文提出一种基于隐马尔可夫模型的强化学习任务自动机学习方法，解决稀疏非马尔可夫奖励环境下的策略合成问题。 Alessandro Abate,Yousif Almulla,James Fox,David Hyland,Michael Wooldridge cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Polarimetric Inverse Rendering for Transparent Shapes Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于透明形状重建的偏振逆渲染
abstract: In this work, we propose a novel method for the detailed reconstruction of transparent objects by exploiting polarimetric cues. Most of the existing methods usually lack sufficient constraints and suffer from the over-smooth problem. Hence, we introduce polarization information as a complementary cue. We implicitly represent the object's geometry as a neural network, while the polarization render is capable of rendering the object's polarization images from the given shape and illumination configuration. Direct comparison of the rendered polarization images to the real-world captured images will have additional errors due to the transmission in the transparent object. To address this issue, the concept of reflection percentage which represents the proportion of the reflection component is introduced. The reflection percentage is calculated by a ray tracer and then used for weighting the polarization loss. We build a polarization dataset for multi-view transparent shapes reconstruction to verify our method. The experimental results show that our method is capable of recovering detailed shapes and improving the reconstruction quality of transparent objects. Our dataset and code will be publicly available at https://github.com/shaomq2187/TransPIR.
summary: In this work, we propose a novel method for the detailed reconstruction of transparent objects by exploiting polarimetric cues. Most of the existing methods usually lack sufficient constraints and suffer from the over-smooth problem. Hence, we introduce polarization information as a complementary cue. We implicitly represent the object's geometry as a neural network, while the polarization render is capable of rendering the object's polarization images from the given shape and illumination configuration. Direct comparison of the rendered polarization images to the real-world captured images will have additional errors due to the transmission in the transparent object. To address this issue, the concept of reflection percentage which represents the proportion of the reflection component is introduced. The reflection percentage is calculated by a ray tracer and then used for weighting the polarization loss. We build a polarization dataset for multi-view transparent shapes reconstruction to verify our method. The experimental results show that our method is capable of recovering detailed shapes and improving the reconstruction quality of transparent objects. Our dataset and code will be publicly available at https://github.com/shaomq2187/TransPIR.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用偏振线索来详细重建透明物体的新方法。大多数现有方法通常缺乏足够的约束并且存在过度平滑的问题。因此，我们引入极化信息作为补充线索。我们隐式地将对象的几何形状表示为神经网络，而偏振渲染能够根据给定的形状和照明配置渲染对象的偏振图像。由于透明物体中的传输，将渲染的偏振图像与真实世界捕获的图像直接比较会产生额外的误差。为了解决这个问题，引入了反射百分比的概念，它表示反射分量的比例。反射百分比由光线追踪器计算，然后用于对偏振损耗进行加权。我们构建了用于多视图透明形状重建的偏振数据集来验证我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法能够恢复详细的形状并提高透明物体的重建质量。我们的数据集和代码将在 https://github.com/shaomq2187/TransPIR 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用偏振信息进行透明物体细节重建的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有透明物体重建方法因缺乏约束条件导致过度平滑问题，需引入偏振信息作为补充线索。
AI.method: 通过神经网络隐式表示物体几何，结合偏振渲染与反射率计算，利用加权偏振损失优化重建过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效恢复透明物体细节，提升重建质量，并公开了数据集与代码。
AI.conclusion: 偏振线索与反射率权重机制显著改善透明形状重建效果，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Shoaib Meraj Sami,John McCauley,Sobhan Soleymani,Nasser Nasrabadi,Jeremy Dawson
title: Benchmarking Human Face Similarity Using Identical Twins
title_zh: 使用同卵双胞胎对人脸相似度进行基准测试
comment: 34 pages, 48 figures, Accepted in IET Biometrics Journal (5th August 2022)
comments: 34 pages, 48 figures, Accepted in IET Biometrics Journal (5th August 2022)
abstract: The problem of distinguishing identical twins and non-twin look-alikes in automated facial recognition (FR) applications has become increasingly important with the widespread adoption of facial biometrics. Due to the high facial similarity of both identical twins and look-alikes, these face pairs represent the hardest cases presented to facial recognition tools. This work presents an application of one of the largest twin datasets compiled to date to address two FR challenges: 1) determining a baseline measure of facial similarity between identical twins and 2) applying this similarity measure to determine the impact of doppelgangers, or look-alikes, on FR performance for large face datasets. The facial similarity measure is determined via a deep convolutional neural network. This network is trained on a tailored verification task designed to encourage the network to group together highly similar face pairs in the embedding space and achieves a test AUC of 0.9799. The proposed network provides a quantitative similarity score for any two given faces and has been applied to large-scale face datasets to identify similar face pairs. An additional analysis which correlates the comparison score returned by a facial recognition tool and the similarity score returned by the proposed network has also been performed.
summary: The problem of distinguishing identical twins and non-twin look-alikes in automated facial recognition (FR) applications has become increasingly important with the widespread adoption of facial biometrics. Due to the high facial similarity of both identical twins and look-alikes, these face pairs represent the hardest cases presented to facial recognition tools. This work presents an application of one of the largest twin datasets compiled to date to address two FR challenges: 1) determining a baseline measure of facial similarity between identical twins and 2) applying this similarity measure to determine the impact of doppelgangers, or look-alikes, on FR performance for large face datasets. The facial similarity measure is determined via a deep convolutional neural network. This network is trained on a tailored verification task designed to encourage the network to group together highly similar face pairs in the embedding space and achieves a test AUC of 0.9799. The proposed network provides a quantitative similarity score for any two given faces and has been applied to large-scale face datasets to identify similar face pairs. An additional analysis which correlates the comparison score returned by a facial recognition tool and the similarity score returned by the proposed network has also been performed.
abstract_zh: 随着面部生物识别技术的广泛采用，在自动面部识别（FR）应用中区分同卵双胞胎和非双胞胎的问题变得越来越重要。由于同卵双胞胎和相似双胞胎的面部相似度很高，这些面部对代表了面部识别工具最难的情况。这项工作提出了迄今为止编译的最大双胞胎数据集之一的应用，以解决两个 FR 挑战：1）确定同卵双胞胎之间面部相似性的基线测量，2）应用此相似性测量来确定分身或相似者对大型人脸数据集的 FR 性能的影响。面部相似性度量是通过深度卷积神经网络确定的。该网络接受了定制验证任务的训练，旨在鼓励网络将嵌入空间中高度相似的人脸对分组在一起，并实现 0.9799 的测试 AUC。所提出的网络为任意两个给定的人脸提供定量相似性评分，并已应用于大规模人脸数据集以识别相似的人脸对。还进行了一项附加分析，将面部识别工具返回的比较分数与所提出的网络返回的相似性分数相关联。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建大规模双胞胎数据集，研究人脸识别系统中区分双胞胎与非双胞胎相似面孔的基准问题，并评估‘替身’（相似面孔）对系统性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着人脸识别技术的广泛应用，区分双胞胎和高度相似的非双胞胎面孔成为系统性能的瓶颈，亟需建立量化相似性评估基准以提升识别鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计深度卷积神经网络，在定制的验证任务中训练模型以聚类高相似度人脸对，通过嵌入空间实现相似性评分，并在大规模数据集中验证其有效性。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到0.9799的AUC值，成功识别出大规模数据集中的相似面孔对，且与现有识别工具的评分结果具有显著相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该网络提供了可量化的面部相似性评估方法，揭示了双胞胎与替身对人脸识别系统的挑战性影响，为改进生物特征识别系统提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Akash Gokul,Konstantinos Kallidromitis,Shufan Li,Yusuke Kato,Kazuki Kozuka,Trevor Darrell,Colorado J Reed
title: Refine and Represent: Region-to-Object Representation Learning
title_zh: 细化和表示：区域到对象表示学习
abstract: Recent works in self-supervised learning have demonstrated strong performance on scene-level dense prediction tasks by pretraining with object-centric or region-based correspondence objectives. In this paper, we present Region-to-Object Representation Learning (R2O) which unifies region-based and object-centric pretraining. R2O operates by training an encoder to dynamically refine region-based segments into object-centric masks and then jointly learns representations of the contents within the mask. R2O uses a "region refinement module" to group small image regions, generated using a region-level prior, into larger regions which tend to correspond to objects by clustering region-level features. As pretraining progresses, R2O follows a region-to-object curriculum which encourages learning region-level features early on and gradually progresses to train object-centric representations. Representations learned using R2O lead to state-of-the art performance in semantic segmentation for PASCAL VOC (+0.7 mIOU) and Cityscapes (+0.4 mIOU) and instance segmentation on MS COCO (+0.3 mask AP). Further, after pretraining on ImageNet, R2O pretrained models are able to surpass existing state-of-the-art in unsupervised object segmentation on the Caltech-UCSD Birds 200-2011 dataset (+2.9 mIoU) without any further training. We provide the code/models from this work at https://github.com/KKallidromitis/r2o.
summary: Recent works in self-supervised learning have demonstrated strong performance on scene-level dense prediction tasks by pretraining with object-centric or region-based correspondence objectives. In this paper, we present Region-to-Object Representation Learning (R2O) which unifies region-based and object-centric pretraining. R2O operates by training an encoder to dynamically refine region-based segments into object-centric masks and then jointly learns representations of the contents within the mask. R2O uses a "region refinement module" to group small image regions, generated using a region-level prior, into larger regions which tend to correspond to objects by clustering region-level features. As pretraining progresses, R2O follows a region-to-object curriculum which encourages learning region-level features early on and gradually progresses to train object-centric representations. Representations learned using R2O lead to state-of-the art performance in semantic segmentation for PASCAL VOC (+0.7 mIOU) and Cityscapes (+0.4 mIOU) and instance segmentation on MS COCO (+0.3 mask AP). Further, after pretraining on ImageNet, R2O pretrained models are able to surpass existing state-of-the-art in unsupervised object segmentation on the Caltech-UCSD Birds 200-2011 dataset (+2.9 mIoU) without any further training. We provide the code/models from this work at https://github.com/KKallidromitis/r2o.
abstract_zh: 最近的自监督学习工作通过以对象为中心或基于区域的对应目标进行预训练，在场景级密集预测任务上表现出了强大的性能。在本文中，我们提出了区域到对象表示学习（R2O），它统一了基于区域和以对象为中心的预训练。 R2O 通过训练编码器来动态地将基于区域的片段细化为以对象为中心的掩模，然后共同学习掩模内内容的表示。 R2O 使用“区域细化模块”将使用区域级先验生成的小图像区域分组为较大的区域，这些区域往往通过聚类区域级特征来对应于对象。随着预训练的进行，R2O 遵循从区域到对象的课程，鼓励尽早学习区域级特征，并逐渐训练以对象为中心的表示。使用 R2O 学习的表示在 PASCAL VOC (+0.7 mIOU) 和 Cityscapes (+0.4 mIOU) 的语义分割以及 MS COCO (+0.3 mask AP) 上的实例分割方面实现了最先进的性能。此外，在 ImageNet 上进行预训练后，R2O 预训练模型能够在 Caltech-UCSD Birds 200-2011 数据集（+2.9 mIoU）上超越现有最先进的无监督对象分割，而无需任何进一步训练。我们在 https://github.com/KKallidromitis/r2o 上提供了这项工作的代码/模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一区域与对象预训练的表征学习方法R2O，通过动态细化区域分割并联合学习对象表征，显著提升了分割任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法需分别处理区域级和对象级预训练目标，缺乏统一框架。R2O旨在通过动态区域到对象的转换，实现更高效的表征学习。
AI.method: R2O包含区域细化模块，通过聚类区域特征生成对象掩码，并采用从区域到对象的课程学习策略，逐步优化表征学习过程。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC（+0.7 mIOU）、Cityscapes（+0.4 mIOU）、MS COCO（+0.3 mask AP）及Caltech-UCSD Birds数据集（+2.9 mIoU）上均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: R2O通过统一区域与对象预训练框架有效提升了分割任务表现，且预训练模型在无额外训练下即可超越现有方法，代码已开源。

search_text: Refine and Represent: Region-to-Object Representation Learning 细化和表示：区域到对象表示学习 Recent works in self-supervised learning have demonstrated strong performance on scene-level dense prediction tasks by pretraining with object-centric or region-based correspondence objectives. In this paper, we present Region-to-Object Representation Learning (R2O) which unifies region-based and object-centric pretraining. R2O operates by training an encoder to dynamically refine region-based segments into object-centric masks and then jointly learns representations of the contents within the mask. R2O uses a "region refinement module" to group small image regions, generated using a region-level prior, into larger regions which tend to correspond to objects by clustering region-level features. As pretraining progresses, R2O follows a region-to-object curriculum which encourages learning region-level features early on and gradually progresses to train object-centric representations. Representations learned using R2O lead to state-of-the art performance in semantic segmentation for PASCAL VOC (+0.7 mIOU) and Cityscapes (+0.4 mIOU) and instance segmentation on MS COCO (+0.3 mask AP). Further, after pretraining on ImageNet, R2O pretrained models are able to surpass existing state-of-the-art in unsupervised object segmentation on the Caltech-UCSD Birds 200-2011 dataset (+2.9 mIoU) without any further training. We provide the code/models from this work at https://github.com/KKallidromitis/r2o. 最近的自监督学习工作通过以对象为中心或基于区域的对应目标进行预训练，在场景级密集预测任务上表现出了强大的性能。在本文中，我们提出了区域到对象表示学习（R2O），它统一了基于区域和以对象为中心的预训练。 R2O 通过训练编码器来动态地将基于区域的片段细化为以对象为中心的掩模，然后共同学习掩模内内容的表示。 R2O 使用“区域细化模块”将使用区域级先验生成的小图像区域分组为较大的区域，这些区域往往通过聚类区域级特征来对应于对象。随着预训练的进行，R2O 遵循从区域到对象的课程，鼓励尽早学习区域级特征，并逐渐训练以对象为中心的表示。使用 R2O 学习的表示在 PASCAL VOC (+0.7 mIOU) 和 Cityscapes (+0.4 mIOU) 的语义分割以及 MS COCO (+0.3 mask AP) 上的实例分割方面实现了最先进的性能。此外，在 ImageNet 上进行预训练后，R2O 预训练模型能够在 Caltech-UCSD Birds 200-2011 数据集（+2.9 mIoU）上超越现有最先进的无监督对象分割，而无需任何进一步训练。我们在 https://github.com/KKallidromitis/r2o 上提供了这项工作的代码/模型。 本文提出了一种统一区域与对象预训练的表征学习方法R2O，通过动态细化区域分割并联合学习对象表征，显著提升了分割任务性能。 Akash Gokul,Konstantinos Kallidromitis,Shufan Li,Yusuke Kato,Kazuki Kozuka,Trevor Darrell,Colorado J Reed cs.CV

title: Skeleton Prototype Contrastive Learning with Multi-Level Graph Relation Modeling for Unsupervised Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于无监督人员重新识别的骨架原型对比学习与多级图关系建模
comment: Submitted to TPAMI in 2021. Pleliminary version of this work has been accepted for oral presentation at IJCAI 2021. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Kali-Hac/SPC-MGR
comments: Submitted to TPAMI in 2021. Pleliminary version of this work has been accepted for oral presentation at IJCAI 2021. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Kali-Hac/SPC-MGR
abstract: Person re-identification (re-ID) via 3D skeletons is an important emerging topic with many merits. Existing solutions rarely explore valuable body-component relations in skeletal structure or motion, and they typically lack the ability to learn general representations with unlabeled skeleton data for person re-ID. This paper proposes a generic unsupervised Skeleton Prototype Contrastive learning paradigm with Multi-level Graph Relation learning (SPC-MGR) to learn effective representations from unlabeled skeletons to perform person re-ID. Specifically, we first construct unified multi-level skeleton graphs to fully model body structure within skeletons. Then we propose a multi-head structural relation layer to comprehensively capture relations of physically-connected body-component nodes in graphs. A full-level collaborative relation layer is exploited to infer collaboration between motion-related body parts at various levels, so as to capture rich body features and recognizable walking patterns. Lastly, we propose a skeleton prototype contrastive learning scheme that clusters feature-correlative instances of unlabeled graph representations and contrasts their inherent similarity with representative skeleton features ("skeleton prototypes") to learn discriminative skeleton representations for person re-ID. Empirical evaluations show that SPC-MGR significantly outperforms several state-of-the-art skeleton-based methods, and it also achieves highly competitive person re-ID performance for more general scenarios.
summary: Person re-identification (re-ID) via 3D skeletons is an important emerging topic with many merits. Existing solutions rarely explore valuable body-component relations in skeletal structure or motion, and they typically lack the ability to learn general representations with unlabeled skeleton data for person re-ID. This paper proposes a generic unsupervised Skeleton Prototype Contrastive learning paradigm with Multi-level Graph Relation learning (SPC-MGR) to learn effective representations from unlabeled skeletons to perform person re-ID. Specifically, we first construct unified multi-level skeleton graphs to fully model body structure within skeletons. Then we propose a multi-head structural relation layer to comprehensively capture relations of physically-connected body-component nodes in graphs. A full-level collaborative relation layer is exploited to infer collaboration between motion-related body parts at various levels, so as to capture rich body features and recognizable walking patterns. Lastly, we propose a skeleton prototype contrastive learning scheme that clusters feature-correlative instances of unlabeled graph representations and contrasts their inherent similarity with representative skeleton features ("skeleton prototypes") to learn discriminative skeleton representations for person re-ID. Empirical evaluations show that SPC-MGR significantly outperforms several state-of-the-art skeleton-based methods, and it also achieves highly competitive person re-ID performance for more general scenarios.
abstract_zh: 通过 3D 骨骼进行人员重新识别 (re-ID) 是一个重要的新兴主题，具有许多优点。现有的解决方案很少探索骨骼结构或运动中有价值的身体组件关系，并且它们通常缺乏利用未标记的骨骼数据学习一般表示以进行人员重新识别的能力。本文提出了一种具有多级图关系学习（SPC-MGR）的通用无监督骨架原型对比学习范式，从未标记的骨架中学习有效的表示以执行人员重新识别。具体来说，我们首先构建统一的多级骨架图来完全模拟骨架内的身体结构。然后，我们提出了一个多头结构关系层来全面捕获图中物理连接的身体组件节点的关系。利用全层次的协作关系层来推断各个层次上与运动相关的身体部位之间的协作，从而捕获丰富的身体特征和可识别的行走模式。最后，我们提出了一种骨架原型对比学习方案，该方案对未标记图表示的特征相关实例进行聚类，并将其固有相似性与代表性骨架特征（“骨架原型”）进行对比，以学习用于人员重新识别的判别性骨架表示。实证评估表明，SPC-MGR 显着优于几种最先进的基于骨架的方法，并且在更一般的场景中也实现了极具竞争力的行人重识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于骨骼原型对比学习和多级图关系建模的无监督行人重识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有骨骼行人重识别方法未能充分挖掘骨骼结构及运动中的身体组件关系，且缺乏对未标记骨骼数据的通用表征学习能力。
AI.method: 构建多级骨骼图建模身体结构，设计多头结构关系层捕捉物理连接节点关系，利用全级协作关系层分析运动部件协作关系，并提出骨骼原型对比学习方案进行无监督表征学习。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上显著优于现有骨骼基方法，且在通用场景中表现具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多级图关系建模和对比学习有效提升了无监督骨骼行人重识别性能。

authors_text: Hallison Paz,Tiago Novello,Vinicius Silva,Luiz Schirmer,Guilherme Schardong,Fabio Chagas,Helio Lopes,Luiz Velho
title: Multiresolution Neural Networks for Imaging
title_zh: 用于成像的多分辨率神经网络
abstract: We present MR-Net, a general architecture for multiresolution neural networks, and a framework for imaging applications based on this architecture. Our coordinate-based networks are continuous both in space and in scale as they are composed of multiple stages that progressively add finer details. Besides that, they are a compact and efficient representation. We show examples of multiresolution image representation and applications to texturemagnification, minification, and antialiasing. This document is the extended version of the paper [PNS+22]. It includes additional material that would not fit the page limitations of the conference track for publication.
summary: We present MR-Net, a general architecture for multiresolution neural networks, and a framework for imaging applications based on this architecture. Our coordinate-based networks are continuous both in space and in scale as they are composed of multiple stages that progressively add finer details. Besides that, they are a compact and efficient representation. We show examples of multiresolution image representation and applications to texturemagnification, minification, and antialiasing. This document is the extended version of the paper [PNS+22]. It includes additional material that would not fit the page limitations of the conference track for publication.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MR-Net，一种多分辨率神经网络的通用架构，以及基于该架构的成像应用框架。我们基于坐标的网络在空间和规模上都是连续的，因为它们由多个阶段组成，这些阶段逐渐添加更精细的细节。除此之外，它们是一种紧凑且高效的表示形式。我们展示了多分辨率图像表示以及纹理放大、缩小和抗锯齿应用的示例。本文档是论文[PNS+22]的扩展版本。它包含不符合发布会议轨道页数限制的其他材料。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多分辨率神经网络架构MR-Net，并应用于图像处理任务，如纹理放大、缩小和抗锯齿。
AI.motivation: 解决传统图像处理方法在多分辨率任务中的不足，提供更高效、连续的表示方式。
AI.method: 提出基于坐标网络的MR-Net架构，通过多阶段逐步添加细节，实现空间和尺度上的连续性，形成紧凑高效的多分辨率表示。
AI.result: 展示了多分辨率图像表示在纹理放大、缩小和抗锯齿任务中的应用效果，并验证了其高效性。
AI.conclusion: MR-Net作为通用架构，在成像应用中表现出高效性，扩展了原有研究并补充了更多细节。

search_text: Multiresolution Neural Networks for Imaging 用于成像的多分辨率神经网络 We present MR-Net, a general architecture for multiresolution neural networks, and a framework for imaging applications based on this architecture. Our coordinate-based networks are continuous both in space and in scale as they are composed of multiple stages that progressively add finer details. Besides that, they are a compact and efficient representation. We show examples of multiresolution image representation and applications to texturemagnification, minification, and antialiasing. This document is the extended version of the paper [PNS+22]. It includes additional material that would not fit the page limitations of the conference track for publication. 我们提出了 MR-Net，一种多分辨率神经网络的通用架构，以及基于该架构的成像应用框架。我们基于坐标的网络在空间和规模上都是连续的，因为它们由多个阶段组成，这些阶段逐渐添加更精细的细节。除此之外，它们是一种紧凑且高效的表示形式。我们展示了多分辨率图像表示以及纹理放大、缩小和抗锯齿应用的示例。本文档是论文[PNS+22]的扩展版本。它包含不符合发布会议轨道页数限制的其他材料。 提出一种多分辨率神经网络架构MR-Net，并应用于图像处理任务，如纹理放大、缩小和抗锯齿。 Hallison Paz,Tiago Novello,Vinicius Silva,Luiz Schirmer,Guilherme Schardong,Fabio Chagas,Helio Lopes,Luiz Velho cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

title: Are We Making Progress In Visualization Research?
title_zh: 我们在可视化研究方面取得进展吗？
abstract: In this work, I use a survey of senior visualization researchers and thinkers to ideate about the notion of progress in visualization research: how are we growing as a field, what are we building towards, and are our existing methods sufficient to get us there? My respondents discussed several potential challenges for visualization research in terms of knowledge formation: a lack of rigor in the methods used, a lack of applicability to actual communities of practice, and a lack of theoretical structures that incorporate everything that happens to people and to data both before and after the few seconds when a viewer looks at a value in a chart. Orienting the field around progress (if such a thing is even desirable, which is another point of contention) I believe will require drastic re-conceptions of what the field is, what it values, and how it is taught.
summary: In this work, I use a survey of senior visualization researchers and thinkers to ideate about the notion of progress in visualization research: how are we growing as a field, what are we building towards, and are our existing methods sufficient to get us there? My respondents discussed several potential challenges for visualization research in terms of knowledge formation: a lack of rigor in the methods used, a lack of applicability to actual communities of practice, and a lack of theoretical structures that incorporate everything that happens to people and to data both before and after the few seconds when a viewer looks at a value in a chart. Orienting the field around progress (if such a thing is even desirable, which is another point of contention) I believe will require drastic re-conceptions of what the field is, what it values, and how it is taught.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我通过对高级可视化研究人员和思想家的调查来思考可视化研究进展的概念：我们作为一个领域如何发展，我们正在朝着什么方向发展，以及我们现有的方法是否足以实现这一目标？我的受访者讨论了可视化研究在知识形成方面的几个潜在挑战：所使用的方法缺乏严谨性，缺乏对实际实践社区的适用性，以及缺乏将观看者查看图表中的值之前和之后几秒钟发生在人和数据上的所有事情结合起来的理论结构。我认为，围绕进步来引导这个领域（如果这样的事情是可取的，这是另一个争论点），我认为需要对这个领域是什么、它的价值是什么以及它的教学方式进行彻底的重新概念。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查资深可视化研究者，探讨可视化研究领域在进步概念上的挑战及未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 反思可视化研究领域的进展，识别当前方法论和应用上的不足，并探讨如何重新定义该领域的目标和教学方式。
AI.method: 通过调查资深可视化研究人员和思想家，收集他们对进步概念、方法论挑战及未来方向的看法。
AI.result: 研究发现当前可视化研究面临方法论不严谨、实际应用不足及理论框架不完善等挑战，并指出需要重新思考领域定义和教学方法以推动进步。
AI.conclusion: 作者认为，若要推动可视化研究的进步，需彻底重构该领域的定义、核心价值及教学方法，以解决现有挑战。

authors_text: Jiezhang Cao,Qin Wang,Jingyun Liang,Yulun Zhang,Kai Zhang,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Learning Task-Oriented Flows to Mutually Guide Feature Alignment in Synthesized and Real Video Denoising
title_zh: 学习面向任务的流程以相互指导合成和真实视频去噪中的特征对齐
abstract: Video denoising aims at removing noise from videos to recover clean ones. Some existing works show that optical flow can help the denoising by exploiting the additional spatial-temporal clues from nearby frames. However, the flow estimation itself is also sensitive to noise, and can be unusable under large noise levels. To this end, we propose a new multi-scale refined optical flow-guided video denoising method, which is more robust to different noise levels. Our method mainly consists of a denoising-oriented flow refinement (DFR) module and a flow-guided mutual denoising propagation (FMDP) module. Unlike previous works that directly use off-the-shelf flow solutions, DFR first learns robust multi-scale optical flows, and FMDP makes use of the flow guidance by progressively introducing and refining more flow information from low resolution to high resolution. Together with real noise degradation synthesis, the proposed multi-scale flow-guided denoising network achieves state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic Gaussian denoising and real video denoising. The codes will be made publicly available.
summary: Video denoising aims at removing noise from videos to recover clean ones. Some existing works show that optical flow can help the denoising by exploiting the additional spatial-temporal clues from nearby frames. However, the flow estimation itself is also sensitive to noise, and can be unusable under large noise levels. To this end, we propose a new multi-scale refined optical flow-guided video denoising method, which is more robust to different noise levels. Our method mainly consists of a denoising-oriented flow refinement (DFR) module and a flow-guided mutual denoising propagation (FMDP) module. Unlike previous works that directly use off-the-shelf flow solutions, DFR first learns robust multi-scale optical flows, and FMDP makes use of the flow guidance by progressively introducing and refining more flow information from low resolution to high resolution. Together with real noise degradation synthesis, the proposed multi-scale flow-guided denoising network achieves state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic Gaussian denoising and real video denoising. The codes will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 视频去噪的目的是去除视频中的噪声，恢复干净的视频。一些现有的工作表明，光流可以通过利用附近帧的额外时空线索来帮助去噪。然而，流量估计本身对噪声也很敏感，并且在大噪声水平下可能无法使用。为此，我们提出了一种新的多尺度精细光流引导视频去噪方法，该方法对不同的噪声水平更加鲁棒。我们的方法主要由面向降噪的流细化（DFR）模块和流引导的相互降噪传播（FMDP）模块组成。与之前直接使用现成的流解决方案的工作不同，DFR 首先学习鲁棒的多尺度光流，而 FMDP 通过从低分辨率到高分辨率逐步引入和细化更多流信息来利用流引导。与真实噪声衰减合成相结合，所提出的多尺度流引导去噪网络在合成高斯去噪和真实视频去噪方面均实现了最先进的性能。这些代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度光流引导的视频去噪方法，通过优化光流估计和特征对齐来提升合成与真实视频的去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有光流估计方法在高噪声环境下表现不稳定，导致视频去噪效果受限，需开发更鲁棒的光流引导机制。
AI.method: 设计了去噪导向光流 refinement 模块（DFR）和光流引导互惠去噪传播模块（FMDP），通过多尺度光流学习与分辨率逐步细化实现特征对齐。
AI.result: 在合成高斯噪声和真实视频去噪任务中均达到最先进水平，代码将公开。
AI.conclusion: 通过任务导向的光流学习与双向特征传播，有效提升了不同噪声水平下的视频去噪性能。

title: A Simpler Proof that Pairing Heaps Take O(1) Amortized Time per Insertion
title_zh: 更简单的证明每次插入配对堆需要 O(1) 摊销时间
abstract: The pairing heap is a simple "self-adjusting" implementation of a heap (priority queue). Inserting an item into a pairing heap or decreasing the key of an item takes O(1) time worst-case, as does melding two heaps. But deleting an item of minimum key can take time linear in the heap size in the worst case. The paper that introduced the pairing heap proved an O(log n) amortized time bound for each heap operation, where n is the number of items in the heap or heaps involved in the operation, by charging all but O(log n) of the time for each deletion to non-deletion operations, O(log n) to each. Later Iacono found a way to reduce the amortized time per insertion to O(1) and that of meld to zero while preserving the O(log n) amortized time bound for the other update operations. We give a simpler proof of Iacono's result with significantly smaller constant factors. Our analysis uses the natural representation of pairing heaps instead of the conversion to a binary tree used in the original analysis and in Iacono's.
summary: The pairing heap is a simple "self-adjusting" implementation of a heap (priority queue). Inserting an item into a pairing heap or decreasing the key of an item takes O(1) time worst-case, as does melding two heaps. But deleting an item of minimum key can take time linear in the heap size in the worst case. The paper that introduced the pairing heap proved an O(log n) amortized time bound for each heap operation, where n is the number of items in the heap or heaps involved in the operation, by charging all but O(log n) of the time for each deletion to non-deletion operations, O(log n) to each. Later Iacono found a way to reduce the amortized time per insertion to O(1) and that of meld to zero while preserving the O(log n) amortized time bound for the other update operations. We give a simpler proof of Iacono's result with significantly smaller constant factors. Our analysis uses the natural representation of pairing heaps instead of the conversion to a binary tree used in the original analysis and in Iacono's.
abstract_zh: 配对堆是堆（优先级队列）的简单“自我调整”实现。在最坏情况下，将项目插入配对堆或减少项目的键需要 O(1) 时间，合并两个堆也是如此。但在最坏的情况下，删除最小键的项目可能会花费与堆大小成线性关系的时间。介绍配对堆的论文证明了每个堆操作的摊销时间界限为 O(log n)，其中 n 是操作中涉及的一个或多个堆中的项目数，通过将每次删除操作的除 O(log n) 时间之外的所有时间都计入非删除操作，每个非删除操作的时间为 O(log n)。后来 Iacono 找到了一种方法，可以将每次插入的摊余时间减少到 O(1)，并将融合时间减少到零，同时保留其他更新操作的 O(log n) 摊余时间范围。我们用明显更小的常数因子给出了 Iacono 结果的更简单的证明。我们的分析使用配对堆的自然表示，而不是转换为原始分析和 Iacono 中使用的二叉树。

AI.tldr: 本文提供了一种更简洁的证明，证明配对堆的插入操作在均摊时间复杂度下为O(1)。
AI.motivation: 配对堆作为一种高效的优先队列结构，其插入和合并操作的时间复杂度需进一步优化分析，以降低常数因子并简化证明过程。
AI.method: 采用配对堆的自然表示法，而非传统分析中转换为二叉树的方式，重新分析操作时间分配。
AI.result: 在保持其他操作O(log n)均摊时间复杂度的前提下，简化了插入操作的证明并显著减小了常数因子。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为配对堆的理论分析提供了更高效、直观的证明途径，提升了算法分析的简洁性与实用性。

authors_text: Shizhe Chen,Pierre-Louis Guhur,Makarand Tapaswi,Cordelia Schmid,Ivan Laptev
title: Learning from Unlabeled 3D Environments for Vision-and-Language Navigation
title_zh: 从未标记的 3D 环境中学习以实现视觉和语言导航
abstract: In vision-and-language navigation (VLN), an embodied agent is required to navigate in realistic 3D environments following natural language instructions. One major bottleneck for existing VLN approaches is the lack of sufficient training data, resulting in unsatisfactory generalization to unseen environments. While VLN data is typically collected manually, such an approach is expensive and prevents scalability. In this work, we address the data scarcity issue by proposing to automatically create a large-scale VLN dataset from 900 unlabeled 3D buildings from HM3D. We generate a navigation graph for each building and transfer object predictions from 2D to generate pseudo 3D object labels by cross-view consistency. We then fine-tune a pretrained language model using pseudo object labels as prompts to alleviate the cross-modal gap in instruction generation. Our resulting HM3D-AutoVLN dataset is an order of magnitude larger than existing VLN datasets in terms of navigation environments and instructions. We experimentally demonstrate that HM3D-AutoVLN significantly increases the generalization ability of resulting VLN models. On the SPL metric, our approach improves over state of the art by 7.1% and 8.1% on the unseen validation splits of REVERIE and SOON datasets respectively.
summary: In vision-and-language navigation (VLN), an embodied agent is required to navigate in realistic 3D environments following natural language instructions. One major bottleneck for existing VLN approaches is the lack of sufficient training data, resulting in unsatisfactory generalization to unseen environments. While VLN data is typically collected manually, such an approach is expensive and prevents scalability. In this work, we address the data scarcity issue by proposing to automatically create a large-scale VLN dataset from 900 unlabeled 3D buildings from HM3D. We generate a navigation graph for each building and transfer object predictions from 2D to generate pseudo 3D object labels by cross-view consistency. We then fine-tune a pretrained language model using pseudo object labels as prompts to alleviate the cross-modal gap in instruction generation. Our resulting HM3D-AutoVLN dataset is an order of magnitude larger than existing VLN datasets in terms of navigation environments and instructions. We experimentally demonstrate that HM3D-AutoVLN significantly increases the generalization ability of resulting VLN models. On the SPL metric, our approach improves over state of the art by 7.1% and 8.1% on the unseen validation splits of REVERIE and SOON datasets respectively.
abstract_zh: 在视觉和语言导航 (VLN) 中，实体代理需要按照自然语言指令在真实的 3D 环境中进行导航。现有 VLN 方法的一个主要瓶颈是缺乏足够的训练数据，导致对未见过的环境的泛化效果不理想。虽然 VLN 数据通常是手动收集的，但这种方法成本高昂并且阻碍了可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们建议从 HM3D 的 900 个未标记的 3D 建筑物自动创建大规模 VLN 数据集，从而解决数据稀缺问题。我们为每个建筑物生成一个导航图，并从 2D 传输对象预测，通过跨视图一致性生成伪 3D 对象标签。然后，我们使用伪对象标签作为提示来微调预训练的语言模型，以减轻指令生成中的跨模式差距。我们生成的 HM3D-AutoVLN 数据集在导航环境和指令方面比现有 VLN 数据集大一个数量级。我们通过实验证明 HM3D-AutoVLN 显着提高了 VLN 模型的泛化能力。在 SPL 指标上，我们的方法在 REVERIE 和 SOON 数据集的未见验证分割上分别比现有技术提高了 7.1% 和 8.1%。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过自动构建大规模未标记3D环境数据集，提升视觉与语言导航（VLN）模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN方法因训练数据不足导致模型在新环境中泛化能力差，而人工数据收集成本高且不可扩展，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 从HM3D的900个未标记3D建筑中生成导航图，通过跨视角一致性将2D物体预测迁移至3D生成伪标签，并利用伪标签微调预训练语言模型以缩小模态差距。
AI.result: HM3D-AutoVLN数据集规模比现有数据集大一个数量级，在REVERIE和SOON数据集的未见验证集上分别提升SPL指标7.1%和8.1%。
AI.conclusion: 自动构建大规模3D-VLN数据集有效缓解了数据稀缺问题，显著提升了模型的跨环境泛化能力与导航性能。

title: Comprehensive Dataset of Face Manipulations for Development and Evaluation of Forensic Tools
title_zh: 用于开发和评估取证工具的面部操作综合数据集
abstract: Digital media (e.g., photographs, video) can be easily created, edited, and shared. Tools for editing digital media are capable of doing so while also maintaining a high degree of photo-realism. While many types of edits to digital media are generally benign, others can also be applied for malicious purposes. State-of-the-art face editing tools and software can, for example, artificially make a person appear to be smiling at an inopportune time, or depict authority figures as frail and tired in order to discredit individuals. Given the increasing ease of editing digital media and the potential risks from misuse, a substantial amount of effort has gone into media forensics. To this end, we created a challenge dataset of edited facial images to assist the research community in developing novel approaches to address and classify the authenticity of digital media. Our dataset includes edits applied to controlled, portrait-style frontal face images and full-scene in-the-wild images that may include multiple (i.e., more than one) face per image. The goals of our dataset is to address the following challenge questions: (1) Can we determine the authenticity of a given image (edit detection)? (2) If an image has been edited, can we \textit{localize} the edit region? (3) If an image has been edited, can we deduce (classify) what edit type was performed? The majority of research in image forensics generally attempts to answer item (1), detection. To the best of our knowledge, there are no formal datasets specifically curated to evaluate items (2) and (3), localization and classification, respectively. Our hope is that our prepared evaluation protocol will assist researchers in improving the state-of-the-art in image forensics as they pertain to these challenges.

Tools for editing digital media are capable of doing so while also maintaining a high degree of photo-realism. While many types of edits to digital media are generally benign, others can also be applied for malicious purposes. Given the increasing ease of editing digital media and the potential risks from misuse, a substantial amount of effort has gone into media forensics. Our dataset includes edits applied to controlled, portrait-style frontal face images and full-scene in-the-wild images that may include multiple (i.e., more than one) face per image. (2) If an image has been edited, can we \textit{localize} the edit region? (3) If an image has been edited, can we deduce (classify) what edit type was performed? The majority of research in image forensics generally attempts to answer item (1), detection. abstract_zh: 数字媒体（例如照片、视频）可以轻松创建、编辑和共享。用于编辑数字媒体的工具能够做到这一点，同时还保持高度的照片真实感。虽然对数字媒体的许多类型的编辑通常是良性的，但其他类型的编辑也可能被用于恶意目的。例如，最先进的面部编辑工具和软件可以人为地使一个人看起来在不合时宜的时候微笑，或者将权威人物描绘成虚弱和疲惫的形象，以抹黑个人。鉴于编辑数字媒体变得越来越容易以及滥用的潜在风险，人们在媒体取证方面投入了大量精力。为此，我们创建了一个经过编辑的面部图像的挑战数据集，以帮助研究界开发新的方法来解决和分类数字媒体的真实性。我们的数据集包括应用于受控肖像式正面图像和全场景野外图像的编辑，其中每张图像可能包含多个（即多个）脸部。我们数据集的目标是解决以下挑战问题：（1）我们能否确定给定图像的真实性（编辑检测）？ (2) 如果图像被编辑过，我们可以\textit{本地化}编辑区域吗？ （3）如果图像被编辑过，我们可以推断（分类）执行了什么编辑类型吗？图像取证的大多数研究通常试图回答第 (1) 项：检测。据我们所知，没有专门设计的正式数据集来分别评估项目（2）和（3）、本地化和分类。我们希望我们准备的评估方案能够帮助研究人员提高图像取证领域的最新技术，以应对这些挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文创建了一个包含人脸篡改图像的综合数据集，用于开发和评估数字媒体取证工具，解决篡改检测、定位和分类三大挑战。
AI.motivation: 数字媒体篡改技术日益成熟且存在恶意使用风险，现有研究主要聚焦篡改检测，缺乏针对篡改区域定位和编辑类型分类的评估数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含控制条件正面人脸图像和真实场景多面孔图像的数据集，涵盖多种人脸编辑类型，并设计对应的评估协议。
AI.result: 提供了首个专门用于评估篡改定位和分类的基准数据集，填补了该领域研究空白，为后续算法开发提供测试资源。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集有望推动图像取证领域在篡改定位与分类方向的技术进步，促进更全面的媒体真实性验证方法研究。

search_text: Comprehensive Dataset of Face Manipulations for Development and Evaluation of Forensic Tools 用于开发和评估取证工具的面部操作综合数据集 Digital media (e.g., photographs, video) can be easily created, edited, and shared. Tools for editing digital media are capable of doing so while also maintaining a high degree of photo-realism. While many types of edits to digital media are generally benign, others can also be applied for malicious purposes. State-of-the-art face editing tools and software can, for example, artificially make a person appear to be smiling at an inopportune time, or depict authority figures as frail and tired in order to discredit individuals. Given the increasing ease of editing digital media and the potential risks from misuse, a substantial amount of effort has gone into media forensics. To this end, we created a challenge dataset of edited facial images to assist the research community in developing novel approaches to address and classify the authenticity of digital media. Our dataset includes edits applied to controlled, portrait-style frontal face images and full-scene in-the-wild images that may include multiple (i.e., more than one) face per image. The goals of our dataset is to address the following challenge questions: (1) Can we determine the authenticity of a given image (edit detection)? (2) If an image has been edited, can we \textit{localize} the edit region? (3) If an image has been edited, can we deduce (classify) what edit type was performed? The majority of research in image forensics generally attempts to answer item (1), detection. To the best of our knowledge, there are no formal datasets specifically curated to evaluate items (2) and (3), localization and classification, respectively. Our hope is that our prepared evaluation protocol will assist researchers in improving the state-of-the-art in image forensics as they pertain to these challenges. 数字媒体（例如照片、视频）可以轻松创建、编辑和共享。用于编辑数字媒体的工具能够做到这一点，同时还保持高度的照片真实感。虽然对数字媒体的许多类型的编辑通常是良性的，但其他类型的编辑也可能被用于恶意目的。例如，最先进的面部编辑工具和软件可以人为地使一个人看起来在不合时宜的时候微笑，或者将权威人物描绘成虚弱和疲惫的形象，以抹黑个人。鉴于编辑数字媒体变得越来越容易以及滥用的潜在风险，人们在媒体取证方面投入了大量精力。为此，我们创建了一个经过编辑的面部图像的挑战数据集，以帮助研究界开发新的方法来解决和分类数字媒体的真实性。我们的数据集包括应用于受控肖像式正面图像和全场景野外图像的编辑，其中每张图像可能包含多个（即多个）脸部。我们数据集的目标是解决以下挑战问题：（1）我们能否确定给定图像的真实性（编辑检测）？ (2) 如果图像被编辑过，我们可以\textit{本地化}编辑区域吗？ （3）如果图像被编辑过，我们可以推断（分类）执行了什么编辑类型吗？图像取证的大多数研究通常试图回答第 (1) 项：检测。据我们所知，没有专门设计的正式数据集来分别评估项目（2）和（3）、本地化和分类。我们希望我们准备的评估方案能够帮助研究人员提高图像取证领域的最新技术，以应对这些挑战。 本文创建了一个包含人脸篡改图像的综合数据集，用于开发和评估数字媒体取证工具，解决篡改检测、定位和分类三大挑战。 Brian DeCann,Kirill Trapeznikov cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Josef Spjut,Arjun Madhusudan,Benjamin Watson,Ben Boudaoud,Joohwan Kim
title: The Esports Frontier: Rendering for Competitive Games
title_zh: 电子竞技前沿：竞技游戏渲染
comment: 3 pages, 1 figure, Abstract of talk presented at SIGGRAPH Frontiers esports workshop in 2022
comments: 3 pages, 1 figure, Abstract of talk presented at SIGGRAPH Frontiers esports workshop in 2022
abstract: Real-time graphics is commonly thought of as anything exceeding about 30 fps, where the interactivity of the application becomes fluid enough for high rates of interaction. Inspired by esports and competitive gaming, where players regularly exceed the threshold for real-time by 10x (esports displays commonly reach 360 Hz or beyond), this talk begins the exploration of how rendering has the opportunity to evolve beyond the current state of focus on either image quality or frame rate. Esports gamers regularly decline nearly all options for increased image quality in exchange for maximum frame rates. However, there remains a distinct opportunity to move beyond the focus on video as a sequence of images and instead rethink the pipeline for more continuous updates.
summary: Real-time graphics is commonly thought of as anything exceeding about 30 fps, where the interactivity of the application becomes fluid enough for high rates of interaction. Inspired by esports and competitive gaming, where players regularly exceed the threshold for real-time by 10x (esports displays commonly reach 360 Hz or beyond), this talk begins the exploration of how rendering has the opportunity to evolve beyond the current state of focus on either image quality or frame rate. Esports gamers regularly decline nearly all options for increased image quality in exchange for maximum frame rates. However, there remains a distinct opportunity to move beyond the focus on video as a sequence of images and instead rethink the pipeline for more continuous updates.
abstract_zh: 实时图形通常被认为是任何超过 30 fps 的图形，其中应用程序的交互性变得足够流畅，足以实现高交互率。受到电子竞技和竞技游戏的启发，玩家经常超过实时阈值 10 倍（电子竞技显示器通常达到 360 Hz 或更高），本演讲开始探索渲染如何有机会超越当前对图像质量或帧速率的关注状态。电子竞技游戏玩家经常拒绝几乎所有提高图像质量的选项，以换取最大帧速率。然而，仍然存在一个明显的机会，可以超越对视频作为图像序列的关注，而是重新考虑更连续更新的管道。

AI.tldr: 探讨在电竞领域中，如何超越传统图像质量与帧率的平衡，重新设计渲染管线以实现更连续的更新。
AI.motivation: 电竞游戏对高帧率的极端需求促使研究者重新思考传统渲染技术的局限性，探索更高效的实时图形处理方法。
AI.method: 通过分析电竞游戏对高帧率的需求，研究现有渲染技术的瓶颈，并提出新的渲染框架以实现更连续的更新。
AI.result: 初步提出了一个重新设计的渲染管线概念，为高帧率下的实时图形处理提供了新方向。
AI.conclusion: 传统渲染技术需突破图像质量与帧率的单一追求，向更连续的更新机制演进，以满足电竞领域的高帧率需求。

authors_text: Tahir Javed,Kaushal Santosh Bhogale,Abhigyan Raman,Anoop Kunchukuttan,Pratyush Kumar,Mitesh M. Khapra
title: IndicSUPERB: A Speech Processing Universal Performance Benchmark for Indian languages
title_zh: IndicSUPERB：印度语言的语音处理通用性能基准
abstract: A cornerstone in AI research has been the creation and adoption of standardized training and test datasets to earmark the progress of state-of-the-art models. A particularly successful example is the GLUE dataset for training and evaluating Natural Language Understanding (NLU) models for English. The large body of research around self-supervised BERT-based language models revolved around performance improvements on NLU tasks in GLUE. To evaluate language models in other languages, several language-specific GLUE datasets were created. The area of speech language understanding (SLU) has followed a similar trajectory. The success of large self-supervised models such as wav2vec2 enable creation of speech models with relatively easy to access unlabelled data. These models can then be evaluated on SLU tasks, such as the SUPERB benchmark. In this work, we extend this to Indic languages by releasing the IndicSUPERB benchmark. Specifically, we make the following three contributions. (i) We collect Kathbath containing 1,684 hours of labelled speech data across 12 Indian languages from 1,218 contributors located in 203 districts in India. (ii) Using Kathbath, we create benchmarks across 6 speech tasks: Automatic Speech Recognition, Speaker Verification, Speaker Identification (mono/multi), Language Identification, Query By Example, and Keyword Spotting for 12 languages. (iii) On the released benchmarks, we train and evaluate different self-supervised models alongside a commonly used baseline FBANK. We show that language-specific fine-tuned models are more accurate than baseline on most of the tasks, including a large gap of 76\% for the Language Identification task. However, for speaker identification, self-supervised models trained on large datasets demonstrate an advantage. We hope IndicSUPERB contributes to the progress of developing speech language understanding models for Indian languages.
summary: A cornerstone in AI research has been the creation and adoption of standardized training and test datasets to earmark the progress of state-of-the-art models. A particularly successful example is the GLUE dataset for training and evaluating Natural Language Understanding (NLU) models for English. The large body of research around self-supervised BERT-based language models revolved around performance improvements on NLU tasks in GLUE. To evaluate language models in other languages, several language-specific GLUE datasets were created. The area of speech language understanding (SLU) has followed a similar trajectory. The success of large self-supervised models such as wav2vec2 enable creation of speech models with relatively easy to access unlabelled data. These models can then be evaluated on SLU tasks, such as the SUPERB benchmark. In this work, we extend this to Indic languages by releasing the IndicSUPERB benchmark. Specifically, we make the following three contributions. (i) We collect Kathbath containing 1,684 hours of labelled speech data across 12 Indian languages from 1,218 contributors located in 203 districts in India. (ii) Using Kathbath, we create benchmarks across 6 speech tasks: Automatic Speech Recognition, Speaker Verification, Speaker Identification (mono/multi), Language Identification, Query By Example, and Keyword Spotting for 12 languages. (iii) On the released benchmarks, we train and evaluate different self-supervised models alongside a commonly used baseline FBANK. We show that language-specific fine-tuned models are more accurate than baseline on most of the tasks, including a large gap of 76\% for the Language Identification task. However, for speaker identification, self-supervised models trained on large datasets demonstrate an advantage. We hope IndicSUPERB contributes to the progress of developing speech language understanding models for Indian languages.
abstract_zh: 人工智能研究的基石是创建和采用标准化训练和测试数据集，以指定最先进模型的进展。一个特别成功的例子是用于训练和评估英语自然语言理解 (NLU) 模型的 GLUE 数据集。围绕基于 BERT 的自监督语言模型的大量研究都围绕着 GLUE 中 NLU 任务的性能改进。为了评估其他语言的语言模型，创建了多个特定语言的 GLUE 数据集。语音语言理解 (SLU) 领域也遵循类似的轨迹。 wav2vec2 等大型自监督模型的成功使得能够创建相对容易访问未标记数据的语音模型。然后可以在 SLU 任务（例如 SUPERB 基准）上评估这些模型。在这项工作中，我们通过发布 IndicSUPERB 基准将其扩展到印度语言。具体来说，我们做出以下三点贡献。 (i) 我们收集了 Kathbath，其中包含来自印度 203 个地区 1,218 名贡献者的 1,684 小时带标签语音数据，涉及 12 种印度语言。 (ii) 使用 Kathbath，我们为 6 种语音任务创建了基准：自动语音识别、说话人验证、说话人识别（单/多）、语言识别、示例查询和 12 种语言的关键字识别。 (iii) 在已发布的基准上，我们与常用的基线 FBANK 一起训练和评估不同的自监督模型。我们表明，在大多数任务上，针对特定语言的微调模型比基线更准确，其中语言识别任务的准确率高达 76%。然而，对于说话人识别，在大型数据集上训练的自监督模型表现出了优势。我们希望 IndicSUPERB 为印度语言语音理解模型的开发进步做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IndicSUPERB，一个针对印度语言的语音处理通用性能基准，包含12种印度语言的语音数据集和六个语音任务的评估基准。
AI.motivation: 现有语音语言理解模型缺乏针对印度语言的标准化测试基准，而类似GLUE的英语NLU基准已显著推动模型发展，需建立多语言语音基准以促进印度语言模型研究。
AI.method: 收集包含1,684小时标注语音数据的Kathbath数据集，覆盖12种印度语言；基于该数据集构建6个语音任务（如语音识别、说话人验证等）的基准，并训练评估自监督模型与FBANK基线。
AI.result: 语言特定微调模型在多数任务中优于基线，语言识别任务差距达76%；自监督模型在说话人识别任务中展现优势。
AI.conclusion: IndicSUPERB为印度语言语音语言理解模型的研究提供了标准化基准，有望推动相关技术进步。

search_text: IndicSUPERB: A Speech Processing Universal Performance Benchmark for Indian languages IndicSUPERB：印度语言的语音处理通用性能基准 A cornerstone in AI research has been the creation and adoption of standardized training and test datasets to earmark the progress of state-of-the-art models. A particularly successful example is the GLUE dataset for training and evaluating Natural Language Understanding (NLU) models for English. The large body of research around self-supervised BERT-based language models revolved around performance improvements on NLU tasks in GLUE. To evaluate language models in other languages, several language-specific GLUE datasets were created. The area of speech language understanding (SLU) has followed a similar trajectory. The success of large self-supervised models such as wav2vec2 enable creation of speech models with relatively easy to access unlabelled data. These models can then be evaluated on SLU tasks, such as the SUPERB benchmark. In this work, we extend this to Indic languages by releasing the IndicSUPERB benchmark. Specifically, we make the following three contributions. (i) We collect Kathbath containing 1,684 hours of labelled speech data across 12 Indian languages from 1,218 contributors located in 203 districts in India. (ii) Using Kathbath, we create benchmarks across 6 speech tasks: Automatic Speech Recognition, Speaker Verification, Speaker Identification (mono/multi), Language Identification, Query By Example, and Keyword Spotting for 12 languages. (iii) On the released benchmarks, we train and evaluate different self-supervised models alongside a commonly used baseline FBANK. We show that language-specific fine-tuned models are more accurate than baseline on most of the tasks, including a large gap of 76\% for the Language Identification task. However, for speaker identification, self-supervised models trained on large datasets demonstrate an advantage. We hope IndicSUPERB contributes to the progress of developing speech language understanding models for Indian languages. 人工智能研究的基石是创建和采用标准化训练和测试数据集，以指定最先进模型的进展。一个特别成功的例子是用于训练和评估英语自然语言理解 (NLU) 模型的 GLUE 数据集。围绕基于 BERT 的自监督语言模型的大量研究都围绕着 GLUE 中 NLU 任务的性能改进。为了评估其他语言的语言模型，创建了多个特定语言的 GLUE 数据集。语音语言理解 (SLU) 领域也遵循类似的轨迹。 wav2vec2 等大型自监督模型的成功使得能够创建相对容易访问未标记数据的语音模型。然后可以在 SLU 任务（例如 SUPERB 基准）上评估这些模型。在这项工作中，我们通过发布 IndicSUPERB 基准将其扩展到印度语言。具体来说，我们做出以下三点贡献。 (i) 我们收集了 Kathbath，其中包含来自印度 203 个地区 1,218 名贡献者的 1,684 小时带标签语音数据，涉及 12 种印度语言。 (ii) 使用 Kathbath，我们为 6 种语音任务创建了基准：自动语音识别、说话人验证、说话人识别（单/多）、语言识别、示例查询和 12 种语言的关键字识别。 (iii) 在已发布的基准上，我们与常用的基线 FBANK 一起训练和评估不同的自监督模型。我们表明，在大多数任务上，针对特定语言的微调模型比基线更准确，其中语言识别任务的准确率高达 76%。然而，对于说话人识别，在大型数据集上训练的自监督模型表现出了优势。我们希望 IndicSUPERB 为印度语言语音理解模型的开发进步做出贡献。 本文提出IndicSUPERB，一个针对印度语言的语音处理通用性能基准，包含12种印度语言的语音数据集和六个语音任务的评估基准。 Tahir Javed,Kaushal Santosh Bhogale,Abhigyan Raman,Anoop Kunchukuttan,Pratyush Kumar,Mitesh M. Khapra cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: AI-coupled HPC Workflows
title_zh: AI 耦合 HPC 工作流程
abstract: Increasingly, scientific discovery requires sophisticated and scalable workflows. Workflows have become the ``new applications,'' wherein multi-scale computing campaigns comprise multiple and heterogeneous executable tasks. In particular, the introduction of AI/ML models into the traditional HPC workflows has been an enabler of highly accurate modeling, typically reducing computational needs compared to traditional methods. This chapter discusses various modes of integrating AI/ML models to HPC computations, resulting in diverse types of AI-coupled HPC workflows. The increasing need of coupling AI/ML and HPC across scientific domains is motivated, and then exemplified by a number of production-grade use cases for each mode. We additionally discuss the primary challenges of extreme-scale AI-coupled HPC campaigns -- task heterogeneity, adaptivity, performance -- and several framework and middleware solutions which aim to address them. While both HPC workflow and AI/ML computing paradigms are independently effective, we highlight how their integration, and ultimate convergence, is leading to significant improvements in scientific performance across a range of domains, ultimately resulting in scientific explorations otherwise unattainable.

In particular, the introduction of AI/ML models into the traditional HPC workflows has been an enabler of highly accurate modeling, typically reducing computational needs compared to traditional methods. We additionally discuss the primary challenges of extreme-scale AI-coupled HPC campaigns -- task heterogeneity, adaptivity, performance -- and several framework and middleware solutions which aim to address them. While both HPC workflow and AI/ML computing paradigms are independently effective, we highlight how their integration, and ultimate convergence, is leading to significant improvements in scientific performance across a range of domains, ultimately resulting in scientific explorations otherwise unattainable.
abstract_zh: 科学发现越来越需要复杂且可扩展的工作流程。工作流已成为“新应用程序”，其中多规模计算活动包含多个异构可执行任务。特别是，将 AI/ML 模型引入传统 HPC 工作流程已成为高精度建模的推动者，与传统方法相比，通常会减少计算需求。本章讨论将 AI/ML 模型集成到 HPC 计算的各种模式，从而产生各种类型的 AI 耦合 HPC 工作流程。跨科学领域耦合 AI/ML 和 HPC 的需求日益增长，每种模式的许多生产级用例都得到了例证。我们还讨论了超大规模人工智能耦合 HPC 活动的主要挑战——任务异构性、适应性、性能——以及旨在解决这些问题的几种框架和中间件解决方案。虽然 HPC 工作流程和 AI/ML 计算范式都是独立有效的，但我们强调它们的集成和最终融合如何导致一系列领域的科学性能显着提高，最终导致其他方式无法实现的科学探索。

AI.tldr: 探讨AI与HPC工作流程的集成模式、应用案例及挑战
AI.motivation: 科学发现需要更高效的工作流程，AI/ML的引入能提升准确性并减少计算需求，推动跨领域应用
AI.method: 分析多种AI-HPC集成模式，通过生产案例验证，并探讨框架和中间件解决方案
AI.result: 显著提升多领域科学性能，实现传统方法无法达到的探索
AI.conclusion: HPC与AI/ML的融合是科学计算的重要方向，有效解决复杂问题并推动跨学科发展
