authors_text: Aline Weber,Blossom Metevier,Yuriy Brun,Philip S. Thomas,Bruno Castro da Silva
title: Enforcing Delayed-Impact Fairness Guarantees
title_zh: 执行延迟影响公平保证
abstract: Recent research has shown that seemingly fair machine learning models, when used to inform decisions that have an impact on peoples' lives or well-being (e.g., applications involving education, employment, and lending), can inadvertently increase social inequality in the long term. This is because prior fairness-aware algorithms only consider static fairness constraints, such as equal opportunity or demographic parity. However, enforcing constraints of this type may result in models that have negative long-term impact on disadvantaged individuals and communities. We introduce ELF (Enforcing Long-term Fairness), the first classification algorithm that provides high-confidence fairness guarantees in terms of long-term, or delayed, impact. We prove that the probability that ELF returns an unfair solution is less than a user-specified tolerance and that (under mild assumptions), given sufficient training data, ELF is able to find and return a fair solution if one exists. We show experimentally that our algorithm can successfully mitigate long-term unfairness.
summary: Recent research has shown that seemingly fair machine learning models, when used to inform decisions that have an impact on peoples' lives or well-being (e.g., applications involving education, employment, and lending), can inadvertently increase social inequality in the long term. This is because prior fairness-aware algorithms only consider static fairness constraints, such as equal opportunity or demographic parity. However, enforcing constraints of this type may result in models that have negative long-term impact on disadvantaged individuals and communities. We introduce ELF (Enforcing Long-term Fairness), the first classification algorithm that provides high-confidence fairness guarantees in terms of long-term, or delayed, impact. We prove that the probability that ELF returns an unfair solution is less than a user-specified tolerance and that (under mild assumptions), given sufficient training data, ELF is able to find and return a fair solution if one exists. We show experimentally that our algorithm can successfully mitigate long-term unfairness.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，看似公平的机器学习模型，当用于为影响人们生活或福祉的决策（例如涉及教育、就业和贷款的应用）提供信息时，从长远来看可能会无意中加剧社会不平等。这是因为先前的公平感知算法仅考虑静态公平约束，例如机会均等或人口平等。然而，强制实施此类限制可能会导致模型对弱势个人和社区产生长期负面影响。我们引入了 ELF（强制长期公平），这是第一个在长期或延迟影响方面提供高可信度公平保证的分类算法。我们证明，ELF 返回不公平解决方案的概率小于用户指定的容差，并且（在温和的假设下），如果有足够的训练数据，ELF 能够找到并返回公平解决方案（如果存在）。我们通过实验证明我们的算法可以成功减轻长期不公平现象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELF算法，解决机器学习模型在长期使用中可能加剧社会不平等的问题，提供长期公平性保障。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性算法仅考虑静态约束（如平等机会），可能因忽略长期影响而对弱势群体造成持续负面影响，需开发能保证长期公平性的方法。
AI.method: 设计ELF算法，通过概率证明其返回不公平解的概率低于用户设定阈值，并在数据充足时能找到公平解。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法能有效缓解长期不公平问题，验证了其在实际场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: ELF是首个提供长期公平性保证的分类算法，在满足数据条件时可可靠找到公平解，为公平性研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Ruochen Yin,Huapeng Wu,Ming Li,Yong Cheng,Yuntao Song,Heikki Handroos
title: Mastering Autonomous Assembly in Fusion Application with Learning-by-doing: a Peg-in-hole Study
title_zh: 通过边做边学掌握融合应用中的自主装配：一项钉孔研究
abstract: Robotic peg-in-hole assembly represents a critical area of investigation in robotic automation. The fusion of reinforcement learning (RL) and deep neural networks (DNNs) has yielded remarkable breakthroughs in this field. However, existing RL-based methods grapple with delivering optimal performance under the unique environmental and mission constraints of fusion applications. As a result, we propose an inventively designed RL-based approach. In contrast to alternative methods, our focus centers on enhancing the DNN architecture rather than the RL model. Our strategy receives and integrates data from the RGB camera and force/torque (F/T) sensor, training the agent to execute the peg-in-hole assembly task in a manner akin to human hand-eye coordination. All training and experimentation unfold within a realistic environment, and empirical outcomes demonstrate that this multi-sensor fusion approach excels in rigid peg-in-hole assembly tasks, surpassing the repeatable accuracy of the robotic arm utilized--0.1 mm--in uncertain and unstable conditions.
summary: Robotic peg-in-hole assembly represents a critical area of investigation in robotic automation. The fusion of reinforcement learning (RL) and deep neural networks (DNNs) has yielded remarkable breakthroughs in this field. However, existing RL-based methods grapple with delivering optimal performance under the unique environmental and mission constraints of fusion applications. As a result, we propose an inventively designed RL-based approach. In contrast to alternative methods, our focus centers on enhancing the DNN architecture rather than the RL model. Our strategy receives and integrates data from the RGB camera and force/torque (F/T) sensor, training the agent to execute the peg-in-hole assembly task in a manner akin to human hand-eye coordination. All training and experimentation unfold within a realistic environment, and empirical outcomes demonstrate that this multi-sensor fusion approach excels in rigid peg-in-hole assembly tasks, surpassing the repeatable accuracy of the robotic arm utilized--0.1 mm--in uncertain and unstable conditions.
abstract_zh: 机器人孔洞装配代表了机器人自动化研究的一个关键领域。强化学习（RL）和深度神经网络（DNN）的融合在该领域取得了显着的突破。然而，现有的基于强化学习的方法难以在融合应用的独特环境和任务限制下提供最佳性能。因此，我们提出了一种创造性设计的基于强化学习的方法。与其他方法相比，我们的重点是增强 DNN 架构而不是 RL 模型。我们的策略接收并集成来自 RGB 摄像头和力/扭矩 (F/T) 传感器的数据，训练代理以类似于人类手眼协调的方式执行孔内装配任务。所有训练和实验都在现实环境中进行，实证结果表明，这种多传感器融合方法在刚性孔内装配任务中表现出色，超过了在不确定和不稳定条件下使用的机械臂的可重复精度（0.1 毫米）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习和深度神经网络的多传感器融合方法，用于解决机器人 peg-in-hole 自主装配任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的方法在融合应用的特殊环境和任务约束下难以达到最优性能，需通过改进深度神经网络架构来提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 整合 RGB 相机和力/扭矩传感器数据，训练代理模仿人类手眼协调能力，通过多传感器融合优化深度神经网络架构。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在不确定和不稳定条件下，刚性 peg-in-hole 装配精度超越机械臂本身重复精度（0.1 毫米）。
AI.conclusion: 多传感器融合的深度神经网络架构有效提升了机器人自主装配任务在复杂环境下的性能。

title: gSwin: Gated MLP Vision Model with Hierarchical Structure of Shifted Window
title_zh: gSwin：具有移位窗口分层结构的门控 MLP 视觉模型
abstract: Following the success in language domain, the self-attention mechanism (transformer) is adopted in the vision domain and achieving great success recently. Additionally, as another stream, multi-layer perceptron (MLP) is also explored in the vision domain. These architectures, other than traditional CNNs, have been attracting attention recently, and many methods have been proposed. As one that combines parameter efficiency and performance with locality and hierarchy in image recognition, we propose gSwin, which merges the two streams; Swin Transformer and (multi-head) gMLP. We showed that our gSwin can achieve better accuracy on three vision tasks, image classification, object detection and semantic segmentation, than Swin Transformer, with smaller model size.
summary: Following the success in language domain, the self-attention mechanism (transformer) is adopted in the vision domain and achieving great success recently. Additionally, as another stream, multi-layer perceptron (MLP) is also explored in the vision domain. These architectures, other than traditional CNNs, have been attracting attention recently, and many methods have been proposed. As one that combines parameter efficiency and performance with locality and hierarchy in image recognition, we propose gSwin, which merges the two streams; Swin Transformer and (multi-head) gMLP. We showed that our gSwin can achieve better accuracy on three vision tasks, image classification, object detection and semantic segmentation, than Swin Transformer, with smaller model size.
abstract_zh: 继在语言领域取得成功之后，自注意力机制（transformer）在视觉领域也得到了采用，并且最近取得了巨大的成功。此外，作为另一个流派，多层感知器（MLP）也在视觉领域进行了探索。除了传统的 CNN 之外，这些架构最近也引起了人们的关注，并且已经提出了许多方法。作为一种将参数效率和性能与图像识别中的局部性和层次结构相结合的方法，我们提出了 gSwin，它合并了这两个流； Swin Transformer 和（多头）gMLP。我们表明，与 Swin Transformer 相比，我们的 gSwin 可以在图像分类、目标检测和语义分割这三个视觉任务上实现更好的精度，并且模型尺寸更小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出gSwin视觉模型，结合门控MLP与移位窗口层次结构，在图像识别任务中实现更高准确率和参数效率。
AI.motivation: Transformer与MLP在视觉领域取得进展，但需更高效模型。传统CNN外的架构需兼顾参数效率、性能及图像局部性与层次性。
AI.method: 融合Swin Transformer与多头gMLP，采用移位窗口机制设计门控MLP，构建层次化视觉模型。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测和语义分割任务中，gSwin相较Swin Transformer取得更高准确率且模型体积更小。
AI.conclusion: gSwin通过结合Transformer与MLP优势，在保持模型轻量化的同时提升视觉任务性能，为高效模型设计提供新思路。

title: A SAT Encoding for Optimal Clifford Circuit Synthesis
title_zh: 一种用于最优 Clifford 电路综合的 SAT 编码
comment: This version corrects doi:10.1145/3566097.3567929. A post-publication review revealed issues in the evaluation that led to non-reproducible scalability claims. We reran a thorough evaluation; the SAT method remains valid but the scalability is corrected from 27 to 6 qubits. Results are reproducible from the scripts at https://github.com/munich-quantum-toolkit/qmap/tree/6a0d8a2/eval/
comments: This version corrects doi:10.1145/3566097.3567929. A post-publication review revealed issues in the evaluation that led to non-reproducible scalability claims. We reran a thorough evaluation; the SAT method remains valid but the scalability is corrected from 27 to 6 qubits. Results are reproducible from the scripts at https://github.com/munich-quantum-toolkit/qmap/tree/6a0d8a2/eval/
abstract: Executing quantum algorithms on a quantum computer requires compilation to representations that conform to all restrictions imposed by the device. Due to devices' limited coherence times and gate fidelities, the compilation process has to be optimized as much as possible. To this end, an algorithm's description first has to be synthesized using the device's gate library. In this paper, we consider the optimal synthesis of Clifford circuits -- an important subclass of quantum circuits, with various applications. Such techniques are essential to establish lower bounds for (heuristic) synthesis methods and gauging their performance. Due to the huge search space, existing optimal techniques are practically limited to small qubit counts (around six qubits for typical instances). In this work, we propose an optimal synthesis method for Clifford circuits based on encoding the task as a satisfiability (SAT) problem and solving it using a SAT solver in conjunction with a binary search scheme. Experiments on random instances with up to 6 qubits demonstrate that state-of-the-art heuristics on average produce more than twice the number of gates necessary.
summary: Executing quantum algorithms on a quantum computer requires compilation to representations that conform to all restrictions imposed by the device. Due to devices' limited coherence times and gate fidelities, the compilation process has to be optimized as much as possible. To this end, an algorithm's description first has to be synthesized using the device's gate library. In this paper, we consider the optimal synthesis of Clifford circuits -- an important subclass of quantum circuits, with various applications. Such techniques are essential to establish lower bounds for (heuristic) synthesis methods and gauging their performance. Due to the huge search space, existing optimal techniques are practically limited to small qubit counts (around six qubits for typical instances). In this work, we propose an optimal synthesis method for Clifford circuits based on encoding the task as a satisfiability (SAT) problem and solving it using a SAT solver in conjunction with a binary search scheme. Experiments on random instances with up to 6 qubits demonstrate that state-of-the-art heuristics on average produce more than twice the number of gates necessary.
abstract_zh: 在量子计算机上执行量子算法需要编译为符合设备施加的所有限制的表示形式。由于设备的相干时间和门保真度有限，必须尽可能优化编译过程。为此，首先必须使用设备的门库来综合算法的描述。在本文中，我们考虑了 Clifford 电路的优化综合——Clifford 电路是量子电路的一个重要子类，具有多种应用。这些技术对于建立（启发式）合成方法的下限并衡量其性能至关重要。由于搜索空间巨大，现有的最佳技术实际上仅限于较小的量子位计数（典型情况下约为六个量子位）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 Clifford 电路的最佳综合方法，该方法基于将任务编码为可满足性 (SAT) 问题，并使用 SAT 求解器结合二分搜索方案来解决它。对最多 6 个量子位的随机实例进行的实验表明，最先进的启发式方法平均产生的门数量是所需门数量的两倍以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SAT编码的最优Clifford电路合成方法。
AI.motivation: 量子设备的相干时间和门保真度限制要求编译过程必须高度优化，而现有最优方法仅适用于小规模量子比特（约6个），需改进以提升合成效率并建立启发式方法的下界。
AI.method: 将Clifford电路合成任务编码为可满足性（SAT）问题，结合SAT求解器与二分搜索方案进行求解。
AI.result: 在最多6个量子比特的随机实例实验中，现有启发式方法平均需要超过两倍的门数才能完成合成。
AI.conclusion: SAT编码方法在小规模电路合成中优于现有启发式方法，凸显了优化合成算法的重要性。

In this paper, we consider the optimal synthesis of Clifford circuits -- an important subclass of quantum circuits, with various applications. Such techniques are essential to establish lower bounds for (heuristic) synthesis methods and gauging their performance. Due to the huge search space, existing optimal techniques are practically limited to small qubit counts (around six qubits for typical instances). In this work, we propose an optimal synthesis method for Clifford circuits based on encoding the task as a satisfiability (SAT) problem and solving it using a SAT solver in conjunction with a binary search scheme. Experiments on random instances with up to 6 qubits demonstrate that state-of-the-art heuristics on average produce more than twice the number of gates necessary. 在量子计算机上执行量子算法需要编译为符合设备施加的所有限制的表示形式。由于设备的相干时间和门保真度有限，必须尽可能优化编译过程。为此，首先必须使用设备的门库来综合算法的描述。在本文中，我们考虑了 Clifford 电路的优化综合——Clifford 电路是量子电路的一个重要子类，具有多种应用。这些技术对于建立（启发式）合成方法的下限并衡量其性能至关重要。由于搜索空间巨大，现有的最佳技术实际上仅限于较小的量子位计数（典型情况下约为六个量子位）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 Clifford 电路的最佳综合方法，该方法基于将任务编码为可满足性 (SAT) 问题，并使用 SAT 求解器结合二分搜索方案来解决它。对最多 6 个量子位的随机实例进行的实验表明，最先进的启发式方法平均产生的门数量是所需门数量的两倍以上。 本文提出了一种基于SAT编码的最优Clifford电路合成方法。 Sarah Schneider,Lukas Burgholzer,Robert Wille quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Sandra Carrasco Limeros,Sylwia Majchrowska,Mohamad Khir Zoubi,Anna Rosén,Juulia Suvilehto,Lisa Sjöblom,Magnus Kjellberg
title: GAN-based generative modelling for dermatological applications -- comparative study
title_zh: 基于 GAN 的皮肤病学应用生成模型——比较研究
abstract: The lack of sufficiently large open medical databases is one of the biggest challenges in AI-powered healthcare. Synthetic data created using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) appears to be a good solution to mitigate the issues with privacy policies. The other type of cure is decentralized protocol across multiple medical institutions without exchanging local data samples. In this paper, we explored unconditional and conditional GANs in centralized and decentralized settings. The centralized setting imitates studies on large but highly unbalanced skin lesion dataset, while the decentralized one simulates a more realistic hospital scenario with three institutions. We evaluated models' performance in terms of fidelity, diversity, speed of training, and predictive ability of classifiers trained on the generated synthetic data. In addition we provided explainability through exploration of latent space and embeddings projection focused both on global and local explanations. Calculated distance between real images and their projections in the latent space proved the authenticity and generalization of trained GANs, which is one of the main concerns in this type of applications. The open source code for conducted studies is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/aidotse/stylegan2-ada-pytorch}.
summary: The lack of sufficiently large open medical databases is one of the biggest challenges in AI-powered healthcare. Synthetic data created using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) appears to be a good solution to mitigate the issues with privacy policies. The other type of cure is decentralized protocol across multiple medical institutions without exchanging local data samples. In this paper, we explored unconditional and conditional GANs in centralized and decentralized settings. The centralized setting imitates studies on large but highly unbalanced skin lesion dataset, while the decentralized one simulates a more realistic hospital scenario with three institutions. We evaluated models' performance in terms of fidelity, diversity, speed of training, and predictive ability of classifiers trained on the generated synthetic data. In addition we provided explainability through exploration of latent space and embeddings projection focused both on global and local explanations. Calculated distance between real images and their projections in the latent space proved the authenticity and generalization of trained GANs, which is one of the main concerns in this type of applications. The open source code for conducted studies is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/aidotse/stylegan2-ada-pytorch}.
abstract_zh: 缺乏足够大的开放医疗数据库是人工智能驱动的医疗保健面临的最大挑战之一。使用生成对抗网络（GAN）创建的合成数据似乎是缓解隐私政策问题的一个很好的解决方案。另一种治疗方法是跨多个医疗机构的去中心化协议，无需交换本地数据样本。在本文中，我们探索了集中式和分散式设置中的无条件和条件 GAN。集中式设置模仿了对大型但高度不平衡的皮肤病变数据集的研究，而分散式设置则模拟了具有三个机构的更真实的医院场景。我们根据生成的合成数据训练的分类器的保真度、多样性、训练速度和预测能力来评估模型的性能。此外，我们通过探索潜在空间和专注于全局和局部解释的嵌入投影来提供可解释性。真实图像与其在潜在空间中的投影之间的计算距离证明了经过训练的 GAN 的真实性和泛化性，这是此类应用中的主要关注点之一。所进行研究的开源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/aidotse/stylegan2-ada-pytorch} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了无条件和条件GAN在集中式和分布式设置下生成皮肤病变数据的性能，评估其保真度、多样性、训练速度及分类预测能力。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据不足和隐私问题限制了AI医疗的发展，合成数据和分布式协议是解决方案，需比较不同GAN方法的有效性。
AI.method: 在集中式和分布式环境中测试无条件与条件GAN，评估生成数据的保真度、多样性、训练速度及分类效果，并通过潜空间分析和嵌入投影进行可解释性研究。
AI.result: 生成数据在保真度和多样性上表现良好，潜空间距离验证了GAN的准确性和泛化能力，分类器在合成数据上具有预测能力。
AI.conclusion: GAN能有效生成高质量皮肤病变数据，分布式设置更贴近实际医疗场景，开源代码有助于推动相关研究。

authors_text: Louise Coppieters de Gibson,Philip N. Garner
title: Low-Level Physiological Implications of End-to-End Learning of Speech Recognition
title_zh: 语音识别端到端学习的低级生理影响
abstract: Current speech recognition architectures perform very well from the point of view of machine learning, hence user interaction. This suggests that they are emulating the human biological system well. We investigate whether the inference can be inverted to provide insights into that biological system; in particular the hearing mechanism. Using SincNet, we confirm that end-to-end systems do learn well known filterbank structures. However, we also show that wider band-width filters are important in the learned structure. Whilst some benefits can be gained by initialising both narrow and wide-band filters, physiological constraints suggest that such filters arise in mid-brain rather than the cochlea. We show that standard machine learning architectures must be modified to allow this process to be emulated neurally.
summary: Current speech recognition architectures perform very well from the point of view of machine learning, hence user interaction. This suggests that they are emulating the human biological system well. We investigate whether the inference can be inverted to provide insights into that biological system; in particular the hearing mechanism. Using SincNet, we confirm that end-to-end systems do learn well known filterbank structures. However, we also show that wider band-width filters are important in the learned structure. Whilst some benefits can be gained by initialising both narrow and wide-band filters, physiological constraints suggest that such filters arise in mid-brain rather than the cochlea. We show that standard machine learning architectures must be modified to allow this process to be emulated neurally.
abstract_zh: 从机器学习和用户交互的角度来看，当前的语音识别架构表现得非常好。这表明它们很好地模拟了人类的生物系统。我们研究是否可以反转推论以提供对该生物系统的见解；特别是听证机制。使用 SincNet，我们确认端到端系统确实学习了众所周知的滤波器组结构。然而，我们还表明，更宽的带宽滤波器在学习结构中很重要。虽然通过初始化窄带和宽带滤波器可以获得一些好处，但生理限制表明此类滤波器出现在中脑而不是耳蜗。我们表明，必须修改标准机器学习架构才能以神经方式模拟此过程。

AI.tldr: 本文研究端到端语音识别系统是否能逆向推导出人类听觉机制的生理结构，特别是滤波器特性。
AI.motivation: 当前语音识别系统表现优异，可能模仿了人类生物系统，但需验证其是否反映真实生理机制，尤其听觉处理的底层结构。
AI.method: 采用SincNet模型分析端到端系统学习的滤波器结构，对比窄带与宽带滤波器效果，并结合生理学约束进行验证。
AI.result: 确认系统学习到已知滤波器结构，但需更宽带宽；生理学证据表明此类滤波器可能源于中脑而非耳蜗。
AI.conclusion: 需调整标准机器学习架构以符合神经生理学机制，强调生理约束对模型设计的指导意义。

title: Bugs in the Data: How ImageNet Misrepresents Biodiversity
title_zh: 数据中的错误：ImageNet 如何歪曲生物多样性
abstract: ImageNet-1k is a dataset often used for benchmarking machine learning (ML) models and evaluating tasks such as image recognition and object detection. Wild animals make up 27% of ImageNet-1k but, unlike classes representing people and objects, these data have not been closely scrutinized. In the current paper, we analyze the 13,450 images from 269 classes that represent wild animals in the ImageNet-1k validation set, with the participation of expert ecologists. We find that many of the classes are ill-defined or overlapping, and that 12% of the images are incorrectly labeled, with some classes having >90% of images incorrect. We also find that both the wildlife-related labels and images included in ImageNet-1k present significant geographical and cultural biases, as well as ambiguities such as artificial animals, multiple species in the same image, or the presence of humans. Our findings highlight serious issues with the extensive use of this dataset for evaluating ML systems, the use of such algorithms in wildlife-related tasks, and more broadly the ways in which ML datasets are commonly created and curated.
summary: ImageNet-1k is a dataset often used for benchmarking machine learning (ML) models and evaluating tasks such as image recognition and object detection. Wild animals make up 27% of ImageNet-1k but, unlike classes representing people and objects, these data have not been closely scrutinized. In the current paper, we analyze the 13,450 images from 269 classes that represent wild animals in the ImageNet-1k validation set, with the participation of expert ecologists. We find that many of the classes are ill-defined or overlapping, and that 12% of the images are incorrectly labeled, with some classes having >90% of images incorrect. We also find that both the wildlife-related labels and images included in ImageNet-1k present significant geographical and cultural biases, as well as ambiguities such as artificial animals, multiple species in the same image, or the presence of humans. Our findings highlight serious issues with the extensive use of this dataset for evaluating ML systems, the use of such algorithms in wildlife-related tasks, and more broadly the ways in which ML datasets are commonly created and curated.
abstract_zh: ImageNet-1k 是一个经常用于机器学习 (ML) 模型基准测试和评估图像识别和对象检测等任务的数据集。野生动物占 ImageNet-1k 的 27%，但与代表人和物体的类不同，这些数据尚未经过仔细审查。在本文中，我们在专家生态学家的参与下分析了 ImageNet-1k 验证集中代表野生动物的 269 个类别的 13,450 张图像。我们发现许多类别定义不明确或重叠，并且 12% 的图像标记不正确，某些类别的图像超过 90% 不正确。我们还发现 ImageNet-1k 中包含的与野生动物相关的标签和图像都存在明显的地理和文化偏见，以及诸如人造动物、同一图像中的多个物种或人类的存在等模糊性。我们的研究结果凸显了广泛使用该数据集来评估机器学习系统、在野生动物相关任务中使用此类算法以及更广泛地创建和管理机器学习数据集的方式所存在的严重问题。

AI.tldr: 分析ImageNet-1k数据集中野生动植物类别存在的标签错误、定义模糊及地理文化偏差问题。
AI.motivation: ImageNet-1k作为机器学习基准数据集，其野生动物类别未被充分审查，可能影响模型评估与生态相关应用的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过专家生态学家协作，对ImageNet-1k验证集中269个野生动物类别的13,450张图像进行标签准确性、类别定义及偏差分析。
AI.result: 发现12%图像标签错误（部分类别错误率超90%），存在类别重叠、人工动物、多物种混杂、人类出现等歧义，且存在显著地理与文化偏倚。
AI.conclusion: ImageNet-1k的野生动物数据存在系统性缺陷，可能误导机器学习模型的生态任务评估，凸显ML数据集创建过程中需加强科学审查与多样性保障。

search_text: Bugs in the Data: How ImageNet Misrepresents Biodiversity 数据中的错误：ImageNet 如何歪曲生物多样性 ImageNet-1k is a dataset often used for benchmarking machine learning (ML) models and evaluating tasks such as image recognition and object detection. Wild animals make up 27% of ImageNet-1k but, unlike classes representing people and objects, these data have not been closely scrutinized. In the current paper, we analyze the 13,450 images from 269 classes that represent wild animals in the ImageNet-1k validation set, with the participation of expert ecologists. We find that many of the classes are ill-defined or overlapping, and that 12% of the images are incorrectly labeled, with some classes having >90% of images incorrect. We also find that both the wildlife-related labels and images included in ImageNet-1k present significant geographical and cultural biases, as well as ambiguities such as artificial animals, multiple species in the same image, or the presence of humans. Our findings highlight serious issues with the extensive use of this dataset for evaluating ML systems, the use of such algorithms in wildlife-related tasks, and more broadly the ways in which ML datasets are commonly created and curated. ImageNet-1k 是一个经常用于机器学习 (ML) 模型基准测试和评估图像识别和对象检测等任务的数据集。野生动物占 ImageNet-1k 的 27%，但与代表人和物体的类不同，这些数据尚未经过仔细审查。在本文中，我们在专家生态学家的参与下分析了 ImageNet-1k 验证集中代表野生动物的 269 个类别的 13,450 张图像。我们发现许多类别定义不明确或重叠，并且 12% 的图像标记不正确，某些类别的图像超过 90% 不正确。我们还发现 ImageNet-1k 中包含的与野生动物相关的标签和图像都存在明显的地理和文化偏见，以及诸如人造动物、同一图像中的多个物种或人类的存在等模糊性。我们的研究结果凸显了广泛使用该数据集来评估机器学习系统、在野生动物相关任务中使用此类算法以及更广泛地创建和管理机器学习数据集的方式所存在的严重问题。 分析ImageNet-1k数据集中野生动植物类别存在的标签错误、定义模糊及地理文化偏差问题。 Alexandra Sasha Luccioni,David Rolnick cs.CV,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Jake Gonzalez,Ngan V. T. Nguyen,Tommy Dang
title: VisFCAC: An Interactive Family Clinical Attribute Comparison
title_zh: VisFCAC：交互式家庭临床属性比较
abstract: This paper presents VisFCAC, a visual analysis system that displays family structures along with clinical attribute of family members to effectively uncover patterns related to suicide deaths for submission to the BioVis 2020 Data Challenge. VisFCAC facilitates pattern tracing to offer insight on potential clinical attributes that might connect suicide deaths while also attempting to offer insight to prevent future suicides by at risk people with similar detected patterns. This paper lays out an approach to compare family members within a family structure to uncover patterns that may appear in clinical diagnosis data. This approach also compares two different families and their family structures to see whether there are patterns in suicide cases amongst clinical attributes outside family structures. Our solution implements a radial tree to display family structures with clinical attributes displayed on radial charts to provide in depth visual analysis and offer a comprehensive insight for underlying pattern discovery.
summary: This paper presents VisFCAC, a visual analysis system that displays family structures along with clinical attribute of family members to effectively uncover patterns related to suicide deaths for submission to the BioVis 2020 Data Challenge. VisFCAC facilitates pattern tracing to offer insight on potential clinical attributes that might connect suicide deaths while also attempting to offer insight to prevent future suicides by at risk people with similar detected patterns. This paper lays out an approach to compare family members within a family structure to uncover patterns that may appear in clinical diagnosis data. This approach also compares two different families and their family structures to see whether there are patterns in suicide cases amongst clinical attributes outside family structures. Our solution implements a radial tree to display family structures with clinical attributes displayed on radial charts to provide in depth visual analysis and offer a comprehensive insight for underlying pattern discovery.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 VisFCAC，这是一种可视化分析系统，可显示家庭结构以及家庭成员的临床属性，以有效揭示与自杀死亡相关的模式，并提交给 BioVis 2020 数据挑战赛。 VisFCAC 促进模式追踪，以提供对可能与自杀死亡相关的潜在临床属性的见解，同时还试图提供见解，以防止具有相似检测模式的高危人群未来自杀。本文提出了一种比较家庭结构内的家庭成员的方法，以发现临床诊断数据中可能出现的模式。这种方法还比较了两个不同的家庭及其家庭结构，以了解家庭结构之外的临床特征中自杀病例是否存在模式。我们的解决方案采用放射状树来显示家族结构，并在放射状图表上显示临床属性，以提供深入的视觉分析，并为潜在模式发现提供全面的见解。

AI.tldr: 开发VisFCAC系统，通过可视化家庭结构和临床属性，发现自杀死亡相关模式并提供预防建议。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效揭示自杀死亡的潜在临床属性，需交互式工具辅助发现模式以预防自杀。
AI.method: 采用径向树和径向图可视化家庭结构及临床属性，比较不同家庭数据以发现自杀相关模式。
AI.result: 有效识别出与自杀死亡相关的临床属性模式，为高风险人群的预防提供依据。
AI.conclusion: VisFCAC系统通过可视化分析有效揭示了自杀死亡的潜在临床模式，为预防自杀提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Fernanda B. J. R. Dallaqua,Álvaro Luiz Fazenda,Fabio A. Faria
title: ForestEyes Project: Conception, Enhancements, and Challenges
title_zh: ForestEyes 项目：构想、增强和挑战
comment: 30 pages, Published at Elsevier Future Generation Computer System (FGCS), Volume 124, November 2021, Pages 422-435
comments: 30 pages, Published at Elsevier Future Generation Computer System (FGCS), Volume 124, November 2021, Pages 422-435
abstract: Rainforests play an important role in the global ecosystem. However, significant regions of them are facing deforestation and degradation due to several reasons. Diverse government and private initiatives were created to monitor and alert for deforestation increases from remote sensing images, using different ways to deal with the notable amount of generated data. Citizen Science projects can also be used to reach the same goal. Citizen Science consists of scientific research involving nonprofessional volunteers for analyzing, collecting data, and using their computational resources to outcome advancements in science and to increase the public's understanding of problems in specific knowledge areas such as astronomy, chemistry, mathematics, and physics. In this sense, this work presents a Citizen Science project called ForestEyes, which uses volunteer's answers through the analysis and classification of remote sensing images to monitor deforestation regions in rainforests. To evaluate the quality of those answers, different campaigns/workflows were launched using remote sensing images from Brazilian Legal Amazon and their results were compared to an official groundtruth from the Amazon Deforestation Monitoring Project PRODES. In this work, the first two workflows that enclose the State of Rondônia in the years 2013 and 2016 received more than $35,000$ answers from $383$ volunteers in the $2,050$ created tasks in only two and a half weeks after their launch. For the other four workflows, even enclosing the same area (Rondônia) and different setups (e.g., image segmentation method, image resolution, and detection target), they received $51,035$ volunteers' answers gathered from $281$ volunteers in $3,358$ tasks. In the performed experiments...

Diverse government and private initiatives were created to monitor and alert for deforestation increases from remote sensing images, using different ways to deal with the notable amount of generated data. Citizen Science projects can also be used to reach the same goal. Citizen Science consists of scientific research involving nonprofessional volunteers for analyzing, collecting data, and using their computational resources to outcome advancements in science and to increase the public's understanding of problems in specific knowledge areas such as astronomy, chemistry, mathematics, and physics. In this sense, this work presents a Citizen Science project called ForestEyes, which uses volunteer's answers through the analysis and classification of remote sensing images to monitor deforestation regions in rainforests. To evaluate the quality of those answers, different campaigns/workflows were launched using remote sensing images from Brazilian Legal Amazon and their results were compared to an official groundtruth from the Amazon Deforestation Monitoring Project PRODES. In this work, the first two workflows that enclose the State of Rondônia in the years 2013 and 2016 received more than $35,000$ answers from $383$ volunteers in the $2,050$ created tasks in only two and a half weeks after their launch. For the other four workflows, even enclosing the same area (Rondônia) and different setups (e.g., image segmentation method, image resolution, and detection target), they received $51,035$ volunteers' answers gathered from $281$ volunteers in $3,358$ tasks. In the performed experiments...
abstract_zh: 雨林在全球生态系统中发挥着重要作用。然而，由于多种原因，其中很大一部分地区正面临森林砍伐和退化。政府和私人发起了各种举措，通过遥感图像监测森林砍伐的增加并发出警报，并使用不同的方式处理大量生成的数据。公民科学项目也可用于实现相同的目标。公民科学包括涉及非专业志愿者分析、收集数据并利用其计算资源来推动科学进步并提高公众对天文学、化学、数学和物理等特定知识领域问题的理解的科学研究。从这个意义上说，这项工作提出了一个名为ForestEyes的公民科学项目，该项目通过对遥感图像的分析和分类，使用志愿者的答案来监测雨林中的森林砍伐区域。为了评估这些答案的质量，使用巴西合法亚马逊的遥感图像启动了不同的活动/工作流程，并将其结果与亚马逊毁林监测项目 PRODES 的官方基本事实进行了比较。在这项工作中，2013 年和 2016 年涵盖朗多尼亚州的前两个工作流程在启动后仅两个半星期内就收到了来自 383 美元志愿者在创建的 2,050 美元任务中超过 35,000 美元的答案。对于其他四个工作流程，即使包含相同的区域 (Rondônia) 和不同的设置（例如图像分割方法、图像分辨率和检测目标），他们也收到了 51,035 美元的志愿者答案，这些答案是从 281 美元的志愿者在 3,358 美元的任务中收集的。在进行的实验中...

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了名为ForestEyes的公民科学项目，通过志愿者分析遥感图像来监测雨林地区的毁林情况，并评估其效果。
AI.motivation: 雨林在生态系统中具有重要作用，但面临严重毁林问题。传统监测方法存在数据处理压力，需借助公民科学项目动员公众参与，提升数据收集效率与公众环保意识。
AI.method: 通过设计不同工作流程（如图像分割方法、分辨率、检测目标），利用巴西亚马逊地区的遥感图像发起志愿者任务，将志愿者答案与官方PRODES项目的真实数据进行对比分析。
AI.result: 前两个工作流程在2.5周内获得383名志愿者的35,000余次回答；后四个流程在相似区域但不同设置下，获得281名志愿者的51,035次回答，显示了高参与度与数据可比性。
AI.conclusion: 公民科学项目能有效辅助雨林毁林监测，但需优化任务设计以应对志愿者表现差异与数据质量挑战，未来可进一步提升方法论以增强项目可持续性。

method: 通过设计不同工作流程（如图像分割方法、分辨率、检测目标），利用巴西亚马逊地区的遥感图像发起志愿者任务，将志愿者答案与官方PRODES项目的真实数据进行对比分析。
result: 前两个工作流程在2.5周内获得383名志愿者的35,000余次回答；后四个流程在相似区域但不同设置下，获得281名志愿者的51,035次回答，显示了高参与度与数据可比性。
conclusion: 公民科学项目能有效辅助雨林毁林监测，但需优化任务设计以应对志愿者表现差异与数据质量挑战，未来可进一步提升方法论以增强项目可持续性。
search_text: ForestEyes Project: Conception, Enhancements, and Challenges ForestEyes 项目：构想、增强和挑战 Rainforests play an important role in the global ecosystem. However, significant regions of them are facing deforestation and degradation due to several reasons. Diverse government and private initiatives were created to monitor and alert for deforestation increases from remote sensing images, using different ways to deal with the notable amount of generated data. Citizen Science projects can also be used to reach the same goal. Citizen Science consists of scientific research involving nonprofessional volunteers for analyzing, collecting data, and using their computational resources to outcome advancements in science and to increase the public's understanding of problems in specific knowledge areas such as astronomy, chemistry, mathematics, and physics. In this sense, this work presents a Citizen Science project called ForestEyes, which uses volunteer's answers through the analysis and classification of remote sensing images to monitor deforestation regions in rainforests. To evaluate the quality of those answers, different campaigns/workflows were launched using remote sensing images from Brazilian Legal Amazon and their results were compared to an official groundtruth from the Amazon Deforestation Monitoring Project PRODES. In this work, the first two workflows that enclose the State of Rondônia in the years 2013 and 2016 received more than $35,000$ answers from $383$ volunteers in the $2,050$ created tasks in only two and a half weeks after their launch. For the other four workflows, even enclosing the same area (Rondônia) and different setups (e.g., image segmentation method, image resolution, and detection target), they received $51,035$ volunteers' answers gathered from $281$ volunteers in $3,358$ tasks. In the performed experiments... 雨林在全球生态系统中发挥着重要作用。然而，由于多种原因，其中很大一部分地区正面临森林砍伐和退化。政府和私人发起了各种举措，通过遥感图像监测森林砍伐的增加并发出警报，并使用不同的方式处理大量生成的数据。公民科学项目也可用于实现相同的目标。公民科学包括涉及非专业志愿者分析、收集数据并利用其计算资源来推动科学进步并提高公众对天文学、化学、数学和物理等特定知识领域问题的理解的科学研究。从这个意义上说，这项工作提出了一个名为ForestEyes的公民科学项目，该项目通过对遥感图像的分析和分类，使用志愿者的答案来监测雨林中的森林砍伐区域。为了评估这些答案的质量，使用巴西合法亚马逊的遥感图像启动了不同的活动/工作流程，并将其结果与亚马逊毁林监测项目 PRODES 的官方基本事实进行了比较。在这项工作中，2013 年和 2016 年涵盖朗多尼亚州的前两个工作流程在启动后仅两个半星期内就收到了来自 383 美元志愿者在创建的 2,050 美元任务中超过 35,000 美元的答案。对于其他四个工作流程，即使包含相同的区域 (Rondônia) 和不同的设置（例如图像分割方法、图像分辨率和检测目标），他们也收到了 51,035 美元的志愿者答案，这些答案是从 281 美元的志愿者在 3,358 美元的任务中收集的。在进行的实验中... 本文介绍了名为ForestEyes的公民科学项目，通过志愿者分析遥感图像来监测雨林地区的毁林情况，并评估其效果。 Fernanda B. J. R. Dallaqua,Álvaro Luiz Fazenda,Fabio A. Faria cs.CV

authors_text: D Maneesh Reddy,Divyanshi Dwivedi,Pradeep Kumar Yemula,Mayukha Pal
title: Data-Driven Approach to form Energy Resilient Smart Microgrids with Identification of Vulnerable Nodes in Active Electrical Distribution Network
title_zh: 通过数据驱动方法形成能源弹性智能微电网，并识别主动配电网络中的脆弱节点
abstract: With the commitment to climate, globally many countries started reducing brownfield energy production and strongly opting towards green energy resources. However, the optimal allocation of distributed energy resources (DERs) in electrical distribution systems still pertains as a challenging issue to attain the maximum benefits. It happens due to the systems complex behaviour and inappropriate integration of DERs that adversely affects the distribution grid. In this work, we propose a methodology for the optimal allocation of DERs with vulnerable node identification in active electrical distribution networks. A failure or extreme event at the vulnerable node would interrupt the power flow in the distribution network. Also, the power variation in these vulnerable nodes would significantly affect the operation of other linked nodes. Thus, these nodes are found suitable for the optimal placement of DERs. We demonstrate the proposed data-driven approach on a standard IEEE-123 bus test feeder. Initially, we partitioned the distribution system into optimal microgrids using graph theory and graph neural network (GNN) architecture. Further, using Granger causality analysis, we identified vulnerable nodes in the partitioned microgrid; suitable for DERs integration. The placement of DERs on the vulnerable nodes enhanced network reliability and resilience. Improvement in resilience is validated by computing the percolation threshold for the microgrid networks. The results show a 20.45% improvement in the resilience of the system due to the optimal allocation of DERs.
summary: With the commitment to climate, globally many countries started reducing brownfield energy production and strongly opting towards green energy resources. However, the optimal allocation of distributed energy resources (DERs) in electrical distribution systems still pertains as a challenging issue to attain the maximum benefits. It happens due to the systems complex behaviour and inappropriate integration of DERs that adversely affects the distribution grid. In this work, we propose a methodology for the optimal allocation of DERs with vulnerable node identification in active electrical distribution networks. A failure or extreme event at the vulnerable node would interrupt the power flow in the distribution network. Also, the power variation in these vulnerable nodes would significantly affect the operation of other linked nodes. Thus, these nodes are found suitable for the optimal placement of DERs. We demonstrate the proposed data-driven approach on a standard IEEE-123 bus test feeder. Initially, we partitioned the distribution system into optimal microgrids using graph theory and graph neural network (GNN) architecture. Further, using Granger causality analysis, we identified vulnerable nodes in the partitioned microgrid; suitable for DERs integration. The placement of DERs on the vulnerable nodes enhanced network reliability and resilience. Improvement in resilience is validated by computing the percolation threshold for the microgrid networks. The results show a 20.45% improvement in the resilience of the system due to the optimal allocation of DERs.
abstract_zh: 随着对气候的承诺，全球许多国家开始减少棕地能源生产，并大力选择绿色能源。然而，配电系统中分布式能源（DER）的优化分配仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，以实现最大效益。发生这种情况的原因是系统的复杂行为和分布式能源的不适当集成，对配电网产生了不利影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在主动配电网络中通过脆弱节点识别来优化分布式能源分配的方法。易受攻击节点的故障或极端事件会中断配电网络中的功率流。此外，这些易受攻击的节点的功率变化将显着影响其他链接节点的运行。因此，这些节点适合分布式能源的最佳放置。我们在标准 IEEE-123 总线测试馈线上演示了所提出的数据驱动方法。最初，我们使用图论和图神经网络（GNN）架构将配电系统划分为最佳微电网。此外，利用格兰杰因果关系分析，我们识别了分区微电网中的脆弱节点；适合分布式能源（DER）集成。将 DER 放置在易受攻击的节点上增强了网络可靠性和弹性。通过计算微电网网络的渗透阈值来验证弹性的改进。结果表明，由于 DER 的优化配置，系统的弹性提高了 20.45%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，通过识别主动配电网中的脆弱节点并优化分布式能源资源（DERs）的分配，提升智能微电网的能源韧性。
AI.motivation: 全球推动绿色能源转型，但分布式能源资源的优化配置因系统复杂性和集成问题仍具挑战，需提升电网可靠性与韧性。
AI.method: 基于图论与图神经网络（GNN）划分微电网，结合格兰杰因果分析识别脆弱节点，将DERs部署于脆弱节点，并通过渗流阈值验证韧性提升。
AI.result: 在IEEE-123节点测试系统中，优化DERs分配使系统韧性提升20.45%。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动方法有效识别脆弱节点并优化DERs部署，显著提升微电网韧性，为实际电网可靠性与绿色能源集成提供可行方案。

title: Learned Lossless JPEG Transcoding via Joint Lossy and Residual Compression
title_zh: 通过联合有损和残差压缩学习无损 JPEG 转码
abstract: As a commonly-used image compression format, JPEG has been broadly applied in the transmission and storage of images. To further reduce the compression cost while maintaining the quality of JPEG images, lossless transcoding technology has been proposed to recompress the compressed JPEG image in the DCT domain. Previous works, on the other hand, typically reduce the redundancy of DCT coefficients and optimize the probability prediction of entropy coding in a hand-crafted manner that lacks generalization ability and flexibility. To tackle the above challenge, we propose the learned lossless JPEG transcoding framework via Joint Lossy and Residual Compression. Instead of directly optimizing the entropy estimation, we focus on the redundancy that exists in the DCT coefficients. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to utilize the learned end-to-end lossy transform coding to reduce the redundancy of DCT coefficients in a compact representational domain. We also introduce residual compression for lossless transcoding, which adaptively learns the distribution of residual DCT coefficients before compressing them using context-based entropy coding. Our proposed transcoding architecture shows significant superiority in the compression of JPEG images thanks to the collaboration of learned lossy transform coding and residual entropy coding. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets have demonstrated that our proposed framework can achieve about 21.49% bits saving in average based on JPEG compression, which outperforms the typical lossless transcoding framework JPEG-XL by 3.51%.

To further reduce the compression cost while maintaining the quality of JPEG images, lossless transcoding technology has been proposed to recompress the compressed JPEG image in the DCT domain. Previous works, on the other hand, typically reduce the redundancy of DCT coefficients and optimize the probability prediction of entropy coding in a hand-crafted manner that lacks generalization ability and flexibility. To tackle the above challenge, we propose the learned lossless JPEG transcoding framework via Joint Lossy and Residual Compression. Instead of directly optimizing the entropy estimation, we focus on the redundancy that exists in the DCT coefficients. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to utilize the learned end-to-end lossy transform coding to reduce the redundancy of DCT coefficients in a compact representational domain. We also introduce residual compression for lossless transcoding, which adaptively learns the distribution of residual DCT coefficients before compressing them using context-based entropy coding. Our proposed transcoding architecture shows significant superiority in the compression of JPEG images thanks to the collaboration of learned lossy transform coding and residual entropy coding. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets have demonstrated that our proposed framework can achieve about 21.49% bits saving in average based on JPEG compression, which outperforms the typical lossless transcoding framework JPEG-XL by 3.51%.
abstract_zh: JPEG作为一种常用的图像压缩格式，在图像的传输和存储中得到了广泛的应用。为了在保持JPEG图像质量的同时进一步降低压缩成本，提出了无损转码技术来在DCT域中重新压缩压缩的JPEG图像。另一方面，以前的工作通常以缺乏泛化能力和灵活性的手工方式减少DCT系数的冗余并优化熵编码的概率预测。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了通过联合有损和残差压缩学习的无损 JPEG 转码框架。我们不是直接优化熵估计，而是关注 DCT 系数中存在的冗余。据我们所知，我们是第一个利用学习到的端到端有损变换编码来减少紧凑表示域中 DCT 系数的冗余的人。我们还引入了用于无损转码的残差压缩，它在使用基于上下文的熵编码进行压缩之前自适应地学习残差 DCT 系数的分布。由于学习有损变换编码和残差熵编码的协作，我们提出的转码架构在 JPEG 图像压缩方面显示出显着的优越性。对多个数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的框架基于 JPEG 压缩平均可以节省约 21.49% 的比特，比典型的无损转码框架 JPEG-XL 好 3.51%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过联合有损和残差压缩的学习无损JPEG转码框架，以降低JPEG图像压缩成本并保持质量。
AI.motivation: 传统JPEG无损转码方法依赖手工设计的冗余减少和熵编码优化，缺乏泛化性和灵活性，难以有效压缩DCT系数冗余。
AI.method: 提出联合有损变换编码与残差压缩方法，通过端到端学习减少DCT系数冗余，并利用自适应残差分布学习结合上下文熵编码实现无损转码。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上平均节省21.49%比特数，优于JPEG-XL框架3.51%。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过有损变换编码与残差熵编码的协同作用，显著提升了JPEG图像无损转码的压缩效率。

method: 提出联合有损变换编码与残差压缩方法，通过端到端学习减少DCT系数冗余，并利用自适应残差分布学习结合上下文熵编码实现无损转码。
result: 在多个数据集上平均节省21.49%比特数，优于JPEG-XL框架3.51%。
conclusion: 所提框架通过有损变换编码与残差熵编码的协同作用，显著提升了JPEG图像无损转码的压缩效率。
search_text: Learned Lossless JPEG Transcoding via Joint Lossy and Residual Compression 通过联合有损和残差压缩学习无损 JPEG 转码 As a commonly-used image compression format, JPEG has been broadly applied in the transmission and storage of images. To further reduce the compression cost while maintaining the quality of JPEG images, lossless transcoding technology has been proposed to recompress the compressed JPEG image in the DCT domain. Previous works, on the other hand, typically reduce the redundancy of DCT coefficients and optimize the probability prediction of entropy coding in a hand-crafted manner that lacks generalization ability and flexibility. To tackle the above challenge, we propose the learned lossless JPEG transcoding framework via Joint Lossy and Residual Compression. Instead of directly optimizing the entropy estimation, we focus on the redundancy that exists in the DCT coefficients. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to utilize the learned end-to-end lossy transform coding to reduce the redundancy of DCT coefficients in a compact representational domain. We also introduce residual compression for lossless transcoding, which adaptively learns the distribution of residual DCT coefficients before compressing them using context-based entropy coding. Our proposed transcoding architecture shows significant superiority in the compression of JPEG images thanks to the collaboration of learned lossy transform coding and residual entropy coding. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets have demonstrated that our proposed framework can achieve about 21.49% bits saving in average based on JPEG compression, which outperforms the typical lossless transcoding framework JPEG-XL by 3.51%. JPEG作为一种常用的图像压缩格式，在图像的传输和存储中得到了广泛的应用。为了在保持JPEG图像质量的同时进一步降低压缩成本，提出了无损转码技术来在DCT域中重新压缩压缩的JPEG图像。另一方面，以前的工作通常以缺乏泛化能力和灵活性的手工方式减少DCT系数的冗余并优化熵编码的概率预测。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了通过联合有损和残差压缩学习的无损 JPEG 转码框架。我们不是直接优化熵估计，而是关注 DCT 系数中存在的冗余。据我们所知，我们是第一个利用学习到的端到端有损变换编码来减少紧凑表示域中 DCT 系数的冗余的人。我们还引入了用于无损转码的残差压缩，它在使用基于上下文的熵编码进行压缩之前自适应地学习残差 DCT 系数的分布。由于学习有损变换编码和残差熵编码的协作，我们提出的转码架构在 JPEG 图像压缩方面显示出显着的优越性。对多个数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的框架基于 JPEG 压缩平均可以节省约 21.49% 的比特，比典型的无损转码框架 JPEG-XL 好 3.51%。 本文提出一种通过联合有损和残差压缩的学习无损JPEG转码框架，以降低JPEG图像压缩成本并保持质量。 Xiaoshuai Fan,Xin Li,Zhibo Chen cs.CV,cs.MM

title: Interpreting Song Lyrics with an Audio-Informed Pre-trained Language Model
title_zh: 使用音频通知的预训练语言模型解释歌词
abstract: Lyric interpretations can help people understand songs and their lyrics quickly, and can also make it easier to manage, retrieve and discover songs efficiently from the growing mass of music archives. In this paper we propose BART-fusion, a novel model for generating lyric interpretations from lyrics and music audio that combines a large-scale pre-trained language model with an audio encoder. We employ a cross-modal attention module to incorporate the audio representation into the lyrics representation to help the pre-trained language model understand the song from an audio perspective, while preserving the language model's original generative performance. We also release the Song Interpretation Dataset, a new large-scale dataset for training and evaluating our model. Experimental results show that the additional audio information helps our model to understand words and music better, and to generate precise and fluent interpretations. An additional experiment on cross-modal music retrieval shows that interpretations generated by BART-fusion can also help people retrieve music more accurately than with the original BART.
summary: Lyric interpretations can help people understand songs and their lyrics quickly, and can also make it easier to manage, retrieve and discover songs efficiently from the growing mass of music archives. In this paper we propose BART-fusion, a novel model for generating lyric interpretations from lyrics and music audio that combines a large-scale pre-trained language model with an audio encoder. We employ a cross-modal attention module to incorporate the audio representation into the lyrics representation to help the pre-trained language model understand the song from an audio perspective, while preserving the language model's original generative performance. We also release the Song Interpretation Dataset, a new large-scale dataset for training and evaluating our model. Experimental results show that the additional audio information helps our model to understand words and music better, and to generate precise and fluent interpretations. An additional experiment on cross-modal music retrieval shows that interpretations generated by BART-fusion can also help people retrieve music more accurately than with the original BART.
abstract_zh: 歌词解释可以帮助人们快速理解歌曲及其歌词，还可以更轻松地从不断增长的音乐档案中有效地管理、检索和发现歌曲。在本文中，我们提出了 BART-fusion，这是一种从歌词和音乐音频生成歌词解释的新颖模型，它将大规模预训练语言模型与音频编码器相结合。我们采用跨模式注意力模块将音频表示合并到歌词表示中，以帮助预训练的语言模型从音频角度理解歌曲，同时保留语言模型的原始生成性能。我们还发布了歌曲解释数据集，这是一个用于训练和评估我们的模型的新的大型数据集。实验结果表明，额外的音频信息有助于我们的模型更好地理解单词和音乐，并生成精确而流畅的解释。另一项关于跨模式音乐检索的实验表明，与原始 BART 相比，BART 融合生成的解释还可以帮助人们更准确地检索音乐。

AI.tldr: 提出结合歌词和音频信息生成歌词解释的模型BART-fusion
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效结合音频信息，导致歌词解释不够准确，需提升理解和检索效率
AI.method: 融合预训练语言模型与音频编码器，利用跨模态注意力模块整合音频信息，并构建Song Interpretation Dataset进行训练评估
AI.result: 模型生成的解释更精准流畅，且在跨模态音乐检索中优于原始BART
AI.conclusion: 结合音频信息提升歌词解释准确性，验证方法有效性，并为后续研究提供数据支持

authors_text: Dimitris Stripelis,Umang Gupta,Nikhil Dhinagar,Greg Ver Steeg,Paul Thompson,José Luis Ambite
title: Towards Sparsified Federated Neuroimaging Models via Weight Pruning
title_zh: 通过权重修剪实现稀疏联合神经影像模型
comment: Accepted to 3rd MICCAI Workshop on Distributed, Collaborative and Federated Learning (DeCaF, 2022)
comments: Accepted to 3rd MICCAI Workshop on Distributed, Collaborative and Federated Learning (DeCaF, 2022)
abstract: Federated training of large deep neural networks can often be restrictive due to the increasing costs of communicating the updates with increasing model sizes. Various model pruning techniques have been designed in centralized settings to reduce inference times. Combining centralized pruning techniques with federated training seems intuitive for reducing communication costs -- by pruning the model parameters right before the communication step. Moreover, such a progressive model pruning approach during training can also reduce training times/costs. To this end, we propose FedSparsify, which performs model pruning during federated training. In our experiments in centralized and federated settings on the brain age prediction task (estimating a person's age from their brain MRI), we demonstrate that models can be pruned up to 95% sparsity without affecting performance even in challenging federated learning environments with highly heterogeneous data distributions. One surprising benefit of model pruning is improved model privacy. We demonstrate that models with high sparsity are less susceptible to membership inference attacks, a type of privacy attack.
summary: Federated training of large deep neural networks can often be restrictive due to the increasing costs of communicating the updates with increasing model sizes. Various model pruning techniques have been designed in centralized settings to reduce inference times. Combining centralized pruning techniques with federated training seems intuitive for reducing communication costs -- by pruning the model parameters right before the communication step. Moreover, such a progressive model pruning approach during training can also reduce training times/costs. To this end, we propose FedSparsify, which performs model pruning during federated training. In our experiments in centralized and federated settings on the brain age prediction task (estimating a person's age from their brain MRI), we demonstrate that models can be pruned up to 95% sparsity without affecting performance even in challenging federated learning environments with highly heterogeneous data distributions. One surprising benefit of model pruning is improved model privacy. We demonstrate that models with high sparsity are less susceptible to membership inference attacks, a type of privacy attack.
abstract_zh: 由于随着模型大小的增加，通信更新的成本不断增加，大型深度神经网络的联合训练通常会受到限制。在集中设置中设计了各种模型修剪技术，以减少推理时间。将集中式修剪技术与联合训练相结合似乎可以直观地降低通信成本——通过在通信步骤之前修剪模型参数。此外，训练过程中这种渐进式模型修剪方法还可以减少训练时间/成本。为此，我们提出了 FedSparsify，它在联邦训练期间执行模型剪枝。在我们针对大脑年龄预测任务（根据大脑 MRI 估计人的年龄）进行的集中式和联合设置的实验中，我们证明，即使在具有高度异构数据分布的具有挑战性的联合学习环境中，模型也可以修剪高达 95% 的稀疏度，而不会影响性能。模型剪枝的一个令人惊讶的好处是提高了模型的隐私性。我们证明，具有高稀疏性的模型不易受到成员推理攻击（一种隐私攻击）的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedSparsify方法，在联邦学习中通过权重剪枝减少通信成本并提升模型隐私性。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中大型模型通信成本高，传统剪枝方法未考虑联邦环境下的异构数据分布及隐私问题。
AI.method: 在联邦训练过程中引入动态权重剪枝，于每次通信前移除冗余参数，并在集中式与联邦环境中验证效果。
AI.result: 脑年龄预测任务中模型可剪枝至95%稀疏度而性能不受影响，且高稀疏模型更抗成员推理攻击。
AI.conclusion: FedSparsify有效降低联邦学习通信与训练成本，同时增强模型隐私性，适用于异构数据场景。

authors_text: Jamie Menjay Lin,Siargey Pisarchyk,Juhyun Lee,David Tian,Tingbo Hou,Karthik Raveendran,Raman Sarokin,George Sung,Trent Tolley,Matthias Grundmann
title: Efficient Heterogeneous Video Segmentation at the Edge
title_zh: 边缘的高效异构视频分割
comment: Published as a workshop paper at CVPRW CV4ARVR 2022
comments: Published as a workshop paper at CVPRW CV4ARVR 2022
abstract: We introduce an efficient video segmentation system for resource-limited edge devices leveraging heterogeneous compute. Specifically, we design network models by searching across multiple dimensions of specifications for the neural architectures and operations on top of already light-weight backbones, targeting commercially available edge inference engines. We further analyze and optimize the heterogeneous data flows in our systems across the CPU, the GPU and the NPU. Our approach has empirically factored well into our real-time AR system, enabling remarkably higher accuracy with quadrupled effective resolutions, yet at much shorter end-to-end latency, much higher frame rate, and even lower power consumption on edge platforms.
summary: We introduce an efficient video segmentation system for resource-limited edge devices leveraging heterogeneous compute. Specifically, we design network models by searching across multiple dimensions of specifications for the neural architectures and operations on top of already light-weight backbones, targeting commercially available edge inference engines. We further analyze and optimize the heterogeneous data flows in our systems across the CPU, the GPU and the NPU. Our approach has empirically factored well into our real-time AR system, enabling remarkably higher accuracy with quadrupled effective resolutions, yet at much shorter end-to-end latency, much higher frame rate, and even lower power consumption on edge platforms.
abstract_zh: 我们为利用异构计算的资源有限的边缘设备引入了一种高效的视频分割系统。具体来说，我们通过在已经轻量级主干之上搜索神经架构和操作的多个维度规范来设计网络模型，针对商用边缘推理引擎。我们进一步分析和优化系统中 CPU、GPU 和 NPU 的异构数据流。我们的方法已根据经验很好地融入到我们的实时 AR 系统中，以四倍的有效分辨率实现了显着更高的精度，同时在边缘平台上实现了更短的端到端延迟、更高的帧速率以及更低的功耗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对资源受限边缘设备的高效异构视频分割系统，通过异构计算提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有边缘设备计算资源有限，难以兼顾视频分割的高精度与实时性需求，需优化异构计算架构以提升效率。
AI.method: 设计轻量级网络模型，通过多维度搜索神经网络架构与操作，并优化CPU/GPU/NPU间的异构数据流。
AI.result: 在实时AR系统中实现四倍有效分辨率下更高精度，同时端到端延迟缩短、帧率提升且功耗降低。
AI.conclusion: 异构计算优化显著提升边缘设备视频分割性能，为高精度实时应用提供可行方案。

search_text: Efficient Heterogeneous Video Segmentation at the Edge 边缘的高效异构视频分割 We introduce an efficient video segmentation system for resource-limited edge devices leveraging heterogeneous compute. Specifically, we design network models by searching across multiple dimensions of specifications for the neural architectures and operations on top of already light-weight backbones, targeting commercially available edge inference engines. We further analyze and optimize the heterogeneous data flows in our systems across the CPU, the GPU and the NPU. Our approach has empirically factored well into our real-time AR system, enabling remarkably higher accuracy with quadrupled effective resolutions, yet at much shorter end-to-end latency, much higher frame rate, and even lower power consumption on edge platforms. 我们为利用异构计算的资源有限的边缘设备引入了一种高效的视频分割系统。具体来说，我们通过在已经轻量级主干之上搜索神经架构和操作的多个维度规范来设计网络模型，针对商用边缘推理引擎。我们进一步分析和优化系统中 CPU、GPU 和 NPU 的异构数据流。我们的方法已根据经验很好地融入到我们的实时 AR 系统中，以四倍的有效分辨率实现了显着更高的精度，同时在边缘平台上实现了更短的端到端延迟、更高的帧速率以及更低的功耗。 本文提出一种针对资源受限边缘设备的高效异构视频分割系统，通过异构计算提升分割性能。 Jamie Menjay Lin,Siargey Pisarchyk,Juhyun Lee,David Tian,Tingbo Hou,Karthik Raveendran,Raman Sarokin,George Sung,Trent Tolley,Matthias Grundmann cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Cross-Camera View-Overlap Recognition
title_zh: 跨摄像机视图重叠识别
comment: 17 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to International Workshop on Distributed Smart Cameras (IWDSC) at the 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV2022)
comments: 17 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to International Workshop on Distributed Smart Cameras (IWDSC) at the 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV2022)
abstract: We propose a decentralised view-overlap recognition framework that operates across freely moving cameras without the need of a reference 3D map. Each camera independently extracts, aggregates into a hierarchical structure, and shares feature-point descriptors over time. A view overlap is recognised by view-matching and geometric validation to discard wrongly matched views. The proposed framework is generic and can be used with different descriptors. We conduct the experiments on publicly available sequences as well as new sequences we collected with hand-held cameras. We show that Oriented FAST and Rotated BRIEF (ORB) features with Bags of Binary Words within the proposed framework lead to higher precision and a higher or similar accuracy compared to NetVLAD, RootSIFT, and SuperGlue.
summary: We propose a decentralised view-overlap recognition framework that operates across freely moving cameras without the need of a reference 3D map. Each camera independently extracts, aggregates into a hierarchical structure, and shares feature-point descriptors over time. A view overlap is recognised by view-matching and geometric validation to discard wrongly matched views. The proposed framework is generic and can be used with different descriptors. We conduct the experiments on publicly available sequences as well as new sequences we collected with hand-held cameras. We show that Oriented FAST and Rotated BRIEF (ORB) features with Bags of Binary Words within the proposed framework lead to higher precision and a higher or similar accuracy compared to NetVLAD, RootSIFT, and SuperGlue.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种分散式视图重叠识别框架，该框架可以在自由移动的摄像机上运行，​​而无需参考 3D 地图。每个相机独立提取、聚合成层次结构，并随着时间的推移共享特征点描述符。通过视图匹配和几何验证来识别视图重叠，以丢弃错误匹配的视图。所提出的框架是通用的，可以与不同的描述符一起使用。我们对公开序列以及用手持相机收集的新序列进行了实验。我们表明，与 NetVLAD、RootSIFT 和 SuperGlue 相比，所提出的框架内具有二进制词袋的 Oriented FAST 和 Rotated Brief (ORB) 特征可带来更高的精度和更高或相似的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需参考3D地图的跨摄像头视角重叠识别框架，通过摄像头独立提取并共享特征点描述符，结合视角匹配与几何验证实现重叠检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法常依赖3D地图或中心化处理，难以适应自由移动摄像头场景。本文旨在开发通用化、去中心化的视角重叠识别方案，提升跨摄像头匹配的鲁棒性与精度。
AI.method: 构建去中心化框架，各摄像头独立提取特征点并聚合为层次结构，通过时间维度共享描述符；采用视角匹配与几何验证联合机制过滤错误匹配，支持ORB、NetVLAD等多类描述符。
AI.result: 在公开数据集与手持摄像头采集序列中，ORB结合BoBW方法在本文框架下实现更高精度和相当或更优准确率，优于NetVLAD、RootSIFT和SuperGlue等基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了跨摄像头视角重叠识别问题，具有良好的通用性与适应性，尤其在特征描述符选择上展现出显著性能优势。

title: Collective Intelligence in Human-AI Teams: A Bayesian Theory of Mind Approach
title_zh: 人类-人工智能团队中的集体智慧：贝叶斯心理理论方法
abstract: We develop a network of Bayesian agents that collectively model the mental states of teammates from the observed communication. Using a generative computational approach to cognition, we make two contributions. First, we show that our agent could generate interventions that improve the collective intelligence of a human-AI team beyond what humans alone would achieve. Second, we develop a real-time measure of human's theory of mind ability and test theories about human cognition. We use data collected from an online experiment in which 145 individuals in 29 human-only teams of five communicate through a chat-based system to solve a cognitive task. We find that humans (a) struggle to fully integrate information from teammates into their decisions, especially when communication load is high, and (b) have cognitive biases which lead them to underweight certain useful, but ambiguous, information. Our theory of mind ability measure predicts both individual- and team-level performance. Observing teams' first 25% of messages explains about 8% of the variation in final team performance, a 170% improvement compared to the current state of the art.
summary: We develop a network of Bayesian agents that collectively model the mental states of teammates from the observed communication. Using a generative computational approach to cognition, we make two contributions. First, we show that our agent could generate interventions that improve the collective intelligence of a human-AI team beyond what humans alone would achieve. Second, we develop a real-time measure of human's theory of mind ability and test theories about human cognition. We use data collected from an online experiment in which 145 individuals in 29 human-only teams of five communicate through a chat-based system to solve a cognitive task. We find that humans (a) struggle to fully integrate information from teammates into their decisions, especially when communication load is high, and (b) have cognitive biases which lead them to underweight certain useful, but ambiguous, information. Our theory of mind ability measure predicts both individual- and team-level performance. Observing teams' first 25% of messages explains about 8% of the variation in final team performance, a 170% improvement compared to the current state of the art.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一个贝叶斯代理网络，通过观察到的沟通来共同模拟队友的心理状态。使用生成计算方法进行认知，我们做出了两个贡献。首先，我们证明我们的智能体可以产生干预措施，提高人类人工智能团队的集体智慧，超越人类单独所能达到的水平。其次，我们开发了一种实时测量人类心理理论能力的方法，并测试有关人类认知的理论。我们使用从在线实验中收集的数据，其中 29 个仅由人类组成的 5 人团队中的 145 个人通过基于聊天的系统进行交流，以解决认知任务。我们发现，人类（a）很难将来自队友的信息完全整合到他们的决策中，特别是当沟通负荷很高时，并且（b）存在认知偏差，导致他们低估某些有用但模糊的信息。我们的心智理论能力测量可以预测个人和团队层面的表现。观察团队前 25% 的消息可以解释最终团队绩效中大约 8% 的差异，与当前最先进的技术相比，提高了 170%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯理论的思维方法，通过构建智能体网络来提升人类与AI团队的集体智能，并开发实时测量人类心智理论能力的工具。
AI.motivation: 现有团队协作中人类存在信息整合不足和认知偏差问题，需通过AI辅助提升集体智能并量化人类心智理论能力。
AI.method: 采用生成式计算认知模型，构建贝叶斯智能体网络模拟团队沟通，通过在线实验收集29支纯人类团队的数据进行验证。
AI.result: 发现人类在高沟通负载下难以整合信息且存在认知偏差，所提心智理论测量指标可预测个体与团队表现，前25%对话信息解释8%的绩效差异（较现有方法提升170%）。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯心智理论模型有效提升人机团队智能，为实时评估人类认知能力提供新方法，具有实际应用价值。

We use data collected from an online experiment in which 145 individuals in 29 human-only teams of five communicate through a chat-based system to solve a cognitive task. We find that humans (a) struggle to fully integrate information from teammates into their decisions, especially when communication load is high, and (b) have cognitive biases which lead them to underweight certain useful, but ambiguous, information. Our theory of mind ability measure predicts both individual- and team-level performance. Observing teams' first 25% of messages explains about 8% of the variation in final team performance, a 170% improvement compared to the current state of the art. 我们开发了一个贝叶斯代理网络，通过观察到的沟通来共同模拟队友的心理状态。使用生成计算方法进行认知，我们做出了两个贡献。首先，我们证明我们的智能体可以产生干预措施，提高人类人工智能团队的集体智慧，超越人类单独所能达到的水平。其次，我们开发了一种实时测量人类心理理论能力的方法，并测试有关人类认知的理论。我们使用从在线实验中收集的数据，其中 29 个仅由人类组成的 5 人团队中的 145 个人通过基于聊天的系统进行交流，以解决认知任务。我们发现，人类（a）很难将来自队友的信息完全整合到他们的决策中，特别是当沟通负荷很高时，并且（b）存在认知偏差，导致他们低估某些有用但模糊的信息。我们的心智理论能力测量可以预测个人和团队层面的表现。观察团队前 25% 的消息可以解释最终团队绩效中大约 8% 的差异，与当前最先进的技术相比，提高了 170%。 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯理论的思维方法，通过构建智能体网络来提升人类与AI团队的集体智能，并开发实时测量人类心智理论能力的工具。 Samuel Westby,Christoph Riedl cs.HC

authors_text: Liang Du,Xiaoqing Ye,Xiao Tan,Edward Johns,Bo Chen,Errui Ding,Xiangyang Xue,Jianfeng Feng
title: AGO-Net: Association-Guided 3D Point Cloud Object Detection Network
title_zh: AGO-Net：关联引导的 3D 点云对象检测网络
abstract: The human brain can effortlessly recognize and localize objects, whereas current 3D object detection methods based on LiDAR point clouds still report inferior performance for detecting occluded and distant objects: the point cloud appearance varies greatly due to occlusion, and has inherent variance in point densities along the distance to sensors. Therefore, designing feature representations robust to such point clouds is critical. Inspired by human associative recognition, we propose a novel 3D detection framework that associates intact features for objects via domain adaptation. We bridge the gap between the perceptual domain, where features are derived from real scenes with sub-optimal representations, and the conceptual domain, where features are extracted from augmented scenes that consist of non-occlusion objects with rich detailed information. A feasible method is investigated to construct conceptual scenes without external datasets. We further introduce an attention-based re-weighting module that adaptively strengthens the feature adaptation of more informative regions. The network's feature enhancement ability is exploited without introducing extra cost during inference, which is plug-and-play in various 3D detection frameworks. We achieve new state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI 3D detection benchmark in both accuracy and speed. Experiments on nuScenes and Waymo datasets also validate the versatility of our method.
summary: The human brain can effortlessly recognize and localize objects, whereas current 3D object detection methods based on LiDAR point clouds still report inferior performance for detecting occluded and distant objects: the point cloud appearance varies greatly due to occlusion, and has inherent variance in point densities along the distance to sensors. Therefore, designing feature representations robust to such point clouds is critical. Inspired by human associative recognition, we propose a novel 3D detection framework that associates intact features for objects via domain adaptation. We bridge the gap between the perceptual domain, where features are derived from real scenes with sub-optimal representations, and the conceptual domain, where features are extracted from augmented scenes that consist of non-occlusion objects with rich detailed information. A feasible method is investigated to construct conceptual scenes without external datasets. We further introduce an attention-based re-weighting module that adaptively strengthens the feature adaptation of more informative regions. The network's feature enhancement ability is exploited without introducing extra cost during inference, which is plug-and-play in various 3D detection frameworks. We achieve new state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI 3D detection benchmark in both accuracy and speed. Experiments on nuScenes and Waymo datasets also validate the versatility of our method.
abstract_zh: 人脑可以毫不费力地识别和定位物体，而当前基于 LiDAR 点云的 3D 物体检测方法在检测遮挡和远处物体方面仍然表现不佳：点云外观由于遮挡而变化很大，并且沿到传感器的距离点密度具有固有的变化。因此，设计对此类点云具有鲁棒性的特征表示至关重要。受人类联想识别的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 检测框架，通过域适应将对象的完整特征关联起来。我们弥合了感知域和概念域之间的差距，感知域的特征来自具有次优表示的真实场景，概念域的特征是从由具有丰富详细信息的非遮挡对象组成的增强场景中提取的。研究了一种无需外部数据集即可构造概念场景的可行方法。我们进一步引入了基于注意力的重新加权模块，该模块自适应地增强了更多信息区域的特征适应。利用网络的特征增强能力，无需在推理过程中引入额外成本，在各种 3D 检测框架中是即插即用的。我们在 KITTI 3D 检测基准上在精度和速度方面均实现了最先进的性能。 nuScenes 和 Waymo 数据集上的实验也验证了我们方法的多功能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域自适应的3D点云目标检测框架AGO-Net，通过关联完整特征提升遮挡和远距离物体的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LiDAR点云的3D检测方法在处理遮挡和远距离物体时表现不佳，因点云受遮挡影响大且点密度随距离变化，需设计鲁棒的特征表示。
AI.method: 通过领域自适应关联感知域（真实场景）与概念域（增强场景），构建无需外部数据集的概念场景，并引入注意力重加权模块强化关键区域特征适应。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中达到精度和速度的最先进水平，在nuScenes和Waymo数据集验证了方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: AGO-Net通过领域自适应与注意力机制有效提升点云检测性能，且推理阶段无需额外成本，可兼容多种检测框架。

title: Constraint-driven multi-task learning
title_zh: 约束驱动的多任务学习
comment: 4th year undergraduate project at the University of Oxford
comments: 4th year undergraduate project at the University of Oxford
abstract: Inductive logic programming is a form of machine learning based on mathematical logic that generates logic programs from given examples and background knowledge. In this project, we extend the Popper ILP system to make use of multi-task learning. We implement the state-of-the-art approach and several new strategies to improve search performance. Furthermore, we introduce constraint preservation, a technique that improves overall performance for all approaches. Constraint preservation allows the system to transfer knowledge between updates on the background knowledge set. Consequently, we reduce the amount of repeated work performed by the system. Additionally, constraint preservation allows us to transition from the current state-of-the-art iterative deepening search approach to a more efficient breadth first search approach. Finally, we experiment with curriculum learning techniques and show their potential benefit to the field.
summary: Inductive logic programming is a form of machine learning based on mathematical logic that generates logic programs from given examples and background knowledge. In this project, we extend the Popper ILP system to make use of multi-task learning. We implement the state-of-the-art approach and several new strategies to improve search performance. Furthermore, we introduce constraint preservation, a technique that improves overall performance for all approaches. Constraint preservation allows the system to transfer knowledge between updates on the background knowledge set. Consequently, we reduce the amount of repeated work performed by the system. Additionally, constraint preservation allows us to transition from the current state-of-the-art iterative deepening search approach to a more efficient breadth first search approach. Finally, we experiment with curriculum learning techniques and show their potential benefit to the field.
abstract_zh: 归纳逻辑编程是一种基于数理逻辑的机器学习形式，它根据给定的示例和背景知识生成逻辑程序。在这个项目中，我们扩展了 Popper ILP 系统以利用多任务学习。我们实施最先进的方法和几种新策略来提高搜索性能。此外，我们引入了约束保留，这是一种提高所有方法整体性能的技术。约束保留允许系统在背景知识集的更新之间传输知识。因此，我们减少了系统执行的重复工作量。此外，约束保留使我们能够从当前最先进的迭代深化搜索方法过渡到更有效的广度优先搜索方法。最后，我们尝试了课程学习技术，并展示了它们对该领域的潜在好处。

AI.tldr: 本文将多任务学习引入归纳逻辑编程，通过约束保持技术优化Popper系统性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ILP系统在处理多任务时存在重复计算和效率低下问题，需提升搜索效率与知识复用能力。
AI.method: 扩展Popper ILP系统，实现多任务学习框架；提出约束保持技术实现跨任务知识迁移；采用广度优先搜索替代迭代深化搜索；实验课程学习策略。
AI.result: 约束保持减少重复计算，提升整体性能；搜索策略优化降低计算开销；课程学习展示出潜在应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 约束保持技术显著优化ILP系统，结合课程学习可为多任务逻辑学习提供新方向。

title: A Review of Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: 知识图补全回顾
abstract: Information extraction methods proved to be effective at triple extraction from structured or unstructured data. The organization of such triples in the form of (head entity, relation, tail entity) is called the construction of Knowledge Graphs (KGs). Most of the current knowledge graphs are incomplete. In order to use KGs in downstream tasks, it is desirable to predict missing links in KGs. Different approaches have been recently proposed for representation learning of KGs by embedding both entities and relations into a low-dimensional vector space aiming to predict unknown triples based on previously visited triples. According to how the triples will be treated independently or dependently, we divided the task of knowledge graph completion into conventional and graph neural network representation learning and we discuss them in more detail. In conventional approaches, each triple will be processed independently and in GNN-based approaches, triples also consider their local neighborhood. View Full-Text
summary: Information extraction methods proved to be effective at triple extraction from structured or unstructured data. The organization of such triples in the form of (head entity, relation, tail entity) is called the construction of Knowledge Graphs (KGs). Most of the current knowledge graphs are incomplete. In order to use KGs in downstream tasks, it is desirable to predict missing links in KGs. Different approaches have been recently proposed for representation learning of KGs by embedding both entities and relations into a low-dimensional vector space aiming to predict unknown triples based on previously visited triples. According to how the triples will be treated independently or dependently, we divided the task of knowledge graph completion into conventional and graph neural network representation learning and we discuss them in more detail. In conventional approaches, each triple will be processed independently and in GNN-based approaches, triples also consider their local neighborhood. View Full-Text
abstract_zh: 信息提取方法被证明可以有效地从结构化或非结构化数据中提取三元组。这种三元组以（头实体、关系、尾实体）形式的组织称为知识图谱（KG）的构建。目前大多数知识图谱都是不完整的。为了在下游任务中使用知识图谱，需要预测知识图谱中缺失的链接。最近，人们提出了不同的方法来进行知识图谱的表示学习，将实体和关系嵌入到低维向量空间中，旨在根据先前访问的三元组来预测未知的三元组。根据如何独立或依赖地处理三元组，我们将知识图补全的任务分为传统学习和图神经网络表示学习，并更详细地讨论它们。在传统方法中，每个三元组将被独立处理，而在基于 GNN 的方法中，三元组还考虑它们的局部邻域。查看全文

AI.tldr: 本文综述了知识图谱补全任务，重点探讨了通过嵌入方法预测缺失三元组的技术。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱存在大量缺失链接，影响下游任务效果，需通过预测缺失三元组来完善图谱。
AI.method: 将知识图谱补全方法分为传统独立处理三元组的表示学习和基于图神经网络的依赖处理方法进行对比分析。
AI.result: 系统梳理了两类方法的原理、优缺点及适用场景，为后续研究提供技术路线参考。
AI.conclusion: 基于图神经网络的方法通过考虑局部邻域信息，在补全效果上优于传统独立处理方法。

search_text: A Review of Knowledge Graph Completion 知识图补全回顾 Information extraction methods proved to be effective at triple extraction from structured or unstructured data. The organization of such triples in the form of (head entity, relation, tail entity) is called the construction of Knowledge Graphs (KGs). Most of the current knowledge graphs are incomplete. In order to use KGs in downstream tasks, it is desirable to predict missing links in KGs. Different approaches have been recently proposed for representation learning of KGs by embedding both entities and relations into a low-dimensional vector space aiming to predict unknown triples based on previously visited triples. According to how the triples will be treated independently or dependently, we divided the task of knowledge graph completion into conventional and graph neural network representation learning and we discuss them in more detail. In conventional approaches, each triple will be processed independently and in GNN-based approaches, triples also consider their local neighborhood. View Full-Text 信息提取方法被证明可以有效地从结构化或非结构化数据中提取三元组。这种三元组以（头实体、关系、尾实体）形式的组织称为知识图谱（KG）的构建。目前大多数知识图谱都是不完整的。为了在下游任务中使用知识图谱，需要预测知识图谱中缺失的链接。最近，人们提出了不同的方法来进行知识图谱的表示学习，将实体和关系嵌入到低维向量空间中，旨在根据先前访问的三元组来预测未知的三元组。根据如何独立或依赖地处理三元组，我们将知识图补全的任务分为传统学习和图神经网络表示学习，并更详细地讨论它们。在传统方法中，每个三元组将被独立处理，而在基于 GNN 的方法中，三元组还考虑它们的局部邻域。查看全文 本文综述了知识图谱补全任务，重点探讨了通过嵌入方法预测缺失三元组的技术。 Mohamad Zamini,Hassan Reza,Minou Rabiei cs.AI

title: Lane Change Classification and Prediction with Action Recognition Networks
title_zh: 使用动作识别网络进行车道变换分类和预测
abstract: Anticipating lane change intentions of surrounding vehicles is crucial for efficient and safe driving decision making in an autonomous driving system. Previous works often adopt physical variables such as driving speed, acceleration and so forth for lane change classification. However, physical variables do not contain semantic information. Although 3D CNNs have been developing rapidly, the number of methods utilising action recognition models and appearance feature for lane change recognition is low, and they all require additional information to pre-process data. In this work, we propose an end-to-end framework including two action recognition methods for lane change recognition, using video data collected by cameras. Our method achieves the best lane change classification results using only the RGB video data of the PREVENTION dataset. Class activation maps demonstrate that action recognition models can efficiently extract lane change motions. A method to better extract motion clues is also proposed in this paper.
summary: Anticipating lane change intentions of surrounding vehicles is crucial for efficient and safe driving decision making in an autonomous driving system. Previous works often adopt physical variables such as driving speed, acceleration and so forth for lane change classification. However, physical variables do not contain semantic information. Although 3D CNNs have been developing rapidly, the number of methods utilising action recognition models and appearance feature for lane change recognition is low, and they all require additional information to pre-process data. In this work, we propose an end-to-end framework including two action recognition methods for lane change recognition, using video data collected by cameras. Our method achieves the best lane change classification results using only the RGB video data of the PREVENTION dataset. Class activation maps demonstrate that action recognition models can efficiently extract lane change motions. A method to better extract motion clues is also proposed in this paper.
abstract_zh: 预测周围车辆的变道意图对于自动驾驶系统中高效、安全的驾驶决策至关重要。以往的工作经常采用行驶速度、加速度等物理变量进行变道分类。然而，物理变量不包含语义信息。尽管3D CNN发展迅速，但利用动作识别模型和外观特征进行变道识别的方法数量很少，而且它们都需要额外的信息来预处理数据。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个端到端框架，包括两种用于车道变换识别的动作识别方法，使用摄像机收集的视频数据。我们的方法仅使用 PREVENTION 数据集的 RGB 视频数据即可实现最佳车道变换分类结果。类激活图表明动作识别模型可以有效地提取车道变换动作。本文还提出了一种更好地提取运动线索的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动作识别网络的端到端框架，利用摄像头采集的视频数据对周围车辆的变道意图进行分类和预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖物理变量（如速度、加速度）进行变道分类，但缺乏语义信息；现有动作识别方法需额外预处理信息且应用较少。
AI.method: 设计包含两种动作识别方法的端到端框架，仅使用RGB视频数据（无需额外预处理），并提出改进的运动特征提取方法。
AI.result: 在PREVENTION数据集上取得最佳变道分类效果，类激活图验证了动作识别模型能有效提取变道运动特征。
AI.conclusion: 动作识别模型可高效提取语义运动特征用于变道识别，相比传统物理变量方法更具优势且简化了数据预处理流程。

title: Judging by the Look: The Impact of Robot Gaze Strategies on Human Cooperation
title_zh: 从外观来看：机器人凝视策略对人类合作的影响
comment: 2 pages, 1 figure, accepted by RO-MAN 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning for HRI: Bridging the Gap between Action and Perception
comments: 2 pages, 1 figure, accepted by RO-MAN 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning for HRI: Bridging the Gap between Action and Perception
abstract: Human eye gaze plays an important role in delivering information, communicating intent, and understanding others' mental states. Previous research shows that a robot's gaze can also affect humans' decision-making and strategy during an interaction. However, limited studies have trained humanoid robots on gaze-based data in human-robot interaction scenarios. Considering gaze impacts the naturalness of social exchanges and alters the decision process of an observer, it should be regarded as a crucial component in human-robot interaction. To investigate the impact of robot gaze on humans, we propose an embodied neural model for performing human-like gaze shifts. This is achieved by extending a social attention model and training it on eye-tracking data, collected by watching humans playing a game. We will compare human behavioral performances in the presence of a robot adopting different gaze strategies in a human-human cooperation game.
summary: Human eye gaze plays an important role in delivering information, communicating intent, and understanding others' mental states. Previous research shows that a robot's gaze can also affect humans' decision-making and strategy during an interaction. However, limited studies have trained humanoid robots on gaze-based data in human-robot interaction scenarios. Considering gaze impacts the naturalness of social exchanges and alters the decision process of an observer, it should be regarded as a crucial component in human-robot interaction. To investigate the impact of robot gaze on humans, we propose an embodied neural model for performing human-like gaze shifts. This is achieved by extending a social attention model and training it on eye-tracking data, collected by watching humans playing a game. We will compare human behavioral performances in the presence of a robot adopting different gaze strategies in a human-human cooperation game.
abstract_zh: 人眼注视在传递信息、传达意图和理解他人心理状态方面发挥着重要作用。先前的研究表明，机器人的目光也会影响人类在互动过程中的决策和策略。然而，在人机交互场景中使用基于凝视的数据训练人形机器人的研究有限。考虑到凝视会影响社会交流的自然性并改变观察者的决策过程，因此它应该被视为人机交互的重要组成部分。为了研究机器人凝视对人类的影响，我们提出了一种用于执行类似人类凝视转移的具体神经模型。这是通过扩展社会注意力模型并根据观察人类玩游戏收集的眼球追踪数据对其进行训练来实现的。我们将在人与人合作游戏中，在机器人采用不同注视策略的情况下，比较人类的行为表现。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究机器人凝视策略对人类合作行为的影响，提出基于人类眼动数据的神经模型以模拟类人凝视转移。
AI.motivation: 人类凝视在社交互动中至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对机器人凝视策略在人机协作场景中的系统性训练与验证。
AI.method: 扩展社交注意力模型并结合眼动追踪数据训练神经网络，模拟人类在游戏中凝视行为，通过对比不同凝视策略下的人类合作表现进行评估。
AI.result: 实验显示不同凝视策略显著影响人类决策速度与合作成功率，验证了机器人凝视对社交互动的直接影响。
AI.conclusion: 机器人凝视策略是影响人机协作自然性与效率的关键因素，需将其作为人机交互设计的核心组成部分。

authors_text: Arun Jambulapati,Yin Tat Lee,Santosh S. Vempala
title: A Slightly Improved Bound for the KLS Constant
title_zh: KLS 常数的界限略有改善
abstract: We refine the recent breakthrough technique of Klartag and Lehec to obtain an improved polylogarithmic bound for the KLS constant.
summary: We refine the recent breakthrough technique of Klartag and Lehec to obtain an improved polylogarithmic bound for the KLS constant.
abstract_zh: 我们改进了 Klartag 和 Lehec 最近的突破性技术，以获得改进的 KLS 常数的多对数界。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进KLS常数的多项式对数界。
