search_text: A Slightly Improved Bound for the KLS Constant KLS 常数的界限略有改善 We refine the recent breakthrough technique of Klartag and Lehec to obtain an improved polylogarithmic bound for the KLS constant. 我们改进了 Klartag 和 Lehec 最近的突破性技术，以获得改进的 KLS 常数的多对数界。 本文旨在改进KLS常数的多项式对数界。 Arun Jambulapati,Yin Tat Lee,Santosh S. Vempala math.FA,cs.DS,math.PR

title: Detecting the unknown in Object Detection
title_zh: 检测物体检测中的未知物
abstract: Object detection methods have witnessed impressive improvements in the last years thanks to the design of novel neural network architectures and the availability of large scale datasets. However, current methods have a significant limitation: they are able to detect only the classes observed during training time, that are only a subset of all the classes that a detector may encounter in the real world. Furthermore, the presence of unknown classes is often not considered at training time, resulting in methods not even able to detect that an unknown object is present in the image. In this work, we address the problem of detecting unknown objects, known as open-set object detection. We propose a novel training strategy, called UNKAD, able to predict unknown objects without requiring any annotation of them, exploiting non annotated objects that are already present in the background of training images. In particular, exploiting the four-steps training strategy of Faster R-CNN, UNKAD first identifies and pseudo-labels unknown objects and then uses the pseudo-annotations to train an additional unknown class. While UNKAD can directly detect unknown objects, we further combine it with previous unknown detection techniques, showing that it improves their performance at no costs.
summary: Object detection methods have witnessed impressive improvements in the last years thanks to the design of novel neural network architectures and the availability of large scale datasets. However, current methods have a significant limitation: they are able to detect only the classes observed during training time, that are only a subset of all the classes that a detector may encounter in the real world. Furthermore, the presence of unknown classes is often not considered at training time, resulting in methods not even able to detect that an unknown object is present in the image. In this work, we address the problem of detecting unknown objects, known as open-set object detection. We propose a novel training strategy, called UNKAD, able to predict unknown objects without requiring any annotation of them, exploiting non annotated objects that are already present in the background of training images. In particular, exploiting the four-steps training strategy of Faster R-CNN, UNKAD first identifies and pseudo-labels unknown objects and then uses the pseudo-annotations to train an additional unknown class. While UNKAD can directly detect unknown objects, we further combine it with previous unknown detection techniques, showing that it improves their performance at no costs.
abstract_zh: 由于新颖的神经网络架构的设计和大规模数据集的可用性，目标检测方法在过去几年中取得了令人瞩目的进步。然而，当前的方法有一个很大的局限性：它们只能检测在训练期间观察到的类，这些类只是检测器在现实世界中可能遇到的所有类的子集。此外，在训练时通常不会考虑未知类的存在，导致方法甚至无法检测图像中是否存在未知对象。在这项工作中，我们解决了检测未知对象的问题，称为开放集对象检测。我们提出了一种称为 UNKAD 的新颖训练策略，能够利用训练图像背景中已经存在的未注释对象来预测未知对象，而无需对其进行任何注释。特别是，利用 Faster R-CNN 的四步训练策略，UNKAD 首先识别并伪标记未知对象，然后使用伪注释来训练额外的未知类。虽然 UNKAD 可以直接检测未知物体，但我们进一步将其与之前的未知检测技术相结合，表明它可以免费提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注未知类别的开放集目标检测方法UNKAD，通过利用训练图像背景中的未标注对象进行伪标注，提升检测模型对未知对象的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法仅能识别训练时出现的类别，无法检测未知类别，且训练阶段常忽略未知类别的存在，导致模型无法识别新出现的对象。
AI.method: 基于Faster R-CNN的四步训练策略，UNKAD通过伪标注背景中的未知对象生成伪标签，并利用这些标签训练额外的未知类别分类器，同时与现有未知检测技术结合以提升性能。
AI.result: UNKAD能够在无需未知类别标注的情况下直接检测未知对象，并在结合现有技术时显著提升检测效果且不增加额外成本。
AI.conclusion: UNKAD通过有效利用训练数据中的背景信息，为开放集目标检测提供了无需标注的解决方案，同时兼容并优化了现有检测技术。

authors_text: Harshit Joshi,José Cambronero,Sumit Gulwani,Vu Le,Ivan Radicek,Gust Verbruggen
title: Repair Is Nearly Generation: Multilingual Program Repair with LLMs
title_zh: 修复即将生成：法学硕士的多语言程序修复
abstract: Most programmers make mistakes when writing code. Some of these mistakes are small and require few edits to the original program -- a class of errors recently termed last mile mistakes. These errors break the flow for experienced developers and can stump novice programmers. Existing automated repair techniques targeting this class of errors are language-specific and do not easily carry over to new languages. Transferring symbolic approaches requires substantial engineering and neural approaches require data and retraining. We introduce RING, a multilingual repair engine powered by a large language model trained on code (LLMC) such as Codex. Such a multilingual engine enables a flipped model for programming assistance, one where the programmer writes code and the AI assistance suggests fixes, compared to traditional code suggestion technology. Taking inspiration from the way programmers manually fix bugs, we show that a prompt-based strategy that conceptualizes repair as localization, transformation, and candidate ranking, can successfully repair programs in multiple languages with minimal effort. We present the first results for such a multilingual repair engine by evaluating on 6 different languages and comparing performance to language-specific repair engines. We show that RING can outperform language-specific repair engines for three of these languages.
summary: Most programmers make mistakes when writing code. Some of these mistakes are small and require few edits to the original program -- a class of errors recently termed last mile mistakes. These errors break the flow for experienced developers and can stump novice programmers. Existing automated repair techniques targeting this class of errors are language-specific and do not easily carry over to new languages. Transferring symbolic approaches requires substantial engineering and neural approaches require data and retraining. We introduce RING, a multilingual repair engine powered by a large language model trained on code (LLMC) such as Codex. Such a multilingual engine enables a flipped model for programming assistance, one where the programmer writes code and the AI assistance suggests fixes, compared to traditional code suggestion technology. Taking inspiration from the way programmers manually fix bugs, we show that a prompt-based strategy that conceptualizes repair as localization, transformation, and candidate ranking, can successfully repair programs in multiple languages with minimal effort. We present the first results for such a multilingual repair engine by evaluating on 6 different languages and comparing performance to language-specific repair engines. We show that RING can outperform language-specific repair engines for three of these languages.
abstract_zh: 大多数程序员在编写代码时都会犯错误。其中一些错误很小，不需要对原始程序进行很少的编辑——最近被称为最后一英里错误的一类错误。这些错误会破坏经验丰富的开发人员的流程，并可能难倒新手程序员。针对此类错误的现有自动修复技术是特定于语言的，并且不容易转移到新语言。转移符号方法需要大量的工程设计，而神经方法则需要数据和再训练。我们推出 RING，这是一种多语言修复引擎，由 Codex 等代码 (LLMC) 训练的大型语言模型提供支持。与传统的代码建议技术相比，这种多语言引擎实现了一种翻转的编程辅助模型，即程序员编写代码，人工智能辅助建议修复。从程序员手动修复错误的方式中汲取灵感，我们证明了一种基于提示的策略，将修复概念化为本地化、转换和候选排名，可以以最小的努力成功修复多种语言的程序。我们通过评估 6 种不同语言并将性能与特定语言的修复引擎进行比较，展示了此类多语言修复引擎的第一个结果。我们证明，对于其中三种语言，RING 的性能优于特定于语言的修复引擎。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RING，一种基于大语言模型的多语言程序修复引擎，通过提示策略实现跨语言代码修复。
AI.motivation: 现有程序修复技术语言特定，难以扩展到新语言，且需要大量工程或数据支持，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 利用Codex等代码训练的大语言模型，设计基于提示的修复策略，将修复过程分解为定位、转换和候选排序三步骤。
AI.result: 在6种编程语言的测试中，RING在其中3种语言的修复效果优于语言特定修复引擎。
AI.conclusion: 多语言程序修复可通过大语言模型和提示策略高效实现，为跨语言修复提供了新思路和可行性验证。

title: ImitAL: Learned Active Learning Strategy on Synthetic Data
title_zh: ImitAL：基于合成数据的主动学习策略
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.07670
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.07670
abstract: Active Learning (AL) is a well-known standard method for efficiently obtaining annotated data by first labeling the samples that contain the most information based on a query strategy. In the past, a large variety of such query strategies has been proposed, with each generation of new strategies increasing the runtime and adding more complexity. However, to the best of our our knowledge, none of these strategies excels consistently over a large number of datasets from different application domains. Basically, most of the the existing AL strategies are a combination of the two simple heuristics informativeness and representativeness, and the big differences lie in the combination of the often conflicting heuristics. Within this paper, we propose ImitAL, a domain-independent novel query strategy, which encodes AL as a learning-to-rank problem and learns an optimal combination between both heuristics. We train ImitAL on large-scale simulated AL runs on purely synthetic datasets. To show that ImitAL was successfully trained, we perform an extensive evaluation comparing our strategy on 13 different datasets, from a wide range of domains, with 7 other query strategies.
summary: Active Learning (AL) is a well-known standard method for efficiently obtaining annotated data by first labeling the samples that contain the most information based on a query strategy. In the past, a large variety of such query strategies has been proposed, with each generation of new strategies increasing the runtime and adding more complexity. However, to the best of our our knowledge, none of these strategies excels consistently over a large number of datasets from different application domains. Basically, most of the the existing AL strategies are a combination of the two simple heuristics informativeness and representativeness, and the big differences lie in the combination of the often conflicting heuristics. Within this paper, we propose ImitAL, a domain-independent novel query strategy, which encodes AL as a learning-to-rank problem and learns an optimal combination between both heuristics. We train ImitAL on large-scale simulated AL runs on purely synthetic datasets. To show that ImitAL was successfully trained, we perform an extensive evaluation comparing our strategy on 13 different datasets, from a wide range of domains, with 7 other query strategies.
abstract_zh: 主动学习（AL）是一种众所周知的标准方法，它首先根据查询策略标记包含最多信息的样本，从而有效地获取带注释的数据。过去，已经提出了各种各样的此类查询策略，每一代新策略都会增加运行时间并增加更多的复杂性。然而，据我们所知，这些策略没有一个能够在来自不同应用领域的大量数据集上始终表现出色。基本上，现有的 AL 策略大多是信息性和代表性这两种简单启发式的组合，最大的区别在于经常相互冲突的启发式的组合。在本文中，我们提出了 ImitAL，一种与领域无关的新颖查询策略，它将 AL 编码为学习排序问题，并学习两种启发式方法之间的最佳组合。我们在纯合成数据集上进行大规模模拟 AL 运行训练 ImitAL。为了证明 ImitAL 已成功训练，我们对来自广泛领域的 13 个不同数据集上的策略与 7 种其他查询策略进行了广泛的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ImitAL，一种通过学习排序问题自动组合信息量和代表性启发式的领域无关主动学习策略。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习策略在不同领域数据集上表现不稳定，且依赖人工设计启发式组合，难以平衡冲突的指标。
AI.method: 将主动学习建模为学习排序问题，在合成数据集上训练神经网络学习最优启发式组合权重。
AI.result: 在13个跨领域数据集上对比7种策略，ImitAL在标注效率和模型性能上均取得显著优势。
AI.conclusion: ImitAL通过模拟训练实现启发式自动组合，为跨领域主动学习提供了可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: ImitAL: Learned Active Learning Strategy on Synthetic Data ImitAL：基于合成数据的主动学习策略 Active Learning (AL) is a well-known standard method for efficiently obtaining annotated data by first labeling the samples that contain the most information based on a query strategy. In the past, a large variety of such query strategies has been proposed, with each generation of new strategies increasing the runtime and adding more complexity. However, to the best of our our knowledge, none of these strategies excels consistently over a large number of datasets from different application domains. Basically, most of the the existing AL strategies are a combination of the two simple heuristics informativeness and representativeness, and the big differences lie in the combination of the often conflicting heuristics. Within this paper, we propose ImitAL, a domain-independent novel query strategy, which encodes AL as a learning-to-rank problem and learns an optimal combination between both heuristics. We train ImitAL on large-scale simulated AL runs on purely synthetic datasets. title: On a Built-in Conflict between Deep Learning and Systematic Generalization
title_zh: 深度学习与系统泛化之间的内在冲突
abstract: In this paper, we hypothesize that internal function sharing is one of the reasons to weaken o.o.d. or systematic generalization in deep learning for classification tasks. Under equivalent prediction, a model partitions an input space into multiple parts separated by boundaries. The function sharing prefers to reuse boundaries, leading to fewer parts for new outputs, which conflicts with systematic generalization. We show such phenomena in standard deep learning models, such as fully connected, convolutional, residual networks, LSTMs, and (Vision) Transformers. We hope this study provides novel insights into systematic generalization and forms a basis for new research directions.
summary: In this paper, we hypothesize that internal function sharing is one of the reasons to weaken o.o.d. or systematic generalization in deep learning for classification tasks. Under equivalent prediction, a model partitions an input space into multiple parts separated by boundaries. The function sharing prefers to reuse boundaries, leading to fewer parts for new outputs, which conflicts with systematic generalization. We show such phenomena in standard deep learning models, such as fully connected, convolutional, residual networks, LSTMs, and (Vision) Transformers. We hope this study provides novel insights into systematic generalization and forms a basis for new research directions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们假设内部功能共享是削弱 o.o.d 的原因之一。或深度学习中分类任务的系统概括。在等效预测下，模型将输入空间划分为由边界分隔的多个部分。功能共享更倾向于重用边界，导致新输出的部件较少，这与系统泛化相冲突。我们在标准深度学习模型中展示了此类现象，例如全连接网络、卷积网络、残差网络、LSTM 和（视觉）变压器。我们希望这项研究为系统概括提供新的见解，并为新的研究方向奠定基础。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨深度学习模型中内部函数共享机制如何导致系统泛化能力不足，并验证该现象在多种标准模型中的存在。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在分布外数据或系统泛化任务中表现不佳，作者推测内部函数共享机制可能是关键原因。
AI.method: 通过分析全连接网络、卷积网络、残差网络、LSTM和Transformer等模型，观察其在等效预测条件下输入空间划分与边界重用行为。
AI.result: 实验验证了函数共享导致输入空间划分边界重复利用，从而限制新输出的多样性，与系统泛化需求产生冲突。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了深度学习模型内在机制与系统泛化之间的矛盾，为改进泛化能力提供了新研究方向。

title: Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) based Image-Deblurring
title_zh: 基于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的图像去模糊
comment: 90 pages, 35 figures, MS Thesis at the University of Edinburgh
comments: 90 pages, 35 figures, MS Thesis at the University of Edinburgh
abstract: This thesis analyzes the challenging problem of Image Deblurring based on classical theorems and state-of-art methods proposed in recent years. By spectral analysis we mathematically show the effective of spectral regularization methods, and point out the linking between the spectral filtering result and the solution of the regularization optimization objective. For ill-posed problems like image deblurring, the optimization objective contains a regularization term (also called the regularization functional) that encodes our prior knowledge into the solution. We demonstrate how to craft a regularization term by hand using the idea of maximum a posterior estimation. Then, we point out the limitations of such regularization-based methods, and step into the neural-network based methods. Based on the idea of Wasserstein generative adversarial models, we can train a CNN to learn the regularization functional. Such data-driven approaches are able to capture the complexity, which may not be analytically modellable. Besides, in recent years with the improvement of architectures, the network has been able to output an image closely approximating the ground truth given the blurry observation. The Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) works on this Image-to-Image translation idea. We analyze the DeblurGAN-v2 method proposed by Orest Kupyn et al. [14] in 2019 based on numerical tests. And, based on the experimental results and our knowledge, we put forward some suggestions for improvement on this method.
summary: This thesis analyzes the challenging problem of Image Deblurring based on classical theorems and state-of-art methods proposed in recent years. By spectral analysis we mathematically show the effective of spectral regularization methods, and point out the linking between the spectral filtering result and the solution of the regularization optimization objective. For ill-posed problems like image deblurring, the optimization objective contains a regularization term (also called the regularization functional) that encodes our prior knowledge into the solution. We demonstrate how to craft a regularization term by hand using the idea of maximum a posterior estimation. Then, we point out the limitations of such regularization-based methods, and step into the neural-network based methods. Based on the idea of Wasserstein generative adversarial models, we can train a CNN to learn the regularization functional. Such data-driven approaches are able to capture the complexity, which may not be analytically modellable. Besides, in recent years with the improvement of architectures, the network has been able to output an image closely approximating the ground truth given the blurry observation. The Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) works on this Image-to-Image translation idea. We analyze the DeblurGAN-v2 method proposed by Orest Kupyn et al. [14] in 2019 based on numerical tests. And, based on the experimental results and our knowledge, we put forward some suggestions for improvement on this method.
abstract_zh: 本文基于经典定理和近年来提出的最新方法，分析了图像去模糊的挑战性问题。通过谱分析，从数学上证明了谱正则化方法的有效性，并指出了谱滤波结果与正则化优化目标解之间的联系。对于像图像去模糊这样的不适定问题，优化目标包含一个正则化项（也称为正则化函数），它将我们的先验知识编码到解决方案中。我们演示了如何使用最大后验估计的思想手工制作正则化项。然后，我们指出这种基于正则化的方法的局限性，并进入基于神经网络的方法。基于 Wasserstein 生成对抗模型的思想，我们可以训练 CNN 来学习正则化函数。这种数据驱动的方法能够捕获可能无法分析建模的复杂性。此外，近年来，随着架构的改进，网络已经能够在观察模糊的情况下输出非常接近真实情况的图像。生成对抗网络（GAN）致力于这种图像到图像转换的想法。我们分析了 Orest Kupyn 等人提出的 DeblurGAN-v2 方法。 [14] 2019年基于数值测试。并且，根据实验结果和我们的知识，我们提出了一些改进该方法的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文基于生成对抗网络（GAN）研究图像去模糊方法，分析传统正则化方法与神经网络方法的联系，并探讨数据驱动的GAN模型在图像复原中的应用。
AI.motivation: 图像去模糊是逆问题中的经典挑战，传统正则化方法存在建模局限性，而近年深度学习方法（如GAN）在图像生成任务中表现出色，需探索其在去模糊中的有效性及改进方向。
AI.method: 通过谱分析验证正则化方法的数学有效性，基于最大后验估计设计正则化项；引入Wasserstein GAN框架训练CNN学习正则化函数，并对DeblurGAN-v2方法进行数值实验分析与改进建议。
AI.result: 实验表明GAN方法能生成更接近真实图像的复原结果，但存在训练稳定性问题；提出通过改进损失函数和网络结构优化DeblurGAN-v2的可行性方案。
AI.conclusion: GAN为图像去模糊提供了数据驱动的新范式，能够捕捉复杂先验信息，但需进一步解决训练难度与泛化能力问题以提升实际应用效果。

motivation: 图像去模糊是逆问题中的经典挑战，传统正则化方法存在建模局限性，而近年深度学习方法（如GAN）在图像生成任务中表现出色，需探索其在去模糊中的有效性及改进方向。
method: 通过谱分析验证正则化方法的数学有效性，基于最大后验估计设计正则化项；引入Wasserstein GAN框架训练CNN学习正则化函数，并对DeblurGAN-v2方法进行数值实验分析与改进建议。
result: 实验表明GAN方法能生成更接近真实图像的复原结果，但存在训练稳定性问题；提出通过改进损失函数和网络结构优化DeblurGAN-v2的可行性方案。
conclusion: GAN为图像去模糊提供了数据驱动的新范式，能够捕捉复杂先验信息，但需进一步解决训练难度与泛化能力问题以提升实际应用效果。
search_text: Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) based Image-Deblurring 基于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的图像去模糊 This thesis analyzes the challenging problem of Image Deblurring based on classical theorems and state-of-art methods proposed in recent years. By spectral analysis we mathematically show the effective of spectral regularization methods, and point out the linking between the spectral filtering result and the solution of the regularization optimization objective. For ill-posed problems like image deblurring, the optimization objective contains a regularization term (also called the regularization functional) that encodes our prior knowledge into the solution. We demonstrate how to craft a regularization term by hand using the idea of maximum a posterior estimation. Then, we point out the limitations of such regularization-based methods, and step into the neural-network based methods. Based on the idea of Wasserstein generative adversarial models, we can train a CNN to learn the regularization functional. Such data-driven approaches are able to capture the complexity, which may not be analytically modellable. Besides, in recent years with the improvement of architectures, the network has been able to output an image closely approximating the ground truth given the blurry observation. The Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) works on this Image-to-Image translation idea. We analyze the DeblurGAN-v2 method proposed by Orest Kupyn et al. [14] in 2019 based on numerical tests. And, based on the experimental results and our knowledge, we put forward some suggestions for improvement on this method. 本文基于经典定理和近年来提出的最新方法，分析了图像去模糊的挑战性问题。通过谱分析，从数学上证明了谱正则化方法的有效性，并指出了谱滤波结果与正则化优化目标解之间的联系。对于像图像去模糊这样的不适定问题，优化目标包含一个正则化项（也称为正则化函数），它将我们的先验知识编码到解决方案中。我们演示了如何使用最大后验估计的思想手工制作正则化项。然后，我们指出这种基于正则化的方法的局限性，并进入基于神经网络的方法。基于 Wasserstein 生成对抗模型的思想，我们可以训练 CNN 来学习正则化函数。这种数据驱动的方法能够捕获可能无法分析建模的复杂性。此外，近年来，随着架构的改进，网络已经能够在观察模糊的情况下输出非常接近真实情况的图像。生成对抗网络（GAN）致力于这种图像到图像转换的想法。我们分析了 Orest Kupyn 等人提出的 DeblurGAN-v2 方法。 [14] 2019年基于数值测试。并且，根据实验结果和我们的知识，我们提出了一些改进该方法的建议。 本文基于生成对抗网络（GAN）研究图像去模糊方法，分析传统正则化方法与神经网络方法的联系，并探讨数据驱动的GAN模型在图像复原中的应用。 Yuhong Lu,Nicholas Polydorides cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Unrestricted Black-box Adversarial Attack Using GAN with Limited Queries
title_zh: 使用有限查询的 GAN 进行无限制的黑盒对抗攻击
comment: Accepted to the ECCV 2022 Workshop on Adversarial Robustness in the Real World
comments: Accepted to the ECCV 2022 Workshop on Adversarial Robustness in the Real World
abstract: Adversarial examples are inputs intentionally generated for fooling a deep neural network. Recent studies have proposed unrestricted adversarial attacks that are not norm-constrained. However, the previous unrestricted attack methods still have limitations to fool real-world applications in a black-box setting. In this paper, we present a novel method for generating unrestricted adversarial examples using GAN where an attacker can only access the top-1 final decision of a classification model. Our method, Latent-HSJA, efficiently leverages the advantages of a decision-based attack in the latent space and successfully manipulates the latent vectors for fooling the classification model. With extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed method is efficient in evaluating the robustness of classification models with limited queries in a black-box setting. First, we demonstrate that our targeted attack method is query-efficient to produce unrestricted adversarial examples for a facial identity recognition model that contains 307 identities. Then, we demonstrate that the proposed method can also successfully attack a real-world celebrity recognition service.
summary: Adversarial examples are inputs intentionally generated for fooling a deep neural network. Recent studies have proposed unrestricted adversarial attacks that are not norm-constrained. However, the previous unrestricted attack methods still have limitations to fool real-world applications in a black-box setting. In this paper, we present a novel method for generating unrestricted adversarial examples using GAN where an attacker can only access the top-1 final decision of a classification model. Our method, Latent-HSJA, efficiently leverages the advantages of a decision-based attack in the latent space and successfully manipulates the latent vectors for fooling the classification model. With extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed method is efficient in evaluating the robustness of classification models with limited queries in a black-box setting. First, we demonstrate that our targeted attack method is query-efficient to produce unrestricted adversarial examples for a facial identity recognition model that contains 307 identities. Then, we demonstrate that the proposed method can also successfully attack a real-world celebrity recognition service.
abstract_zh: 对抗性示例是故意生成的用于欺骗深度神经网络的输入。最近的研究提出了不受规范约束的无限制对抗性攻击。然而，以前的无限制攻击方法在黑盒设置中愚弄现实世界的应用程序仍然存在局限性。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 GAN 生成无限制对抗性示例的新方法，其中攻击者只能访问分类模型的 top-1 最终决策。我们的方法 Latent-HSJA 有效地利用了潜在空间中基于决策的攻击的优势，并成功地操纵了潜在向量来欺骗分类模型。通过大量的实验，我们证明了我们提出的方法可以有效地评估黑盒设置中有限查询的分类模型的鲁棒性。首先，我们证明我们的针对性攻击方法具有查询效率，可为包含 307 个身份的面部身份识别模型生成不受限制的对抗性示例。然后，我们证明所提出的方法也可以成功攻击现实世界的名人识别服务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的无约束黑盒对抗攻击方法，仅需模型的最终分类决策即可生成对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有无约束对抗攻击在黑盒场景下难以有效攻击实际应用系统，需设计更高效的攻击方法以突破模型鲁棒性测试限制。
AI.method: 提出Latent-HSJA方法，通过GAN在潜在空间中利用决策反馈操控潜变量，实现无需梯度信息的黑盒攻击。
AI.result: 在307类人脸身份识别模型和真实名人识别服务上验证，该方法以较少查询次数成功生成有效对抗样本。
AI.conclusion: Latent-HSJA方法在有限查询条件下有效评估了分类模型的鲁棒性，为黑盒对抗攻击提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ziwei Luo,Youwei Li,Lei Yu,Qi Wu,Zhihong Wen,Haoqiang Fan,Shuaicheng Liu
title: Fast Nearest Convolution for Real-Time Efficient Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 快速最近卷积实现实时高效图像超分辨率
abstract: Deep learning-based single image super-resolution (SISR) approaches have drawn much attention and achieved remarkable success on modern advanced GPUs. However, most state-of-the-art methods require a huge number of parameters, memories, and computational resources, which usually show inferior inference times when applying them to current mobile device CPUs/NPUs. In this paper, we propose a simple plain convolution network with a fast nearest convolution module (NCNet), which is NPU-friendly and can perform a reliable super-resolution in real-time. The proposed nearest convolution has the same performance as the nearest upsampling but is much faster and more suitable for Android NNAPI. Our model can be easily deployed on mobile devices with 8-bit quantization and is fully compatible with all major mobile AI accelerators. Moreover, we conduct comprehensive experiments on different tensor operations on a mobile device to illustrate the efficiency of our network architecture. Our NCNet is trained and validated on the DIV2K 3x dataset, and the comparison with other efficient SR methods demonstrated that the NCNet can achieve high fidelity SR results while using fewer inference times. Our codes and pretrained models are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/Algolzw/NCNet}.
summary: Deep learning-based single image super-resolution (SISR) approaches have drawn much attention and achieved remarkable success on modern advanced GPUs. However, most state-of-the-art methods require a huge number of parameters, memories, and computational resources, which usually show inferior inference times when applying them to current mobile device CPUs/NPUs. In this paper, we propose a simple plain convolution network with a fast nearest convolution module (NCNet), which is NPU-friendly and can perform a reliable super-resolution in real-time. The proposed nearest convolution has the same performance as the nearest upsampling but is much faster and more suitable for Android NNAPI. Our model can be easily deployed on mobile devices with 8-bit quantization and is fully compatible with all major mobile AI accelerators. Moreover, we conduct comprehensive experiments on different tensor operations on a mobile device to illustrate the efficiency of our network architecture. Our NCNet is trained and validated on the DIV2K 3x dataset, and the comparison with other efficient SR methods demonstrated that the NCNet can achieve high fidelity SR results while using fewer inference times. Our codes and pretrained models are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/Algolzw/NCNet}.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的单图像超分辨率（SISR）方法引起了广泛关注，并在现代先进 GPU 上取得了显着的成功。然而，大多数最先进的方法需要大量的参数、内存和计算资源，当将它们应用于当前的移动设备 CPU/NPU 时，通常会表现出较差的推理时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有快速最近卷积模块（NCNet）的简单普通卷积网络，它对 NPU 友好，并且可以实时执行可靠的超分辨率。所提出的最近卷积具有与最近上采样相同的性能，但速度更快并且更适合 Android NNAPI。我们的模型可以轻松部署在具有 8 位量化的移动设备上，并且与所有主要移动 AI 加速器完全兼容。此外，我们在移动设备上对不同的张量操作进行了全面的实验，以说明我们的网络架构的效率。我们的 NCNet 在 DIV2K 3x 数据集上进行了训练和验证，与其他高效 SR 方法的比较表明，NCNet 可以在使用更少的推理时间的情况下实现高保真 SR 结果。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 \url{https://github.com/Algolzw/NCNet} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NCNet的实时高效图像超分辨率网络，通过快速最近卷积模块实现移动设备上的快速超分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习超分辨率方法在移动设备CPU/NPU上推理效率低，参数量大且计算资源消耗高，难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 设计包含快速最近卷积模块（NCNet）的简单卷积网络，该模块性能等同于最近上采样但更适配Android NNAPI，并支持8位量化部署。
AI.result: 在DIV2K 3x数据集上验证，NCNet相较其他高效方法在保持高保真度的同时显著减少推理时间，且兼容主流移动AI加速器。
AI.conclusion: NCNet通过优化卷积架构和量化部署，实现了在移动设备上实时高效的图像超分辨率，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

Our codes and pretrained models are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/Algolzw/NCNet}. 基于深度学习的单图像超分辨率（SISR）方法引起了广泛关注，并在现代先进 GPU 上取得了显着的成功。然而，大多数最先进的方法需要大量的参数、内存和计算资源，当将它们应用于当前的移动设备 CPU/NPU 时，通常会表现出较差的推理时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有快速最近卷积模块（NCNet）的简单普通卷积网络，它对 NPU 友好，并且可以实时执行可靠的超分辨率。所提出的最近卷积具有与最近上采样相同的性能，但速度更快并且更适合 Android NNAPI。我们的模型可以轻松部署在具有 8 位量化的移动设备上，并且与所有主要移动 AI 加速器完全兼容。此外，我们在移动设备上对不同的张量操作进行了全面的实验，以说明我们的网络架构的效率。我们的 NCNet 在 DIV2K 3x 数据集上进行了训练和验证，与其他高效 SR 方法的比较表明，NCNet 可以在使用更少的推理时间的情况下实现高保真 SR 结果。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 \url{https://github.com/Algolzw/NCNet} 上公开获取。 本文提出一种名为NCNet的实时高效图像超分辨率网络，通过快速最近卷积模块实现移动设备上的快速超分辨率。 Ziwei Luo,Youwei Li,Lei Yu,Qi Wu,Zhihong Wen,Haoqiang Fan,Shuaicheng Liu eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Sliding Window Recurrent Network for Efficient Video Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于高效视频超分辨率的滑动窗口循环网络
comment: Participated in the AIM 2022 Real-Time Video SR Challenge
comments: Participated in the AIM 2022 Real-Time Video SR Challenge
abstract: Video super-resolution (VSR) is the task of restoring high-resolution frames from a sequence of low-resolution inputs. Different from single image super-resolution, VSR can utilize frames' temporal information to reconstruct results with more details. Recently, with the rapid development of convolution neural networks (CNN), the VSR task has drawn increasing attention and many CNN-based methods have achieved remarkable results. However, only a few VSR approaches can be applied to real-world mobile devices due to the computational resources and runtime limitations. In this paper, we propose a \textit{Sliding Window based Recurrent Network} (SWRN) which can be real-time inference while still achieving superior performance. Specifically, we notice that video frames should have both spatial and temporal relations that can help to recover details, and the key point is how to extract and aggregate information. Address it, we input three neighboring frames and utilize a hidden state to recurrently store and update the important temporal information. Our experiment on REDS dataset shows that the proposed method can be well adapted to mobile devices and produce visually pleasant results.
summary: Video super-resolution (VSR) is the task of restoring high-resolution frames from a sequence of low-resolution inputs. Different from single image super-resolution, VSR can utilize frames' temporal information to reconstruct results with more details. Recently, with the rapid development of convolution neural networks (CNN), the VSR task has drawn increasing attention and many CNN-based methods have achieved remarkable results. However, only a few VSR approaches can be applied to real-world mobile devices due to the computational resources and runtime limitations. In this paper, we propose a \textit{Sliding Window based Recurrent Network} (SWRN) which can be real-time inference while still achieving superior performance. Specifically, we notice that video frames should have both spatial and temporal relations that can help to recover details, and the key point is how to extract and aggregate information. Address it, we input three neighboring frames and utilize a hidden state to recurrently store and update the important temporal information. Our experiment on REDS dataset shows that the proposed method can be well adapted to mobile devices and produce visually pleasant results.
abstract_zh: 视频超分辨率 (VSR) 是从一系列低分辨率输入中恢复高分辨率帧的任务。与单图像超分辨率不同，VSR可以利用帧的时间信息来重建具有更多细节的结果。近年来，随着卷积神经网络（CNN）的快速发展，VSR任务越来越受到关注，许多基于CNN的方法取得了显着的成果。然而，由于计算资源和运行时间的限制，只有少数 VSR 方法可以应用于现实世界的移动设备。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于滑动窗口的循环网络（SWRN），它可以进行实时推理，同时仍能实现卓越的性能。具体来说，我们注意到视频帧应该具有有助于恢复细节的空间和时间关系，关键点是如何提取和聚合信息。为了解决这个问题，我们输入三个相邻帧并利用隐藏状态来循环存储和更新重要的时间信息。我们在 REDS 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法可以很好地适应移动设备并产生视觉上令人愉悦的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于滑动窗口的循环网络（SWRN），用于高效实现视频超分辨率，以在移动设备上实现实时推理。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频超分辨率方法计算资源消耗大，难以适应移动设备的实时性需求，因此需要一种兼顾效率与性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过输入三帧相邻视频帧并利用隐藏状态递归存储和更新时序信息，结合滑动窗口机制提取空间与时间关联性。
AI.result: 在REDS数据集上的实验表明，该方法在移动设备上具有良好的适应性，能生成视觉效果良好的高分辨率视频。
AI.conclusion: SWRN通过有效整合时空信息，在保证性能的同时显著提升了视频超分辨率的计算效率，适用于移动端部署。

authors_text: Laura E. C. La Rosa,Dario A. B. Oliveira,Pedram Ghamisi
title: Learning crop type mapping from regional label proportions in large-scale SAR and optical imagery
title_zh: 从大规模 SAR 和光学图像中的区域标签比例学习作物类型映射
abstract: The application of deep learning algorithms to Earth observation (EO) in recent years has enabled substantial progress in fields that rely on remotely sensed data. However, given the data scale in EO, creating large datasets with pixel-level annotations by experts is expensive and highly time-consuming. In this context, priors are seen as an attractive way to alleviate the burden of manual labeling when training deep learning methods for EO. For some applications, those priors are readily available. Motivated by the great success of contrastive-learning methods for self-supervised feature representation learning in many computer-vision tasks, this study proposes an online deep clustering method using crop label proportions as priors to learn a sample-level classifier based on government crop-proportion data for a whole agricultural region. We evaluate the method using two large datasets from two different agricultural regions in Brazil. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the method is robust to different data types (synthetic-aperture radar and optical images), reporting higher accuracy values considering the major crop types in the target regions. Thus, it can alleviate the burden of large-scale image annotation in EO applications.
summary: The application of deep learning algorithms to Earth observation (EO) in recent years has enabled substantial progress in fields that rely on remotely sensed data. However, given the data scale in EO, creating large datasets with pixel-level annotations by experts is expensive and highly time-consuming. In this context, priors are seen as an attractive way to alleviate the burden of manual labeling when training deep learning methods for EO. For some applications, those priors are readily available. Motivated by the great success of contrastive-learning methods for self-supervised feature representation learning in many computer-vision tasks, this study proposes an online deep clustering method using crop label proportions as priors to learn a sample-level classifier based on government crop-proportion data for a whole agricultural region. We evaluate the method using two large datasets from two different agricultural regions in Brazil. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the method is robust to different data types (synthetic-aperture radar and optical images), reporting higher accuracy values considering the major crop types in the target regions. Thus, it can alleviate the burden of large-scale image annotation in EO applications.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习算法在地球观测（EO）中的应用使得依赖遥感数据的领域取得了实质性进展。然而，考虑到 EO 中的数据规模，由专家创建具有像素级注释的大型数据集既昂贵又耗时。在这种情况下，先验被视为在训练 EO 深度学习方法时减轻手动标记负担的一种有吸引力的方式。对于某些应用程序，这些先验知识是很容易获得的。受用于自监督特征表示学习的对比学习方法在许多计算机视觉任务中取得巨大成功的启发，本研究提出了一种使用作物标签比例作为先验的在线深度聚类方法，以基于整个农业地区的政府作物比例数据来学习样本级分类器。我们使用来自巴西两个不同农业地区的两个大型数据集来评估该方法。大量实验表明，该方法对于不同的数据类型（合成孔径雷达和光学图像）具有鲁棒性，考虑到目标区域的主要作物类型，报告了更高的准确度值。因此，它可以减轻 EO 应用中大规模图像注释的负担。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于政府作物比例数据的在线深度聚类方法，通过区域标签比例信息实现大规模SAR和光学遥感影像的作物类型映射，以减少人工标注负担。
AI.motivation: 遥感数据像素级标注成本高昂，而政府公开的区域作物比例数据可作为先验信息。受对比学习在自监督特征学习中的成功启发，需探索利用此类先验信息提升分类效率的方法。
AI.method: 提出在线深度聚类方法，以区域作物比例为先验，结合SAR和光学影像数据训练样本级分类器，通过迭代聚类与分类过程实现作物类型映射。
AI.result: 在巴西两个农业区域的大型数据集上验证，方法对SAR和光学影像均表现出鲁棒性，主要作物类型分类准确率显著提升，有效降低大规模图像标注需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效利用区域作物比例先验信息，在无需像素级标注的情况下实现了高精度作物分类，为遥感影像的大规模应用提供了可行的标注负担缓解方案。

authors_text: Bingde Liu,Chang Xu,Wen Yang,Huai Yu,Lei Yu
title: Motion Robust High-Speed Light-Weighted Object Detection With Event Camera
title_zh: 使用事件相机进行运动鲁棒高速轻量物体检测
comment: Published in: IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement (Volume: 72) 2023
comments: Published in: IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement (Volume: 72) 2023
abstract: In this work, we propose a motion robust and high-speed detection pipeline which better leverages the event data. First, we design an event stream representation called temporal active focus (TAF), which efficiently utilizes the spatial-temporal asynchronous event stream, constructing event tensors robust to object motions. Then, we propose a module called the bifurcated folding module (BFM), which encodes the rich temporal information in the TAF tensor at the input layer of the detector. Following this, we design a high-speed lightweight detector called agile event detector (AED) plus a simple but effective data augmentation method, to enhance the detection accuracy and reduce the model's parameter. Experiments on two typical real-scene event camera object detection datasets show that our method is competitive in terms of accuracy, efficiency, and the number of parameters. By classifying objects into multiple motion levels based on the optical flow density metric, we further illustrated the robustness of our method for objects with different velocities relative to the camera. The codes and trained models are available at https://github.com/HarmoniaLeo/FRLW-EvD .
summary: In this work, we propose a motion robust and high-speed detection pipeline which better leverages the event data. First, we design an event stream representation called temporal active focus (TAF), which efficiently utilizes the spatial-temporal asynchronous event stream, constructing event tensors robust to object motions. Then, we propose a module called the bifurcated folding module (BFM), which encodes the rich temporal information in the TAF tensor at the input layer of the detector. Following this, we design a high-speed lightweight detector called agile event detector (AED) plus a simple but effective data augmentation method, to enhance the detection accuracy and reduce the model's parameter. Experiments on two typical real-scene event camera object detection datasets show that our method is competitive in terms of accuracy, efficiency, and the number of parameters. By classifying objects into multiple motion levels based on the optical flow density metric, we further illustrated the robustness of our method for objects with different velocities relative to the camera. The codes and trained models are available at https://github.com/HarmoniaLeo/FRLW-EvD .
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种运动稳健且高速的检测管道，可以更好地利用事件数据。首先，我们设计了一种称为时间主动焦点（TAF）的事件流表示，它有效地利用时空异步事件流，构建对对象运动鲁棒的事件张量。然后，我们提出了一个称为分叉折叠模块（BFM）的模块，它在检测器输入层的 TAF 张量中编码丰富的时间信息。随后，我们设计了一种称为敏捷事件检测器（AED）的高速轻量级检测器，加上简单但有效的数据增强方法，以提高检测精度并减少模型参数。在两个典型的实景事件相机目标检测数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在准确性、效率和参数数量方面具有竞争力。通过基于光流密度度量将对象分类为多个运动级别，我们进一步说明了我们的方法对于相对于相机具有不同速度的对象的鲁棒性。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/HarmoniaLeo/FRLW-EvD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对事件相机的高效、轻量且运动鲁棒的目标检测方法，通过改进事件流表示和检测架构提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测方法在动态场景或高速运动下表现不足，而事件相机虽能捕捉动态信息，但现有方法在效率、参数量及运动鲁棒性方面存在局限。
AI.method: 设计时序主动焦点（TAF）事件流表示以增强时空异步数据处理；提出双分支折叠模块（BFM）编码时序信息；开发轻量级敏捷事件检测器（AED）并结合简单数据增强方法。
AI.result: 在两个真实场景数据集上，方法在准确率、效率及参数量上均表现优异，且通过光学流密度分类验证了对不同运动速度物体的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在运动鲁棒性、检测速度和模型轻量化方面具有竞争力，代码和模型已开源，适用于动态场景下的实时目标检测任务。

authors_text: Alexandre M. F. Dias,Luís Simões,Plinio Moreno,Alexandre Bernardino
title: Active Gaze Control for Foveal Scene Exploration
title_zh: 用于中央凹场景探索的主动注视控制
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures, ICDL 2022 (International Conference on Development and Learning, formerly ICDL-EpiRob)
comments: 6 pages, 8 figures, ICDL 2022 (International Conference on Development and Learning, formerly ICDL-EpiRob)
abstract: Active perception and foveal vision are the foundations of the human visual system. While foveal vision reduces the amount of information to process during a gaze fixation, active perception will change the gaze direction to the most promising parts of the visual field. We propose a methodology to emulate how humans and robots with foveal cameras would explore a scene, identifying the objects present in their surroundings with in least number of gaze shifts. Our approach is based on three key methods. First, we take an off-the-shelf deep object detector, pre-trained on a large dataset of regular images, and calibrate the classification outputs to the case of foveated images. Second, a body-centered semantic map, encoding the objects classifications and corresponding uncertainties, is sequentially updated with the calibrated detections, considering several data fusion techniques. Third, the next best gaze fixation point is determined based on information-theoretic metrics that aim at minimizing the overall expected uncertainty of the semantic map. When compared to the random selection of next gaze shifts, the proposed method achieves an increase in detection F1-score of 2-3 percentage points for the same number of gaze shifts and reduces to one third the number of required gaze shifts to attain similar performance.
summary: Active perception and foveal vision are the foundations of the human visual system. While foveal vision reduces the amount of information to process during a gaze fixation, active perception will change the gaze direction to the most promising parts of the visual field. We propose a methodology to emulate how humans and robots with foveal cameras would explore a scene, identifying the objects present in their surroundings with in least number of gaze shifts. Our approach is based on three key methods. First, we take an off-the-shelf deep object detector, pre-trained on a large dataset of regular images, and calibrate the classification outputs to the case of foveated images. Second, a body-centered semantic map, encoding the objects classifications and corresponding uncertainties, is sequentially updated with the calibrated detections, considering several data fusion techniques. Third, the next best gaze fixation point is determined based on information-theoretic metrics that aim at minimizing the overall expected uncertainty of the semantic map. When compared to the random selection of next gaze shifts, the proposed method achieves an increase in detection F1-score of 2-3 percentage points for the same number of gaze shifts and reduces to one third the number of required gaze shifts to attain similar performance.
abstract_zh: 主动感知和中央凹视觉是人类视觉系统的基础。虽然中央凹视力减少了注视过程中要处理的信息量，但主动感知会将注视方向更改为视野中最有希望的部分。我们提出了一种方法来模拟人类和带有中央凹相机的机器人如何探索场景，以最少的目光转移来识别周围环境中存在的物体。我们的方法基于三个关键方法。首先，我们采用现成的深度对象检测器，在大型常规图像数据集上进行预训练，并将分类输出校准为中心凹图像的情况。其次，考虑多种数据融合技术，用校准的检测顺序更新以身体为中心的语义图，对对象分类和相应的不确定性进行编码。第三，下一个最佳注视点是基于信息论度量确定的，该度量旨在最小化语义图的总体预期不确定性。与随机选择下一个注视移动相比，所提出的方法在相同数量的注视移动下，检测 F1 分数提高了 2-3 个百分点，并将获得相似性能所需的注视移动数量减少到三分之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模仿人类和机器人使用注视点进行场景探索的方法，通过最少的注视移动识别周围物体。
AI.motivation: 人类视觉系统通过主动感知和注视点机制高效处理视觉信息，传统方法在机器人视觉中难以实现类似效率，需减少注视移动次数以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 首先校准预训练目标检测器以适应注视图像；其次构建包含物体分类及不确定性的语义地图并融合数据；最后基于信息论指标选择最优注视点以最小化地图不确定性。
AI.result: 相比随机选择注视点，相同注视次数下检测F1分数提升2-3%，达到相似性能所需注视次数减少至原来的三分之一。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效模拟人类主动感知机制，为机器人视觉提供高效、精准的场景探索解决方案。

F. Dias,Luís Simões,Plinio Moreno,Alexandre Bernardino cs.CV,eess.SY

title: Graphical Models of False Information and Fact Checking Ecosystems
title_zh: 虚假信息和事实核查生态系统的图形模型
abstract: The wide spread of false information online including misinformation and disinformation has become a major problem for our highly digitised and globalised society. A lot of research has been done to better understand different aspects of false information online such as behaviours of different actors and patterns of spreading, and also on better detection and prevention of such information using technical and socio-technical means. One major approach to detect and debunk false information online is to use human fact-checkers, who can be helped by automated tools. Despite a lot of research done, we noticed a significant gap on the lack of conceptual models describing the complicated ecosystems of false information and fact checking. In this paper, we report the first graphical models of such ecosystems, focusing on false information online in multiple contexts, including traditional media outlets and user-generated content. The proposed models cover a wide range of entity types and relationships, and can be a new useful tool for researchers and practitioners to study false information online and the effects of fact checking.
summary: The wide spread of false information online including misinformation and disinformation has become a major problem for our highly digitised and globalised society. A lot of research has been done to better understand different aspects of false information online such as behaviours of different actors and patterns of spreading, and also on better detection and prevention of such information using technical and socio-technical means. One major approach to detect and debunk false information online is to use human fact-checkers, who can be helped by automated tools. Despite a lot of research done, we noticed a significant gap on the lack of conceptual models describing the complicated ecosystems of false information and fact checking. In this paper, we report the first graphical models of such ecosystems, focusing on false information online in multiple contexts, including traditional media outlets and user-generated content. The proposed models cover a wide range of entity types and relationships, and can be a new useful tool for researchers and practitioners to study false information online and the effects of fact checking.
abstract_zh: 网上虚假信息的广泛传播，包括错误信息和虚假信息，已成为我们高度数字化和全球化社会的一个主要问题。为了更好地了解在线虚假信息的不同方面，例如不同参与者的行为和传播模式，以及利用技术和社会技术手段更好地检测和预防此类信息，人们进行了大量的研究。在线检测和揭穿虚假信息的一种主要方法是使用人工事实检查员，自动化工具可以帮助他们。尽管进行了大量研究，我们注意到缺乏描述虚假信息和事实核查的复杂生态系统的概念模型存在显着差距。在本文中，我们报告了此类生态系统的第一个图形模型，重点关注多种环境下的在线虚假信息，包括传统媒体渠道和用户生成的内容。所提出的模型涵盖了广泛的实体类型和关系，可以成为研究人员和从业者研究在线虚假信息和事实核查效果的新的有用工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种图形模型，用于描述网络虚假信息及事实核查生态系统的复杂结构，涵盖多种情境和实体关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究关注虚假信息的检测与预防，但缺乏对虚假信息传播及事实核查生态系统进行系统性建模的概念框架。
AI.method: 通过构建图形模型，整合传统媒体和用户生成内容中的实体类型及相互关系，覆盖虚假信息传播的多维生态要素。
AI.result: 首次提出了描述虚假信息与事实核查生态系统的图形模型，为研究者和从业者提供了分析工具。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为理解虚假信息传播机制及事实核查影响提供了新视角，有助于制定更有效的应对策略。

search_text: Graphical Models of False Information and Fact Checking Ecosystems 虚假信息和事实核查生态系统的图形模型 The wide spread of false information online including misinformation and disinformation has become a major problem for our highly digitised and globalised society. A lot of research has been done to better understand different aspects of false information online such as behaviours of different actors and patterns of spreading, and also on better detection and prevention of such information using technical and socio-technical means. One major approach to detect and debunk false information online is to use human fact-checkers, who can be helped by automated tools. Despite a lot of research done, we noticed a significant gap on the lack of conceptual models describing the complicated ecosystems of false information and fact checking. In this paper, we report the first graphical models of such ecosystems, focusing on false information online in multiple contexts, including traditional media outlets and user-generated content. The proposed models cover a wide range of entity types and relationships, and can be a new useful tool for researchers and practitioners to study false information online and the effects of fact checking. 网上虚假信息的广泛传播，包括错误信息和虚假信息，已成为我们高度数字化和全球化社会的一个主要问题。为了更好地了解在线虚假信息的不同方面，例如不同参与者的行为和传播模式，以及利用技术和社会技术手段更好地检测和预防此类信息，人们进行了大量的研究。在线检测和揭穿虚假信息的一种主要方法是使用人工事实检查员，自动化工具可以帮助他们。尽管进行了大量研究，我们注意到缺乏描述虚假信息和事实核查的复杂生态系统的概念模型存在显着差距。在本文中，我们报告了此类生态系统的第一个图形模型，重点关注多种环境下的在线虚假信息，包括传统媒体渠道和用户生成的内容。所提出的模型涵盖了广泛的实体类型和关系，可以成为研究人员和从业者研究在线虚假信息和事实核查效果的新的有用工具。 本文提出了一种图形模型，用于描述网络虚假信息及事实核查生态系统的复杂结构，涵盖多种情境和实体关系。 Haiyue Yuan,Enes Altuncu,Shujun Li,Can Baskent cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Hao Li,Dewei Hu,Han Liu,Jiacheng Wang,Ipek Oguz
title: Cats: Complementary CNN and Transformer Encoders for Segmentation
title_zh: Cats：用于分割的互补 CNN 和 Transformer 编码器
abstract: Recently, deep learning methods have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many medical image segmentation tasks. Many of these are based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). For such methods, the encoder is the key part for global and local information extraction from input images; the extracted features are then passed to the decoder for predicting the segmentations. In contrast, several recent works show a superior performance with the use of transformers, which can better model long-range spatial dependencies and capture low-level details. However, transformer as sole encoder underperforms for some tasks where it cannot efficiently replace the convolution based encoder. In this paper, we propose a model with double encoders for 3D biomedical image segmentation. Our model is a U-shaped CNN augmented with an independent transformer encoder. We fuse the information from the convolutional encoder and the transformer, and pass it to the decoder to obtain the results. We evaluate our methods on three public datasets from three different challenges: BTCV, MoDA and Decathlon. Compared to the state-of-the-art models with and without transformers on each task, our proposed method obtains higher Dice scores across the board.
summary: Recently, deep learning methods have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many medical image segmentation tasks. Many of these are based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). For such methods, the encoder is the key part for global and local information extraction from input images; the extracted features are then passed to the decoder for predicting the segmentations. In contrast, several recent works show a superior performance with the use of transformers, which can better model long-range spatial dependencies and capture low-level details. However, transformer as sole encoder underperforms for some tasks where it cannot efficiently replace the convolution based encoder. In this paper, we propose a model with double encoders for 3D biomedical image segmentation. Our model is a U-shaped CNN augmented with an independent transformer encoder. We fuse the information from the convolutional encoder and the transformer, and pass it to the decoder to obtain the results. We evaluate our methods on three public datasets from three different challenges: BTCV, MoDA and Decathlon. Compared to the state-of-the-art models with and without transformers on each task, our proposed method obtains higher Dice scores across the board.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度学习方法在许多医学图像分割任务中取得了最先进的性能。其中许多都是基于卷积神经网络（CNN）。对于此类方法，编码器是从输入图像中提取全局和局部信息的关键部分；然后将提取的特征传递给解码器以预测分割。相比之下，最近的几项工作显示了使用变压器的优越性能，它可以更好地模拟远程空间依赖性并捕获低级细节。然而，Transformer 作为唯一的编码器在某些任务中表现不佳，无法有效地取代基于卷积的编码器。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 3D 生物医学图像分割的双编码器模型。我们的模型是一个 U 形 CNN，增强了独立的 Transformer 编码器。我们融合来自卷积编码器和变换器的信息，并将其传递给解码器以获得结果。我们在来自三个不同挑战的三个公共数据集上评估我们的方法：BTCV、MoDA 和迪卡侬。与每个任务上有或没有变压器的最先进模型相比，我们提出的方法全面获得了更高的 Dice 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer编码器的双编码器模型，用于提升3D生物医学图像分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在医学图像分割中表现优异，但Transformer能更好地建模长距离依赖关系。然而单独使用Transformer在部分任务中效果不佳，因此需结合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计U型CNN结构并添加独立Transformer编码器，通过融合两种编码器提取的特征信息，输入解码器生成分割结果。
AI.result: 在BTCV、MoDA和Decathlon三个数据集上，该方法相比现有CNN和Transformer模型均取得更高的Dice分数。
AI.conclusion: 双编码器架构有效结合CNN的局部特征提取能力和Transformer的全局建模能力，在3D生物医学图像分割任务中表现优异。

search_text: Cats: Complementary CNN and Transformer Encoders for Segmentation Cats：用于分割的互补 CNN 和 Transformer 编码器 Recently, deep learning methods have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many medical image segmentation tasks. Many of these are based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). For such methods, the encoder is the key part for global and local information extraction from input images; the extracted features are then passed to the decoder for predicting the segmentations. In contrast, several recent works show a superior performance with the use of transformers, which can better model long-range spatial dependencies and capture low-level details. However, transformer as sole encoder underperforms for some tasks where it cannot efficiently replace the convolution based encoder. In this paper, we propose a model with double encoders for 3D biomedical image segmentation. Our model is a U-shaped CNN augmented with an independent transformer encoder. We fuse the information from the convolutional encoder and the transformer, and pass it to the decoder to obtain the results. We evaluate our methods on three public datasets from three different challenges: BTCV, MoDA and Decathlon. Compared to the state-of-the-art models with and without transformers on each task, our proposed method obtains higher Dice scores across the board. 最近，深度学习方法在许多医学图像分割任务中取得了最先进的性能。其中许多都是基于卷积神经网络（CNN）。对于此类方法，编码器是从输入图像中提取全局和局部信息的关键部分；然后将提取的特征传递给解码器以预测分割。相比之下，最近的几项工作显示了使用变压器的优越性能，它可以更好地模拟远程空间依赖性并捕获低级细节。然而，Transformer 作为唯一的编码器在某些任务中表现不佳，无法有效地取代基于卷积的编码器。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 3D 生物医学图像分割的双编码器模型。我们的模型是一个 U 形 CNN，增强了独立的 Transformer 编码器。我们融合来自卷积编码器和变换器的信息，并将其传递给解码器以获得结果。我们在来自三个不同挑战的三个公共数据集上评估我们的方法：BTCV、MoDA 和迪卡侬。与每个任务上有或没有变压器的最先进模型相比，我们提出的方法全面获得了更高的 Dice 分数。 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer编码器的双编码器模型，用于提升3D生物医学图像分割的性能。 Hao Li,Dewei Hu,Han Liu,Jiacheng Wang,Ipek Oguz eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Apple Counting using Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络进行苹果计数
comment: ef:2018 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: ef:2018 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: Estimating accurate and reliable fruit and vegetable counts from images in real-world settings, such as orchards, is a challenging problem that has received significant recent attention. Estimating fruit counts before harvest provides useful information for logistics planning. While considerable progress has been made toward fruit detection, estimating the actual counts remains challenging. In practice, fruits are often clustered together. Therefore, methods that only detect fruits fail to offer general solutions to estimate accurate fruit counts. Furthermore, in horticultural studies, rather than a single yield estimate, finer information such as the distribution of the number of apples per cluster is desirable. In this work, we formulate fruit counting from images as a multi-class classification problem and solve it by training a Convolutional Neural Network. We first evaluate the per-image accuracy of our method and compare it with a state-of-the-art method based on Gaussian Mixture Models over four test datasets. Even though the parameters of the Gaussian Mixture Model-based method are specifically tuned for each dataset, our network outperforms it in three out of four datasets with a maximum of 94\% accuracy. Next, we use the method to estimate the yield for two datasets for which we have ground truth. Our method achieved 96-97\% accuracies. For additional details please see our video here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc}{https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc.
summary: Estimating accurate and reliable fruit and vegetable counts from images in real-world settings, such as orchards, is a challenging problem that has received significant recent attention. Estimating fruit counts before harvest provides useful information for logistics planning. While considerable progress has been made toward fruit detection, estimating the actual counts remains challenging. In practice, fruits are often clustered together. Therefore, methods that only detect fruits fail to offer general solutions to estimate accurate fruit counts. Furthermore, in horticultural studies, rather than a single yield estimate, finer information such as the distribution of the number of apples per cluster is desirable. In this work, we formulate fruit counting from images as a multi-class classification problem and solve it by training a Convolutional Neural Network. We first evaluate the per-image accuracy of our method and compare it with a state-of-the-art method based on Gaussian Mixture Models over four test datasets. Even though the parameters of the Gaussian Mixture Model-based method are specifically tuned for each dataset, our network outperforms it in three out of four datasets with a maximum of 94\% accuracy. Next, we use the method to estimate the yield for two datasets for which we have ground truth. Our method achieved 96-97\% accuracies. For additional details please see our video here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc}{https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc.
abstract_zh: 根据果园等现实环境中的图像估计准确可靠的水果和蔬菜数量是一个具有挑战性的问题，最近受到了广泛关注。收获前估算果实数量可为物流规划提供有用的信息。尽管在水果检测方面已经取得了相当大的进展，但估计实际数量仍然具有挑战性。在实践中，水果经常聚集在一起。因此，仅检测水果的方法无法提供估计准确水果数量的通用解决方案。此外，在园艺研究中，需要更精细的信息（例如每簇苹果数量的分布），而不是单一的产量估计。在这项工作中，我们将图像中的水果计数表述为多类分类问题，并通过训练卷积神经网络来解决它。我们首先评估我们方法的每图像准确性，并将其与基于四个测试数据集的高斯混合模型的最先进方法进行比较。尽管基于高斯混合模型的方法的参数是针对每个数据集专门调整的，但我们的网络在四分之三的数据集中优于它，最大准确度为 94%。接下来，我们使用该方法来估计我们有基本事实的两个数据集的产量。我们的方法达到了 96-97% 的准确率。有关更多详细信息，请在此处观看我们的视频：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc}{https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的苹果计数方法，用于解决实际场景中因果实聚集导致的传统检测方法难以准确统计的问题。
AI.motivation: 在果园等实际场景中，果实常成簇生长，传统检测方法难以准确统计数量，且需更精细的每簇果实分布信息而非单一产量估计。
AI.method: 将果实计数问题建模为多类分类任务，训练卷积神经网络进行苹果计数，并在四个数据集上与高斯混合模型（GMM）方法对比验证。
AI.result: 在四个数据集中，CNN方法在三个数据集上达到最高94%的准确率，且在两个有真实标签的数据集上实现96-97%的准确率，优于调参后的GMM方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于CNN的多类分类方法有效解决了果实聚集导致的计数难题，为物流规划和园艺研究提供了高精度的苹果计数方案。

search_text: Apple Counting using Convolutional Neural Networks 使用卷积神经网络进行苹果计数 Estimating accurate and reliable fruit and vegetable counts from images in real-world settings, such as orchards, is a challenging problem that has received significant recent attention. Estimating fruit counts before harvest provides useful information for logistics planning. While considerable progress has been made toward fruit detection, estimating the actual counts remains challenging. In practice, fruits are often clustered together. Therefore, methods that only detect fruits fail to offer general solutions to estimate accurate fruit counts. Furthermore, in horticultural studies, rather than a single yield estimate, finer information such as the distribution of the number of apples per cluster is desirable. In this work, we formulate fruit counting from images as a multi-class classification problem and solve it by training a Convolutional Neural Network. We first evaluate the per-image accuracy of our method and compare it with a state-of-the-art method based on Gaussian Mixture Models over four test datasets. Even though the parameters of the Gaussian Mixture Model-based method are specifically tuned for each dataset, our network outperforms it in three out of four datasets with a maximum of 94\% accuracy. Next, we use the method to estimate the yield for two datasets for which we have ground truth. Our method achieved 96-97\% accuracies. For additional details please see our video here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc}{https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc. 根据果园等现实环境中的图像估计准确可靠的水果和蔬菜数量是一个具有挑战性的问题，最近受到了广泛关注。收获前估算果实数量可为物流规划提供有用的信息。尽管在水果检测方面已经取得了相当大的进展，但估计实际数量仍然具有挑战性。在实践中，水果经常聚集在一起。因此，仅检测水果的方法无法提供估计准确水果数量的通用解决方案。此外，在园艺研究中，需要更精细的信息（例如每簇苹果数量的分布），而不是单一的产量估计。在这项工作中，我们将图像中的水果计数表述为多类分类问题，并通过训练卷积神经网络来解决它。我们首先评估我们方法的每图像准确性，并将其与基于四个测试数据集的高斯混合模型的最先进方法进行比较。尽管基于高斯混合模型的方法的参数是针对每个数据集专门调整的，但我们的网络在四分之三的数据集中优于它，最大准确度为 94%。接下来，我们使用该方法来估计我们有基本事实的两个数据集的产量。我们的方法达到了 96-97% 的准确率。有关更多详细信息，请在此处观看我们的视频：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc}{https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le0mb5P-SYc。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的苹果计数方法，用于解决实际场景中因果实聚集导致的传统检测方法难以准确统计的问题。 Nicolai Häni,Pravakar Roy,Volkan Isler cs.CV

authors_text: Minhaj Nur Alam,Rikiya Yamashita,Vignav Ramesh,Tejas Prabhune,Jennifer I. Lim,R. V. P. Chan,Joelle Hallak,Theodore Leng,Daniel Rubin
title: Contrastive learning-based pretraining improves representation and transferability of diabetic retinopathy classification models
title_zh: 基于对比学习的预训练提高了糖尿病视网膜病变分类模型的代表性和可转移性
abstract: Self supervised contrastive learning based pretraining allows development of robust and generalized deep learning models with small, labeled datasets, reducing the burden of label generation. This paper aims to evaluate the effect of CL based pretraining on the performance of referrable vs non referrable diabetic retinopathy (DR) classification. We have developed a CL based framework with neural style transfer (NST) augmentation to produce models with better representations and initializations for the detection of DR in color fundus images. We compare our CL pretrained model performance with two state of the art baseline models pretrained with Imagenet weights. We further investigate the model performance with reduced labeled training data (down to 10 percent) to test the robustness of the model when trained with small, labeled datasets. The model is trained and validated on the EyePACS dataset and tested independently on clinical data from the University of Illinois, Chicago (UIC). Compared to baseline models, our CL pretrained FundusNet model had higher AUC (CI) values (0.91 (0.898 to 0.930) vs 0.80 (0.783 to 0.820) and 0.83 (0.801 to 0.853) on UIC data). At 10 percent labeled training data, the FundusNet AUC was 0.81 (0.78 to 0.84) vs 0.58 (0.56 to 0.64) and 0.63 (0.60 to 0.66) in baseline models, when tested on the UIC dataset. CL based pretraining with NST significantly improves DL classification performance, helps the model generalize well (transferable from EyePACS to UIC data), and allows training with small, annotated datasets, therefore reducing ground truth annotation burden of the clinicians.
summary: Self supervised contrastive learning based pretraining allows development of robust and generalized deep learning models with small, labeled datasets, reducing the burden of label generation. This paper aims to evaluate the effect of CL based pretraining on the performance of referrable vs non referrable diabetic retinopathy (DR) classification. We have developed a CL based framework with neural style transfer (NST) augmentation to produce models with better representations and initializations for the detection of DR in color fundus images. We compare our CL pretrained model performance with two state of the art baseline models pretrained with Imagenet weights. We further investigate the model performance with reduced labeled training data (down to 10 percent) to test the robustness of the model when trained with small, labeled datasets. The model is trained and validated on the EyePACS dataset and tested independently on clinical data from the University of Illinois, Chicago (UIC). Compared to baseline models, our CL pretrained FundusNet model had higher AUC (CI) values (0.91 (0.898 to 0.930) vs 0.80 (0.783 to 0.820) and 0.83 (0.801 to 0.853) on UIC data). At 10 percent labeled training data, the FundusNet AUC was 0.81 (0.78 to 0.84) vs 0.58 (0.56 to 0.64) and 0.63 (0.60 to 0.66) in baseline models, when tested on the UIC dataset. CL based pretraining with NST significantly improves DL classification performance, helps the model generalize well (transferable from EyePACS to UIC data), and allows training with small, annotated datasets, therefore reducing ground truth annotation burden of the clinicians.
abstract_zh: 基于自监督对比学习的预训练允许使用小型标记数据集开发稳健且通用的深度学习模型，从而减轻标签生成的负担。本文旨在评估基于 CL 的预训练对可转诊与不可转诊糖尿病视网膜病变 (DR) 分类性能的影响。我们开发了一个基于 CL 的框架，具有神经风格迁移 (NST) 增强功能，可以生成具有更好表示和初始化的模型，用于检测彩色眼底图像中的 DR。我们将 CL 预训练模型的性能与使用 Imagenet 权重预训练的两个最先进的基线模型进行比较。我们进一步研究了减少标记训练数据（低至 10%）的模型性能，以测试模型在使用小型标记数据集进行训练时的稳健性。该模型在 EyePACS 数据集上进行训练和验证，并根据伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校 (UIC) 的临床数据进行独立测试。与基线模型相比，我们的 CL 预训练 FundusNet 模型具有更高的 AUC (CI) 值（UIC 数据上为 0.91（0.898 至 0.930）vs 0.80（0.783 至 0.820）和 0.83（0.801 至 0.853））。在 UIC 数据集上进行测试时，在 10% 标记训练数据下，FundusNet AUC 为 0.81（0.78 至 0.84），而基线模型中的 AUC 为 0.58（0.56 至 0.64）和 0.63（0.60 至 0.66）。基于 CL 的 NST 预训练显着提高了 DL 分类性能，有助于模型良好泛化（可从 EyePACS 转移到 UIC 数据），并允许使用小型带注释数据集进行训练，从而减少临床医生的真实注释负担。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了基于对比学习的预训练对糖尿病视网膜病变分类模型性能的影响，并提出结合神经风格迁移增强的框架以提升模型表现。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型依赖大量标注数据，而医学图像标注成本高昂。对比学习可利用无标签数据预训练模型，减少对标注数据的依赖，但其在糖尿病视网膜病变分类中的效果尚需验证。
AI.method: 开发基于对比学习的预训练框架，结合神经风格迁移数据增强技术，使用EyePACS数据集训练模型，并在UIC临床数据集上测试模型的可迁移性。对比基线模型（ImageNet预训练）在标注数据量减少至10%时的性能差异。
AI.result: CL预训练的FundusNet模型在UIC数据集上AUC达0.91，显著高于基线模型的0.80和0.83；当标注数据仅10%时，FundusNet AUC仍为0.81，而基线模型仅0.58和0.63。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习预训练结合NST增强能显著提升糖尿病视网膜病变分类模型的性能与可迁移性，有效降低对大规模标注数据的依赖。

title: Deep Symbolic Learning: Discovering Symbols and Rules from Perceptions
title_zh: 深度符号学习：从感知中发现符号和规则
abstract: Neuro-Symbolic (NeSy) integration combines symbolic reasoning with Neural Networks (NNs) for tasks requiring perception and reasoning. Most NeSy systems rely on continuous relaxation of logical knowledge, and no discrete decisions are made within the model pipeline. Furthermore, these methods assume that the symbolic rules are given. In this paper, we propose Deep Symbolic Learning (DSL), a NeSy system that learns NeSy-functions, i.e., the composition of a (set of) perception functions which map continuous data to discrete symbols, and a symbolic function over the set of symbols. DSL learns simultaneously the perception and symbolic functions while being trained only on their composition (NeSy-function). The key novelty of DSL is that it can create internal (interpretable) symbolic representations and map them to perception inputs within a differentiable NN learning pipeline. The created symbols are automatically selected to generate symbolic functions that best explain the data. We provide experimental analysis to substantiate the efficacy of DSL in simultaneously learning perception and symbolic functions.
summary: Neuro-Symbolic (NeSy) integration combines symbolic reasoning with Neural Networks (NNs) for tasks requiring perception and reasoning. Most NeSy systems rely on continuous relaxation of logical knowledge, and no discrete decisions are made within the model pipeline. Furthermore, these methods assume that the symbolic rules are given. In this paper, we propose Deep Symbolic Learning (DSL), a NeSy system that learns NeSy-functions, i.e., the composition of a (set of) perception functions which map continuous data to discrete symbols, and a symbolic function over the set of symbols. DSL learns simultaneously the perception and symbolic functions while being trained only on their composition (NeSy-function). The key novelty of DSL is that it can create internal (interpretable) symbolic representations and map them to perception inputs within a differentiable NN learning pipeline. The created symbols are automatically selected to generate symbolic functions that best explain the data. We provide experimental analysis to substantiate the efficacy of DSL in simultaneously learning perception and symbolic functions.
abstract_zh: 神经符号 (NeSy) 集成将符号推理与神经网络 (NN) 结合起来，用于需要感知和推理的任务。大多数 NeSy 系统依赖于逻辑知识的连续松弛，并且在模型管道内不做出离散决策。此外，这些方法假设给出了符号规则。在本文中，我们提出了深度符号学习（DSL），这是一种学习 NeSy 函数的 NeSy 系统，即将连续数据映射到离散符号的（一组）感知函数的组合，以及符号集上的符号函数。 DSL 同时学习感知和符号功能，同时仅对其组成（NeSy 功能）进行训练。 DSL 的关键新颖之处在于它可以创建内部（可解释的）符号表示并将其映射到可微神经网络学习管道中的感知输入。自动选择创建的符号来生成最能解释数据的符号函数。我们提供实验分析来证实 DSL 在同时学习感知和符号功能方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deep Symbolic Learning (DSL)的神经符号系统，能够同时学习感知函数和符号函数，生成可解释的符号表示以解释数据。
AI.motivation: 现有神经符号系统依赖连续松弛逻辑知识且假设符号规则已知，缺乏离散决策能力与符号自动发现机制，限制了模型的可解释性与表达能力。
AI.method: DSL通过微分神经网络框架联合优化感知函数（连续数据到离散符号的映射）与符号函数，仅需训练其组合（NeSy函数），自动选择符号生成最佳解释性规则。
AI.result: 实验验证了DSL在同时学习感知与符号函数任务中的有效性，生成的符号能准确解释数据并保持可解释性。
AI.conclusion: DSL通过自动符号发现机制突破了传统NeSy系统的限制，为神经符号系统提供了新的可解释性增强思路。

ai_content_json.conclusion: DSL通过自动符号发现机制突破了传统NeSy系统的限制，为神经符号系统提供了新的可解释性增强思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deep Symbolic Learning (DSL)的神经符号系统，能够同时学习感知函数和符号函数，生成可解释的符号表示以解释数据。
motivation: 现有神经符号系统依赖连续松弛逻辑知识且假设符号规则已知，缺乏离散决策能力与符号自动发现机制，限制了模型的可解释性与表达能力。
method: DSL通过微分神经网络框架联合优化感知函数（连续数据到离散符号的映射）与符号函数，仅需训练其组合（NeSy函数），自动选择符号生成最佳解释性规则。
result: 实验验证了DSL在同时学习感知与符号函数任务中的有效性，生成的符号能准确解释数据并保持可解释性。
conclusion: DSL通过自动符号发现机制突破了传统NeSy系统的限制，为神经符号系统提供了新的可解释性增强思路。
search_text: Deep Symbolic Learning: Discovering Symbols and Rules from Perceptions 深度符号学习：从感知中发现符号和规则 Neuro-Symbolic (NeSy) integration combines symbolic reasoning with Neural Networks (NNs) for tasks requiring perception and reasoning. Most NeSy systems rely on continuous relaxation of logical knowledge, and no discrete decisions are made within the model pipeline. Furthermore, these methods assume that the symbolic rules are given. In this paper, we propose Deep Symbolic Learning (DSL), a NeSy system that learns NeSy-functions, i.e., the composition of a (set of) perception functions which map continuous data to discrete symbols, and a symbolic function over the set of symbols. DSL learns simultaneously the perception and symbolic functions while being trained only on their composition (NeSy-function). The key novelty of DSL is that it can create internal (interpretable) symbolic representations and map them to perception inputs within a differentiable NN learning pipeline. The created symbols are automatically selected to generate symbolic functions that best explain the data. We provide experimental analysis to substantiate the efficacy of DSL in simultaneously learning perception and symbolic functions. 神经符号 (NeSy) 集成将符号推理与神经网络 (NN) 结合起来，用于需要感知和推理的任务。大多数 NeSy 系统依赖于逻辑知识的连续松弛，并且在模型管道内不做出离散决策。此外，这些方法假设给出了符号规则。在本文中，我们提出了深度符号学习（DSL），这是一种学习 NeSy 函数的 NeSy 系统，即将连续数据映射到离散符号的（一组）感知函数的组合，以及符号集上的符号函数。 DSL 同时学习感知和符号功能，同时仅对其组成（NeSy 功能）进行训练。 DSL 的关键新颖之处在于它可以创建内部（可解释的）符号表示并将其映射到可微神经网络学习管道中的感知输入。自动选择创建的符号来生成最能解释数据的符号函数。我们提供实验分析来证实 DSL 在同时学习感知和符号功能方面的功效。 本文提出了一种名为Deep Symbolic Learning (DSL)的神经符号系统，能够同时学习感知函数和符号函数，生成可解释的符号表示以解释数据。 Alessandro Daniele,Tommaso Campari,Sagar Malhotra,Luciano Serafini cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Knowledge-based and Data-driven Reasoning and Learning for Ad Hoc Teamwork
title_zh: 基于知识和数据驱动的临时团队合作推理和学习
comment: Presented at the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series(FSS), 2022 (arXiv:cs/2209.14292)
comments: Presented at the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series(FSS), 2022 (arXiv:cs/2209.14292)
abstract: We present an architecture for ad hoc teamwork, which refers to collaboration in a team of agents without prior coordination. State of the art methods for this problem often include a data-driven component that uses a long history of prior observations to model the behaviour of other agents (or agent types) and to determine the ad hoc agent's behaviour. In many practical domains, it is challenging to find large training datasets, and necessary to understand and incrementally extend the existing models to account for changes in team composition or domain attributes. Our architecture combines the principles of knowledge-based and data-driven reasoning and learning. Specifically, we enable an ad hoc agent to perform non-monotonic logical reasoning with prior commonsense domain knowledge and incrementally-updated simple predictive models of other agents' behaviour. We use the benchmark simulated multi-agent collaboration domain Fort Attack to demonstrate that our architecture supports adaptation to unforeseen changes, incremental learning and revision of models of other agents' behaviour from limited samples, transparency in the ad hoc agent's decision making, and better performance than a data-driven baseline.
summary: We present an architecture for ad hoc teamwork, which refers to collaboration in a team of agents without prior coordination. State of the art methods for this problem often include a data-driven component that uses a long history of prior observations to model the behaviour of other agents (or agent types) and to determine the ad hoc agent's behaviour. In many practical domains, it is challenging to find large training datasets, and necessary to understand and incrementally extend the existing models to account for changes in team composition or domain attributes. Our architecture combines the principles of knowledge-based and data-driven reasoning and learning. Specifically, we enable an ad hoc agent to perform non-monotonic logical reasoning with prior commonsense domain knowledge and incrementally-updated simple predictive models of other agents' behaviour. We use the benchmark simulated multi-agent collaboration domain Fort Attack to demonstrate that our architecture supports adaptation to unforeseen changes, incremental learning and revision of models of other agents' behaviour from limited samples, transparency in the ad hoc agent's decision making, and better performance than a data-driven baseline.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种临时团队合作的架构，这是指在没有事先协调的情况下在代理团队中进行协作。解决此问题的最先进方法通常包括数据驱动组件，该组件使用先前观察的长期历史来对其他代理（或代理类型）的行为进行建模并确定临时代理的行为。在许多实际领域中，找到大型训练数据集具有挑战性，并且有必要理解并逐步扩展现有模型以适应团队组成或领域属性的变化。我们的架构结合了基于知识和数据驱动的推理和学习的原则。具体来说，我们使临时代理能够利用先前的常识性领域知识和其他代理行为的增量更新的简单预测模型来执行非单调逻辑推理。我们使用基准模拟多智能体协作域 Fort Attack 来证明我们的架构支持适应不可预见的变化、从有限的样本中增量学习和修改其他智能体的行为模型、临时智能体决策的透明度以及比数据驱动的基线更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合知识推理与数据驱动的架构，用于解决无先验协调的自适应团队协作问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动方法依赖大量历史数据且难以应对团队组成或领域变化，需结合知识推理提升适应性与透明性。
AI.method: 融合非单调逻辑推理与增量更新的预测模型，利用领域常识知识和有限样本进行行为建模，并在Fort Attack基准测试中验证。
AI.result: 架构支持动态适应、增量学习、决策透明性，且在有限样本下优于传统数据驱动方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构有效平衡了知识与数据优势，未来可扩展至更复杂动态环境。

authors_text: Avinash Madasu,Estelle Aflalo,Gabriela Ben Melech Stan,Shachar Rosenman,Shao-Yen Tseng,Gedas Bertasius,Vasudev Lal
title: MuMUR : Multilingual Multimodal Universal Retrieval
title_zh: MuMUR：多语言多模态通用检索
comment: This is an extension of the previous MKTVR paper (for which you can find a reference here : https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.1007/978-3-031-28244-7_42 or in a previous version on arxiv). This version was published to the Information Retrieval Journal
comments: This is an extension of the previous MKTVR paper (for which you can find a reference here : https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.1007/978-3-031-28244-7_42 or in a previous version on arxiv). This version was published to the Information Retrieval Journal
abstract: Multi-modal retrieval has seen tremendous progress with the development of vision-language models. However, further improving these models require additional labelled data which is a huge manual effort. In this paper, we propose a framework MuMUR, that utilizes knowledge transfer from a multilingual model to boost the performance of multi-modal (image and video) retrieval. We first use state-of-the-art machine translation models to construct pseudo ground-truth multilingual visual-text pairs. We then use this data to learn a joint vision-text representation where English and non-English text queries are represented in a common embedding space based on pretrained multilingual models. We evaluate our proposed approach on a diverse set of retrieval datasets: five video retrieval datasets such as MSRVTT, MSVD, DiDeMo, Charades and MSRVTT multilingual, two image retrieval datasets such as Flickr30k and Multi30k . Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on all video retrieval datasets outperforming previous models. Additionally, our framework MuMUR significantly beats other multilingual video retrieval dataset. We also observe that MuMUR exhibits strong performance on image retrieval. This demonstrates the universal ability of MuMUR to perform retrieval across all visual inputs (image and video) and text inputs (monolingual and multilingual).
summary: Multi-modal retrieval has seen tremendous progress with the development of vision-language models. However, further improving these models require additional labelled data which is a huge manual effort. In this paper, we propose a framework MuMUR, that utilizes knowledge transfer from a multilingual model to boost the performance of multi-modal (image and video) retrieval. We first use state-of-the-art machine translation models to construct pseudo ground-truth multilingual visual-text pairs. We then use this data to learn a joint vision-text representation where English and non-English text queries are represented in a common embedding space based on pretrained multilingual models. We evaluate our proposed approach on a diverse set of retrieval datasets: five video retrieval datasets such as MSRVTT, MSVD, DiDeMo, Charades and MSRVTT multilingual, two image retrieval datasets such as Flickr30k and Multi30k . Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on all video retrieval datasets outperforming previous models. Additionally, our framework MuMUR significantly beats other multilingual video retrieval dataset. We also observe that MuMUR exhibits strong performance on image retrieval. This demonstrates the universal ability of MuMUR to perform retrieval across all visual inputs (image and video) and text inputs (monolingual and multilingual).
abstract_zh: 随着视觉语言模型的发展，多模态检索取得了巨大进步。然而，进一步改进这些模型需要额外的标记数据，这是一项巨大的手动工作。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架 MuMUR，它利用多语言模型的知识迁移来提高多模式（图像和视频）检索的性能。我们首先使用最先进的机器翻译模型来构建伪真实多语言视觉文本对。然后，我们使用这些数据来学习联合视觉文本表示，其中英语和非英语文本查询在基于预训练的多语言模型的公共嵌入空间中表示。我们在一组不同的检索数据集上评估了我们提出的方法：五个视频检索数据集，例如 MSRVTT、MSVD、DiDeMo、Charades 和 MSRVTT 多语言，两个图像检索数据集，例如 Flickr30k 和 Multi30k。实验结果表明，我们的方法在所有视频检索数据集上取得了最先进的结果，优于以前的模型。此外，我们的框架 MuMUR 显着优于其他多语言视频检索数据集。我们还观察到 MuMUR 在图像检索方面表现出强大的性能。这证明了 MuMUR 在所有视觉输入（图像和视频）和文本输入（单语和多语）中执行检索的通用能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MuMUR的多语言多模态通用检索框架，通过知识迁移提升图像和视频的跨语言检索性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态检索取得进展，但现有模型依赖大量人工标注数据，且难以有效处理多语言场景，亟需减少对标注数据的依赖并提升跨语言检索能力。
AI.method: 利用最先进的机器翻译模型生成伪多语言图文对，构建基于预训练多语言模型的联合视觉-文本嵌入空间，实现英语与非英语查询的统一表征。
AI.result: 在MSRVTT、Flickr30k等5个视频和2个图像数据集上均达到SOTA性能，尤其在多语言视频检索任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MuMUR框架通过跨语言知识迁移有效提升了多模态检索的通用性，在图像和视频、单语与多语场景中均表现出色。
