Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on all video retrieval datasets outperforming previous models. Additionally, our framework MuMUR significantly beats other multilingual video retrieval dataset. We also observe that MuMUR exhibits strong performance on image retrieval. This demonstrates the universal ability of MuMUR to perform retrieval across all visual inputs (image and video) and text inputs (monolingual and multilingual). 随着视觉语言模型的发展，多模态检索取得了巨大进步。然而，进一步改进这些模型需要额外的标记数据，这是一项巨大的手动工作。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架 MuMUR，它利用多语言模型的知识迁移来提高多模式（图像和视频）检索的性能。我们首先使用最先进的机器翻译模型来构建伪真实多语言视觉文本对。然后，我们使用这些数据来学习联合视觉文本表示，其中英语和非英语文本查询在基于预训练的多语言模型的公共嵌入空间中表示。我们在一组不同的检索数据集上评估了我们提出的方法：五个视频检索数据集，例如 MSRVTT、MSVD、DiDeMo、Charades 和 MSRVTT 多语言，两个图像检索数据集，例如 Flickr30k 和 Multi30k。实验结果表明，我们的方法在所有视频检索数据集上取得了最先进的结果，优于以前的模型。此外，我们的框架 MuMUR 显着优于其他多语言视频检索数据集。我们还观察到 MuMUR 在图像检索方面表现出强大的性能。这证明了 MuMUR 在所有视觉输入（图像和视频）和文本输入（单语和多语）中执行检索的通用能力。 本文提出了一种名为MuMUR的多语言多模态通用检索框架，通过知识迁移提升图像和视频的跨语言检索性能。 Avinash Madasu,Estelle Aflalo,Gabriela Ben Melech Stan,Shachar Rosenman,Shao-Yen Tseng,Gedas Bertasius,Vasudev Lal cs.CV

title: CheapET-3: Cost-Efficient Use of Remote DNN Models
title_zh: CheapET-3：远程 DNN 模型的经济高效使用
comment: Research Abstract. Contact me for a pre-print of the full paper (currently not yet published)
comments: Research Abstract. Contact me for a pre-print of the full paper (currently not yet published)
abstract: On complex problems, state of the art prediction accuracy of Deep Neural Networks (DNN) can be achieved using very large-scale models, consisting of billions of parameters. Such models can only be run on dedicated servers, typically provided by a 3rd party service, which leads to a substantial monetary cost for every prediction. We propose a new software architecture for client-side applications, where a small local DNN is used alongside a remote large-scale model, aiming to make easy predictions locally at negligible monetary cost, while still leveraging the benefits of a large model for challenging inputs. In a proof of concept we reduce prediction cost by up to 50% without negatively impacting system accuracy.
summary: On complex problems, state of the art prediction accuracy of Deep Neural Networks (DNN) can be achieved using very large-scale models, consisting of billions of parameters. Such models can only be run on dedicated servers, typically provided by a 3rd party service, which leads to a substantial monetary cost for every prediction. We propose a new software architecture for client-side applications, where a small local DNN is used alongside a remote large-scale model, aiming to make easy predictions locally at negligible monetary cost, while still leveraging the benefits of a large model for challenging inputs. In a proof of concept we reduce prediction cost by up to 50% without negatively impacting system accuracy.
abstract_zh: 对于复杂问题，可以使用由数十亿个参数组成的超大规模模型来实现深度神经网络 (DNN) 的最先进的预测精度。此类模型只能在专用服务器上运行，通常由第三方服务提供，这会导致每次预测都会产生大量的金钱成本。我们为客户端应用程序提出了一种新的软件架构，其中小型本地 DNN 与远程大型模型一起使用，旨在以可忽略不计的货币成本在本地进行轻松预测，同时仍然利用大型模型的优势来应对具有挑战性的输入。在概念验证中，我们将预测成本降低了 50%，而不会对系统准确性产生负面影响。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合本地小型DNN和远程大规模模型的软件架构，以降低成本同时保持预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 大规模DNN模型虽准确但运行成本高，而本地小模型成本低但效果不佳，需在两者间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 设计软件架构，使用本地小型DNN处理简单任务，复杂输入则由远程大模型处理，从而减少远程调用次数。
AI.result: 通过概念验证，预测成本最高降低50%，同时保持系统准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了成本和准确性，为远程大规模模型的高效使用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Lumin Xu,Sheng Jin,Wentao Liu,Chen Qian,Wanli Ouyang,Ping Luo,Xiaogang Wang
title: ZoomNAS: Searching for Whole-body Human Pose Estimation in the Wild
title_zh: ZoomNAS：在野外寻找全身人体姿势估计
abstract: This paper investigates the task of 2D whole-body human pose estimation, which aims to localize dense landmarks on the entire human body including body, feet, face, and hands. We propose a single-network approach, termed ZoomNet, to take into account the hierarchical structure of the full human body and solve the scale variation of different body parts. We further propose a neural architecture search framework, termed ZoomNAS, to promote both the accuracy and efficiency of whole-body pose estimation. ZoomNAS jointly searches the model architecture and the connections between different sub-modules, and automatically allocates computational complexity for searched sub-modules. To train and evaluate ZoomNAS, we introduce the first large-scale 2D human whole-body dataset, namely COCO-WholeBody V1.0, which annotates 133 keypoints for in-the-wild images. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of ZoomNAS and the significance of COCO-WholeBody V1.0.
summary: This paper investigates the task of 2D whole-body human pose estimation, which aims to localize dense landmarks on the entire human body including body, feet, face, and hands. We propose a single-network approach, termed ZoomNet, to take into account the hierarchical structure of the full human body and solve the scale variation of different body parts. We further propose a neural architecture search framework, termed ZoomNAS, to promote both the accuracy and efficiency of whole-body pose estimation. ZoomNAS jointly searches the model architecture and the connections between different sub-modules, and automatically allocates computational complexity for searched sub-modules. To train and evaluate ZoomNAS, we introduce the first large-scale 2D human whole-body dataset, namely COCO-WholeBody V1.0, which annotates 133 keypoints for in-the-wild images. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of ZoomNAS and the significance of COCO-WholeBody V1.0.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了二维全身人体姿势估计的任务，旨在定位整个人体（包括身体、脚、面部和手）上的密集标志。我们提出了一种称为 ZoomNet 的单网络方法，以考虑整个人体的层次结构并解决不同身体部位的尺度变化。我们进一步提出了一种神经架构搜索框架，称为 ZoomNAS，以提高全身姿势估计的准确性和效率。 ZoomNAS联合搜索模型架构和不同子模块之间的连接，并自动为搜索到的子模块分配计算复杂度。为了训练和评估 ZoomNAS，我们引入了第一个大规模 2D 人体全身数据集，即 COCO-WholeBody V1.0，它注释了野外图像的 133 个关键点。大量的实验证明了ZoomNAS的有效性和COCO-WholeBody V1.0的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ZoomNAS的神经架构搜索框架，用于改进2D全身人体姿态估计任务，该任务旨在定位包括身体、脚部、面部和手部在内的密集关键点。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理全身各部位尺度变化和层次结构，导致精度与效率不足。本文旨在通过设计更适应全身姿态估计的网络结构和自动优化计算资源分配来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出ZoomNet网络以考虑全身层次结构，并设计ZoomNAS框架联合搜索模型架构与子模块连接方式，自动分配计算复杂度；同时构建包含133个关键点标注的COCO-WholeBody V1.0数据集用于训练与评估。
AI.result: 实验验证了ZoomNAS在全身姿态估计中的有效性，证明了COCO-WholeBody V1.0数据集对研究的重要意义。
AI.conclusion: ZoomNAS通过架构搜索和层次化设计提升了全身姿态估计的精度与效率，而新数据集为后续研究提供了基准。

title: Unsupervised Structure-Consistent Image-to-Image Translation
title_zh: 无监督结构一致的图像到图像的翻译
comment: structure-consistent image-to-image translation \and style transfer \and training class imbalance
comments: structure-consistent image-to-image translation \and style transfer \and training class imbalance
abstract: The Swapping Autoencoder achieved state-of-the-art performance in deep image manipulation and image-to-image translation. We improve this work by introducing a simple yet effective auxiliary module based on gradient reversal layers. The auxiliary module's loss forces the generator to learn to reconstruct an image with an all-zero texture code, encouraging better disentanglement between the structure and texture information. The proposed attribute-based transfer method enables refined control in style transfer while preserving structural information without using a semantic mask. To manipulate an image, we encode both the geometry of the objects and the general style of the input images into two latent codes with an additional constraint that enforces structure consistency. Moreover, due to the auxiliary loss, training time is significantly reduced. The superiority of the proposed model is demonstrated in complex domains such as satellite images where state-of-the-art are known to fail. Lastly, we show that our model improves the quality metrics for a wide range of datasets while achieving comparable results with multi-modal image generation techniques.
summary: The Swapping Autoencoder achieved state-of-the-art performance in deep image manipulation and image-to-image translation. We improve this work by introducing a simple yet effective auxiliary module based on gradient reversal layers. The auxiliary module's loss forces the generator to learn to reconstruct an image with an all-zero texture code, encouraging better disentanglement between the structure and texture information. The proposed attribute-based transfer method enables refined control in style transfer while preserving structural information without using a semantic mask. To manipulate an image, we encode both the geometry of the objects and the general style of the input images into two latent codes with an additional constraint that enforces structure consistency. Moreover, due to the auxiliary loss, training time is significantly reduced. The superiority of the proposed model is demonstrated in complex domains such as satellite images where state-of-the-art are known to fail. Lastly, we show that our model improves the quality metrics for a wide range of datasets while achieving comparable results with multi-modal image generation techniques.
abstract_zh: 交换自动编码器在深度图像处理和图像到图像转换方面实现了最先进的性能。我们通过引入一个基于梯度反转层的简单而有效的辅助模块来改进这项工作。辅助模块的损失迫使生成器学习使用全零纹理代码重建图像，从而鼓励更好地解开结构和纹理信息之间的纠缠。所提出的基于属性的传输方法可以对风格传输进行精细控制，同时保留结构信息，而无需使用语义掩码。为了操纵图像，我们将对象的几何形状和输入图像的一般样式编码为两个潜在代码，并附加一个强制结构一致性的约束。而且，由于辅助损失，训练时间显着减少。所提出模型的优越性在复杂领域得到了证明，例如卫星图像，而已知最先进的技术在这些领域会失败。最后，我们表明我们的模型提高了各种数据集的质量指标，同时通过多模态图像生成技术实现了可比较的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督的结构一致图像到图像翻译方法，通过改进Swapping Autoencoder模型实现更精细的风格迁移与结构保持。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在结构与纹理信息解耦及无需语义掩码的风格迁移方面存在不足，且训练效率有待提升。
AI.method: 引入基于梯度反转层的辅助模块，通过强制生成器重构零纹理码图像优化结构-纹理解耦，并利用双潜在码（几何与风格）及结构一致性约束实现无监督翻译。
AI.result: 在卫星图像等复杂领域优于现有方法，显著提升多数据集质量指标且训练时间缩短，效果与多模态生成技术相当。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过结构-纹理解耦与辅助损失函数有效提升了无监督图像翻译的精度与效率，验证了其在复杂场景下的优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督的结构一致图像到图像翻译方法，通过改进Swapping Autoencoder模型实现更精细的风格迁移与结构保持。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在结构与纹理信息解耦及无需语义掩码的风格迁移方面存在不足，且训练效率有待提升。
ai_content.method: 引入基于梯度反转层的辅助模块，通过强制生成器重构零纹理码图像优化结构-纹理解耦，并利用双潜在码（几何与风格）及结构一致性约束实现无监督翻译。
ai_content.result: 在卫星图像等复杂领域优于现有方法，显著提升多数据集质量指标且训练时间缩短，效果与多模态生成技术相当。
ai_content.conclusion: 该模型通过结构-纹理解耦与辅助损失函数有效提升了无监督图像翻译的精度与效率，验证了其在复杂场景下的优越性。

search_text: Unsupervised Structure-Consistent Image-to-Image Translation 无监督结构一致的图像到图像的翻译 The Swapping Autoencoder achieved state-of-the-art performance in deep image manipulation and image-to-image translation. We improve this work by introducing a simple yet effective auxiliary module based on gradient reversal layers. The auxiliary module's loss forces the generator to learn to reconstruct an image with an all-zero texture code, encouraging better disentanglement between the structure and texture information. The proposed attribute-based transfer method enables refined control in style transfer while preserving structural information without using a semantic mask. To manipulate an image, we encode both the geometry of the objects and the general style of the input images into two latent codes with an additional constraint that enforces structure consistency. Moreover, due to the auxiliary loss, training time is significantly reduced. The superiority of the proposed model is demonstrated in complex domains such as satellite images where state-of-the-art are known to fail. Lastly, we show that our model improves the quality metrics for a wide range of datasets while achieving comparable results with multi-modal image generation techniques. 交换自动编码器在深度图像处理和图像到图像转换方面实现了最先进的性能。我们通过引入一个基于梯度反转层的简单而有效的辅助模块来改进这项工作。辅助模块的损失迫使生成器学习使用全零纹理代码重建图像，从而鼓励更好地解开结构和纹理信息之间的纠缠。所提出的基于属性的传输方法可以对风格传输进行精细控制，同时保留结构信息，而无需使用语义掩码。为了操纵图像，我们将对象的几何形状和输入图像的一般样式编码为两个潜在代码，并附加一个强制结构一致性的约束。而且，由于辅助损失，训练时间显着减少。所提出模型的优越性在复杂领域得到了证明，例如卫星图像，而已知最先进的技术在这些领域会失败。最后，我们表明我们的模型提高了各种数据集的质量指标，同时通过多模态图像生成技术实现了可比较的结果。 本文提出了一种无监督的结构一致图像到图像翻译方法，通过改进Swapping Autoencoder模型实现更精细的风格迁移与结构保持。 Shima Shahfar,Charalambos Poullis cs.CV

title: Visual Servoing in Orchard Settings
title_zh: 果园环境中的视觉服务
comment: ef:In 2016 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) (pp. 2946-2953)
comments: ef:In 2016 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) (pp. 2946-2953)
abstract: We present a general framework for accurate positioning of sensors and end effectors in farm settings using a camera mounted on a robotic manipulator. Our main contribution is a visual servoing approach based on a new and robust feature tracking algorithm. Results from field experiments performed at an apple orchard demonstrate that our approach converges to a given termination criterion even under environmental influences such as strong winds, varying illumination conditions and partial occlusion of the target object. Further, we show experimentally that the system converges to the desired view for a wide range of initial conditions. This approach opens possibilities for new applications such as automated fruit inspection, fruit picking or precise pesticide application.
summary: We present a general framework for accurate positioning of sensors and end effectors in farm settings using a camera mounted on a robotic manipulator. Our main contribution is a visual servoing approach based on a new and robust feature tracking algorithm. Results from field experiments performed at an apple orchard demonstrate that our approach converges to a given termination criterion even under environmental influences such as strong winds, varying illumination conditions and partial occlusion of the target object. Further, we show experimentally that the system converges to the desired view for a wide range of initial conditions. This approach opens possibilities for new applications such as automated fruit inspection, fruit picking or precise pesticide application.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个通用框架，用于使用安装在机器人操纵器上的相机在农场环境中精确定位传感器和末端执行器。我们的主要贡献是基于新的、强大的特征跟踪算法的视觉伺服方法。在苹果园进行的现场实验结果表明，即使在强风、变化的照明条件和目标对象的部分遮挡等环境影响下，我们的方法也能收敛到给定的终止标准。此外，我们通过实验表明，系统在各种初始条件下都会收敛到所需的视图。这种方法为自动水果检测、水果采摘或精确农药施用等新应用开辟了可能性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉伺服的框架，用于在果园环境中准确定位传感器和机械臂末端执行器。
AI.motivation: 解决果园环境中动态变化和复杂条件下的精准定位问题，提升农业自动化效率。
AI.method: 基于新型鲁棒特征跟踪算法的视觉伺服方法，通过摄像头实时调整机械臂姿态。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在强风、光照变化和遮挡下的有效性，且适用于多种初始条件。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为果园自动化操作提供了可行的解决方案，推动精准农业的发展。

authors_text: Yoonwoo Jeong,Seungjoo Shin,Junha Lee,Christopher Choy,Animashree Anandkumar,Minsu Cho,Jaesik Park
title: PeRFception: Perception using Radiance Fields
title_zh: PerFception：使用辐射场的感知
abstract: The recent progress in implicit 3D representation, i.e., Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs), has made accurate and photorealistic 3D reconstruction possible in a differentiable manner. This new representation can effectively convey the information of hundreds of high-resolution images in one compact format and allows photorealistic synthesis of novel views. In this work, using the variant of NeRF called Plenoxels, we create the first large-scale implicit representation datasets for perception tasks, called the PeRFception, which consists of two parts that incorporate both object-centric and scene-centric scans for classification and segmentation. It shows a significant memory compression rate (96.4\%) from the original dataset, while containing both 2D and 3D information in a unified form. We construct the classification and segmentation models that directly take as input this implicit format and also propose a novel augmentation technique to avoid overfitting on backgrounds of images. The code and data are publicly available in https://postech-cvlab.github.io/PeRFception .
summary: The recent progress in implicit 3D representation, i.e., Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs), has made accurate and photorealistic 3D reconstruction possible in a differentiable manner. This new representation can effectively convey the information of hundreds of high-resolution images in one compact format and allows photorealistic synthesis of novel views. In this work, using the variant of NeRF called Plenoxels, we create the first large-scale implicit representation datasets for perception tasks, called the PeRFception, which consists of two parts that incorporate both object-centric and scene-centric scans for classification and segmentation. It shows a significant memory compression rate (96.4\%) from the original dataset, while containing both 2D and 3D information in a unified form. We construct the classification and segmentation models that directly take as input this implicit format and also propose a novel augmentation technique to avoid overfitting on backgrounds of images. The code and data are publicly available in https://postech-cvlab.github.io/PeRFception .
abstract_zh: 隐式 3D 表示（即神经辐射场 (NeRF)）的最新进展使得以可微分的方式实现准确且逼真的 3D 重建成为可能。这种新的表示方式可以有效地以一种紧凑的格式传达数百张高分辨率图像的信息，并允许新颖视图的逼真合成。在这项工作中，我们使用称为 Plenoxels 的 NeRF 变体，创建了第一个用于感知任务的大规模隐式表示数据集，称为 PerFception，它由两部分组成，结合了以对象为中心和以场景为中心的扫描，以进行分类和分割。它显示了原始数据集的显着内存压缩率 (96.4\%)，同时以统一形式包含 2D 和 3D 信息。我们构建了直接将这种隐式格式作为输入的分类和分割模型，并提出了一种新颖的增强技术来避免图像背景的过度拟合。代码和数据可在 https://postech-cvlab.github.io/PeRFception 中公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PeRFception数据集，利用Plenoxels（NeRF变体）创建首个大规模隐式表示数据集，用于分类和分割任务，结合对象中心和场景中心扫描，实现高效内存压缩。
AI.motivation: 尽管NeRF在3D重建中取得进展，但现有数据集未针对感知任务优化，且缺乏统一的2D/3D信息表示，导致内存效率低下。
AI.method: 基于Plenoxels构建包含对象和场景扫描的隐式表示数据集，设计直接输入隐式格式的分类/分割模型，并提出背景增强技术防止过拟合。
AI.result: 实现原始数据集96.4%的内存压缩率，同时保留2D/3D信息；模型在分类和分割任务中表现良好，数据集已公开。
AI.conclusion: PeRFception为感知任务提供高效、统一的隐式表示数据集，推动视觉与3D重建领域研究，通过压缩存储和新型增强技术提升模型性能。

title: A model-based approach to meta-Reinforcement Learning: Transformers and tree search
title_zh: 基于模型的元强化学习方法：变压器和树搜索
abstract: Meta-learning is a line of research that develops the ability to leverage past experiences to efficiently solve new learning problems. Meta-Reinforcement Learning (meta-RL) methods demonstrate a capability to learn behaviors that efficiently acquire and exploit information in several meta-RL problems. In this context, the Alchemy benchmark has been proposed by Wang et al. [2021]. Alchemy features a rich structured latent space that is challenging for state-of-the-art model-free RL methods. These methods fail to learn to properly explore then exploit. We develop a model-based algorithm. We train a model whose principal block is a Transformer Encoder to fit the symbolic Alchemy environment dynamics. Then we define an online planner with the learned model using a tree search method. This algorithm significantly outperforms previously applied model-free RL methods on the symbolic Alchemy problem. Our results reveal the relevance of model-based approaches with online planning to perform exploration and exploitation successfully in meta-RL. Moreover, we show the efficiency of the Transformer architecture to learn complex dynamics that arise from latent spaces present in meta-RL problems.
summary: Meta-learning is a line of research that develops the ability to leverage past experiences to efficiently solve new learning problems. Meta-Reinforcement Learning (meta-RL) methods demonstrate a capability to learn behaviors that efficiently acquire and exploit information in several meta-RL problems. In this context, the Alchemy benchmark has been proposed by Wang et al. [2021]. Alchemy features a rich structured latent space that is challenging for state-of-the-art model-free RL methods. These methods fail to learn to properly explore then exploit. We develop a model-based algorithm. We train a model whose principal block is a Transformer Encoder to fit the symbolic Alchemy environment dynamics. Then we define an online planner with the learned model using a tree search method. This algorithm significantly outperforms previously applied model-free RL methods on the symbolic Alchemy problem. Our results reveal the relevance of model-based approaches with online planning to perform exploration and exploitation successfully in meta-RL. Moreover, we show the efficiency of the Transformer architecture to learn complex dynamics that arise from latent spaces present in meta-RL problems.
abstract_zh: 元学习是一系列研究，旨在开发利用过去的经验有效解决新学习问题的能力。元强化学习 (meta-RL) 方法展示了学习行为的能力，可以有效获取和利用多个元强化学习问题中的信息。在此背景下，Wang 等人提出了 Alchemy 基准。 [2021]。 Alchemy 具有丰富的结构化潜在空间，这对最先进的无模型强化学习方法来说是一个挑战。这些方法无法学会正确探索然后利用。我们开发了一种基于模型的算法。我们训练一个模型，其主要模块是 Transformer Encoder，以适应符号 Alchemy 环境动态。然后，我们使用树搜索方法使用学习模型定义在线规划器。该算法在符号炼金术问题上明显优于之前应用的无模型强化学习方法。我们的结果揭示了基于模型的方法与在线规划的相关性，以在元强化学习中成功地进行探索和利用。此外，我们还展示了 Transformer 架构在学习元强化学习问题中潜在空间所产生的复杂动态方面的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型的元强化学习方法，结合Transformer和树搜索技术，以解决Alchemy基准中的探索与利用难题。
AI.motivation: 现有无模型强化学习方法在Alchemy基准中难以有效平衡探索与利用，需开发更高效的方法应对复杂潜在空间。
AI.method: 训练以Transformer编码器为核心的动力学模型，并基于该模型设计树搜索在线规划器，实现元强化学习。
AI.result: 该算法在符号化Alchemy问题上显著优于现有无模型RL方法，验证了模型基方法与Transformer的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 模型基方法结合在线规划能有效解决元强化学习中的探索利用问题，Transformer架构适合学习复杂潜在空间动力学。

search_text: A model-based approach to meta-Reinforcement Learning: Transformers and tree search 基于模型的元强化学习方法：变压器和树搜索 Meta-learning is a line of research that develops the ability to leverage past experiences to efficiently solve new learning problems. Meta-Reinforcement Learning (meta-RL) methods demonstrate a capability to learn behaviors that efficiently acquire and exploit information in several meta-RL problems. In this context, the Alchemy benchmark has been proposed by Wang et al. [2021]. Alchemy features a rich structured latent space that is challenging for state-of-the-art model-free RL methods. These methods fail to learn to properly explore then exploit. We develop a model-based algorithm. We train a model whose principal block is a Transformer Encoder to fit the symbolic Alchemy environment dynamics. Then we define an online planner with the learned model using a tree search method. This algorithm significantly outperforms previously applied model-free RL methods on the symbolic Alchemy problem. Our results reveal the relevance of model-based approaches with online planning to perform exploration and exploitation successfully in meta-RL. Moreover, we show the efficiency of the Transformer architecture to learn complex dynamics that arise from latent spaces present in meta-RL problems. 元学习是一系列研究，旨在开发利用过去的经验有效解决新学习问题的能力。元强化学习 (meta-RL) 方法展示了学习行为的能力，可以有效获取和利用多个元强化学习问题中的信息。在此背景下，Wang 等人提出了 Alchemy 基准。 [2021]。 Alchemy 具有丰富的结构化潜在空间，这对最先进的无模型强化学习方法来说是一个挑战。这些方法无法学会正确探索然后利用。我们开发了一种基于模型的算法。我们训练一个模型，其主要模块是 Transformer Encoder，以适应符号 Alchemy 环境动态。然后，我们使用树搜索方法使用学习模型定义在线规划器。该算法在符号炼金术问题上明显优于之前应用的无模型强化学习方法。我们的结果揭示了基于模型的方法与在线规划的相关性，以在元强化学习中成功地进行探索和利用。此外，我们还展示了 Transformer 架构在学习元强化学习问题中潜在空间所产生的复杂动态方面的效率。 本文提出一种基于模型的元强化学习方法，结合Transformer和树搜索技术，以解决Alchemy基准中的探索与利用难题。 Brieuc Pinon,Jean-Charles Delvenne,Raphaël Jungers cs.LG,cs.AI

title: ssFPN: Scale Sequence (S^2) Feature Based-Feature Pyramid Network for Object Detection
title_zh: ssFPN：用于目标检测的基于尺度序列（S^2）特征的特征金字塔网络
abstract: Feature Pyramid Network (FPN) has been an essential module for object detection models to consider various scales of an object. However, average precision (AP) on small objects is relatively lower than AP on medium and large objects. The reason is why the deeper layer of CNN causes information loss as feature extraction level. We propose a new scale sequence (S^2) feature extraction of FPN to strengthen feature information of small objects. We consider FPN structure as scale-space and extract scale sequence (S^2) feature by 3D convolution on the level axis of FPN. It is basically scale invariant feature and is built on high-resolution pyramid feature map for small objects. Furthermore, the proposed S^2 feature can be extended to most object detection models based on FPN. We demonstrate the proposed S2 feature can improve the performance of both one-stage and two-stage detectors on MS COCO dataset. Based on the proposed S2 feature, we achieve upto 1.3% and 1.1% of AP improvement for YOLOv4-P5 and YOLOv4-P6, respectively. For Faster RCNN and Mask R-CNN, we observe upto 2.0% and 1.6% of AP improvement with the suggested S^2 feature, respectively.
summary: Feature Pyramid Network (FPN) has been an essential module for object detection models to consider various scales of an object. However, average precision (AP) on small objects is relatively lower than AP on medium and large objects. The reason is why the deeper layer of CNN causes information loss as feature extraction level. We propose a new scale sequence (S^2) feature extraction of FPN to strengthen feature information of small objects. We consider FPN structure as scale-space and extract scale sequence (S^2) feature by 3D convolution on the level axis of FPN. It is basically scale invariant feature and is built on high-resolution pyramid feature map for small objects. Furthermore, the proposed S^2 feature can be extended to most object detection models based on FPN. We demonstrate the proposed S2 feature can improve the performance of both one-stage and two-stage detectors on MS COCO dataset. Based on the proposed S2 feature, we achieve upto 1.3% and 1.1% of AP improvement for YOLOv4-P5 and YOLOv4-P6, respectively. For Faster RCNN and Mask R-CNN, we observe upto 2.0% and 1.6% of AP improvement with the suggested S^2 feature, respectively.
abstract_zh: 特征金字塔网络（FPN）一直是物体检测模型考虑物体不同尺度的重要模块。然而，小物体上的平均精度（AP）相对中型和大型物体上的AP要低。原因是CNN较深层作为特征提取层会导致信息丢失。我们提出了FPN的一种新的尺度序列（S^2）特征提取来加强小物体的特征信息。我们将 FPN 结构视为尺度空间，并通过在 FPN 的水平轴上进行 3D 卷积来提取尺度序列（S^2）特征。它基本上是尺度不变的特征，并且建立在小物体的高分辨率金字塔特征图上。此外，所提出的S^2特征可以扩展到大多数基于FPN的目标检测模型。我们证明了所提出的 S2 特征可以提高 MS COCO 数据集上的一级和两级检测器的性能。基于所提出的 S2 特征，我们分别为 YOLOv4-P5 和 YOLOv4-P6 实现了高达 1.3% 和 1.1% 的 AP 改进。对于 Faster RCNN 和 Mask R-CNN，我们观察到使用建议的 S^2 特征分别使 AP 提高了 2.0% 和 1.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于尺度序列（S²）特征的改进型特征金字塔网络（ssFPN），旨在提升小目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统FPN在小目标检测中表现较差，因深层CNN导致信息丢失，需增强小目标特征表达。
AI.method: 将FPN结构视为尺度空间，通过3D卷积提取尺度序列（S²）特征，基于高分辨率金字塔特征图构建尺度不变特征。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上，YOLOv4-P5/P6分别提升1.3%/1.1%，Faster R-CNN和Mask R-CNN分别提升2.0%/1.6%。
AI.conclusion: S²特征有效提升多类检测模型的小目标检测性能，可广泛应用于基于FPN的检测框架。

title: A novel method for data augmentation: Nine Dot Moving Least Square (ND-MLS)
title_zh: 一种新的数据增强方法：九点移动最小二乘法（ND-MLS）
abstract: Data augmentation greatly increases the amount of data obtained based on labeled data to save on expenses and labor for data collection and labeling. We present a new approach for data augmentation called nine-dot MLS (ND-MLS). This approach is proposed based on the idea of image defor-mation. Images are deformed based on control points, which are calculated by ND-MLS. The method can generate over 2000 images for one exist-ing dataset in a short time. To verify this data augmentation method, extensive tests were performed covering 3 main tasks of computer vision, namely, classification, detection and segmentation. The results show that 1) in classification, 10 images per category were used for training, and VGGNet can obtain 92% top-1 acc on the MNIST dataset of handwritten digits by ND-MLS. In the Omniglot dataset, the few-shot accuracy usu-ally decreases with the increase in character categories. However, the ND-MLS method has stable performance and obtains 96.5 top-1 acc in Res-Net on 100 different handwritten character classification tasks; 2) in segmentation, under the premise of only ten original images, DeepLab obtains 93.5%, 85%, and 73.3% m_IOU(10) on the bottle, horse, and grass test datasets, respectively, while the cat test dataset obtains 86.7% m_IOU(10) with the SegNet model; 3) with only 10 original images from each category in object detection, YOLO v4 obtains 100% and 97.2% bottle and horse detection, respectively, while the cat dataset obtains 93.6% with YOLO v3. In summary, ND-MLS can perform well on classification, object detec-tion, and semantic segmentation tasks by using only a few data.
summary: Data augmentation greatly increases the amount of data obtained based on labeled data to save on expenses and labor for data collection and labeling. We present a new approach for data augmentation called nine-dot MLS (ND-MLS). This approach is proposed based on the idea of image defor-mation. Images are deformed based on control points, which are calculated by ND-MLS. The method can generate over 2000 images for one exist-ing dataset in a short time. To verify this data augmentation method, extensive tests were performed covering 3 main tasks of computer vision, namely, classification, detection and segmentation. The results show that 1) in classification, 10 images per category were used for training, and VGGNet can obtain 92% top-1 acc on the MNIST dataset of handwritten digits by ND-MLS. In the Omniglot dataset, the few-shot accuracy usu-ally decreases with the increase in character categories. However, the ND-MLS method has stable performance and obtains 96.5 top-1 acc in Res-Net on 100 different handwritten character classification tasks; 2) in segmentation, under the premise of only ten original images, DeepLab obtains 93.5%, 85%, and 73.3% m_IOU(10) on the bottle, horse, and grass test datasets, respectively, while the cat test dataset obtains 86.7% m_IOU(10) with the SegNet model; 3) with only 10 original images from each category in object detection, YOLO v4 obtains 100% and 97.2% bottle and horse detection, respectively, while the cat dataset obtains 93.6% with YOLO v3. In summary, ND-MLS can perform well on classification, object detec-tion, and semantic segmentation tasks by using only a few data.
abstract_zh: 数据增强极大地增加了基于标记数据获得的数据量，以节省数据收集和标记的费用和劳动力。我们提出了一种新的数据增强方法，称为九点 MLS (ND-MLS)。该方法是基于图像变形的思想提出的。图像根据 ND-MLS 计算的控制点进行变形。该方法可以在短时间内为一个现有数据集生成超过 2000 张图像。为了验证这种数据增强方法，进行了广泛的测试，涵盖计算机视觉的 3 个主要任务，即分类、检测和分割。结果表明：1）在分类中，每个类别使用10张图像进行训练，VGGNet通过ND-MLS在手写数字的MNIST数据集上可以获得92%的top-1 acc。在 Omniglot 数据集中，小样本准确率通常随着字符类别的增加而降低。然而，ND-MLS方法性能稳定，在Res-Net中在100个不同的手写字符分类任务上获得了96.5的top-1 acc； 2）在分割方面，在只有十张原始图像的前提下，DeepLab在瓶子、马、草测试数据集上分别获得了93.5%、85%和73.3%的m_IOU(10)，而猫测试数据集通过SegNet模型获得了86.7%的m_IOU(10)； 3）在目标检测中，每个类别只有 10 个原始图像，YOLO v4 分别获得了 100% 和 97.2% 的瓶子和马检测，而猫数据集使用 YOLO v3 获得了 93.6%。总之，ND-MLS 只需使用少量数据即可在分类、目标检测和语义分割任务上表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为九点移动最小二乘法（ND-MLS）的新数据增强方法，用于在计算机视觉任务中通过少量原始数据生成大量训练图像。
AI.motivation: 数据收集和标注成本高昂，传统方法难以高效生成多样化数据。现有数据增强技术可能无法满足小样本场景下的性能需求。
AI.method: 基于图像变形思想，通过九点控制点计算生成变形图像。利用ND-MLS算法快速生成超2000张增强图像，覆盖分类、检测和分割任务。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上使用10张图像训练，VGGNet达92% top-1准确率；Omniglot数据集ResNet在100类任务中保持96.5%准确率。分割任务中DeepLab和SegNet分别达到93.5%/85%/73.3%和86.7% m_IOU。检测任务中YOLOv4/v3在瓶/马/猫数据集上分别达100%/97.2%/93.6%检测率。
AI.conclusion: ND-MLS方法在仅使用少量原始数据时，能有效提升分类、目标检测和语义分割任务的模型性能，具有广泛适用性。

ai_content.result: 在MNIST数据集上使用10张图像训练，VGGNet达92% top-1准确率；Omniglot数据集ResNet在100类任务中保持96.5%准确率。分割任务中DeepLab和SegNet分别达到93.5%/85%/73.3%和86.7% m_IOU。检测任务中YOLOv4/v3在瓶/马/猫数据集上分别达100%/97.2%/93.6%检测率。
ai_content.conclusion: ND-MLS方法在仅使用少量原始数据时，能有效提升分类、目标检测和语义分割任务的模型性能，具有广泛适用性。

search_text: A novel method for data augmentation: Nine Dot Moving Least Square (ND-MLS) 一种新的数据增强方法：九点移动最小二乘法（ND-MLS） Data augmentation greatly increases the amount of data obtained based on labeled data to save on expenses and labor for data collection and labeling. We present a new approach for data augmentation called nine-dot MLS (ND-MLS). This approach is proposed based on the idea of image defor-mation. Images are deformed based on control points, which are calculated by ND-MLS. The method can generate over 2000 images for one exist-ing dataset in a short time. To verify this data augmentation method, extensive tests were performed covering 3 main tasks of computer vision, namely, classification, detection and segmentation. The results show that 1) in classification, 10 images per category were used for training, and VGGNet can obtain 92% top-1 acc on the MNIST dataset of handwritten digits by ND-MLS. In the Omniglot dataset, the few-shot accuracy usu-ally decreases with the increase in character categories. However, the ND-MLS method has stable performance and obtains 96.5 top-1 acc in Res-Net on 100 different handwritten character classification tasks; 2) in segmentation, under the premise of only ten original images, DeepLab obtains 93.5%, 85%, and 73.3% m_IOU(10) on the bottle, horse, and grass test datasets, respectively, while the cat test dataset obtains 86.7% m_IOU(10) with the SegNet model; 3) with only 10 original images from each category in object detection, YOLO v4 obtains 100% and 97.2% bottle and horse detection, respectively, while the cat dataset obtains 93.6% with YOLO v3. In summary, ND-MLS can perform well on classification, object detec-tion, and semantic segmentation tasks by using only a few data. 数据增强极大地增加了基于标记数据获得的数据量，以节省数据收集和标记的费用和劳动力。我们提出了一种新的数据增强方法，称为九点 MLS (ND-MLS)。该方法是基于图像变形的思想提出的。图像根据 ND-MLS 计算的控制点进行变形。该方法可以在短时间内为一个现有数据集生成超过 2000 张图像。为了验证这种数据增强方法，进行了广泛的测试，涵盖计算机视觉的 3 个主要任务，即分类、检测和分割。结果表明：1）在分类中，每个类别使用10张图像进行训练，VGGNet通过ND-MLS在手写数字的MNIST数据集上可以获得92%的top-1 acc。在 Omniglot 数据集中，小样本准确率通常随着字符类别的增加而降低。然而，ND-MLS方法性能稳定，在Res-Net中在100个不同的手写字符分类任务上获得了96.5的top-1 acc； 2）在分割方面，在只有十张原始图像的前提下，DeepLab在瓶子、马、草测试数据集上分别获得了93.5%、85%和73.3%的m_IOU(10)，而猫测试数据集通过SegNet模型获得了86.7%的m_IOU(10)； 3）在目标检测中，每个类别只有 10 个原始图像，YOLO v4 分别获得了 100% 和 97.2% 的瓶子和马检测，而猫数据集使用 YOLO v3 获得了 93.6%。总之，ND-MLS 只需使用少量数据即可在分类、目标检测和语义分割任务上表现良好。 本文提出一种名为九点移动最小二乘法（ND-MLS）的新数据增强方法，用于在计算机视觉任务中通过少量原始数据生成大量训练图像。 Wen Yang,Rui Wang,Yanchao Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Darshan Ganganna Ravindra,Laslo Dinges,Al-Hamadi Ayoub,Vasili Baranau
title: Fast and Precise Binary Instance Segmentation of 2D Objects for Automotive Applications
title_zh: 适用于汽车应用的 2D 对象的快速、精确的二进制实例分割
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, WSCG 2022 conference [WSCG 2022 Proceedings, CSRN 3201, ISSN 2464-4617]
comments: 4 pages, 4 figures, WSCG 2022 conference [WSCG 2022 Proceedings, CSRN 3201, ISSN 2464-4617]
abstract: In this paper, we focus on improving binary 2D instance segmentation to assist humans in labeling ground truth datasets with polygons. Humans labeler just have to draw boxes around objects, and polygons are generated automatically. To be useful, our system has to run on CPUs in real-time. The most usual approach for binary instance segmentation involves encoder-decoder networks. This report evaluates state-of-the-art encoder-decoder networks and proposes a method for improving instance segmentation quality using these networks. Alongside network architecture improvements, our proposed method relies upon providing extra information to the network input, so-called extreme points, i.e. the outermost points on the object silhouette. The user can label them instead of a bounding box almost as quickly. The bounding box can be deduced from the extreme points as well. This method produces better IoU compared to other state-of-the-art encoder-decoder networks and also runs fast enough when it is deployed on a CPU.
summary: In this paper, we focus on improving binary 2D instance segmentation to assist humans in labeling ground truth datasets with polygons. Humans labeler just have to draw boxes around objects, and polygons are generated automatically. To be useful, our system has to run on CPUs in real-time. The most usual approach for binary instance segmentation involves encoder-decoder networks. This report evaluates state-of-the-art encoder-decoder networks and proposes a method for improving instance segmentation quality using these networks. Alongside network architecture improvements, our proposed method relies upon providing extra information to the network input, so-called extreme points, i.e. the outermost points on the object silhouette. The user can label them instead of a bounding box almost as quickly. The bounding box can be deduced from the extreme points as well. This method produces better IoU compared to other state-of-the-art encoder-decoder networks and also runs fast enough when it is deployed on a CPU.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们专注于改进二进制二维实例分割，以帮助人类用多边形标记地面实况数据集。人类贴标签者只需在物体周围画出方框，多边形就会自动生成。为了发挥作用，我们的系统必须在 CPU 上实时运行。二进制实例分割最常用的方法涉及编码器-解码器网络。该报告评估了最先进的编码器-解码器网络，并提出了一种使用这些网络提高实例分割质量的方法。除了网络架构的改进之外，我们提出的方法还依赖于向网络输入提供额外的信息，即所谓的极值点，即对象轮廓上的最外层点。用户几乎可以同样快地标记它们而不是边界框。边界框也可以从极值点推断出来。与其他最先进的编码器-解码器网络相比，该方法产生更好的 IoU，并且在部署在 CPU 上时运行速度也足够快。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进二值2D实例分割方法，以实现实时、高精度的2D对象分割，用于汽车应用中的自动多边形标注。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在实时性和分割精度上存在不足，需在CPU上实现快速且精确的分割以满足汽车应用需求。
AI.method: 通过改进网络架构并引入极值点作为额外输入信息，提升实例分割质量，同时保持实时性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在IoU指标上优于现有方法，并能在CPU上实现实时处理。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过结合网络优化与极值点信息，有效提升了分割精度和效率，适用于汽车领域的实时标注需求。

title: Prostate Lesion Detection and Salient Feature Assessment Using Zone-Based Classifiers
title_zh: 使用基于区域的分类器进行前列腺病变检测和显着特征评估
abstract: Multi-parametric magnetic resonance imaging (mpMRI) has a growing role in detecting prostate cancer lesions. Thus, it is pertinent that medical professionals who interpret these scans reduce the risk of human error by using computer-aided detection systems. The variety of algorithms used in system implementation, however, has yielded mixed results. Here we investigate the best machine learning classifier for each prostate zone. We also discover salient features to clarify the models' classification rationale. Of the data provided, we gathered and augmented T2 weighted images and apparent diffusion coefficient map images to extract first through third order statistical features as input to machine learning classifiers. For our deep learning classifier, we used a convolutional neural net (CNN) architecture for automatic feature extraction and classification. The interpretability of the CNN results was improved by saliency mapping to understand the classification mechanisms within. Ultimately, we concluded that effective detection of peripheral and anterior fibromuscular stroma (AS) lesions depended more on statistical distribution features, whereas those in the transition zone (TZ) depended more on textural features. Ensemble algorithms worked best for PZ and TZ zones, while CNNs were best in the AS zone. These classifiers can be used to validate a radiologist's predictions and reduce inter-reader variability in patients suspected to have prostate cancer. The salient features reported in this study can also be investigated further to better understand hidden features and biomarkers of prostate lesions with mpMRIs.
summary: Multi-parametric magnetic resonance imaging (mpMRI) has a growing role in detecting prostate cancer lesions. Thus, it is pertinent that medical professionals who interpret these scans reduce the risk of human error by using computer-aided detection systems. The variety of algorithms used in system implementation, however, has yielded mixed results. Here we investigate the best machine learning classifier for each prostate zone. We also discover salient features to clarify the models' classification rationale. Of the data provided, we gathered and augmented T2 weighted images and apparent diffusion coefficient map images to extract first through third order statistical features as input to machine learning classifiers. For our deep learning classifier, we used a convolutional neural net (CNN) architecture for automatic feature extraction and classification. The interpretability of the CNN results was improved by saliency mapping to understand the classification mechanisms within. Ultimately, we concluded that effective detection of peripheral and anterior fibromuscular stroma (AS) lesions depended more on statistical distribution features, whereas those in the transition zone (TZ) depended more on textural features. Ensemble algorithms worked best for PZ and TZ zones, while CNNs were best in the AS zone. These classifiers can be used to validate a radiologist's predictions and reduce inter-reader variability in patients suspected to have prostate cancer. The salient features reported in this study can also be investigated further to better understand hidden features and biomarkers of prostate lesions with mpMRIs.
abstract_zh: 多参数磁共振成像 (mpMRI) 在检测前列腺癌病变方面发挥着越来越重要的作用。因此，解释这些扫描的医疗专业人员通过使用计算机辅助检测系统来降低人为错误的风险是相关的。然而，系统实现中使用的各种算法产生了不同的结果。在这里，我们研究每个前列腺区域的最佳机器学习分类器。我们还发现了显着特征来阐明模型的分类原理。在提供的数据中，我们收集并增强了 T2 加权图像和表观扩散系数图图像，以提取一阶到三阶统计特征作为机器学习分类器的输入。对于我们的深度学习分类器，我们使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构进行自动特征提取和分类。通过显着性映射提高了 CNN 结果的可解释性，以了解其中的分类机制。最终，我们得出的结论是，外周和前部纤维肌间质（AS）病变的有效检测更多地依赖于统计分布特征，而过渡区（TZ）中的病变更多地依赖于纹理特征。集成算法最适合 PZ 和 TZ 区域，而 CNN 最适合 AS 区域。这些分类器可用于验证放射科医生的预测并减少疑似患有前列腺癌的患者的读者间差异。本研究报告的显着特征还可以进一步研究，以更好地了解 mpMRI 前列腺病变的隐藏特征和生物标志物。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于区域分类器的前列腺病变检测及显著特征评估，旨在提高计算机辅助检测系统的准确性。
AI.motivation: 多参数磁共振成像（mpMRI）在前列腺癌检测中应用广泛，但人工解读存在误差，需通过计算机辅助系统提升诊断可靠性。
AI.method: 收集并增强T2加权图像和ADC图，提取一至三阶统计特征输入机器学习分类器；采用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行自动特征提取，并通过显著性映射提升可解释性。
AI.result: 外周带和前纤维肌肉间质区病变检测依赖统计分布特征，移行区依赖纹理特征；集成算法在PZ和TZ表现最佳，CNN在AS区效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提分类器可辅助放射科医生减少诊断差异，显著特征有助于进一步探索前列腺病变的潜在生物标志物。

method: 收集并增强T2加权图像和ADC图，提取一至三阶统计特征输入机器学习分类器；采用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行自动特征提取，并通过显著性映射提升可解释性。
result: 外周带和前纤维肌肉间质区病变检测依赖统计分布特征，移行区依赖纹理特征；集成算法在PZ和TZ表现最佳，CNN在AS区效果更优。
conclusion: 所提分类器可辅助放射科医生减少诊断差异，显著特征有助于进一步探索前列腺病变的潜在生物标志物。
search_text: Prostate Lesion Detection and Salient Feature Assessment Using Zone-Based Classifiers 使用基于区域的分类器进行前列腺病变检测和显着特征评估 Multi-parametric magnetic resonance imaging (mpMRI) has a growing role in detecting prostate cancer lesions. Thus, it is pertinent that medical professionals who interpret these scans reduce the risk of human error by using computer-aided detection systems. The variety of algorithms used in system implementation, however, has yielded mixed results. Here we investigate the best machine learning classifier for each prostate zone. We also discover salient features to clarify the models' classification rationale. Of the data provided, we gathered and augmented T2 weighted images and apparent diffusion coefficient map images to extract first through third order statistical features as input to machine learning classifiers. For our deep learning classifier, we used a convolutional neural net (CNN) architecture for automatic feature extraction and classification. The interpretability of the CNN results was improved by saliency mapping to understand the classification mechanisms within. Ultimately, we concluded that effective detection of peripheral and anterior fibromuscular stroma (AS) lesions depended more on statistical distribution features, whereas those in the transition zone (TZ) depended more on textural features. Ensemble algorithms worked best for PZ and TZ zones, while CNNs were best in the AS zone. These classifiers can be used to validate a radiologist's predictions and reduce inter-reader variability in patients suspected to have prostate cancer. The salient features reported in this study can also be investigated further to better understand hidden features and biomarkers of prostate lesions with mpMRIs. 多参数磁共振成像 (mpMRI) 在检测前列腺癌病变方面发挥着越来越重要的作用。因此，解释这些扫描的医疗专业人员通过使用计算机辅助检测系统来降低人为错误的风险是相关的。然而，系统实现中使用的各种算法产生了不同的结果。在这里，我们研究每个前列腺区域的最佳机器学习分类器。我们还发现了显着特征来阐明模型的分类原理。在提供的数据中，我们收集并增强了 T2 加权图像和表观扩散系数图图像，以提取一阶到三阶统计特征作为机器学习分类器的输入。对于我们的深度学习分类器，我们使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构进行自动特征提取和分类。通过显着性映射提高了 CNN 结果的可解释性，以了解其中的分类机制。最终，我们得出的结论是，外周和前部纤维肌间质（AS）病变的有效检测更多地依赖于统计分布特征，而过渡区（TZ）中的病变更多地依赖于纹理特征。集成算法最适合 PZ 和 TZ 区域，而 CNN 最适合 AS 区域。这些分类器可用于验证放射科医生的预测并减少疑似患有前列腺癌的患者的读者间差异。本研究报告的显着特征还可以进一步研究，以更好地了解 mpMRI 前列腺病变的隐藏特征和生物标志物。 本文研究基于区域分类器的前列腺病变检测及显著特征评估，旨在提高计算机辅助检测系统的准确性。 Haoli Yin,Nithin Buduma eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Feng Xie,Zhong Zhang,Liang Li,Bin Zhou,Yusong Tan
title: EpiGNN: Exploring Spatial Transmission with Graph Neural Network for Regional Epidemic Forecasting
title_zh: EpiGNN：用图神经网络探索空间传播以进行区域流行病预测
abstract: Epidemic forecasting is the key to effective control of epidemic transmission and helps the world mitigate the crisis that threatens public health. To better understand the transmission and evolution of epidemics, we propose EpiGNN, a graph neural network-based model for epidemic forecasting. Specifically, we design a transmission risk encoding module to characterize local and global spatial effects of regions in epidemic processes and incorporate them into the model. Meanwhile, we develop a Region-Aware Graph Learner (RAGL) that takes transmission risk, geographical dependencies, and temporal information into account to better explore spatial-temporal dependencies and makes regions aware of related regions' epidemic situations. The RAGL can also combine with external resources, such as human mobility, to further improve prediction performance. Comprehensive experiments on five real-world epidemic-related datasets (including influenza and COVID-19) demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method and show that EpiGNN outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 9.48% in RMSE.
summary: Epidemic forecasting is the key to effective control of epidemic transmission and helps the world mitigate the crisis that threatens public health. To better understand the transmission and evolution of epidemics, we propose EpiGNN, a graph neural network-based model for epidemic forecasting. Specifically, we design a transmission risk encoding module to characterize local and global spatial effects of regions in epidemic processes and incorporate them into the model. Meanwhile, we develop a Region-Aware Graph Learner (RAGL) that takes transmission risk, geographical dependencies, and temporal information into account to better explore spatial-temporal dependencies and makes regions aware of related regions' epidemic situations. The RAGL can also combine with external resources, such as human mobility, to further improve prediction performance. Comprehensive experiments on five real-world epidemic-related datasets (including influenza and COVID-19) demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method and show that EpiGNN outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 9.48% in RMSE.
abstract_zh: 疫情预测是有效控制疫情传播的关键，有助于世界缓解威胁公共卫生的危机。为了更好地理解流行病的传播和演变，我们提出了 EpiGNN，一种基于图神经网络的流行病预测模型。具体来说，我们设计了一个传播风险编码模块来表征流行病过程中区域的局部和全球空间影响，并将其纳入模型中。同时，我们开发了一个区域感知图学习器（RAGL），将传播风险、地理依赖性和时间信息考虑在内，以更好地探索时空依赖性，并使区域了解相关区域的疫情情况。 RAGL还可以与外部资源（例如人员流动性）结合，进一步提高预测性能。对五个真实世界流行病相关数据集（包括流感和 COVID-19）的综合实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性，并表明 EpiGNN 在 RMSE 方面优于最先进的基线 9.48%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络的区域传染病预测模型EpiGNN，通过探索空间传播特性提升预测效果。
AI.motivation: 传染病预测对公共卫生危机管控至关重要，但现有方法难以有效捕捉区域间空间传播的时空依赖性。
AI.method: 设计传输风险编码模块表征区域时空效应，并开发结合传播风险、地理依赖和时间信息的区域感知图学习器（RAGL），整合人口流动等外部数据优化预测。
AI.result: 在五个真实数据集（含流感和新冠疫情）的实验表明，EpiGNN在RMSE指标上优于现有方法9.48%。
AI.conclusion: EpiGNN通过建模区域间时空传播关系及外部因素，显著提升了区域传染病预测的准确性。

authors_text: Feng Xie,Zhong Zhang,Xuechen Zhao,Bin Zhou,Yusong Tan
title: Inter- and Intra-Series Embeddings Fusion Network for Epidemiological Forecasting
title_zh: 用于流行病学预测的系列间和系列内嵌入融合网络
abstract: The accurate forecasting of infectious epidemic diseases is the key to effective control of the epidemic situation in a region. Most existing methods ignore potential dynamic dependencies between regions or the importance of temporal dependencies and inter-dependencies between regions for prediction. In this paper, we propose an Inter- and Intra-Series Embeddings Fusion Network (SEFNet) to improve epidemic prediction performance. SEFNet consists of two parallel modules, named Inter-Series Embedding Module and Intra-Series Embedding Module. In Inter-Series Embedding Module, a multi-scale unified convolution component called Region-Aware Convolution is proposed, which cooperates with self-attention to capture dynamic dependencies between time series obtained from multiple regions. The Intra-Series Embedding Module uses Long Short-Term Memory to capture temporal relationships within each time series. Subsequently, we learn the influence degree of two embeddings and fuse them with the parametric-matrix fusion method. To further improve the robustness, SEFNet also integrates a traditional autoregressive component in parallel with nonlinear neural networks. Experiments on four real-world epidemic-related datasets show SEFNet is effective and outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: The accurate forecasting of infectious epidemic diseases is the key to effective control of the epidemic situation in a region. Most existing methods ignore potential dynamic dependencies between regions or the importance of temporal dependencies and inter-dependencies between regions for prediction. In this paper, we propose an Inter- and Intra-Series Embeddings Fusion Network (SEFNet) to improve epidemic prediction performance. SEFNet consists of two parallel modules, named Inter-Series Embedding Module and Intra-Series Embedding Module. In Inter-Series Embedding Module, a multi-scale unified convolution component called Region-Aware Convolution is proposed, which cooperates with self-attention to capture dynamic dependencies between time series obtained from multiple regions. The Intra-Series Embedding Module uses Long Short-Term Memory to capture temporal relationships within each time series. Subsequently, we learn the influence degree of two embeddings and fuse them with the parametric-matrix fusion method. To further improve the robustness, SEFNet also integrates a traditional autoregressive component in parallel with nonlinear neural networks. Experiments on four real-world epidemic-related datasets show SEFNet is effective and outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 传染病疫情的准确预测是有效控制一个地区疫情的关键。大多数现有方法忽略了区域之间潜在的动态依赖性或时间依赖性和区域之间的相互依赖性对于预测的重要性。在本文中，我们提出了一种系列间和系列内嵌入融合网络（SEFNet）来提高流行病预测性能。 SEFNet 由两个并行模块组成，分别称为系列间嵌入模块和系列内嵌入模块。在Inter-Series Embedding Module中，提出了一种称为Region-Aware Convolution的多尺度统一卷积组件，它与self-attention配合捕获从多个区域获得的时间序列之间的动态依赖关系。系列内嵌入模块使用长短期记忆来捕获每个时间序列内的时间关系。随后，我们了解两个嵌入的影响程度，并用参数矩阵融合方法将它们融合。为了进一步提高鲁棒性，SEFNet 还将传统的自回归组件与非线性神经网络并行集成。对四个现实世界流行病相关数据集的实验表明，SEFNet 是有效的，并且优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合区域间与区域内部时间序列嵌入的网络（SEFNet），用于改进传染病预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了区域间的动态依赖关系及时间序列的时序依赖性，导致预测效果不佳。
AI.method: SEFNet包含两个并行模块：区域间嵌入模块（使用区域感知卷积与自注意力捕获跨区域动态依赖）和区域内部嵌入模块（使用LSTM捕获单区域时序关系），通过参数矩阵融合方法整合两种嵌入，并引入传统自回归组件增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在四个真实疫情数据集上的实验表明，SEFNet优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SEFNet通过有效融合区域间与区域内部依赖关系，显著提升了疫情预测的准确性与鲁棒性。

title: A Graph Convolution for Signed Directed Graphs
title_zh: 有向图的图卷积
abstract: A signed directed graph is a graph with sign and direction information on the edges. Even though signed directed graphs are more informative than unsigned or undirected graphs, they are more complicated to analyze and have received less research attention. This paper investigates a spectral graph convolution model to fully utilize the information embedded in signed directed edges. We propose a novel complex Hermitian adjacency matrix that encodes graph information via complex numbers. Compared to a simple connection-based adjacency matrix, the complex Hermitian can represent edge direction, sign, and connectivity via its phases and magnitudes. Then, we define a magnetic Laplacian of the proposed adjacency matrix and prove that it is positive semi-definite (PSD) for the analyses using spectral graph convolution. We perform extensive experiments on four real-world datasets. Our experiments show that the proposed scheme outperforms several state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: A signed directed graph is a graph with sign and direction information on the edges. Even though signed directed graphs are more informative than unsigned or undirected graphs, they are more complicated to analyze and have received less research attention. This paper investigates a spectral graph convolution model to fully utilize the information embedded in signed directed edges. We propose a novel complex Hermitian adjacency matrix that encodes graph information via complex numbers. Compared to a simple connection-based adjacency matrix, the complex Hermitian can represent edge direction, sign, and connectivity via its phases and magnitudes. Then, we define a magnetic Laplacian of the proposed adjacency matrix and prove that it is positive semi-definite (PSD) for the analyses using spectral graph convolution. We perform extensive experiments on four real-world datasets. Our experiments show that the proposed scheme outperforms several state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 带符号有向图是边上带有符号和方向信息的图。尽管有符号有向图比无符号或无向图提供更多信息，但它们分析起来更复杂，并且受到的研究关注较少。本文研究了谱图卷积模型，以充分利用嵌入有符号有向边的信息。我们提出了一种新颖的复数埃尔米特邻接矩阵，它通过复数对图信息进行编码。与简单的基于连接的邻接矩阵相比，复杂的埃尔米特矩阵可以通过其相位和幅度来表示边缘方向、符号和连通性。然后，我们定义了所提出的邻接矩阵的磁拉普拉斯算子，并证明它对于使用谱图卷积的分析是正半定的（PSD）。我们对四个真实世界的数据集进行了广泛的实验。我们的实验表明，所提出的方案优于几种最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对有符号有向图的图卷积方法，通过复数赫米特邻接矩阵和磁拉普拉斯算子进行谱分析。
AI.motivation: 有符号有向图能更全面地表示复杂关系，但现有方法难以有效利用其方向和符号信息，亟需新的分析模型。
AI.method: 设计复数赫米特邻接矩阵编码边的方向、符号和连接性，定义磁拉普拉斯算子并证明其半正定性，基于此构建谱图卷积模型。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于多种最先进技术，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过复数域建模和磁拉普拉斯算子，本文为有符号有向图分析提供了新思路，推动了图神经网络的发展。

title: Quantum Multi-Agent Meta Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 量子多智能体元强化学习
abstract: Although quantum supremacy is yet to come, there has recently been an increasing interest in identifying the potential of quantum machine learning (QML) in the looming era of practical quantum computing. Motivated by this, in this article we re-design multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) based on the unique characteristics of quantum neural networks (QNNs) having two separate dimensions of trainable parameters: angle parameters affecting the output qubit states, and pole parameters associated with the output measurement basis. Exploiting this dyadic trainability as meta-learning capability, we propose quantum meta MARL (QM2ARL) that first applies angle training for meta-QNN learning, followed by pole training for few-shot or local-QNN training. To avoid overfitting, we develop an angle-to-pole regularization technique injecting noise into the pole domain during angle training. Furthermore, by exploiting the pole as the memory address of each trained QNN, we introduce the concept of pole memory allowing one to save and load trained QNNs using only two-parameter pole values. We theoretically prove the convergence of angle training under the angle-to-pole regularization, and by simulation corroborate the effectiveness of QM2ARL in achieving high reward and fast convergence, as well as of the pole memory in fast adaptation to a time-varying environment.
summary: Although quantum supremacy is yet to come, there has recently been an increasing interest in identifying the potential of quantum machine learning (QML) in the looming era of practical quantum computing. Motivated by this, in this article we re-design multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) based on the unique characteristics of quantum neural networks (QNNs) having two separate dimensions of trainable parameters: angle parameters affecting the output qubit states, and pole parameters associated with the output measurement basis. Exploiting this dyadic trainability as meta-learning capability, we propose quantum meta MARL (QM2ARL) that first applies angle training for meta-QNN learning, followed by pole training for few-shot or local-QNN training. To avoid overfitting, we develop an angle-to-pole regularization technique injecting noise into the pole domain during angle training. Furthermore, by exploiting the pole as the memory address of each trained QNN, we introduce the concept of pole memory allowing one to save and load trained QNNs using only two-parameter pole values. We theoretically prove the convergence of angle training under the angle-to-pole regularization, and by simulation corroborate the effectiveness of QM2ARL in achieving high reward and fast convergence, as well as of the pole memory in fast adaptation to a time-varying environment.
abstract_zh: 尽管量子霸权尚未到来，但最近人们对在即将到来的实用量子计算时代中识别量子机器学习（QML）的潜力越来越感兴趣。受此启发，在本文中，我们基于量子神经网络（QNN）的独特特性重新设计了多智能体强化学习（MARL），该网络具有两个独立维度的可训练参数：影响输出量子位状态的角度参数和与输出测量基础相关的极参数。利用这种二元可训练性作为元学习能力，我们提出了量子元 MARL (QM2ARL)，它首先应用角度训练进行元 QNN 学习，然后进行极点训练进行少样本或局部 QNN 训练。为了避免过度拟合，我们开发了一种角度到极点正则化技术，在角度训练期间将噪声注入极点域。此外，通过利用极点作为每个经过训练的 QNN 的内存地址，我们引入了极点内存的概念，允许仅使用两个参数极点值来保存和加载经过训练的 QNN。我们从理论上证明了角度到极点正则化下角度训练的收敛性，并通过仿真证实了 QM2ARL 在实现高奖励和快速收敛方面的有效性，以及极点记忆在快速适应时变环境方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出量子元多智能体强化学习框架（QM2ARL），结合量子神经网络的双参数特性优化多智能体学习过程。
AI.motivation: 量子计算发展推动量子机器学习研究，传统多智能体强化学习在动态环境适应性和训练效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 设计分阶段训练机制：先通过角度参数进行元学习，再利用极点参数实现快速适配；引入角度到极点正则化防止过拟合，并开发基于极点的记忆存储机制。
AI.result: 仿真验证QM2ARL在奖励值、收敛速度及动态环境适应性方面优于传统方法，理论证明了角度训练的收敛性。
AI.conclusion: QM2ARL有效结合量子神经网络特性，为量子强化学习提供新范式，极点记忆机制显著提升动态环境适应能力。

authors_text: Seungwon Song,Hyungtae Lim,Alex Junho Lee,Hyun Myung
title: DynaVINS: A Visual-Inertial SLAM for Dynamic Environments
title_zh: DynaVINS：适用于动态环境的视觉惯性 SLAM
abstract: Visual inertial odometry and SLAM algorithms are widely used in various fields, such as service robots, drones, and autonomous vehicles. Most of the SLAM algorithms are based on assumption that landmarks are static. However, in the real-world, various dynamic objects exist, and they degrade the pose estimation accuracy. In addition, temporarily static objects, which are static during observation but move when they are out of sight, trigger false positive loop closings. To overcome these problems, we propose a novel visual-inertial SLAM framework, called DynaVINS, which is robust against both dynamic objects and temporarily static objects. In our framework, we first present a robust bundle adjustment that could reject the features from dynamic objects by leveraging pose priors estimated by the IMU preintegration. Then, a keyframe grouping and a multi-hypothesis-based constraints grouping methods are proposed to reduce the effect of temporarily static objects in the loop closing. Subsequently, we evaluated our method in a public dataset that contains numerous dynamic objects. Finally, the experimental results corroborate that our DynaVINS has promising performance compared with other state-of-the-art methods by successfully rejecting the effect of dynamic and temporarily static objects. Our code is available at https://github.com/url-kaist/dynaVINS.
summary: Visual inertial odometry and SLAM algorithms are widely used in various fields, such as service robots, drones, and autonomous vehicles. Most of the SLAM algorithms are based on assumption that landmarks are static. However, in the real-world, various dynamic objects exist, and they degrade the pose estimation accuracy. In addition, temporarily static objects, which are static during observation but move when they are out of sight, trigger false positive loop closings. To overcome these problems, we propose a novel visual-inertial SLAM framework, called DynaVINS, which is robust against both dynamic objects and temporarily static objects. In our framework, we first present a robust bundle adjustment that could reject the features from dynamic objects by leveraging pose priors estimated by the IMU preintegration. Then, a keyframe grouping and a multi-hypothesis-based constraints grouping methods are proposed to reduce the effect of temporarily static objects in the loop closing. Subsequently, we evaluated our method in a public dataset that contains numerous dynamic objects. Finally, the experimental results corroborate that our DynaVINS has promising performance compared with other state-of-the-art methods by successfully rejecting the effect of dynamic and temporarily static objects. Our code is available at https://github.com/url-kaist/dynaVINS.
abstract_zh: 视觉惯性里程计和SLAM算法广泛应用于服务机器人、无人机、自动驾驶汽车等各个领域。大多数 SLAM 算法都基于地标是静态的假设。然而，在现实世界中，存在各种动态物体，它们降低了位姿估计的精度。此外，暂时静态的物体（在观察期间是静态的，但在看不见的时候会移动）会触发误报闭环。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉惯性 SLAM 框架，称为 DynaVINS，它对动态对象和临时静态对象都具有鲁棒性。在我们的框架中，我们首先提出了一种强大的捆绑调整，可以通过利用 IMU 预积分估计的姿势先验来拒绝动态对象的特征。然后，提出了关键帧分组和基于多假设的约束分组方法来减少闭环中临时静态对象的影响。随后，我们在包含大量动态对象的公共数据集中评估了我们的方法。最后，实验结果证实，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们的 DynaVINS 通过成功地拒绝动态和临时静态物体的影响而具有良好的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/url-kaist/dynaVINS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DynaVINS的视觉惯性SLAM框架，旨在解决动态环境中的动态物体和临时静态物体对定位精度的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM算法假设地标为静态，但现实环境中动态物体和临时静态物体会导致定位误差和虚假闭环，影响系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过IMU预积分估计的位姿先验进行鲁棒光束法平差，剔除动态特征；结合关键帧分组和多假设约束分组方法，降低临时静态物体对闭环的影响。
AI.result: 在包含大量动态物体的公开数据集上验证，实验结果表明DynaVINS相比其他先进方法能有效抑制动态和临时静态物体的干扰。
AI.conclusion: DynaVINS通过创新的特征剔除和闭环约束方法，在动态环境中实现了鲁棒的视觉惯性SLAM性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DynaVINS的视觉惯性SLAM框架，旨在解决动态环境中的动态物体和临时静态物体对定位精度的影响。

search_text: DynaVINS: A Visual-Inertial SLAM for Dynamic Environments DynaVINS：适用于动态环境的视觉惯性 SLAM Visual inertial odometry and SLAM algorithms are widely used in various fields, such as service robots, drones, and autonomous vehicles. Most of the SLAM algorithms are based on assumption that landmarks are static. However, in the real-world, various dynamic objects exist, and they degrade the pose estimation accuracy. In addition, temporarily static objects, which are static during observation but move when they are out of sight, trigger false positive loop closings. To overcome these problems, we propose a novel visual-inertial SLAM framework, called DynaVINS, which is robust against both dynamic objects and temporarily static objects. In our framework, we first present a robust bundle adjustment that could reject the features from dynamic objects by leveraging pose priors estimated by the IMU preintegration. Then, a keyframe grouping and a multi-hypothesis-based constraints grouping methods are proposed to reduce the effect of temporarily static objects in the loop closing. Subsequently, we evaluated our method in a public dataset that contains numerous dynamic objects. Finally, the experimental results corroborate that our DynaVINS has promising performance compared with other state-of-the-art methods by successfully rejecting the effect of dynamic and temporarily static objects. Our code is available at https://github.com/url-kaist/dynaVINS. 视觉惯性里程计和SLAM算法广泛应用于服务机器人、无人机、自动驾驶汽车等各个领域。大多数 SLAM 算法都基于地标是静态的假设。然而，在现实世界中，存在各种动态物体，它们降低了位姿估计的精度。此外，暂时静态的物体（在观察期间是静态的，但在看不见的时候会移动）会触发误报闭环。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉惯性 SLAM 框架，称为 DynaVINS，它对动态对象和临时静态对象都具有鲁棒性。在我们的框架中，我们首先提出了一种强大的捆绑调整，可以通过利用 IMU 预积分估计的姿势先验来拒绝动态对象的特征。然后，提出了关键帧分组和基于多假设的约束分组方法来减少闭环中临时静态对象的影响。随后，我们在包含大量动态对象的公共数据集中评估了我们的方法。最后，实验结果证实，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们的 DynaVINS 通过成功地拒绝动态和临时静态物体的影响而具有良好的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/url-kaist/dynaVINS 获取。 本文提出了一种名为DynaVINS的视觉惯性SLAM框架，旨在解决动态环境中的动态物体和临时静态物体对定位精度的影响。 Seungwon Song,Hyungtae Lim,Alex Junho Lee,Hyun Myung cs.RO

title: Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation with Mutual Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 具有相互知识蒸馏的半监督语义分割
abstract: Consistency regularization has been widely studied in recent semisupervised semantic segmentation methods, and promising performance has been achieved. In this work, we propose a new consistency regularization framework, termed mutual knowledge distillation (MKD), combined with data and feature augmentation. We introduce two auxiliary mean-teacher models based on consistency regularization. More specifically, we use the pseudo-labels generated by a mean teacher to supervise the student network to achieve a mutual knowledge distillation between the two branches. In addition to using image-level strong and weak augmentation, we also discuss feature augmentation. This involves considering various sources of knowledge to distill the student network. Thus, we can significantly increase the diversity of the training samples. Experiments on public benchmarks show that our framework outperforms previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods under various semi-supervised settings. Code is available at semi-mmseg.
summary: Consistency regularization has been widely studied in recent semisupervised semantic segmentation methods, and promising performance has been achieved. In this work, we propose a new consistency regularization framework, termed mutual knowledge distillation (MKD), combined with data and feature augmentation. We introduce two auxiliary mean-teacher models based on consistency regularization. More specifically, we use the pseudo-labels generated by a mean teacher to supervise the student network to achieve a mutual knowledge distillation between the two branches. In addition to using image-level strong and weak augmentation, we also discuss feature augmentation. This involves considering various sources of knowledge to distill the student network. Thus, we can significantly increase the diversity of the training samples. Experiments on public benchmarks show that our framework outperforms previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods under various semi-supervised settings. Code is available at semi-mmseg.
abstract_zh: 一致性正则化在最近的半监督语义分割方法中得到了广泛的研究，并取得了可喜的性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的一致性正则化框架，称为相互知识蒸馏（MKD），结合了数据和特征增强。我们引入了两种基于一致性正则化的辅助均值教师模型。更具体地说，我们使用平均教师生成的伪标签来监督学生网络，以实现两个分支之间的相互知识蒸馏。除了使用图像级强增强和弱增强之外，我们还讨论特征增强。这涉及考虑各种知识来源来提炼学生网络。因此，我们可以显着增加训练样本的多样性。公共基准测试表明，我们的框架在各种半监督设置下优于以前最先进的（SOTA）方法。代码可在 semi-mmseg 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合相互知识蒸馏与数据/特征增强的半监督语义分割新框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管一致性正则化在半监督分割中表现良好，但现有方法在知识传递效率和样本多样性方面仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 设计互知识蒸馏框架(MKD)，通过两个均值教师模型生成伪标签，结合图像级与特征级增强策略进行双向知识传递。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，代码已开源验证效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过增强样本多样性与双向知识蒸馏机制，有效提升了半监督语义分割性能。

title: A Generalization of the Shortest Path Problem to Graphs with Multiple Edge-Cost Estimates
title_zh: 具有多重边成本估计的图的最短路径问题的推广
abstract: The shortest path problem in graphs is a cornerstone of AI theory and applications. Existing algorithms generally ignore edge weight computation time. We present a generalized framework for weighted directed graphs, where edge weight can be computed (estimated) multiple times, at increasing accuracy and run-time expense. This raises several generalized variants of the shortest path problem. We introduce the problem of finding a path with the tightest lower-bound on the optimal cost. We then present two complete algorithms for the generalized problem, and empirically demonstrate their efficacy.
summary: The shortest path problem in graphs is a cornerstone of AI theory and applications. Existing algorithms generally ignore edge weight computation time. We present a generalized framework for weighted directed graphs, where edge weight can be computed (estimated) multiple times, at increasing accuracy and run-time expense. This raises several generalized variants of the shortest path problem. We introduce the problem of finding a path with the tightest lower-bound on the optimal cost. We then present two complete algorithms for the generalized problem, and empirically demonstrate their efficacy.
abstract_zh: 图中的最短路径问题是人工智能理论和应用的基石。现有算法通常忽略边缘权重计算时间。我们提出了一个加权有向图的通用框架，其中可以多次计算（估计）边权重，从而提高准确性和运行时费用。这提出了最短路径问题的几个广义变体。我们引入了寻找最优成本下限最紧的路径的问题。然后，我们针对广义问题提出了两种完整的算法，并凭经验证明了它们的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文将传统最短路径问题推广到边权重可多次计算的场景，提出新的问题定义及求解算法。
AI.motivation: 现有最短路径算法忽略边权重计算时间，而实际应用中需权衡计算精度与耗时，需解决动态权重估计问题。
AI.method: 构建支持多阶段权重估计的图框架，定义最紧下界路径问题，设计两种完整算法并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明所提算法能有效求解考虑多次权重估计的最短路径问题，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 新框架为动态权重场景提供理论支持，算法在精度与效率间取得平衡，可拓展至实际应用中。

authors_text: Laura Gwilliams,Graham Flick,Alec Marantz,Liina Pylkkanen,David Poeppel,Jean-Remi King
title: MEG-MASC: a high-quality magneto-encephalography dataset for evaluating natural speech processing
title_zh: MEG-MASC：用于评估自然语音处理的高质量脑磁图数据集
abstract: The "MEG-MASC" dataset provides a curated set of raw magnetoencephalography (MEG) recordings of 27 English speakers who listened to two hours of naturalistic stories. Each participant performed two identical sessions, involving listening to four fictional stories from the Manually Annotated Sub-Corpus (MASC) intermixed with random word lists and comprehension questions. We time-stamp the onset and offset of each word and phoneme in the metadata of the recording, and organize the dataset according to the 'Brain Imaging Data Structure' (BIDS). This data collection provides a suitable benchmark to large-scale encoding and decoding analyses of temporally-resolved brain responses to speech. We provide the Python code to replicate several validations analyses of the MEG evoked related fields such as the temporal decoding of phonetic features and word frequency. All code and MEG, audio and text data are publicly available to keep with best practices in transparent and reproducible research.
summary: The "MEG-MASC" dataset provides a curated set of raw magnetoencephalography (MEG) recordings of 27 English speakers who listened to two hours of naturalistic stories. Each participant performed two identical sessions, involving listening to four fictional stories from the Manually Annotated Sub-Corpus (MASC) intermixed with random word lists and comprehension questions. We time-stamp the onset and offset of each word and phoneme in the metadata of the recording, and organize the dataset according to the 'Brain Imaging Data Structure' (BIDS). This data collection provides a suitable benchmark to large-scale encoding and decoding analyses of temporally-resolved brain responses to speech. We provide the Python code to replicate several validations analyses of the MEG evoked related fields such as the temporal decoding of phonetic features and word frequency. All code and MEG, audio and text data are publicly available to keep with best practices in transparent and reproducible research.
abstract_zh: “MEG-MASC”数据集提供了一组精选的原始脑磁图 (MEG) 录音，记录了 27 名讲英语的人听了两个小时的自然故事。每个参与者进行了两次相同的会话，其中包括听来自手动注释子语料库 (MASC) 的四个虚构故事，并混合了随机单词列表和理解问题。我们在记录的元数据中对每个单词和音素的开始和偏移进行时间戳记，并根据“脑成像数据结构”（BIDS）组织数据集。该数据收集为对语音的时间分辨大脑反应的大规模编码和解码分析提供了合适的基准。我们提供 Python 代码来复制 MEG 诱发相关领域的多个验证分析，例如语音特征和词频的时间解码。所有代码和 MEG、音频和文本数据均公开可用，以保持透明和可重复研究的最佳实践。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了MEG-MASC数据集，包含27名英语母语者聆听自然故事时的MEG记录，用于评估自然语音处理的脑响应分析。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏高质量的自然语音处理脑响应数据集，限制了大规模编码解码分析的进展，因此需要构建标准化、可复现的基准数据集。
AI.method: 采集27名被试两次实验数据，包含MASC语料库中的虚构故事及随机词表，通过时间戳标注词/音素起止时间，按BIDS标准组织数据，并提供Python代码验证语音特征解码等分析。
AI.result: 公开了MEG原始数据、音频文本材料及分析代码，实现了语音特征时序解码等验证分析，符合可复现研究规范。
AI.conclusion: MEG-MASC为研究大脑对自然语音的时序响应提供了标准化基准，有助于推动语音编码解码模型的发展。

search_text: MEG-MASC: a high-quality magneto-encephalography dataset for evaluating natural speech processing MEG-MASC：用于评估自然语音处理的高质量脑磁图数据集 The "MEG-MASC" dataset provides a curated set of raw magnetoencephalography (MEG) recordings of 27 English speakers who listened to two hours of naturalistic stories. Each participant performed two identical sessions, involving listening to four fictional stories from the Manually Annotated Sub-Corpus (MASC) intermixed with random word lists and comprehension questions. We time-stamp the onset and offset of each word and phoneme in the metadata of the recording, and organize the dataset according to the 'Brain Imaging Data Structure' (BIDS). This data collection provides a suitable benchmark to large-scale encoding and decoding analyses of temporally-resolved brain responses to speech. We provide the Python code to replicate several validations analyses of the MEG evoked related fields such as the temporal decoding of phonetic features and word frequency. All code and MEG, audio and text data are publicly available to keep with best practices in transparent and reproducible research. “MEG-MASC”数据集提供了一组精选的原始脑磁图 (MEG) 录音，记录了 27 名讲英语的人听了两个小时的自然故事。每个参与者进行了两次相同的会话，其中包括听来自手动注释子语料库 (MASC) 的四个虚构故事，并混合了随机单词列表和理解问题。我们在记录的元数据中对每个单词和音素的开始和偏移进行时间戳记，并根据“脑成像数据结构”（BIDS）组织数据集。该数据收集为对语音的时间分辨大脑反应的大规模编码和解码分析提供了合适的基准。我们提供 Python 代码来复制 MEG 诱发相关领域的多个验证分析，例如语音特征和词频的时间解码。所有代码和 MEG、音频和文本数据均公开可用，以保持透明和可重复研究的最佳实践。 本文介绍了MEG-MASC数据集，包含27名英语母语者聆听自然故事时的MEG记录，用于评估自然语音处理的脑响应分析。 Laura Gwilliams,Graham Flick,Alec Marantz,Liina Pylkkanen,David Poeppel,Jean-Remi King q-bio.QM,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Aly Mostafa,Omar Mohamed,Ali Ashraf,Ahmed Elbehery,Salma Jamal,Anas Salah,Amr S. Ghoneim
title: An End-to-End OCR Framework for Robust Arabic-Handwriting Recognition using a Novel Transformers-based Model and an Innovative 270 Million-Words Multi-Font Corpus of Classical Arabic with Diacritics
title_zh: 使用基于 Transformers 的新颖模型和创新的 2.7 亿字多字体古典阿拉伯语语料库（带变音符号）实现稳健的阿拉伯语手写识别的端到端 OCR 框架
abstract: This research is the second phase in a series of investigations on developing an Optical Character Recognition (OCR) of Arabic historical documents and examining how different modeling procedures interact with the problem. The first research studied the effect of Transformers on our custom-built Arabic dataset. One of the downsides of the first research was the size of the training data, a mere 15000 images from our 30 million images, due to lack of resources. Also, we add an image enhancement layer, time and space optimization, and Post-Correction layer to aid the model in predicting the correct word for the correct context. Notably, we propose an end-to-end text recognition approach using Vision Transformers as an encoder, namely BEIT, and vanilla Transformer as a decoder, eliminating CNNs for feature extraction and reducing the model's complexity. The experiments show that our end-to-end model outperforms Convolutions Backbones. The model attained a CER of 4.46%.
summary: This research is the second phase in a series of investigations on developing an Optical Character Recognition (OCR) of Arabic historical documents and examining how different modeling procedures interact with the problem. The first research studied the effect of Transformers on our custom-built Arabic dataset. One of the downsides of the first research was the size of the training data, a mere 15000 images from our 30 million images, due to lack of resources. Also, we add an image enhancement layer, time and space optimization, and Post-Correction layer to aid the model in predicting the correct word for the correct context. Notably, we propose an end-to-end text recognition approach using Vision Transformers as an encoder, namely BEIT, and vanilla Transformer as a decoder, eliminating CNNs for feature extraction and reducing the model's complexity. The experiments show that our end-to-end model outperforms Convolutions Backbones. The model attained a CER of 4.46%.
abstract_zh: 这项研究是一系列研究的第二阶段，这些研究旨在开发阿拉伯历史文献的光学字符识别 (OCR) 并研究不同的建模程序如何与问题相互作用。第一项研究研究了 Transformers 对我们定制的阿拉伯语数据集的影响。第一项研究的缺点之一是训练数据的大小，由于缺乏资源，我们的 3000 万张图像中只有 15000 张图像。此外，我们添加了图像增强层、时间和空间优化以及后校正层，以帮助模型预测正确上下文的正确单词。值得注意的是，我们提出了一种使用 Vision Transformer 作为编码器（即 BEIT）和普通 Transformer 作为解码器的端到端文本识别方法，消除了用于特征提取的 CNN，并降低了模型的复杂性。实验表明，我们的端到端模型优于卷积主干。该模型的 CER 为 4.46%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉Transformer和传统Transformer的端到端OCR框架，用于改进阿拉伯手写体识别，并构建了一个包含2.7亿词的多字体古典阿拉伯语语料库。
AI.motivation: 先前研究因资源限制仅使用了1.5万张图像，且未充分探索模型结构与数据规模的协同效应。本文旨在通过构建更大规模语料库并优化模型结构提升识别性能。
AI.method: 采用BEIT视觉Transformer作为编码器、传统Transformer作为解码器，去除CNN模块以降低复杂度；引入图像增强、时空优化和后校正层；构建包含2.7亿词的多字体带标点语料库。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到4.46%的字符错误率（CER），优于传统卷积神经网络基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 端到端Transformer架构结合大规模语料库能有效提升阿拉伯手写体识别性能，后校正机制对上下文相关性预测具有显著作用。

title: SubFace: Learning with Softmax Approximation for Face Recognition
title_zh: SubFace：使用 Softmax 近似学习进行人脸识别
abstract: The softmax-based loss functions and its variants (e.g., cosface, sphereface, and arcface) significantly improve the face recognition performance in wild unconstrained scenes. A common practice of these algorithms is to perform optimizations on the multiplication between the embedding features and the linear transformation matrix. However in most cases, the dimension of embedding features is given based on traditional design experience, and there is less-studied on improving performance using the feature itself when giving a fixed size. To address this challenge, this paper presents a softmax approximation method called SubFace, which employs the subspace feature to promote the performance of face recognition. Specifically, we dynamically select the non-overlapping subspace features in each batch during training, and then use the subspace features to approximate full-feature among softmax-based loss, so the discriminability of the deep model can be significantly enhanced for face recognition. Comprehensive experiments conducted on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method can significantly improve the performance of vanilla CNN baseline, which strongly proves the effectiveness of subspace strategy with the margin-based loss.
summary: The softmax-based loss functions and its variants (e.g., cosface, sphereface, and arcface) significantly improve the face recognition performance in wild unconstrained scenes. A common practice of these algorithms is to perform optimizations on the multiplication between the embedding features and the linear transformation matrix. However in most cases, the dimension of embedding features is given based on traditional design experience, and there is less-studied on improving performance using the feature itself when giving a fixed size. To address this challenge, this paper presents a softmax approximation method called SubFace, which employs the subspace feature to promote the performance of face recognition. Specifically, we dynamically select the non-overlapping subspace features in each batch during training, and then use the subspace features to approximate full-feature among softmax-based loss, so the discriminability of the deep model can be significantly enhanced for face recognition. Comprehensive experiments conducted on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method can significantly improve the performance of vanilla CNN baseline, which strongly proves the effectiveness of subspace strategy with the margin-based loss.
abstract_zh: 基于softmax的损失函数及其变体（例如cosface、sphereface和arcface）显着提高了野外无约束场景中的人脸识别性能。这些算法的常见做法是对嵌入特征和线性变换矩阵之间的乘法进行优化。但大多数情况下，嵌入特征的尺寸是根据传统设计经验给出的，在给定固定尺寸的情况下利用特征本身提高性能的研究较少。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种称为 SubFace 的 softmax 近似方法，该方法利用子空间特征来提高人脸识别的性能。具体来说，我们在训练过程中动态选择每批中不重叠的子空间特征，然后使用子空间特征来逼近基于softmax的损失中的全特征，因此可以显着增强深度模型的可辨别性以进行人脸识别。在基准数据集上进行的综合实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提高 vanilla CNN 基线的性能，这有力地证明了基于边缘损失的子空间策略的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SubFace的软最大值近似方法，通过子空间特征提升人脸识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于软最大值损失函数的方法（如CosFace、SphereFace）在优化嵌入特征与线性变换矩阵乘积时，通常固定嵌入特征维度，缺乏对特征本身的深入研究。
AI.method: 动态选择训练批次中的非重叠子空间特征，用子空间特征近似全特征软最大值损失，增强深度模型的判别能力。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了基础CNN模型的性能，验证了子空间策略与边缘损失结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SubFace通过子空间特征近似策略有效提升了人脸识别性能，为固定维度下的特征优化提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SubFace的软最大值近似方法，通过子空间特征提升人脸识别性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有基于软最大值损失函数的方法（如CosFace、SphereFace）在优化嵌入特征与线性变换矩阵乘积时，通常固定嵌入特征维度，缺乏对特征本身的深入研究。

ai_content.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了基础CNN模型的性能，验证了子空间策略与边缘损失结合的有效性。
