search_text: SubFace: Learning with Softmax Approximation for Face Recognition SubFace：使用 Softmax 近似学习进行人脸识别 The softmax-based loss functions and its variants (e.g., cosface, sphereface, and arcface) significantly improve the face recognition performance in wild unconstrained scenes. A common practice of these algorithms is to perform optimizations on the multiplication between the embedding features and the linear transformation matrix. However in most cases, the dimension of embedding features is given based on traditional design experience, and there is less-studied on improving performance using the feature itself when giving a fixed size. To address this challenge, this paper presents a softmax approximation method called SubFace, which employs the subspace feature to promote the performance of face recognition. Specifically, we dynamically select the non-overlapping subspace features in each batch during training, and then use the subspace features to approximate full-feature among softmax-based loss, so the discriminability of the deep model can be significantly enhanced for face recognition. Comprehensive experiments conducted on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method can significantly improve the performance of vanilla CNN baseline, which strongly proves the effectiveness of subspace strategy with the margin-based loss. 基于softmax的损失函数及其变体（例如cosface、sphereface和arcface）显着提高了野外无约束场景中的人脸识别性能。这些算法的常见做法是对嵌入特征和线性变换矩阵之间的乘法进行优化。但大多数情况下，嵌入特征的尺寸是根据传统设计经验给出的，在给定固定尺寸的情况下利用特征本身提高性能的研究较少。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种称为 SubFace 的 softmax 近似方法，该方法利用子空间特征来提高人脸识别的性能。具体来说，我们在训练过程中动态选择每批中不重叠的子空间特征，然后使用子空间特征来逼近基于softmax的损失中的全特征，因此可以显着增强深度模型的可辨别性以进行人脸识别。在基准数据集上进行的综合实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提高 vanilla CNN 基线的性能，这有力地证明了基于边缘损失的子空间策略的有效性。 本文提出一种名为SubFace的软最大值近似方法，通过子空间特征提升人脸识别性能。 Hongwei Xu,Suncheng Xiang,Dahong Qian cs.CV

title: A Deep Learning Approach Using Masked Image Modeling for Reconstruction of Undersampled K-spaces
title_zh: 使用掩模图像建模重建欠采样 K 空间的深度学习方法
abstract: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scans are time consuming and precarious, since the patients remain still in a confined space for extended periods of time. To reduce scanning time, some experts have experimented with undersampled k spaces, trying to use deep learning to predict the fully sampled result. These studies report that as many as 20 to 30 minutes could be saved off a scan that takes an hour or more. However, none of these studies have explored the possibility of using masked image modeling (MIM) to predict the missing parts of MRI k spaces. This study makes use of 11161 reconstructed MRI and k spaces of knee MRI images from Facebook's fastmri dataset. This tests a modified version of an existing model using baseline shifted window (Swin) and vision transformer architectures that makes use of MIM on undersampled k spaces to predict the full k space and consequently the full MRI image. Modifications were made using pytorch and numpy libraries, and were published to a github repository. After the model reconstructed the k space images, the basic Fourier transform was applied to determine the actual MRI image. Once the model reached a steady state, experimentation with hyperparameters helped to achieve pinpoint accuracy for the reconstructed images. The model was evaluated through L1 loss, gradient normalization, and structural similarity values. The model produced reconstructed images with L1 loss values averaging to <0.01 and gradient normalization values <0.1 after training finished. The reconstructed k spaces yielded structural similarity values of over 99% for both training and validation with the fully sampled k spaces, while validation loss continually decreased under 0.01. These data strongly support the idea that the algorithm works for MRI reconstruction, as they indicate the model's reconstructed image aligns extremely well with the original, fully sampled k space.

After the model reconstructed the k space images, the basic Fourier transform was applied to determine the actual MRI image. Once the model reached a steady state, experimentation with hyperparameters helped to achieve pinpoint accuracy for the reconstructed images. The model was evaluated through L1 loss, gradient normalization, and structural similarity values. abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 扫描既耗时又不稳定，因为患者长时间处于密闭空间内一动不动。为了减少扫描时间，一些专家尝试了欠采样的k空间，尝试使用深度学习来预测完全采样的结果。这些研究报告称，一次扫描需要一个小时或更长时间，最多可以节省 20 到 30 分钟。然而，这些研究都没有探索使用掩模图像建模（MIM）来预测 MRI k 空间缺失部分的可能性。这项研究利用了来自 Facebook 的 fastmri 数据集的 11161 个重建 MRI 和膝盖 MRI 图像的 k 空间。此测试使用基线移位窗口 (Swin) 和视觉变换器架构来测试现有模型的修改版本，该架构利用欠采样 k 空间上的 MIM 来预测完整的 k 空间，从而预测完整的 MRI 图像。使用 pytorch 和 numpy 库进行修改，并发布到 github 存储库。模型重建 k 空间图像后，应用基本傅里叶变换来确定实际的 MRI 图像。一旦模型达到稳定状态，超参数实验有助于实现重建图像的精确精度。该模型通过 L1 损失、梯度归一化和结构相似度值进行评估。训练完成后，模型生成的重建图像的 L1 损失值平均 <0.01，梯度归一化值 <0.1。重建的 k 空间在完全采样的 k 空间的训练和验证中产生了超过 99% 的结构相似性值，而验证损失持续下降到 0.01 以下。这些数据有力地支持了该算法适用于 MRI 重建的观点，因为它们表明模型的重建图像与原始的、完全采样的 k 空间非常吻合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码图像建模（MIM）的深度学习方法，用于从欠采样的k空间重建完整MRI图像。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI扫描耗时且患者体验差，现有深度学习方法虽能加速扫描但未探索MIM技术，因此需研究更高效的重建方案。
AI.method: 使用改进的Swin和Vision Transformer架构，结合MIM预测欠采样k空间缺失部分，通过FastMRI数据集训练模型，并利用L1损失、梯度归一化及结构相似性进行评估。
AI.result: 模型在训练和验证集上均达到99%以上的结构相似性，L1损失低于0.01，梯度归一化值低于0.1，验证损失持续下降至0.01以下。
AI.conclusion: 该算法能高效重建高质量MRI图像，验证了MIM在k空间重建中的有效性，有望显著缩短扫描时间。

authors_text: Maciej Besta,Cesare Miglioli,Paolo Sylos Labini,Jakub Tětek,Patrick Iff,Raghavendra Kanakagiri,Saleh Ashkboos,Kacper Janda,Michal Podstawski,Grzegorz Kwasniewski,Niels Gleinig,Flavio Vella,Onur Mutlu,Torsten Hoefler
title: ProbGraph: High-Performance and High-Accuracy Graph Mining with Probabilistic Set Representations
title_zh: ProbGraph：具有概率集表示的高性能和高精度图挖掘
comment: Best Paper Award at ACM/IEEE Supercomputing'22 (SC22)
comments: Best Paper Award at ACM/IEEE Supercomputing'22 (SC22)
abstract: Important graph mining problems such as Clustering are computationally demanding. To significantly accelerate these problems, we propose ProbGraph: a graph representation that enables simple and fast approximate parallel graph mining with strong theoretical guarantees on work, depth, and result accuracy. The key idea is to represent sets of vertices using probabilistic set representations such as Bloom filters. These representations are much faster to process than the original vertex sets thanks to vectorizability and small size. We use these representations as building blocks in important parallel graph mining algorithms such as Clique Counting or Clustering. When enhanced with ProbGraph, these algorithms significantly outperform tuned parallel exact baselines (up to nearly 50x on 32 cores) while ensuring accuracy of more than 90% for many input graph datasets. Our novel bounds and algorithms based on probabilistic set representations with desirable statistical properties are of separate interest for the data analytics community.
summary: Important graph mining problems such as Clustering are computationally demanding. To significantly accelerate these problems, we propose ProbGraph: a graph representation that enables simple and fast approximate parallel graph mining with strong theoretical guarantees on work, depth, and result accuracy. The key idea is to represent sets of vertices using probabilistic set representations such as Bloom filters. These representations are much faster to process than the original vertex sets thanks to vectorizability and small size. We use these representations as building blocks in important parallel graph mining algorithms such as Clique Counting or Clustering. When enhanced with ProbGraph, these algorithms significantly outperform tuned parallel exact baselines (up to nearly 50x on 32 cores) while ensuring accuracy of more than 90% for many input graph datasets. Our novel bounds and algorithms based on probabilistic set representations with desirable statistical properties are of separate interest for the data analytics community.
abstract_zh: 重要的图挖掘问题（例如聚类）对计算的要求很高。为了显着加速这些问题的解决，我们提出了 ProbGraph：一种图表示形式，可以实现简单快速的近似并行图挖掘，并对工作、深度和结果准确性提供强有力的理论保证。关键思想是使用概率集表示（例如布隆过滤器）来表示顶点集。由于可矢量化和小尺寸，这些表示的处理速度比原始顶点集快得多。我们使用这些表示作为重要的并行图挖掘算法（例如团计数或聚类）中的构建块。当使用 ProbGraph 进行增强时，这些算法的性能显着优于经过调整的并行精确基线（在 32 个内核上高达近 50 倍），同时确保许多输入图形数据集的准确性超过 90%。我们基于概率集表示的新颖边界和算法具有理想的统计特性，这对于数据分析社区来说是单独的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 提出ProbGraph方法，通过概率集合表示加速图挖掘任务，同时保持高准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统图挖掘算法计算成本高，效率低，需要更高效且保持精度的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用概率集合表示（如布隆过滤器）作为构建模块，应用于并行图挖掘算法，实现快速近似计算。
AI.result: 在32核上加速达50倍，保持90%以上准确率，优于现有并行精确基线。
AI.conclusion: ProbGraph通过概率集合表示提供了高效的图挖掘方法，具有理论保证和实际应用价值，适用于大数据分析。

search_text: ProbGraph: High-Performance and High-Accuracy Graph Mining with Probabilistic Set Representations ProbGraph：具有概率集表示的高性能和高精度图挖掘 Important graph mining problems such as Clustering are computationally demanding. To significantly accelerate these problems, we propose ProbGraph: a graph representation that enables simple and fast approximate parallel graph mining with strong theoretical guarantees on work, depth, and result accuracy. The key idea is to represent sets of vertices using probabilistic set representations such as Bloom filters. These representations are much faster to process than the original vertex sets thanks to vectorizability and small size. We use these representations as building blocks in important parallel graph mining algorithms such as Clique Counting or Clustering. When enhanced with ProbGraph, these algorithms significantly outperform tuned parallel exact baselines (up to nearly 50x on 32 cores) while ensuring accuracy of more than 90% for many input graph datasets. Our novel bounds and algorithms based on probabilistic set representations with desirable statistical properties are of separate interest for the data analytics community. 重要的图挖掘问题（例如聚类）对计算的要求很高。为了显着加速这些问题的解决，我们提出了 ProbGraph：一种图表示形式，可以实现简单快速的近似并行图挖掘，并对工作、深度和结果准确性提供强有力的理论保证。关键思想是使用概率集表示（例如布隆过滤器）来表示顶点集。由于可矢量化和小尺寸，这些表示的处理速度比原始顶点集快得多。我们使用这些表示作为重要的并行图挖掘算法（例如团计数或聚类）中的构建块。当使用 ProbGraph 进行增强时，这些算法的性能显着优于经过调整的并行精确基线（在 32 个内核上高达近 50 倍），同时确保许多输入图形数据集的准确性超过 90%。我们基于概率集表示的新颖边界和算法具有理想的统计特性，这对于数据分析社区来说是单独的兴趣。 提出ProbGraph方法，通过概率集合表示加速图挖掘任务，同时保持高准确性。 Maciej Besta,Cesare Miglioli,Paolo Sylos Labini,Jakub Tětek,Patrick Iff,Raghavendra Kanakagiri,Saleh Ashkboos,Kacper Janda,Michal Podstawski,Grzegorz Kwasniewski,Niels Gleinig,Flavio Vella,Onur Mutlu,Torsten Hoefler cs.DC,cs.DS

title: Weakly Supervised Airway Orifice Segmentation in Video Bronchoscopy
title_zh: 视频支气管镜检查中的弱监督气道口分割
comment: 5 Pages, 2 figures, only supplemental file, submitted to SPIE MI
comments: 5 Pages, 2 figures, only supplemental file, submitted to SPIE MI
abstract: Video bronchoscopy is routinely conducted for biopsies of lung tissue suspected for cancer, monitoring of COPD patients and clarification of acute respiratory problems at intensive care units. The navigation within complex bronchial trees is particularly challenging and physically demanding, requiring long-term experiences of physicians. This paper addresses the automatic segmentation of bronchial orifices in bronchoscopy videos. Deep learning-based approaches to this task are currently hampered due to the lack of readily-available ground truth segmentation data. Thus, we present a data-driven pipeline consisting of a k-means followed by a compact marker-based watershed algorithm which enables to generate airway instance segmentation maps from given depth images. In this way, these traditional algorithms serve as weak supervision for training a shallow CNN directly on RGB images solely based on a phantom dataset. We evaluate generalization capabilities of this model on two in-vivo datasets covering 250 frames on 21 different bronchoscopies. We demonstrate that its performance is comparable to those models being directly trained on in-vivo data, reaching an average error of 11 vs 5 pixels for the detected centers of the airway segmentation by an image resolution of 128x128. Our quantitative and qualitative results indicate that in the context of video bronchoscopy, phantom data and weak supervision using non-learning-based approaches enable to gain a semantic understanding of airway structures.
summary: Video bronchoscopy is routinely conducted for biopsies of lung tissue suspected for cancer, monitoring of COPD patients and clarification of acute respiratory problems at intensive care units. The navigation within complex bronchial trees is particularly challenging and physically demanding, requiring long-term experiences of physicians. This paper addresses the automatic segmentation of bronchial orifices in bronchoscopy videos. Deep learning-based approaches to this task are currently hampered due to the lack of readily-available ground truth segmentation data. Thus, we present a data-driven pipeline consisting of a k-means followed by a compact marker-based watershed algorithm which enables to generate airway instance segmentation maps from given depth images. In this way, these traditional algorithms serve as weak supervision for training a shallow CNN directly on RGB images solely based on a phantom dataset. We evaluate generalization capabilities of this model on two in-vivo datasets covering 250 frames on 21 different bronchoscopies. We demonstrate that its performance is comparable to those models being directly trained on in-vivo data, reaching an average error of 11 vs 5 pixels for the detected centers of the airway segmentation by an image resolution of 128x128. Our quantitative and qualitative results indicate that in the context of video bronchoscopy, phantom data and weak supervision using non-learning-based approaches enable to gain a semantic understanding of airway structures.
abstract_zh: 视频支气管镜检查通常用于对疑似癌症的肺组织进行活检、监测慢性阻塞性肺病患者以及澄清重症监护病房的急性呼吸系统问题。在复杂的支气管树内导航特别具有挑战性，对体力要求很高，需要医生的长期经验。本文讨论了支气管镜视频中支气管口的自动分割。由于缺乏现成的地面实况分割数据，基于深度学习的方法目前受到阻碍。因此，我们提出了一个数据驱动的管道，由 k 均值和紧凑的基于标记的分水岭算法组成，该算法能够从给定的深度图像生成气道实例分割图。这样，这些传统算法就可以作为弱监督，直接在基于幻像数据集的 RGB 图像上训练浅层 CNN。我们在两个体内数据集（涵盖 21 个不同支气管镜检查的 250 个帧）上评估该模型的泛化能力。我们证明其性能与直接在体内数据上训练的模型相当，通过 128x128 的图像分辨率检测到的气道分割中心的平均误差达到 11 比 5 像素。我们的定量和定性结果表明，在视频支气管镜检查的背景下，使用非学习方法的虚拟数据和弱监督能够获得对气道结构的语义理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督方法，用于在视频支气管镜检查中自动分割支气管口。
AI.motivation: 深度学习方法因缺乏标注的地面真值分割数据而难以应用于支气管镜视频中的支气管口分割任务。
AI.method: 结合k-means聚类和基于紧凑标记的分水岭算法，从深度图像生成气道实例分割图，作为弱监督信号训练浅层CNN模型。
AI.result: 在21次支气管镜检查的250帧数据集上，模型检测中心的平均误差为11像素（图像分辨率128x128），性能接近直接使用体内数据训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: 利用传统算法生成的弱监督信号和phantom数据，可实现视频支气管镜中气道结构的语义理解。

authors_text: Peter Hirsch,Caroline Malin-Mayor,Anthony Santella,Stephan Preibisch,Dagmar Kainmueller,Jan Funke
title: Tracking by weakly-supervised learning and graph optimization for whole-embryo C. elegans lineages
title_zh: 通过弱监督学习和图形优化来跟踪线虫全胚胎谱系
abstract: Tracking all nuclei of an embryo in noisy and dense fluorescence microscopy data is a challenging task. We build upon a recent method for nuclei tracking that combines weakly-supervised learning from a small set of nuclei center point annotations with an integer linear program (ILP) for optimal cell lineage extraction. Our work specifically addresses the following challenging properties of C. elegans embryo recordings: (1) Many cell divisions as compared to benchmark recordings of other organisms, and (2) the presence of polar bodies that are easily mistaken as cell nuclei. To cope with (1), we devise and incorporate a learnt cell division detector. To cope with (2), we employ a learnt polar body detector. We further propose automated ILP weights tuning via a structured SVM, alleviating the need for tedious manual set-up of a respective grid search. Our method outperforms the previous leader of the cell tracking challenge on the Fluo-N3DH-CE embryo dataset. We report a further extensive quantitative evaluation on two more C. elegans datasets. We will make these datasets public to serve as an extended benchmark for future method development. Our results suggest considerable improvements yielded by our method, especially in terms of the correctness of division event detection and the number and length of fully correct track segments. Code: https://github.com/funkelab/linajea
summary: Tracking all nuclei of an embryo in noisy and dense fluorescence microscopy data is a challenging task. We build upon a recent method for nuclei tracking that combines weakly-supervised learning from a small set of nuclei center point annotations with an integer linear program (ILP) for optimal cell lineage extraction. Our work specifically addresses the following challenging properties of C. elegans embryo recordings: (1) Many cell divisions as compared to benchmark recordings of other organisms, and (2) the presence of polar bodies that are easily mistaken as cell nuclei. To cope with (1), we devise and incorporate a learnt cell division detector. To cope with (2), we employ a learnt polar body detector. We further propose automated ILP weights tuning via a structured SVM, alleviating the need for tedious manual set-up of a respective grid search. Our method outperforms the previous leader of the cell tracking challenge on the Fluo-N3DH-CE embryo dataset. We report a further extensive quantitative evaluation on two more C. elegans datasets. We will make these datasets public to serve as an extended benchmark for future method development. Our results suggest considerable improvements yielded by our method, especially in terms of the correctness of division event detection and the number and length of fully correct track segments. Code: https://github.com/funkelab/linajea
abstract_zh: 在嘈杂且密集的荧光显微镜数据中跟踪胚胎的所有细胞核是一项具有挑战性的任务。我们建立在一种最新的细胞核跟踪方法的基础上，该方法将一小组细胞核中心点注释的弱监督学习与整数线性程序（ILP）相结合，以实现最佳的细胞谱系提取。我们的工作特别解决了线虫胚胎记录的以下具有挑战性的特性：（1）与其他生物体的基准记录相比，细胞分裂较多，以及（2）极体的存在很容易被误认为是细胞核。为了应对（1），我们设计并整合了一个学习的细胞分裂检测器。为了应对（2），我们采用了学习极体检测器。我们进一步提出通过结构化 SVM 进行自动 ILP 权重调整，从而减轻了繁琐的手动设置相应网格搜索的需要。我们的方法在 Fluo-N3DH-CE 胚胎数据集上优于细胞追踪挑战赛的前任领导者。我们报告了对另外两个线虫数据集的进一步广泛的定量评估。我们将公开这些数据集，作为未来方法开发的扩展基准。我们的结果表明我们的方法取得了相当大的改进，特别是在划分事件检测的正确性以及完全正确的轨道段的数量和长度方面。代码：https://github.com/funkelab/linajea

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合弱监督学习与图优化的方法，用于追踪整个线虫胚胎中的所有细胞核，解决荧光显微镜数据中的噪声和密集问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理线虫胚胎的高细胞分裂频率及易被误认为细胞核的极体时存在局限性，需提升追踪准确性与自动化程度。
AI.method: 融合弱监督学习（基于少量标注的细胞核中心点）与整数线性规划（ILP），引入学习型细胞分裂检测器和极体检测器，并通过结构化SVM自动优化ILP权重。
AI.result: 在Fluo-N3DH-CE数据集上超越现有最佳方法，在两个额外线虫数据集上实现广泛定量评估，公开数据集以推动未来研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升分裂事件检测正确率及完整追踪段数量与长度，自动化流程减少人工调参需求，公开数据集为领域发展提供基准。

We will make these datasets public to serve as an extended benchmark for future method development. Our results suggest considerable improvements yielded by our method, especially in terms of the correctness of division event detection and the number and length of fully correct track segments. Code: https://github.com/funkelab/linajea 在嘈杂且密集的荧光显微镜数据中跟踪胚胎的所有细胞核是一项具有挑战性的任务。我们建立在一种最新的细胞核跟踪方法的基础上，该方法将一小组细胞核中心点注释的弱监督学习与整数线性程序（ILP）相结合，以实现最佳的细胞谱系提取。我们的工作特别解决了线虫胚胎记录的以下具有挑战性的特性：（1）与其他生物体的基准记录相比，细胞分裂较多，以及（2）极体的存在很容易被误认为是细胞核。为了应对（1），我们设计并整合了一个学习的细胞分裂检测器。为了应对（2），我们采用了学习极体检测器。我们进一步提出通过结构化 SVM 进行自动 ILP 权重调整，从而减轻了繁琐的手动设置相应网格搜索的需要。我们的方法在 Fluo-N3DH-CE 胚胎数据集上优于细胞追踪挑战赛的前任领导者。我们报告了对另外两个线虫数据集的进一步广泛的定量评估。我们将公开这些数据集，作为未来方法开发的扩展基准。我们的结果表明我们的方法取得了相当大的改进，特别是在划分事件检测的正确性以及完全正确的轨道段的数量和长度方面。代码：https://github.com/funkelab/linajea 本文提出一种结合弱监督学习与图优化的方法，用于追踪整个线虫胚胎中的所有细胞核，解决荧光显微镜数据中的噪声和密集问题。 Peter Hirsch,Caroline Malin-Mayor,Anthony Santella,Stephan Preibisch,Dagmar Kainmueller,Jan Funke cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Improving Natural-Language-based Audio Retrieval with Transfer Learning and Audio & Text Augmentations
title_zh: 通过迁移学习以及音频和文本增强改进基于自然语言的音频检索
abstract: The absence of large labeled datasets remains a significant challenge in many application areas of deep learning. Researchers and practitioners typically resort to transfer learning and data augmentation to alleviate this issue. We study these strategies in the context of audio retrieval with natural language queries (Task 6b of the DCASE 2022 Challenge). Our proposed system uses pre-trained embedding models to project recordings and textual descriptions into a shared audio-caption space in which related examples from different modalities are close. We employ various data augmentation techniques on audio and text inputs and systematically tune their corresponding hyperparameters with sequential model-based optimization. Our results show that the used augmentations strategies reduce overfitting and improve retrieval performance.
summary: The absence of large labeled datasets remains a significant challenge in many application areas of deep learning. Researchers and practitioners typically resort to transfer learning and data augmentation to alleviate this issue. We study these strategies in the context of audio retrieval with natural language queries (Task 6b of the DCASE 2022 Challenge). Our proposed system uses pre-trained embedding models to project recordings and textual descriptions into a shared audio-caption space in which related examples from different modalities are close. We employ various data augmentation techniques on audio and text inputs and systematically tune their corresponding hyperparameters with sequential model-based optimization. Our results show that the used augmentations strategies reduce overfitting and improve retrieval performance.
abstract_zh: 在深度学习的许多应用领域中，缺乏大型标记数据集仍然是一个重大挑战。研究人员和从业者通常采用迁移学习和数据增强来缓解这个问题。我们在自然语言查询音频检索的背景下研究这些策略（DCASE 2022 挑战赛的任务 6b）。我们提出的系统使用预先训练的嵌入模型将录音和文本描述投影到共享的音频字幕空间中，其中来自不同模式的相关示例非常接近。我们对音频和文本输入采用各种数据增强技术，并通过基于顺序模型的优化系统地调整其相应的超参数。我们的结果表明，所使用的增强策略减少了过度拟合并提高了检索性能。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何通过迁移学习与音频、文本增强技术提升基于自然语言查询的音频检索性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模标注音频数据稀缺，限制了深度学习在音频检索领域的应用，需依赖迁移学习与数据增强技术突破瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用预训练嵌入模型构建音频-文本共享表征空间，结合音频/文本增强技术，并通过基于模型的序列优化调整超参数。
AI.result: 所提增强策略有效缓解过拟合问题，在DCASE 2022任务6b中显著提升音频检索准确率。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习与多模态数据增强的结合为小样本场景下的音频检索提供了有效解决方案。

title: Deterministic Fault-Tolerant Connectivity Labeling Scheme
title_zh: 确定性容错连接标记方案
abstract: The \emph{$f$-fault-tolerant connectivity labeling} ($f$-FTC labeling) is a scheme of assigning each vertex and edge with a small-size label such that one can determine the connectivity of two vertices $s$ and $t$ under the presence of at most $f$ faulty edges only from the labels of $s$, $t$, and the faulty edges. This paper presents a new deterministic $f$-FTC labeling scheme attaining $O(f^2 \mathrm{polylog}(n))$-bit label size and a polynomial construction time, which settles the open problem left by Dory and Parter [PODC'21]. The key ingredient of our construction is to develop a deterministic counterpart of the graph sketch technique by Ahn, Guha, and McGreger [SODA'12], via some natural connection with the theory of error-correcting codes. This technique removes one major obstacle in de-randomizing the Dory-Parter scheme. The whole scheme is obtained by combining this technique with a new deterministic graph sparsification algorithm derived from the seminal $ε$-net theory, which is also of independent interest. As byproducts, our result deduces the first deterministic fault-tolerant approximate distance labeling scheme with a non-trivial performance guarantee and an improved deterministic fault-tolerant compact routing. The authors believe that our new technique is potentially useful in the future exploration of more efficient FTC labeling schemes and other related applications based on graph sketches.
summary: The \emph{$f$-fault-tolerant connectivity labeling} ($f$-FTC labeling) is a scheme of assigning each vertex and edge with a small-size label such that one can determine the connectivity of two vertices $s$ and $t$ under the presence of at most $f$ faulty edges only from the labels of $s$, $t$, and the faulty edges. This paper presents a new deterministic $f$-FTC labeling scheme attaining $O(f^2 \mathrm{polylog}(n))$-bit label size and a polynomial construction time, which settles the open problem left by Dory and Parter [PODC'21]. The key ingredient of our construction is to develop a deterministic counterpart of the graph sketch technique by Ahn, Guha, and McGreger [SODA'12], via some natural connection with the theory of error-correcting codes. This technique removes one major obstacle in de-randomizing the Dory-Parter scheme. The whole scheme is obtained by combining this technique with a new deterministic graph sparsification algorithm derived from the seminal $ε$-net theory, which is also of independent interest. As byproducts, our result deduces the first deterministic fault-tolerant approximate distance labeling scheme with a non-trivial performance guarantee and an improved deterministic fault-tolerant compact routing. The authors believe that our new technique is potentially useful in the future exploration of more efficient FTC labeling schemes and other related applications based on graph sketches.
abstract_zh: \emph{$f$-容错连通性标记}（$f$-FTC 标记）是一种为每个顶点和边分配一个小尺寸标签的方案，这样在最多存在 $f$ 个故障边的情况下，仅根据 $s$、$t$ 和故障边的标签就可以确定两个顶点 $s$ 和 $t$ 的连通性。本文提出了一种新的确定性 $f$-FTC 标签方案，获得 $O(f^2 \mathrm{polylog}(n))$ 位标签大小和多项式构造时间，解决了 Dory 和 Parter [PODC'21] 留下的开放问题。我们构建的关键要素是通过与纠错码理论的某种自然联系，开发 Ahn、Guha 和 McGreger [SODA'12] 的图形草图技术的确定性对应物。这项技术消除了 Dory-Parter 方案去随机化的一个主要障碍。整个方案是通过将该技术与源自开创性的 $ε$-net 理论的新的确定性图稀疏算法相结合而获得的，该算法也具有独立的意义。作为副产品，我们的结果推导出第一个确定性容错近似距离标记方案，具有重要的性能保证和改进的确定性容错紧凑路由。作者相信，我们的新技术在未来探索更高效的 FTC 标签方案和其他基于图形草图的相关应用中可能有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种确定性的容错连通性标签方案，能够在存在最多f条故障边的情况下，通过顶点和边的标签快速判断两点连通性。
AI.motivation: 现有容错连通性标签方案多依赖随机化方法或标签尺寸过大，无法满足高效性和确定性需求，且存在未解决的开放性问题。
AI.method: 通过开发图草图技术的确定性版本并结合纠错码理论，结合ε-网理论的确定性图稀疏化算法，消除了随机化障碍。
AI.result: 实现了O(f² polylog(n))位标签尺寸和多项式时间构造，解决了Dory-Parter的开放问题，并衍生出首个确定性容错近似距离标签方案及改进路由方案。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为未来更高效的容错标签方案及其他基于图草图的应用提供了潜在支持。

authors_text: Yuanliang Zhang,Xiaofeng Wang,Jinxin Hu,Ke Gao,Chenyi Lei,Fei Fang
title: Scenario-Adaptive and Self-Supervised Model for Multi-Scenario Personalized Recommendation
title_zh: 场景自适应自监督模型的多场景个性化推荐
abstract: Multi-scenario recommendation is dedicated to retrieve relevant items for users in multiple scenarios, which is ubiquitous in industrial recommendation systems. These scenarios enjoy portions of overlaps in users and items, while the distribution of different scenarios is different. The key point of multi-scenario modeling is to efficiently maximize the use of whole-scenario information and granularly generate adaptive representations both for users and items among multiple scenarios. we summarize three practical challenges which are not well solved for multi-scenario modeling: (1) Lacking of fine-grained and decoupled information transfer controls among multiple scenarios. (2) Insufficient exploitation of entire space samples. (3) Item's multi-scenario representation disentanglement problem. In this paper, we propose a Scenario-Adaptive and Self-Supervised (SASS) model to solve the three challenges mentioned above. Specifically, we design a Multi-Layer Scenario Adaptive Transfer (ML-SAT) module with scenario-adaptive gate units to select and fuse effective transfer information from whole scenario to individual scenario in a quite fine-grained and decoupled way. To sufficiently exploit the power of entire space samples, a two-stage training process including pre-training and fine-tune is introduced. The pre-training stage is based on a scenario-supervised contrastive learning task with the training samples drawn from labeled and unlabeled data spaces. The model is created symmetrically both in user side and item side, so that we can get distinguishing representations of items in different scenarios. Extensive experimental results on public and industrial datasets demonstrate the superiority of the SASS model over state-of-the-art methods. This model also achieves more than 8.0% improvement on Average Watching Time Per User in online A/B tests.
summary: Multi-scenario recommendation is dedicated to retrieve relevant items for users in multiple scenarios, which is ubiquitous in industrial recommendation systems. These scenarios enjoy portions of overlaps in users and items, while the distribution of different scenarios is different. The key point of multi-scenario modeling is to efficiently maximize the use of whole-scenario information and granularly generate adaptive representations both for users and items among multiple scenarios. we summarize three practical challenges which are not well solved for multi-scenario modeling: (1) Lacking of fine-grained and decoupled information transfer controls among multiple scenarios. (2) Insufficient exploitation of entire space samples. (3) Item's multi-scenario representation disentanglement problem. In this paper, we propose a Scenario-Adaptive and Self-Supervised (SASS) model to solve the three challenges mentioned above. Specifically, we design a Multi-Layer Scenario Adaptive Transfer (ML-SAT) module with scenario-adaptive gate units to select and fuse effective transfer information from whole scenario to individual scenario in a quite fine-grained and decoupled way. To sufficiently exploit the power of entire space samples, a two-stage training process including pre-training and fine-tune is introduced. The pre-training stage is based on a scenario-supervised contrastive learning task with the training samples drawn from labeled and unlabeled data spaces. The model is created symmetrically both in user side and item side, so that we can get distinguishing representations of items in different scenarios. Extensive experimental results on public and industrial datasets demonstrate the superiority of the SASS model over state-of-the-art methods. This model also achieves more than 8.0% improvement on Average Watching Time Per User in online A/B tests.
abstract_zh: 多场景推荐致力于在多个场景下为用户检索相关项目，这在工业推荐系统中无处不在。这些场景在用户和物品上有部分重叠，但不同场景的分布是不同的。多场景建模的关键是有效地最大化整个场景信息的使用，并为多个场景之间的用户和项目精细地生成自适应表示。我们总结了多场景建模尚未得到很好解决的三个实际挑战：（1）缺乏多场景之间细粒度和解耦的信息传输控制。 (2)整个空间样本的利用不足。 (3) Item的多场景表示解开问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种场景自适应和自监督（SASS）模型来解决上述三个挑战。具体来说，我们设计了一个具有场景自适应门单元的多层场景自适应传输（ML-SAT）模块，以相当细粒度和解耦的方式选择和融合从整个场景到单个场景的有效传输信息。为了充分利用整个空间样本的力量，引入了包括预训练和微调的两阶段训练过程。预训练阶段基于场景监督对比学习任务，训练样本来自标记和未标记的数据空间。该模型在用户侧和项目侧对称创建，以便我们能够在不同场景下获得项目的区分表示。对公共和工业数据集的大量实验结果证明了 SASS 模型相对于最先进方法的优越性。该模型还在在线 A/B 测试中实现了每用户平均观看时间超过 8.0% 的提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种场景自适应与自监督模型SASS，解决多场景个性化推荐中信息转移控制、样本利用不足及物品表征解耦三大挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多场景推荐中存在细粒度信息转移控制不足、未能充分利用全场景样本以及物品跨场景表征难以解耦的问题，影响推荐效果。
AI.method: 设计多层场景自适应迁移模块ML-SAT，通过场景自适应门控单元实现细粒度信息选择与融合；采用两阶段训练（预训练+微调），利用场景监督对比学习任务，对称建模用户和物品表征以实现跨场景区分。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和工业数据上实验表明SASS优于现有方法，在线A/B测试中用户平均观看时长提升超8.0%。
AI.conclusion: SASS通过场景自适应机制和自监督学习有效解决多场景推荐难题，显著提升推荐效果，验证了方法的有效性与实用性。

search_text: Scenario-Adaptive and Self-Supervised Model for Multi-Scenario Personalized Recommendation 场景自适应自监督模型的多场景个性化推荐 Multi-scenario recommendation is dedicated to retrieve relevant items for users in multiple scenarios, which is ubiquitous in industrial recommendation systems. These scenarios enjoy portions of overlaps in users and items, while the distribution of different scenarios is different. The key point of multi-scenario modeling is to efficiently maximize the use of whole-scenario information and granularly generate adaptive representations both for users and items among multiple scenarios. we summarize three practical challenges which are not well solved for multi-scenario modeling: (1) Lacking of fine-grained and decoupled information transfer controls among multiple scenarios. (2) Insufficient exploitation of entire space samples. (3) Item's multi-scenario representation disentanglement problem. In this paper, we propose a Scenario-Adaptive and Self-Supervised (SASS) model to solve the three challenges mentioned above. Specifically, we design a Multi-Layer Scenario Adaptive Transfer (ML-SAT) module with scenario-adaptive gate units to select and fuse effective transfer information from whole scenario to individual scenario in a quite fine-grained and decoupled way. To sufficiently exploit the power of entire space samples, a two-stage training process including pre-training and fine-tune is introduced. The pre-training stage is based on a scenario-supervised contrastive learning task with the training samples drawn from labeled and unlabeled data spaces. The model is created symmetrically both in user side and item side, so that we can get distinguishing representations of items in different scenarios. Extensive experimental results on public and industrial datasets demonstrate the superiority of the SASS model over state-of-the-art methods. This model also achieves more than 8.0% improvement on Average Watching Time Per User in online A/B tests. 多场景推荐致力于在多个场景下为用户检索相关项目，这在工业推荐系统中无处不在。这些场景在用户和物品上有部分重叠，但不同场景的分布是不同的。多场景建模的关键是有效地最大化整个场景信息的使用，并为多个场景之间的用户和项目精细地生成自适应表示。我们总结了多场景建模尚未得到很好解决的三个实际挑战：（1）缺乏多场景之间细粒度和解耦的信息传输控制。 (2)整个空间样本的利用不足。 (3) Item的多场景表示解开问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种场景自适应和自监督（SASS）模型来解决上述三个挑战。具体来说，我们设计了一个具有场景自适应门单元的多层场景自适应传输（ML-SAT）模块，以相当细粒度和解耦的方式选择和融合从整个场景到单个场景的有效传输信息。为了充分利用整个空间样本的力量，引入了包括预训练和微调的两阶段训练过程。预训练阶段基于场景监督对比学习任务，训练样本来自标记和未标记的数据空间。该模型在用户侧和项目侧对称创建，以便我们能够在不同场景下获得项目的区分表示。对公共和工业数据集的大量实验结果证明了 SASS 模型相对于最先进方法的优越性。该模型还在在线 A/B 测试中实现了每用户平均观看时间超过 8.0% 的提升。 本文提出一种场景自适应与自监督模型SASS，解决多场景个性化推荐中信息转移控制、样本利用不足及物品表征解耦三大挑战。 Yuanliang Zhang,Xiaofeng Wang,Jinxin Hu,Ke Gao,Chenyi Lei,Fei Fang cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Q-Net: Query-Informed Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: Q-Net：基于查询的少样本医学图像分割
abstract: Deep learning has achieved tremendous success in computer vision, while medical image segmentation (MIS) remains a challenge, due to the scarcity of data annotations. Meta-learning techniques for few-shot segmentation (Meta-FSS) have been widely used to tackle this challenge, while they neglect possible distribution shifts between the query image and the support set. In contrast, an experienced clinician can perceive and address such shifts by borrowing information from the query image, then fine-tune or calibrate her prior cognitive model accordingly. Inspired by this, we propose Q-Net, a Query-informed Meta-FSS approach, which mimics in spirit the learning mechanism of an expert clinician. We build Q-Net based on ADNet, a recently proposed anomaly detection-inspired method. Specifically, we add two query-informed computation modules into ADNet, namely a query-informed threshold adaptation module and a query-informed prototype refinement module. Combining them with a dual-path extension of the feature extraction module, Q-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance on widely used abdominal and cardiac magnetic resonance (MR) image datasets. Our work sheds light on a novel way to improve Meta-FSS techniques by leveraging query information.
summary: Deep learning has achieved tremendous success in computer vision, while medical image segmentation (MIS) remains a challenge, due to the scarcity of data annotations. Meta-learning techniques for few-shot segmentation (Meta-FSS) have been widely used to tackle this challenge, while they neglect possible distribution shifts between the query image and the support set. In contrast, an experienced clinician can perceive and address such shifts by borrowing information from the query image, then fine-tune or calibrate her prior cognitive model accordingly. Inspired by this, we propose Q-Net, a Query-informed Meta-FSS approach, which mimics in spirit the learning mechanism of an expert clinician. We build Q-Net based on ADNet, a recently proposed anomaly detection-inspired method. Specifically, we add two query-informed computation modules into ADNet, namely a query-informed threshold adaptation module and a query-informed prototype refinement module. Combining them with a dual-path extension of the feature extraction module, Q-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance on widely used abdominal and cardiac magnetic resonance (MR) image datasets. Our work sheds light on a novel way to improve Meta-FSS techniques by leveraging query information.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在计算机视觉领域取得了巨大成功，但由于数据注释的稀缺，医学图像分割（MIS）仍然是一个挑战。用于少镜头分割的元学习技术（Meta-FSS）已被广泛用于解决这一挑战，但它们忽略了查询图像和支持集之间可能的分布变化。相比之下，经验丰富的临床医生可以通过借用查询图像中的信息来感知和解决这种变化，然后相应地微调或校准她先前的认知模型。受此启发，我们提出了 Q-Net，一种基于查询的 Meta-FSS 方法，它在精神上模仿了专家临床医生的学习机制。我们基于 ADNet 构建 Q-Net，ADNet 是最近提出的一种受异常检测启发的方法。具体来说，我们在 ADNet 中添加了两个查询通知计算模块，即查询通知阈值适应模块和查询通知原型细化模块。将它们与特征提取模块的双路径扩展相结合，Q-Net 在广泛使用的腹部和心脏磁共振 (MR) 图像数据集上实现了最先进的性能。我们的工作揭示了一种通过利用查询信息来改进 Meta-FSS 技术的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Q-Net的查询感知少样本医学图像分割方法，旨在解决医学图像分割中数据标注稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的少样本分割方法忽略了查询图像与支持集之间的分布偏移问题，而经验丰富的临床医生能够通过查询图像调整其先验认知模型，从而解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文基于ADNet方法，引入了两个查询感知计算模块：查询感知阈值自适应模块和查询感知原型优化模块，并结合双路径特征提取模块，构建了Q-Net。
AI.result: Q-Net在广泛使用的腹部和心脏磁共振图像数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种新的改进少样本分割技术的方法，通过利用查询信息提升性能。

title: VISTANet: VIsual Spoken Textual Additive Net for Interpretable Multimodal Emotion Recognition
title_zh: VISTANet：用于可解释的多模态情感识别的视觉口语文本相加网络
abstract: This paper proposes a multimodal emotion recognition system, VIsual Spoken Textual Additive Net (VISTANet), to classify emotions reflected by input containing image, speech, and text into discrete classes. A new interpretability technique, K-Average Additive exPlanation (KAAP), has been developed that identifies important visual, spoken, and textual features leading to predicting a particular emotion class. The VISTANet fuses information from image, speech, and text modalities using a hybrid of intermediate and late fusion. It automatically adjusts the weights of their intermediate outputs while computing the weighted average. The KAAP technique computes the contribution of each modality and corresponding features toward predicting a particular emotion class. To mitigate the insufficiency of multimodal emotion datasets labelled with discrete emotion classes, we have constructed the IIT-R MMEmoRec dataset consisting of images, corresponding speech and text, and emotion labels ('angry,' 'happy,' 'hate,' and 'sad'). The VISTANet has resulted in an overall emotion recognition accuracy of 80.11% on the IIT-R MMEmoRec dataset using visual, spoken, and textual modalities, outperforming single or dual-modality configurations. The code and data can be accessed at https://github.com/MIntelligence-Group/MMEmoRec.
summary: This paper proposes a multimodal emotion recognition system, VIsual Spoken Textual Additive Net (VISTANet), to classify emotions reflected by input containing image, speech, and text into discrete classes. A new interpretability technique, K-Average Additive exPlanation (KAAP), has been developed that identifies important visual, spoken, and textual features leading to predicting a particular emotion class. The VISTANet fuses information from image, speech, and text modalities using a hybrid of intermediate and late fusion. It automatically adjusts the weights of their intermediate outputs while computing the weighted average. The KAAP technique computes the contribution of each modality and corresponding features toward predicting a particular emotion class. To mitigate the insufficiency of multimodal emotion datasets labelled with discrete emotion classes, we have constructed the IIT-R MMEmoRec dataset consisting of images, corresponding speech and text, and emotion labels ('angry,' 'happy,' 'hate,' and 'sad'). The VISTANet has resulted in an overall emotion recognition accuracy of 80.11% on the IIT-R MMEmoRec dataset using visual, spoken, and textual modalities, outperforming single or dual-modality configurations. The code and data can be accessed at https://github.com/MIntelligence-Group/MMEmoRec.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种多模态情感识别系统，视觉口语文本附加网络（VISTANet），将包含图像、语音和文本的输入反映的情感分类为离散类别。一种新的可解释性技术——K-平均加性解释（KAAP）已经被开发出来，它可以识别重要的视觉、口头和文本特征，从而预测特定的情绪类别。 VISTANet 使用中间和后期融合的混合方式融合来自图像、语音和文本模式的信息。它在计算加权平均值时自动调整中间输出的权重。 KAAP 技术计算每种模态和相应特征对预测特定情绪类别的贡献。为了缓解用离散情感类别标记的多模态情感数据集的不足，我们构建了由图像、相应的语音和文本以及情感标签（“愤怒”、“快乐”、“仇恨”和“悲伤”）组成的 IIT-R MMEmoRec 数据集。 VISTANet 使用视觉、口语和文本模态在 IIT-R MMEmoRec 数据集上实现了 80.11% 的整体情感识别准确率，优于单模态或双模态配置。代码和数据可以在 https://github.com/MIntelligence-Group/MMEmoRec 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态情绪识别系统VISTANet，结合视觉、语音和文本信息进行离散情绪分类，并开发了可解释性技术KAAP以识别关键特征。
AI.motivation: 现有情绪识别方法在多模态数据融合和可解释性方面存在不足，且缺乏标注明确的离散情绪类别的多模态数据集。
AI.method: 采用中间融合与晚期融合混合策略，自动调整各模态权重；提出KAAP技术量化各模态特征对情绪预测的贡献，并构建包含图像、语音、文本及情绪标签的IIT-R MMEmoRec数据集。
AI.result: 在IIT-R MMEmoRec数据集上实现80.11%的总体情绪识别准确率，优于单模态或双模态配置。
AI.conclusion: VISTANet通过多模态融合与可解释性分析提升了情绪识别性能，且新数据集为相关研究提供了重要资源。

search_text: VISTANet: VIsual Spoken Textual Additive Net for Interpretable Multimodal Emotion Recognition VISTANet：用于可解释的多模态情感识别的视觉口语文本相加网络 This paper proposes a multimodal emotion recognition system, VIsual Spoken Textual Additive Net (VISTANet), to classify emotions reflected by input containing image, speech, and text into discrete classes. A new interpretability technique, K-Average Additive exPlanation (KAAP), has been developed that identifies important visual, spoken, and textual features leading to predicting a particular emotion class. The VISTANet fuses information from image, speech, and text modalities using a hybrid of intermediate and late fusion. It automatically adjusts the weights of their intermediate outputs while computing the weighted average. The KAAP technique computes the contribution of each modality and corresponding features toward predicting a particular emotion class. To mitigate the insufficiency of multimodal emotion datasets labelled with discrete emotion classes, we have constructed the IIT-R MMEmoRec dataset consisting of images, corresponding speech and text, and emotion labels ('angry,' 'happy,' 'hate,' and 'sad'). The VISTANet has resulted in an overall emotion recognition accuracy of 80.11% on the IIT-R MMEmoRec dataset using visual, spoken, and textual modalities, outperforming single or dual-modality configurations. The code and data can be accessed at https://github.com/MIntelligence-Group/MMEmoRec. 本文提出了一种多模态情感识别系统，视觉口语文本附加网络（VISTANet），将包含图像、语音和文本的输入反映的情感分类为离散类别。一种新的可解释性技术——K-平均加性解释（KAAP）已经被开发出来，它可以识别重要的视觉、口头和文本特征，从而预测特定的情绪类别。 VISTANet 使用中间和后期融合的混合方式融合来自图像、语音和文本模式的信息。它在计算加权平均值时自动调整中间输出的权重。 KAAP 技术计算每种模态和相应特征对预测特定情绪类别的贡献。为了缓解用离散情感类别标记的多模态情感数据集的不足，我们构建了由图像、相应的语音和文本以及情感标签（“愤怒”、“快乐”、“仇恨”和“悲伤”）组成的 IIT-R MMEmoRec 数据集。 VISTANet 使用视觉、口语和文本模态在 IIT-R MMEmoRec 数据集上实现了 80.11% 的整体情感识别准确率，优于单模态或双模态配置。代码和数据可以在 https://github.com/MIntelligence-Group/MMEmoRec 访问。 本文提出了一种多模态情绪识别系统VISTANet，结合视觉、语音和文本信息进行离散情绪分类，并开发了可解释性技术KAAP以识别关键特征。 Puneet Kumar,Sarthak Malik,Balasubramanian Raman,Xiaobai Li cs.CV

title: Towards a Lower Bound for the Average Case Runtime of Simulated Annealing on TSP
title_zh: TSP 上模拟退火的平均案例运行时间的下界
abstract: We analyze simulated annealing (SA) for simple randomized instances of the Traveling Salesperson Problem. Our analysis shows that the theoretically optimal cooling schedule of Hajek explores members of the solution set which are in expectation far from the global optimum. We obtain a lower bound on the expected length of the final tour obtained by SA on these random instances. In addition, we also obtain an upper bound on the expected value of its variance. These bounds assume that the Markov chain that describes SA is stationary, a situation that does not truly hold in practice. Hence, we also formulate conditions under which the bounds extend to the nonstationary case. These bounds are obtained by comparing the tour length distribution to a related distribution. We furthermore provide numerical evidence for a stochastic dominance relation that appears to exist between these two distributions, and formulate a conjecture in this direction. If proved, this conjecture implies that SA stays far from the global optimum with high probability when executed for any sub-exponential number of iterations. This would show that SA requires at least exponentially many iterations to reach a global optimum with nonvanishing probability.
summary: We analyze simulated annealing (SA) for simple randomized instances of the Traveling Salesperson Problem. Our analysis shows that the theoretically optimal cooling schedule of Hajek explores members of the solution set which are in expectation far from the global optimum. We obtain a lower bound on the expected length of the final tour obtained by SA on these random instances. In addition, we also obtain an upper bound on the expected value of its variance. These bounds assume that the Markov chain that describes SA is stationary, a situation that does not truly hold in practice. Hence, we also formulate conditions under which the bounds extend to the nonstationary case. These bounds are obtained by comparing the tour length distribution to a related distribution. We furthermore provide numerical evidence for a stochastic dominance relation that appears to exist between these two distributions, and formulate a conjecture in this direction. If proved, this conjecture implies that SA stays far from the global optimum with high probability when executed for any sub-exponential number of iterations. This would show that SA requires at least exponentially many iterations to reach a global optimum with nonvanishing probability.
abstract_zh: 我们分析了旅行商问题的简单随机实例的模拟退火 (SA)。我们的分析表明，Hajek 的理论上最优冷却方案探索了与全局最优值相去甚远的解集成员。我们获得了 SA 在这些随机实例上获得的最终旅行的预期长度的下界。此外，我们还获得了其方差期望值的上限。这些界限假设描述 SA 的马尔可夫链是平稳的，但这种情况在实践中并不真正成立。因此，我们还制定了将界限扩展到非平稳情况的条件。这些界限是通过将行程长度分布与相关分布进行比较来获得的。我们还为这两个分布之间似乎存在的随机优势关系提供了数值证据，并在这个方向上提出了猜想。如果被证明，这个猜想意味着当执行任何次指数迭代次数时，SA 很可能远离全局最优值。这表明 SA 至少需要指数多次迭代才能达到具有非零概率的全局最优值。

AI.tldr: 本文分析模拟退火算法在旅行商问题（TSP）上的平均情况运行时间下限，探讨其收敛到全局最优解的理论限制。
AI.motivation: 模拟退火是求解TSP的常用启发式算法，但其理论分析多集中于最坏情况，缺乏对平均情况运行时间的系统研究，尤其是对冷却调度效果的理论保证不足。
AI.method: 通过理论分析比较解分布与相关分布，结合马尔可夫链平稳性假设，推导期望路径长度下界和方差上界；并基于数值实验提出随机优势关系猜想。
AI.result: 证明了Hajek最优冷却调度下，模拟退火的期望解距离全局最优解存在下界；方差上界表明解质量波动受限；提出非平稳条件扩展理论结果，并猜想模拟退火需指数级迭代才能以非零概率收敛到全局最优。
AI.conclusion: 模拟退火在子指数迭代次数内难以保证找到全局最优解，其收敛速度存在理论下限，需指数级时间才能实现有效优化。

Our analysis shows that the theoretically optimal cooling schedule of Hajek explores members of the solution set which are in expectation far from the global optimum. authors_text: Kalana Abeywardena,Shechem Sumanthiran,Sanoojan Baliah,Nadarasar Bahavan,Nalith Udugampola,Ajith Pasqual,Chamira Edussooriya,Ranga Rodrigo
title: Dynamic Template Initialization for Part-Aware Person Re-ID
title_zh: 部件感知人员重新识别的动态模板初始化
abstract: Many of the existing Person Re-identification (Re-ID) approaches depend on feature maps which are either partitioned to localize parts of a person or reduced to create a global representation. While part localization has shown significant success, it uses either naıve position-based partitions or static feature templates. These, however, hypothesize the pre-existence of the parts in a given image or their positions, ignoring the input image-specific information which limits their usability in challenging scenarios such as Re-ID with partial occlusions and partial probe images. In this paper, we introduce a spatial attention-based Dynamic Part Template Initialization module that dynamically generates part-templates using mid-level semantic features at the earlier layers of the backbone. Following a self-attention layer, human part-level features of the backbone are used to extract the templates of diverse human body parts using a simplified cross-attention scheme which will then be used to identify and collate representations of various human parts from semantically rich features, increasing the discriminative ability of the entire model. We further explore adaptive weighting of part descriptors to quantify the absence or occlusion of local attributes and suppress the contribution of the corresponding part descriptors to the matching criteria. Extensive experiments on holistic, occluded, and partial Re-ID task benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed architecture is able to achieve competitive performance. Codes will be included in the supplementary material and will be made publicly available.
summary: Many of the existing Person Re-identification (Re-ID) approaches depend on feature maps which are either partitioned to localize parts of a person or reduced to create a global representation. While part localization has shown significant success, it uses either naıve position-based partitions or static feature templates. These, however, hypothesize the pre-existence of the parts in a given image or their positions, ignoring the input image-specific information which limits their usability in challenging scenarios such as Re-ID with partial occlusions and partial probe images. In this paper, we introduce a spatial attention-based Dynamic Part Template Initialization module that dynamically generates part-templates using mid-level semantic features at the earlier layers of the backbone. Following a self-attention layer, human part-level features of the backbone are used to extract the templates of diverse human body parts using a simplified cross-attention scheme which will then be used to identify and collate representations of various human parts from semantically rich features, increasing the discriminative ability of the entire model. We further explore adaptive weighting of part descriptors to quantify the absence or occlusion of local attributes and suppress the contribution of the corresponding part descriptors to the matching criteria. Extensive experiments on holistic, occluded, and partial Re-ID task benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed architecture is able to achieve competitive performance. Codes will be included in the supplementary material and will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 许多现有的行人重新识别（Re-ID）方法依赖于特征图，这些特征图要么被分区以定位人的某些部分，要么被简化以创建全局表示。虽然零件定位已取得巨大成功，但它使用基于位置的简单分区或静态特征模板。然而，这些假设给定图像中的部件或其位置预先存在，忽略了输入图像特定信息，这限制了它们在具有部分遮挡和部分探测图像的 Re-ID 等具有挑战性的场景中的可用性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于空间注意力的动态零件模板初始化模块，该模块使用骨干网早期层的中级语义特征动态生成零件模板。在自注意力层之后，主干的人体部位级特征用于使用简化的交叉注意力方案提取不同人体部位的模板，然后使用该方案从语义丰富的特征中识别和整理各个人体部位的表示，从而提高整个模型的判别能力。我们进一步探索部分描述符的自适应加权，以量化局部属性的缺失或遮挡，并抑制相应部分描述符对匹配标准的贡献。对整体、遮挡和部分 Re-ID 任务基准的大量实验表明，我们提出的架构能够实现有竞争力的性能。代码将包含在补充材料中并将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态部分模板初始化方法，用于提升部分感知的人体再识别（Re-ID）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Re-ID方法依赖静态分区或模板，无法适应图像特定信息，导致在遮挡等复杂场景下表现受限。
AI.method: 引入基于空间注意力的动态部分模板初始化模块，利用主干网络中层语义特征生成部分模板，并通过自注意力和简化交叉注意力机制提取人体部位特征，结合自适应权重抑制遮挡部位影响。
AI.result: 在完整、遮挡和部分Re-ID基准测试中表现出竞争性性能，代码将公开发布。
AI.conclusion: 动态模板生成与自适应权重机制有效提升了Re-ID模型对遮挡场景的鲁棒性和判别能力。

search_text: Dynamic Template Initialization for Part-Aware Person Re-ID 部件感知人员重新识别的动态模板初始化 Many of the existing Person Re-identification (Re-ID) approaches depend on feature maps which are either partitioned to localize parts of a person or reduced to create a global representation. While part localization has shown significant success, it uses either naıve position-based partitions or static feature templates. These, however, hypothesize the pre-existence of the parts in a given image or their positions, ignoring the input image-specific information which limits their usability in challenging scenarios such as Re-ID with partial occlusions and partial probe images. In this paper, we introduce a spatial attention-based Dynamic Part Template Initialization module that dynamically generates part-templates using mid-level semantic features at the earlier layers of the backbone. Following a self-attention layer, human part-level features of the backbone are used to extract the templates of diverse human body parts using a simplified cross-attention scheme which will then be used to identify and collate representations of various human parts from semantically rich features, increasing the discriminative ability of the entire model. We further explore adaptive weighting of part descriptors to quantify the absence or occlusion of local attributes and suppress the contribution of the corresponding part descriptors to the matching criteria. Extensive experiments on holistic, occluded, and partial Re-ID task benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed architecture is able to achieve competitive performance. Codes will be included in the supplementary material and will be made publicly available. 许多现有的行人重新识别（Re-ID）方法依赖于特征图，这些特征图要么被分区以定位人的某些部分，要么被简化以创建全局表示。虽然零件定位已取得巨大成功，但它使用基于位置的简单分区或静态特征模板。然而，这些假设给定图像中的部件或其位置预先存在，忽略了输入图像特定信息，这限制了它们在具有部分遮挡和部分探测图像的 Re-ID 等具有挑战性的场景中的可用性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于空间注意力的动态零件模板初始化模块，该模块使用骨干网早期层的中级语义特征动态生成零件模板。在自注意力层之后，主干的人体部位级特征用于使用简化的交叉注意力方案提取不同人体部位的模板，然后使用该方案从语义丰富的特征中识别和整理各个人体部位的表示，从而提高整个模型的判别能力。我们进一步探索部分描述符的自适应加权，以量化局部属性的缺失或遮挡，并抑制相应部分描述符对匹配标准的贡献。对整体、遮挡和部分 Re-ID 任务基准的大量实验表明，我们提出的架构能够实现有竞争力的性能。代码将包含在补充材料中并将公开发布。 本文提出一种动态部分模板初始化方法，用于提升部分感知的人体再识别（Re-ID）性能。 Kalana Abeywardena,Shechem Sumanthiran,Sanoojan Baliah,Nadarasar Bahavan,Nalith Udugampola,Ajith Pasqual,Chamira Edussooriya,Ranga Rodrigo cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Trace and Detect Adversarial Attacks on CNNs using Feature Response Maps
title_zh: 使用特征响应图跟踪和检测 CNN 上的对抗性攻击
abstract: The existence of adversarial attacks on convolutional neural networks (CNN) questions the fitness of such models for serious applications. The attacks manipulate an input image such that misclassification is evoked while still looking normal to a human observer -- they are thus not easily detectable. In a different context, backpropagated activations of CNN hidden layers -- "feature responses" to a given input -- have been helpful to visualize for a human "debugger" what the CNN "looks at" while computing its output. In this work, we propose a novel detection method for adversarial examples to prevent attacks. We do so by tracking adversarial perturbations in feature responses, allowing for automatic detection using average local spatial entropy. The method does not alter the original network architecture and is fully human-interpretable. Experiments confirm the validity of our approach for state-of-the-art attacks on large-scale models trained on ImageNet.
summary: The existence of adversarial attacks on convolutional neural networks (CNN) questions the fitness of such models for serious applications. The attacks manipulate an input image such that misclassification is evoked while still looking normal to a human observer -- they are thus not easily detectable. In a different context, backpropagated activations of CNN hidden layers -- "feature responses" to a given input -- have been helpful to visualize for a human "debugger" what the CNN "looks at" while computing its output. In this work, we propose a novel detection method for adversarial examples to prevent attacks. We do so by tracking adversarial perturbations in feature responses, allowing for automatic detection using average local spatial entropy. The method does not alter the original network architecture and is fully human-interpretable. Experiments confirm the validity of our approach for state-of-the-art attacks on large-scale models trained on ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 对卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的对抗性攻击的存在质疑了此类模型对于严肃应用的适用性。这些攻击会操纵输入图像，从而引发错误分类，同时对人类观察者来说仍然看起来正常 - 因此它们不容易被检测到。在不同的上下文中，CNN 隐藏层的反向传播激活——对给定输入的“特征响应”——有助于人类“调试器”可视化 CNN 在计算其输出时“看到”的内容。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性示例检测方法来防止攻击。我们通过跟踪特征响应中的对抗性扰动来实现这一点，从而允许使用平均局部空间熵进行自动检测。该方法不会改变原始网络架构，并且完全是人类可解释的。实验证实了我们的方法对在 ImageNet 上训练的大规模模型进行最先进的攻击的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于特征响应图的对抗攻击检测方法
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击威胁CNN的可靠性，需有效且可解释的检测方法
AI.method: 通过分析CNN特征响应中的对抗扰动，利用平均局部空间熵进行检测，且不改变网络结构
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法对ImageNet模型的有效性，可检测最新对抗攻击
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效且可解释，适用于实际应用中的对抗攻击检测

title: Bidirectional Contrastive Split Learning for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 视觉问答的双向对比分割学习
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) based on multi-modal data facilitates real-life applications such as home robots and medical diagnoses. One significant challenge is to devise a robust decentralized learning framework for various client models where centralized data collection is refrained due to confidentiality concerns. This work aims to tackle privacy-preserving VQA by decoupling a multi-modal model into representation modules and a contrastive module and leveraging inter-module gradients sharing and inter-client weight sharing. To this end, we propose Bidirectional Contrastive Split Learning (BiCSL) to train a global multi-modal model on the entire data distribution of decentralized clients. We employ the contrastive loss that enables a more efficient self-supervised learning of decentralized modules. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on the VQA-v2 dataset based on five SOTA VQA models, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed method. Furthermore, we inspect BiCSL's robustness against a dual-key backdoor attack on VQA. Consequently, BiCSL shows much better robustness to the multi-modal adversarial attack compared to the centralized learning method, which provides a promising approach to decentralized multi-modal learning.
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) based on multi-modal data facilitates real-life applications such as home robots and medical diagnoses. One significant challenge is to devise a robust decentralized learning framework for various client models where centralized data collection is refrained due to confidentiality concerns. This work aims to tackle privacy-preserving VQA by decoupling a multi-modal model into representation modules and a contrastive module and leveraging inter-module gradients sharing and inter-client weight sharing. To this end, we propose Bidirectional Contrastive Split Learning (BiCSL) to train a global multi-modal model on the entire data distribution of decentralized clients. We employ the contrastive loss that enables a more efficient self-supervised learning of decentralized modules. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on the VQA-v2 dataset based on five SOTA VQA models, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed method. Furthermore, we inspect BiCSL's robustness against a dual-key backdoor attack on VQA. Consequently, BiCSL shows much better robustness to the multi-modal adversarial attack compared to the centralized learning method, which provides a promising approach to decentralized multi-modal learning.
abstract_zh: 基于多模态数据的视觉问答（VQA）有利于家庭机器人和医疗诊断等现实生活中的应用。一项重大挑战是为各种客户端模型设计一个强大的去中心化学习框架，在这些模型中，由于保密问题而禁止集中数据收集。这项工作旨在通过将多模态模型解耦为表示模块和对比模块并利用模块间梯度共享和客户端间权重共享来解决隐私保护 VQA。为此，我们提出双向对比分割学习（BiCSL），在去中心化客户端的整个数据分布上训练全局多模态模型。我们采用对比损失来实现去中心化模块更有效的自我监督学习。基于五个SOTA VQA模型在VQA-v2数据集上进行了综合实验，证明了该方法的有效性。此外，我们还检查了 BiCSL 针对 VQA 双密钥后门攻击的稳健性。因此，与集中式学习方法相比，BiCSL 对多模态对抗攻击表现出更好的鲁棒性，这为去中心化多模态学习提供了一种有前景的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BiCSL的双向对比分割学习方法，用于解决视觉问答（VQA）中的隐私保护问题，通过去中心化学习框架实现多模态模型的训练。
AI.motivation: 传统VQA模型依赖集中式数据收集，存在隐私泄露风险。需要设计一种去中心化的学习框架，在保证数据隐私的同时提升模型鲁棒性，并防范对抗攻击。
AI.method: 将多模态模型拆分为表示模块和对比模块，通过模块间梯度共享和客户端间权重共享实现去中心化训练，结合对比损失函数进行自监督学习，并验证模型对后门攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在VQA-v2数据集上基于五种SOTA模型的实验表明，BiCSL在去中心化场景下表现优于集中式方法，且对多模态对抗攻击具有更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: BiCSL为去中心化多模态学习提供了有效方案，在隐私保护和模型安全性方面具有显著优势。

result: 在VQA-v2数据集上基于五种SOTA模型的实验表明，BiCSL在去中心化场景下表现优于集中式方法，且对多模态对抗攻击具有更强的鲁棒性。
conclusion: BiCSL为去中心化多模态学习提供了有效方案，在隐私保护和模型安全性方面具有显著优势。
search_text: Bidirectional Contrastive Split Learning for Visual Question Answering 视觉问答的双向对比分割学习 Visual Question Answering (VQA) based on multi-modal data facilitates real-life applications such as home robots and medical diagnoses. One significant challenge is to devise a robust decentralized learning framework for various client models where centralized data collection is refrained due to confidentiality concerns. This work aims to tackle privacy-preserving VQA by decoupling a multi-modal model into representation modules and a contrastive module and leveraging inter-module gradients sharing and inter-client weight sharing. To this end, we propose Bidirectional Contrastive Split Learning (BiCSL) to train a global multi-modal model on the entire data distribution of decentralized clients. We employ the contrastive loss that enables a more efficient self-supervised learning of decentralized modules. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on the VQA-v2 dataset based on five SOTA VQA models, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed method. Furthermore, we inspect BiCSL's robustness against a dual-key backdoor attack on VQA. Consequently, BiCSL shows much better robustness to the multi-modal adversarial attack compared to the centralized learning method, which provides a promising approach to decentralized multi-modal learning. 基于多模态数据的视觉问答（VQA）有利于家庭机器人和医疗诊断等现实生活中的应用。一项重大挑战是为各种客户端模型设计一个强大的去中心化学习框架，在这些模型中，由于保密问题而禁止集中数据收集。这项工作旨在通过将多模态模型解耦为表示模块和对比模块并利用模块间梯度共享和客户端间权重共享来解决隐私保护 VQA。为此，我们提出双向对比分割学习（BiCSL），在去中心化客户端的整个数据分布上训练全局多模态模型。我们采用对比损失来实现去中心化模块更有效的自我监督学习。基于五个SOTA VQA模型在VQA-v2数据集上进行了综合实验，证明了该方法的有效性。此外，我们还检查了 BiCSL 针对 VQA 双密钥后门攻击的稳健性。因此，与集中式学习方法相比，BiCSL 对多模态对抗攻击表现出更好的鲁棒性，这为去中心化多模态学习提供了一种有前景的方法。 本文提出了一种名为BiCSL的双向对比分割学习方法，用于解决视觉问答（VQA）中的隐私保护问题，通过去中心化学习框架实现多模态模型的训练。 Yuwei Sun,Hideya Ochiai cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Cheng Han,Qichao Zhao,Shuyi Zhang,Yinzi Chen,Zhenlin Zhang,Jinwei Yuan
title: YOLOPv2: Better, Faster, Stronger for Panoptic Driving Perception
title_zh: YOLOPv2：更好、更快、更强的全景驾驶感知
abstract: Over the last decade, multi-tasking learning approaches have achieved promising results in solving panoptic driving perception problems, providing both high-precision and high-efficiency performance. It has become a popular paradigm when designing networks for real-time practical autonomous driving system, where computation resources are limited. This paper proposed an effective and efficient multi-task learning network to simultaneously perform the task of traffic object detection, drivable road area segmentation and lane detection. Our model achieved the new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in terms of accuracy and speed on the challenging BDD100K dataset. Especially, the inference time is reduced by half compared to the previous SOTA model. Code will be released in the near future.
summary: Over the last decade, multi-tasking learning approaches have achieved promising results in solving panoptic driving perception problems, providing both high-precision and high-efficiency performance. It has become a popular paradigm when designing networks for real-time practical autonomous driving system, where computation resources are limited. This paper proposed an effective and efficient multi-task learning network to simultaneously perform the task of traffic object detection, drivable road area segmentation and lane detection. Our model achieved the new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in terms of accuracy and speed on the challenging BDD100K dataset. Especially, the inference time is reduced by half compared to the previous SOTA model. Code will be released in the near future.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，多任务学习方法在解决全景驾驶感知问题方面取得了可喜的成果，提供了高精度和高效率的性能。在计算资源有限的实时实用自动驾驶系统网络设计中，它已成为一种流行的范例。本文提出了一种有效且高效的多任务学习网络，以同时执行交通对象检测、可行驶道路区域分割和车道检测的任务。我们的模型在具有挑战性的 BDD100K 数据集上的准确性和速度方面实现了新的最先进 (SOTA) 性能。特别是，与之前的 SOTA 模型相比，推理时间减少了一半。代码将在不久的将来发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的多任务学习网络YOLOPv2，用于同时执行交通目标检测、可行驶区域分割和车道检测任务。
AI.motivation: 在实际的自动驾驶系统中，由于计算资源有限，需要一种高效且准确的多任务学习方法来解决全景驾驶感知问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的多任务学习网络YOLOPv2，能够同时完成交通目标检测、可行驶区域分割和车道检测任务。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的BDD100K数据集上，YOLOPv2在准确性和速度方面均达到了新的最先进(SOTA)性能，推理时间比之前的SOTA模型减少了50%。
AI.conclusion: YOLOPv2在准确性和效率方面都优于现有方法，适用于实时自动驾驶系统的实际应用。

authors_text: Marco A. Martínez-Ramírez,Wei-Hsiang Liao,Giorgio Fabbro,Stefan Uhlich,Chihiro Nagashima,Yuki Mitsufuji
title: Automatic music mixing with deep learning and out-of-domain data
title_zh: 利用深度学习和域外数据自动混合音乐
comment: 23rd International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR), December, 2022. Source code, demo and audio examples: https://marco-martinez-sony.github.io/FxNorm-automix/ - added acknowledgements
comments: 23rd International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR), December, 2022. Source code, demo and audio examples: https://marco-martinez-sony.github.io/FxNorm-automix/ - added acknowledgements
abstract: Music mixing traditionally involves recording instruments in the form of clean, individual tracks and blending them into a final mixture using audio effects and expert knowledge (e.g., a mixing engineer). The automation of music production tasks has become an emerging field in recent years, where rule-based methods and machine learning approaches have been explored. Nevertheless, the lack of dry or clean instrument recordings limits the performance of such models, which is still far from professional human-made mixes. We explore whether we can use out-of-domain data such as wet or processed multitrack music recordings and repurpose it to train supervised deep learning models that can bridge the current gap in automatic mixing quality. To achieve this we propose a novel data preprocessing method that allows the models to perform automatic music mixing. We also redesigned a listening test method for evaluating music mixing systems. We validate our results through such subjective tests using highly experienced mixing engineers as participants.
summary: Music mixing traditionally involves recording instruments in the form of clean, individual tracks and blending them into a final mixture using audio effects and expert knowledge (e.g., a mixing engineer). The automation of music production tasks has become an emerging field in recent years, where rule-based methods and machine learning approaches have been explored. Nevertheless, the lack of dry or clean instrument recordings limits the performance of such models, which is still far from professional human-made mixes. We explore whether we can use out-of-domain data such as wet or processed multitrack music recordings and repurpose it to train supervised deep learning models that can bridge the current gap in automatic mixing quality. To achieve this we propose a novel data preprocessing method that allows the models to perform automatic music mixing. We also redesigned a listening test method for evaluating music mixing systems. We validate our results through such subjective tests using highly experienced mixing engineers as participants.
abstract_zh: 传统上，音乐混音涉及以干净的单独音轨的形式录制乐器，并使用音频效果和专业知识（例如混音工程师）将它们混合成最终的混合物。近年来，音乐制作任务的自动化已成为一个新兴领域，人们对基于规则的方法和机器学习方法进行了探索。然而，缺乏干燥或干净的乐器录音限制了此类模型的性能，与专业的人造混音相比仍相去甚远。我们探索是否可以使用域外数据，例如湿的或经过处理的多轨音乐录音，并将其重新用于训练有监督的深度学习模型，以弥补当前自动混音质量的差距。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种新颖的数据预处理方法，允许模型执行自动音乐混合。我们还重新设计了用于评估音乐混合系统的听力测试方法。我们使用经验丰富的混音工程师作为参与者，通过此类主观测试来验证我们的结果。

AI.tldr: 利用深度学习和域外数据提升自动音乐混音质量
AI.motivation: 传统自动混音依赖干净音轨数据但获取困难，导致模型效果不足，需探索新数据源和方法
AI.method: 提出新型数据预处理方法和听觉测试方案，利用湿声多轨数据训练监督学习模型
AI.result: 通过专业工程师参与的主观测试验证了方法有效性，混音质量显著提升
AI.conclusion: 域外数据结合深度学习可有效突破自动混音技术瓶颈，为该领域提供新研究方向

title: Self-Supervised Endoscopic Image Key-Points Matching
title_zh: 自监督内窥镜图像关键点匹配
abstract: Feature matching and finding correspondences between endoscopic images is a key step in many clinical applications such as patient follow-up and generation of panoramic image from clinical sequences for fast anomalies localization. Nonetheless, due to the high texture variability present in endoscopic images, the development of robust and accurate feature matching becomes a challenging task. Recently, deep learning techniques which deliver learned features extracted via convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have gained traction in a wide range of computer vision tasks. However, they all follow a supervised learning scheme where a large amount of annotated data is required to reach good performances, which is generally not always available for medical data databases. To overcome this limitation related to labeled data scarcity, the self-supervised learning paradigm has recently shown great success in a number of applications. This paper proposes a novel self-supervised approach for endoscopic image matching based on deep learning techniques. When compared to standard hand-crafted local feature descriptors, our method outperformed them in terms of precision and recall. Furthermore, our self-supervised descriptor provides a competitive performance in comparison to a selection of state-of-the-art deep learning based supervised methods in terms of precision and matching score.
summary: Feature matching and finding correspondences between endoscopic images is a key step in many clinical applications such as patient follow-up and generation of panoramic image from clinical sequences for fast anomalies localization. Nonetheless, due to the high texture variability present in endoscopic images, the development of robust and accurate feature matching becomes a challenging task. Recently, deep learning techniques which deliver learned features extracted via convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have gained traction in a wide range of computer vision tasks. However, they all follow a supervised learning scheme where a large amount of annotated data is required to reach good performances, which is generally not always available for medical data databases. To overcome this limitation related to labeled data scarcity, the self-supervised learning paradigm has recently shown great success in a number of applications. This paper proposes a novel self-supervised approach for endoscopic image matching based on deep learning techniques. When compared to standard hand-crafted local feature descriptors, our method outperformed them in terms of precision and recall. Furthermore, our self-supervised descriptor provides a competitive performance in comparison to a selection of state-of-the-art deep learning based supervised methods in terms of precision and matching score.
abstract_zh: 特征匹配和查找内窥镜图像之间的对应关系是许多临床应用中的关键步骤，例如患者随访和从临床序列生成全景图像以进行快速异常定位。尽管如此，由于内窥镜图像中存在高纹理变异性，开发鲁棒且准确的特征匹配成为一项具有挑战性的任务。最近，提供通过卷积神经网络（CNN）提取的学习特征的深度学习技术在广泛的计算机视觉任务中获得了关注。然而，它们都遵循监督学习方案，需要大量带注释的数据才能达到良好的性能，而这通常并不总是可用于医疗数据数据库。为了克服与标记数据稀缺相关的限制，自监督学习范式最近在许多应用中取得了巨大成功。本文提出了一种基于深度学习技术的内窥镜图像匹配的新型自监督方法。与标准手工制作的局部特征描述符相比，我们的方法在精度和召回率方面优于它们。此外，与一系列最先进的基于深度学习的监督方法相比，我们的自监督描述符在精度和匹配分数方面提供了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的深度学习方法，用于内窥镜图像关键点匹配。
AI.motivation: 内窥镜图像因纹理变化大，传统手工特征描述子匹配效果有限，而监督学习方法依赖大量标注数据，医疗数据中常缺乏此类标注。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习框架，通过深度卷积神经网络（CNN）学习内窥镜图像的特征表示，无需人工标注数据。
AI.result: 在精度和召回率上优于传统手工特征描述子，并在匹配得分上与先进监督学习方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习有效解决了医疗图像标注数据稀缺的问题，为内窥镜图像匹配提供了鲁棒且高效的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的深度学习方法，用于内窥镜图像关键点匹配。
ai_content.motivation: 内窥镜图像因纹理变化大，传统手工特征描述子匹配效果有限，而监督学习方法依赖大量标注数据，医疗数据中常缺乏此类标注。
ai_content.method: 采用自监督学习框架，通过深度卷积神经网络（CNN）学习内窥镜图像的特征表示，无需人工标注数据。
ai_content.result: 在精度和召回率上优于传统手工特征描述子，并在匹配得分上与先进监督学习方法具有竞争力。
ai_content.conclusion: 自监督学习有效解决了医疗图像标注数据稀缺的问题，为内窥镜图像匹配提供了鲁棒且高效的解决方案。

search_text: Self-Supervised Endoscopic Image Key-Points Matching 自监督内窥镜图像关键点匹配 Feature matching and finding correspondences between endoscopic images is a key step in many clinical applications such as patient follow-up and generation of panoramic image from clinical sequences for fast anomalies localization. Nonetheless, due to the high texture variability present in endoscopic images, the development of robust and accurate feature matching becomes a challenging task. Recently, deep learning techniques which deliver learned features extracted via convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have gained traction in a wide range of computer vision tasks. However, they all follow a supervised learning scheme where a large amount of annotated data is required to reach good performances, which is generally not always available for medical data databases. To overcome this limitation related to labeled data scarcity, the self-supervised learning paradigm has recently shown great success in a number of applications. This paper proposes a novel self-supervised approach for endoscopic image matching based on deep learning techniques. When compared to standard hand-crafted local feature descriptors, our method outperformed them in terms of precision and recall. Furthermore, our self-supervised descriptor provides a competitive performance in comparison to a selection of state-of-the-art deep learning based supervised methods in terms of precision and matching score. 特征匹配和查找内窥镜图像之间的对应关系是许多临床应用中的关键步骤，例如患者随访和从临床序列生成全景图像以进行快速异常定位。尽管如此，由于内窥镜图像中存在高纹理变异性，开发鲁棒且准确的特征匹配成为一项具有挑战性的任务。最近，提供通过卷积神经网络（CNN）提取的学习特征的深度学习技术在广泛的计算机视觉任务中获得了关注。然而，它们都遵循监督学习方案，需要大量带注释的数据才能达到良好的性能，而这通常并不总是可用于医疗数据数据库。为了克服与标记数据稀缺相关的限制，自监督学习范式最近在许多应用中取得了巨大成功。本文提出了一种基于深度学习技术的内窥镜图像匹配的新型自监督方法。与标准手工制作的局部特征描述符相比，我们的方法在精度和召回率方面优于它们。此外，与一系列最先进的基于深度学习的监督方法相比，我们的自监督描述符在精度和匹配分数方面提供了具有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的深度学习方法，用于内窥镜图像关键点匹配。 Manel Farhat,Houda Chaabouni-Chouayakh,Achraf Ben-Hamadou cs.CV

title: st-Orientations with Few Transitive Edges
title_zh: 具有很少传递边的 st 方向
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: The problem of orienting the edges of an undirected graph such that the resulting digraph is acyclic and has a single source s and a single sink t has a long tradition in graph theory and is central to many graph drawing algorithms. Such an orientation is called an st-orientation. We address the problem of computing st-orientations of undirected graphs with the minimum number of transitive edges. We prove that the problem is NP-hard in the general case. For planar graphs we describe an ILP model that is fast in practice. We experimentally show that optimum solutions dramatically reduce the number of transitive edges with respect to unconstrained st-orientations computed via classical st-numbering algorithms. Moreover, focusing on popular graph drawing algorithms that apply an st-orientation as a preliminary step, we show that reducing the number of transitive edges leads to drawings that are much more compact.
summary: The problem of orienting the edges of an undirected graph such that the resulting digraph is acyclic and has a single source s and a single sink t has a long tradition in graph theory and is central to many graph drawing algorithms. Such an orientation is called an st-orientation. We address the problem of computing st-orientations of undirected graphs with the minimum number of transitive edges. We prove that the problem is NP-hard in the general case. For planar graphs we describe an ILP model that is fast in practice. We experimentally show that optimum solutions dramatically reduce the number of transitive edges with respect to unconstrained st-orientations computed via classical st-numbering algorithms. Moreover, focusing on popular graph drawing algorithms that apply an st-orientation as a preliminary step, we show that reducing the number of transitive edges leads to drawings that are much more compact.
abstract_zh: 定向无向图的边以使生成的有向图是非循环的并且具有单个源 s 和单个接收器 t 的问题在图论中具有悠久的传统，并且是许多图绘制算法的核心。这种取向称为st取向。我们解决了用最少数量的传递边计算无向图的 st 方向的问题。我们证明该问题在一般情况下是NP困难的。对于平面图，我们描述了一种在实践中速度很快的 ILP 模型。我们通过实验表明，对于通过经典 st 编号算法计算的无约束 st 方向，最佳解决方案极大地减少了传递边的数量。此外，重点关注应用 st 方向作为初步步骤的流行图形绘制算法，我们表明减少传递边的数量可以使图形更加紧凑。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何为无向图生成具有最少传递边的st-定向，以优化图绘制算法的效果。
AI.motivation: st-定向在图论和图绘制算法中至关重要，但传统方法生成的定向包含较多传递边，影响绘制效果。本文旨在通过减少传递边数量提升图绘制的紧凑性。
AI.method: 证明问题在一般情况下为NP难，针对平面图提出高效的整数线性规划模型，并与经典st编号算法进行实验对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著减少传递边数量，相较于传统方法生成的定向，能大幅优化图绘制的紧凑性。
AI.conclusion: 针对平面图的ILP模型能有效求解最优st-定向，减少传递边数量，从而提升图绘制质量，但一般情况下问题计算复杂度较高。

authors_text: Jacqueline Wastensteiner,Tobias M. Weiss,Felix Haag,Konstantin Hopf
title: Explainable AI for tailored electricity consumption feedback -- an experimental evaluation of visualizations
title_zh: 用于定制用电反馈的可解释人工智能——可视化的实验评估
abstract: Machine learning (ML) methods can effectively analyse data, recognize patterns in them, and make high-quality predictions. Good predictions usually come along with "black-box" models that are unable to present the detected patterns in a human-readable way. Technical developments recently led to eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques that aim to open such black-boxes and enable humans to gain new insights from detected patterns. We investigated the application of XAI in an area where specific insights can have a significant effect on consumer behaviour, namely electricity use. Knowing that specific feedback on individuals' electricity consumption triggers resource conservation, we created five visualizations with ML and XAI methods from electricity consumption time series for highly personalized feedback, considering existing domain-specific design knowledge. Our experimental evaluation with 152 participants showed that humans can assimilate the pattern displayed by XAI visualizations, but such visualizations should follow known visualization patterns to be well-understood by users.
summary: Machine learning (ML) methods can effectively analyse data, recognize patterns in them, and make high-quality predictions. Good predictions usually come along with "black-box" models that are unable to present the detected patterns in a human-readable way. Technical developments recently led to eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques that aim to open such black-boxes and enable humans to gain new insights from detected patterns. We investigated the application of XAI in an area where specific insights can have a significant effect on consumer behaviour, namely electricity use. Knowing that specific feedback on individuals' electricity consumption triggers resource conservation, we created five visualizations with ML and XAI methods from electricity consumption time series for highly personalized feedback, considering existing domain-specific design knowledge. Our experimental evaluation with 152 participants showed that humans can assimilate the pattern displayed by XAI visualizations, but such visualizations should follow known visualization patterns to be well-understood by users.
abstract_zh: 机器学习（ML）方法可以有效地分析数据、识别其中的模式并做出高质量的预测。好的预测通常伴随着“黑盒”模型，这些模型无法以人类可读的方式呈现检测到的模式。最近的技术发展催生了可解释人工智能（XAI）技术，旨在打开此类黑匣子，使人类能够从检测到的模式中获得新的见解。我们调查了 XAI 在特定见解可对消费者行为产生重大影响的领域（即电力使用）的应用。我们知道对个人用电量的具体反馈会触发资源节约，因此考虑到现有的特定领域设计知识，我们使用 ML 和 XAI 方法从用电量时间序列中创建了五种可视化，以实现高度个性化的反馈。我们对 152 名参与者进行的实验评估表明，人类可以吸收 XAI 可视化显示的模式，但此类可视化应遵循已知的可视化模式，以便用户能够很好地理解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验评估了可解释人工智能（XAI）在电力消费反馈中的应用，探索可视化方法对用户行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型难以解释，而XAI能提供可理解的洞察。电力消费反馈若能结合XAI可视化，可能有效促进资源节约行为。
AI.method: 基于电力时间序列数据，采用ML和XAI技术设计五种可视化方案，结合领域设计知识，并通过152名参与者的实验验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明用户能理解XAI可视化呈现的模式，但需遵循已知的可视化设计规范才能被有效理解。
AI.conclusion: XAI可视化在电力消费反馈中具有潜力，但需遵循用户认知习惯的可视化设计原则以提升效果。

authors_text: Johanna Frischauf,Martin Pfurner,Daniel F. Scharler,Hans-Peter Schröcker
title: A Multi-Bennett 8R Mechanism Obtained From Factorization of Bivariate Motion Polynomials
title_zh: 双变量运动多项式分解得到的多Bennett 8R机构
abstract: We present a closed-loop 8R mechanism with two degrees of freedom whose motion exhibits curious properties. In any point of a two-dimensional component of its configuration variety it is possible to fix every second joint while retaining one degree of freedom. This shows that the even and the odd axes, respectively, always form a Bennett mechanism. In this mechanism, opposite distances and angles are equal and all offsets are zero. The 8R mechanism has four "totally aligned" configurations in which the common normals of any pair of consecutive axes coincide.
summary: We present a closed-loop 8R mechanism with two degrees of freedom whose motion exhibits curious properties. In any point of a two-dimensional component of its configuration variety it is possible to fix every second joint while retaining one degree of freedom. This shows that the even and the odd axes, respectively, always form a Bennett mechanism. In this mechanism, opposite distances and angles are equal and all offsets are zero. The 8R mechanism has four "totally aligned" configurations in which the common normals of any pair of consecutive axes coincide.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种具有两个自由度的闭环 8R 机构，其运动表现出奇怪的特性。在其配置变化的二维组件的任何点上，可以固定每隔一个关节，同时保留一个自由度。这表明偶数轴和奇数轴分别始终形成贝内特机构。在该机制中，相对的距离和角度相等并且所有偏移量为零。 8R 机构具有四种“完全对齐”配置，其中任何一对连续轴的公共法线都重合。

AI.tldr: 本文通过双变量运动多项式分解构建了一种具有特殊运动特性的闭环8R机构，并分析其几何与运动学特性。
AI.motivation: 设计具有特定运动自由度和对称特性的复杂机械结构，探索Bennett机构在多自由度系统中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 利用双变量运动多项式的因式分解方法，结合代数几何与运动学分析，构造并验证8R机构的配置特性。
AI.result: 发现该8R机构在特定配置下可分解为两个Bennett机制，具有对称的几何参数和四种完全对齐的特殊构型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新机制展示了复杂机构设计的可能性，为多自由度机械系统的运动学分析提供了新方法。
