search_text: A Multi-Bennett 8R Mechanism Obtained From Factorization of Bivariate Motion Polynomials 双变量运动多项式分解得到的多Bennett 8R机构 We present a closed-loop 8R mechanism with two degrees of freedom whose motion exhibits curious properties. In any point of a two-dimensional component of its configuration variety it is possible to fix every second joint while retaining one degree of freedom. This shows that the even and the odd axes, respectively, always form a Bennett mechanism. In this mechanism, opposite distances and angles are equal and all offsets are zero. The 8R mechanism has four "totally aligned" configurations in which the common normals of any pair of consecutive axes coincide. 我们提出了一种具有两个自由度的闭环 8R 机构，其运动表现出奇怪的特性。在其配置变化的二维组件的任何点上，可以固定每隔一个关节，同时保留一个自由度。这表明偶数轴和奇数轴分别始终形成贝内特机构。在该机制中，相对的距离和角度相等并且所有偏移量为零。 8R 机构具有四种“完全对齐”配置，其中任何一对连续轴的公共法线都重合。 本文通过双变量运动多项式分解构建了一种具有特殊运动特性的闭环8R机构，并分析其几何与运动学特性。 Johanna Frischauf,Martin Pfurner,Daniel F. Scharler,Hans-Peter Schröcker cs.RO,math.RA

authors_text: Ángel Martín,Daniel Mejías,Zaloa Fernández,Roberto Viola,Josu Pérez,Mikel García,Gorka Velez,Jon Montalbán,Pablo Angueira
title: Adaptive QoS of WebRTC for Vehicular Media Communications
title_zh: 用于车辆媒体通信的 WebRTC 自适应 QoS
comment: ef:2022 IEEE International Symposium on Broadband Multimedia Systems and Broadcasting (BMSB), 2022, pp. 1-6
comments: ef:2022 IEEE International Symposium on Broadband Multimedia Systems and Broadcasting (BMSB), 2022, pp. 1-6
abstract: Vehicles shipping sensors for onboard systems are gaining connectivity. This enables information sharing to realize a more comprehensive understanding of the environment. However, peer communication through public cellular networks brings multiple networking hurdles to address, needing in-network systems to relay communications and connect parties that cannot connect directly. Web Real-Time Communication (WebRTC) is a good candidate for media streaming across vehicles as it enables low latency communications, while bringing standard protocols to security handshake, discovering public IPs and transverse Network Address Translation (NAT) systems. However, the end-to-end Quality of Service (QoS) adaptation in an infrastructure where transmission and reception are decoupled by a relay, needs a mechanism to adapt the video stream to the network capacity efficiently. To this end, this paper investigates a mechanism to apply changes on resolution, framerate and bitrate by exploiting the Real Time Transport Control Protocol (RTCP) metrics, such as bandwidth and round-trip time. The solution aims to ensure that the receiving onboard system gets relevant information in time. The impact on end-to-end throughput efficiency and reaction time when applying different approaches to QoS adaptation are analyzed in a real 5G testbed.
summary: Vehicles shipping sensors for onboard systems are gaining connectivity. This enables information sharing to realize a more comprehensive understanding of the environment. However, peer communication through public cellular networks brings multiple networking hurdles to address, needing in-network systems to relay communications and connect parties that cannot connect directly. Web Real-Time Communication (WebRTC) is a good candidate for media streaming across vehicles as it enables low latency communications, while bringing standard protocols to security handshake, discovering public IPs and transverse Network Address Translation (NAT) systems. However, the end-to-end Quality of Service (QoS) adaptation in an infrastructure where transmission and reception are decoupled by a relay, needs a mechanism to adapt the video stream to the network capacity efficiently. To this end, this paper investigates a mechanism to apply changes on resolution, framerate and bitrate by exploiting the Real Time Transport Control Protocol (RTCP) metrics, such as bandwidth and round-trip time. The solution aims to ensure that the receiving onboard system gets relevant information in time. The impact on end-to-end throughput efficiency and reaction time when applying different approaches to QoS adaptation are analyzed in a real 5G testbed.
abstract_zh: 用于车载系统的车辆运输传感器正在获得连接性。这使得信息共享能够实现对环境的更全面的了解。然而，通过公共蜂窝网络进行的对等通信带来了多个需要解决的网络障碍，需要网络内系统来中继通信并连接无法直接连接的各方。网络实时通信 (WebRTC) 是跨车辆媒体流的良好候选者，因为它支持低延迟通信，同时将标准协议引入安全握手、发现公共 IP 和横向网络地址转换 (NAT) 系统。然而，传输和接收通过中继解耦的基础设施中的端到端服务质量（QoS）自适应需要一种机制来使视频流有效地适应网络容量。为此，本文研究了一种通过利用实时传输控制协议（RTCP）指标（例如带宽和往返时间）来应用分辨率、帧速率和比特率变化的机制。该解决方案旨在确保接收机载系统及时获取相关信息。在真实的 5G 测试台中分析了应用不同方法进行 QoS 自适应时对端到端吞吐量效率和反应时间的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于RTCP指标的WebRTC服务质量（QoS）自适应机制，用于解决车联网中通过中继节点传输媒体流时的网络容量适配问题。
AI.motivation: 车联网中车辆通过公共蜂窝网络进行对等通信时，需克服中继传输和NAT穿透等网络障碍，而WebRTC虽具备低延迟特性，但需有效适配网络容量以确保关键信息及时送达。
AI.method: 利用RTCP协议中的带宽和往返时延等指标，动态调整视频流的分辨率、帧率和比特率，并在实际5G测试环境中验证不同QoS适应方法的吞吐量效率与响应时间影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于RTCP指标的自适应机制能够有效提升端到端吞吐效率，缩短反应时间，确保车载系统及时接收关键环境信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为车联网中的WebRTC媒体通信提供了高效的QoS适应方案，可保障异构网络环境下实时信息传输的可靠性与时效性。

authors_text: Felix Haag,Konstantin Hopf,Pedro Menelau Vasconcelos,Thorsten Staake
title: Augmented cross-selling through explainable AI -- a case from energy retailing
title_zh: 通过可解释的人工智能增强交叉销售——能源零售案例
abstract: The advance of Machine Learning (ML) has led to a strong interest in this technology to support decision making. While complex ML models provide predictions that are often more accurate than those of traditional tools, such models often hide the reasoning behind the prediction from their users, which can lead to lower adoption and lack of insight. Motivated by this tension, research has put forth Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques that uncover patterns discovered by ML. Despite the high hopes in both ML and XAI, there is little empirical evidence of the benefits to traditional businesses. To this end, we analyze data on 220,185 customers of an energy retailer, predict cross-purchases with up to 86% correctness (AUC), and show that the XAI method SHAP provides explanations that hold for actual buyers. We further outline implications for research in information systems, XAI, and relationship marketing.
summary: The advance of Machine Learning (ML) has led to a strong interest in this technology to support decision making. While complex ML models provide predictions that are often more accurate than those of traditional tools, such models often hide the reasoning behind the prediction from their users, which can lead to lower adoption and lack of insight. Motivated by this tension, research has put forth Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques that uncover patterns discovered by ML. Despite the high hopes in both ML and XAI, there is little empirical evidence of the benefits to traditional businesses. To this end, we analyze data on 220,185 customers of an energy retailer, predict cross-purchases with up to 86% correctness (AUC), and show that the XAI method SHAP provides explanations that hold for actual buyers. We further outline implications for research in information systems, XAI, and relationship marketing.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 的进步引发了人们对这项支持决策的技术的浓厚兴趣。虽然复杂的机器学习模型提供的预测通常比传统工具更准确，但此类模型通常向用户隐藏预测背后的推理，这可能导致采用率较低和缺乏洞察力。受这种张力的推动，研究提出了可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 技术，可以揭示 ML 发现的模式。尽管人们对 ML 和 XAI 寄予厚望，但几乎没有经验证据表明这会给传统企业带来好处。为此，我们分析了一家能源零售商 220,185 名客户的数据，以高达 86% 的正确率 (AUC) 预测交叉购买，并表明 XAI 方法 SHAP 提供了适用于实际买家的解释。我们进一步概述了对信息系统、XAI 和关系营销研究的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文通过可解释人工智能（XAI）技术提升能源零售领域的交叉销售效果，利用SHAP方法解释机器学习模型预测结果。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型预测准确但缺乏透明度，导致用户采纳率低；XAI技术可揭示模型逻辑，但其对传统企业的实际效益缺乏实证研究。
AI.method: 基于220,185名能源客户数据，采用机器学习预测交叉购买行为（AUC达86%），并运用SHAP方法验证解释结果与实际买家行为的一致性。
AI.result: SHAP解释有效反映真实买家特征，验证了XAI在提升交叉销售决策中的可行性，并为信息系统、XAI及关系营销研究提供理论启示。
AI.conclusion: 可解释AI能增强企业决策透明度，推动交叉销售策略优化，未来需进一步探索XAI在商业场景中的应用边界与机制。

search_text: Augmented cross-selling through explainable AI -- a case from energy retailing 通过可解释的人工智能增强交叉销售——能源零售案例 The advance of Machine Learning (ML) has led to a strong interest in this technology to support decision making. While complex ML models provide predictions that are often more accurate than those of traditional tools, such models often hide the reasoning behind the prediction from their users, which can lead to lower adoption and lack of insight. Motivated by this tension, research has put forth Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques that uncover patterns discovered by ML. Despite the high hopes in both ML and XAI, there is little empirical evidence of the benefits to traditional businesses. To this end, we analyze data on 220,185 customers of an energy retailer, predict cross-purchases with up to 86% correctness (AUC), and show that the XAI method SHAP provides explanations that hold for actual buyers. We further outline implications for research in information systems, XAI, and relationship marketing. 机器学习 (ML) 的进步引发了人们对这项支持决策的技术的浓厚兴趣。虽然复杂的机器学习模型提供的预测通常比传统工具更准确，但此类模型通常向用户隐藏预测背后的推理，这可能导致采用率较低和缺乏洞察力。受这种张力的推动，研究提出了可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 技术，可以揭示 ML 发现的模式。尽管人们对 ML 和 XAI 寄予厚望，但几乎没有经验证据表明这会给传统企业带来好处。为此，我们分析了一家能源零售商 220,185 名客户的数据，以高达 86% 的正确率 (AUC) 预测交叉购买，并表明 XAI 方法 SHAP 提供了适用于实际买家的解释。我们进一步概述了对信息系统、XAI 和关系营销研究的影响。 本文通过可解释人工智能（XAI）技术提升能源零售领域的交叉销售效果，利用SHAP方法解释机器学习模型预测结果。 Felix Haag,Konstantin Hopf,Pedro Menelau Vasconcelos,Thorsten Staake cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.HC

title: Improved Zero-Shot Audio Tagging & Classification with Patchout Spectrogram Transformers
title_zh: 使用修补频谱图变压器改进零样本音频标记和分类
abstract: Standard machine learning models for tagging and classifying acoustic signals cannot handle classes that were not seen during training. Zero-Shot (ZS) learning overcomes this restriction by predicting classes based on adaptable class descriptions. This study sets out to investigate the effectiveness of self-attention-based audio embedding architectures for ZS learning. To this end, we compare the very recent patchout spectrogram transformer with two classic convolutional architectures. We evaluate these three architectures on three tasks and on three different benchmark datasets: general-purpose tagging on AudioSet, environmental sound classification on ESC-50, and instrument tagging on OpenMIC. Our results show that the self-attention-based embedding methods outperform both compared convolutional architectures in all of these settings. By designing training and test data accordingly, we observe that prediction performance suffers significantly when the `semantic distance' between training and new test classes is large, an effect that will deserve more detailed investigations.
summary: Standard machine learning models for tagging and classifying acoustic signals cannot handle classes that were not seen during training. Zero-Shot (ZS) learning overcomes this restriction by predicting classes based on adaptable class descriptions. This study sets out to investigate the effectiveness of self-attention-based audio embedding architectures for ZS learning. To this end, we compare the very recent patchout spectrogram transformer with two classic convolutional architectures. We evaluate these three architectures on three tasks and on three different benchmark datasets: general-purpose tagging on AudioSet, environmental sound classification on ESC-50, and instrument tagging on OpenMIC. Our results show that the self-attention-based embedding methods outperform both compared convolutional architectures in all of these settings. By designing training and test data accordingly, we observe that prediction performance suffers significantly when the `semantic distance' between training and new test classes is large, an effect that will deserve more detailed investigations.
abstract_zh: 用于标记和分类声音信号的标准机器学习模型无法处理训练期间未看到的类别。零样本（ZS）学习通过基于适应性类描述来预测类，从而克服了这一限制。本研究旨在研究基于自注意力的音频嵌入架构对于 ZS 学习的有效性。为此，我们将最近的补丁频谱图变换器与两种经典的卷积架构进行比较。我们在三个任务和三个不同的基准数据集上评估这三种架构：AudioSet 上的通用标记、ESC-50 上的环境声音分类以及 OpenMIC 上的乐器标记。我们的结果表明，在所有这些设置中，基于自注意力的嵌入方法都优于比较的卷积架构。通过相应地设计训练和测试数据，我们观察到，当训练类和新测试类之间的“语义距离”很大时，预测性能会受到显着影响，这种影响值得更详细的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于自注意力机制的音频嵌入架构在零样本学习中的有效性，通过比较patchout spectrogram transformer与两种经典卷积架构在多个数据集上的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统音频分类模型无法处理训练时未见过的类别，零样本学习通过可适应的类别描述解决此问题，但需验证自注意力架构在此场景下的有效性。
AI.method: 将最新的patchout spectrogram transformer与两种经典卷积架构对比，评估其在AudioSet、ESC-50和OpenMIC三个数据集上的零样本标签和分类任务表现。
AI.result: 自注意力嵌入方法在所有任务中均优于卷积架构，但当训练与测试类别的语义距离较大时，预测性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 自注意力模型在零样本音频任务中表现更优，但需进一步研究语义距离对性能影响的机制。

title: Radial Basis Function Networks for Convolutional Neural Networks to Learn Similarity Distance Metric and Improve Interpretability
title_zh: 用于卷积神经网络的径向基函数网络，用于学习相似性距离度量并提高可解释性
abstract: Radial basis function neural networks (RBFs) are prime candidates for pattern classification and regression and have been used extensively in classical machine learning applications. However, RBFs have not been integrated into contemporary deep learning research and computer vision using conventional convolutional neural networks (CNNs) due to their lack of adaptability with modern architectures. In this paper, we adapt RBF networks as a classifier on top of CNNs by modifying the training process and introducing a new activation function to train modern vision architectures end-to-end for image classification. The specific architecture of RBFs enables the learning of a similarity distance metric to compare and find similar and dissimilar images. Furthermore, we demonstrate that using an RBF classifier on top of any CNN architecture provides new human-interpretable insights about the decision-making process of the models. Finally, we successfully apply RBFs to a range of CNN architectures and evaluate the results on benchmark computer vision datasets.
summary: Radial basis function neural networks (RBFs) are prime candidates for pattern classification and regression and have been used extensively in classical machine learning applications. However, RBFs have not been integrated into contemporary deep learning research and computer vision using conventional convolutional neural networks (CNNs) due to their lack of adaptability with modern architectures. In this paper, we adapt RBF networks as a classifier on top of CNNs by modifying the training process and introducing a new activation function to train modern vision architectures end-to-end for image classification. The specific architecture of RBFs enables the learning of a similarity distance metric to compare and find similar and dissimilar images. Furthermore, we demonstrate that using an RBF classifier on top of any CNN architecture provides new human-interpretable insights about the decision-making process of the models. Finally, we successfully apply RBFs to a range of CNN architectures and evaluate the results on benchmark computer vision datasets.
abstract_zh: 径向基函数神经网络 (RBF) 是模式分类和回归的主要候选者，并已广泛用于经典机器学习应用中。然而，由于缺乏对现代架构的适应性，RBF 尚未被集成到使用传统卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的当代深度学习研究和计算机视觉中。在本文中，我们通过修改训练过程并引入新的激活函数来采用 RBF 网络作为 CNN 之上的分类器来端到端地训练现代视觉架构以进行图像分类。 RBF 的特定架构使得能够学习相似性距离度量来比较和查找相似和不相似的图像。此外，我们证明，在任何 CNN 架构之上使用 RBF 分类器可以提供有关模型决策过程的新的人类可解释的见解。最后，我们成功地将 RBF 应用于一系列 CNN 架构，并在基准计算机视觉数据集上评估结果。

AI.tldr: 将径向基函数网络（RBF）与卷积神经网络（CNN）结合，用于学习相似性距离度量并提升模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: RBF网络在传统机器学习中表现优异，但未被整合到现代深度学习与计算机视觉领域，因其与当代CNN架构的适应性不足。
AI.method: 修改RBF网络的训练流程并引入新激活函数，将其作为CNN分类器的顶层，实现端到端训练以学习图像相似性度量。
AI.result: 成功应用于多种CNN架构，在基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，并提供了模型决策过程的可解释性洞察。
AI.conclusion: RBF与CNN的结合不仅提升了模型性能，还通过相似性度量增强了深度学习模型的可解释性。

authors_text: Patricia Vitoria,Stamatios Georgoulis,Stepan Tulyakov,Alfredo Bochicchio,Julius Erbach,Yuanyou Li
title: Event-based Image Deblurring with Dynamic Motion Awareness
title_zh: 具有动态运动感知的基于事件的图像去模糊
abstract: Non-uniform image deblurring is a challenging task due to the lack of temporal and textural information in the blurry image itself. Complementary information from auxiliary sensors such event sensors are being explored to address these limitations. The latter can record changes in a logarithmic intensity asynchronously, called events, with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range. Current event-based deblurring methods combine the blurry image with events to jointly estimate per-pixel motion and the deblur operator. In this paper, we argue that a divide-and-conquer approach is more suitable for this task. To this end, we propose to use modulated deformable convolutions, whose kernel offsets and modulation masks are dynamically estimated from events to encode the motion in the scene, while the deblur operator is learned from the combination of blurry image and corresponding events. Furthermore, we employ a coarse-to-fine multi-scale reconstruction approach to cope with the inherent sparsity of events in low contrast regions. Importantly, we introduce the first dataset containing pairs of real RGB blur images and related events during the exposure time. Our results show better overall robustness when using events, with improvements in PSNR by up to 1.57dB on synthetic data and 1.08 dB on real event data.
summary: Non-uniform image deblurring is a challenging task due to the lack of temporal and textural information in the blurry image itself. Complementary information from auxiliary sensors such event sensors are being explored to address these limitations. The latter can record changes in a logarithmic intensity asynchronously, called events, with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range. Current event-based deblurring methods combine the blurry image with events to jointly estimate per-pixel motion and the deblur operator. In this paper, we argue that a divide-and-conquer approach is more suitable for this task. To this end, we propose to use modulated deformable convolutions, whose kernel offsets and modulation masks are dynamically estimated from events to encode the motion in the scene, while the deblur operator is learned from the combination of blurry image and corresponding events. Furthermore, we employ a coarse-to-fine multi-scale reconstruction approach to cope with the inherent sparsity of events in low contrast regions. Importantly, we introduce the first dataset containing pairs of real RGB blur images and related events during the exposure time. Our results show better overall robustness when using events, with improvements in PSNR by up to 1.57dB on synthetic data and 1.08 dB on real event data.
abstract_zh: 由于模糊图像本身缺乏时间和纹理信息，非均匀图像去模糊是一项具有挑战性的任务。正在探索来自辅助传感器（例如事件传感器）的补充信息来解决这些限制。后者可以异步记录对数强度的变化，称为事件，具有高时间分辨率和高动态范围。当前基于事件的去模糊方法将模糊图像与事件结合起来，共同估计每像素运动和去模糊算子。在本文中，我们认为分而治之的方法更适合这项任务。为此，我们建议使用调制可变形卷积，其内核偏移和调制掩模是根据事件动态估计的，以对场景中的运动进行编码，而去模糊算子是从模糊图像和相应事件的组合中学习的。此外，我们采用从粗到细的多尺度重建方法来应对低对比度区域中事件固有的稀疏性。重要的是，我们引入了第一个数据集，其中包含曝光期间的真实 RGB 模糊图像对和相关事件。我们的结果显示，使用事件时整体鲁棒性更好，合成数据的 PSNR 提高了 1.57dB，真实事件数据的 PSNR 提高了 1.08dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件传感器的动态运动感知图像去模糊方法，通过分离运动估计与去模糊操作提升非均匀模糊图像的恢复效果。
AI.motivation: 传统图像去模糊方法因缺乏时间与纹理信息效果受限，现有事件融合方法联合估计运动与去模糊参数存在耦合性缺陷，需探索更高效的处理范式。
AI.method: 设计调制变形卷积网络，利用事件流动态生成核偏移与调制掩码编码运动信息，分离估计去模糊算子；采用多尺度重建策略应对低对比度区域事件稀疏问题，并构建首个真实RGB模糊图像-事件配对数据集。
AI.result: 在合成数据上PSNR提升1.57dB，在真实事件数据上提升1.08dB，验证了事件信息有效性与方法鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段处理框架优于联合估计方法，事件驱动的动态运动建模显著提升去模糊性能，新数据集为后续研究提供重要基准。

search_text: Event-based Image Deblurring with Dynamic Motion Awareness 具有动态运动感知的基于事件的图像去模糊 Non-uniform image deblurring is a challenging task due to the lack of temporal and textural information in the blurry image itself. Complementary information from auxiliary sensors such event sensors are being explored to address these limitations. The latter can record changes in a logarithmic intensity asynchronously, called events, with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range. Current event-based deblurring methods combine the blurry image with events to jointly estimate per-pixel motion and the deblur operator. In this paper, we argue that a divide-and-conquer approach is more suitable for this task. To this end, we propose to use modulated deformable convolutions, whose kernel offsets and modulation masks are dynamically estimated from events to encode the motion in the scene, while the deblur operator is learned from the combination of blurry image and corresponding events. Furthermore, we employ a coarse-to-fine multi-scale reconstruction approach to cope with the inherent sparsity of events in low contrast regions. Importantly, we introduce the first dataset containing pairs of real RGB blur images and related events during the exposure time. Our results show better overall robustness when using events, with improvements in PSNR by up to 1.57dB on synthetic data and 1.08 dB on real event data. 由于模糊图像本身缺乏时间和纹理信息，非均匀图像去模糊是一项具有挑战性的任务。正在探索来自辅助传感器（例如事件传感器）的补充信息来解决这些限制。后者可以异步记录对数强度的变化，称为事件，具有高时间分辨率和高动态范围。当前基于事件的去模糊方法将模糊图像与事件结合起来，共同估计每像素运动和去模糊算子。在本文中，我们认为分而治之的方法更适合这项任务。为此，我们建议使用调制可变形卷积，其内核偏移和调制掩模是根据事件动态估计的，以对场景中的运动进行编码，而去模糊算子是从模糊图像和相应事件的组合中学习的。此外，我们采用从粗到细的多尺度重建方法来应对低对比度区域中事件固有的稀疏性。重要的是，我们引入了第一个数据集，其中包含曝光期间的真实 RGB 模糊图像对和相关事件。我们的结果显示，使用事件时整体鲁棒性更好，合成数据的 PSNR 提高了 1.57dB，真实事件数据的 PSNR 提高了 1.08dB。 本文提出一种基于事件传感器的动态运动感知图像去模糊方法，通过分离运动估计与去模糊操作提升非均匀模糊图像的恢复效果。 Patricia Vitoria,Stamatios Georgoulis,Stepan Tulyakov,Alfredo Bochicchio,Julius Erbach,Yuanyou Li cs.CV

authors_text: Doris Antensteiner,Silvia Bucci,Arushi Goel,Marah Halawa,Niveditha Kalavakonda,Tejaswi Kasarla,Miaomiao Liu,Nermin Samet,Ivaxi Sheth
title: WiCV 2022: The Tenth Women In Computer Vision Workshop
title_zh: WiCV 2022：第十届女性计算机视觉研讨会
comment: Report on WiCV Workshop at CVPR 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.05825, arXiv:2101.03787
comments: Report on WiCV Workshop at CVPR 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.05825, arXiv:2101.03787
abstract: In this paper, we present the details of Women in Computer Vision Workshop - WiCV 2022, organized alongside the hybrid CVPR 2022 in New Orleans, Louisiana. It provides a voice to a minority (female) group in the computer vision community and focuses on increasing the visibility of these researchers, both in academia and industry. WiCV believes that such an event can play an important role in lowering the gender imbalance in the field of computer vision. WiCV is organized each year where it provides a) opportunity for collaboration between researchers from minority groups, b) mentorship to female junior researchers, c) financial support to presenters to overcome monetary burden and d) large and diverse choice of role models, who can serve as examples to younger researchers at the beginning of their careers. In this paper, we present a report on the workshop program, trends over the past years, a summary of statistics regarding presenters, attendees, and sponsorship for the WiCV 2022 workshop.
summary: In this paper, we present the details of Women in Computer Vision Workshop - WiCV 2022, organized alongside the hybrid CVPR 2022 in New Orleans, Louisiana. It provides a voice to a minority (female) group in the computer vision community and focuses on increasing the visibility of these researchers, both in academia and industry. WiCV believes that such an event can play an important role in lowering the gender imbalance in the field of computer vision. WiCV is organized each year where it provides a) opportunity for collaboration between researchers from minority groups, b) mentorship to female junior researchers, c) financial support to presenters to overcome monetary burden and d) large and diverse choice of role models, who can serve as examples to younger researchers at the beginning of their careers. In this paper, we present a report on the workshop program, trends over the past years, a summary of statistics regarding presenters, attendees, and sponsorship for the WiCV 2022 workshop.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了女性计算机视觉研讨会 - WiCV 2022 的详细信息，该研讨会与路易斯安那州新奥尔良的混合 CVPR 2022 一起组织。它为计算机视觉社区中的少数群体（女性）提供了发言权，并致力于提高这些研究人员在学术界和工业界的知名度。 WiCV相信这样的活动可以为降低计算机视觉领域的性别失衡发挥重要作用。 WiCV 每年组织一次，提供 a) 少数群体研究人员之间合作的机会，b) 对女性初级研究人员的指导，c) 为演讲者提供财政支持，以克服经济负担，以及 d) 大量和多样化的榜样选择，这些榜样可以为年轻研究人员在职业生涯的初期树立榜样。在本文中，我们提供了一份关于研讨会计划、过去几年趋势的报告，以及有关 WiCV 2022 研讨会的演讲者、与会者和赞助的统计数据摘要。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了与CVPR 2022同步举办的第十届女性计算机视觉研讨会(WiCV 2022)的组织细节、活动内容及统计数据，分析其对促进性别平衡的作用。
AI.motivation: 通过为女性研究者提供展示平台、合作机会及资源支持，缓解计算机视觉领域长期存在的性别失衡问题。
AI.method: 通过年度研讨会形式提供跨领域合作、导师指导、经济资助及多样化榜样示范等系统性支持措施。
AI.result: 呈现了2022年会议的具体方案、历年趋势分析及参会者/赞助方等关键统计数据。
AI.conclusion: WiCV通过多维支持机制有效提升了女性研究者的学术可见度，为减少计算机视觉领域性别差距提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Anand Louis,Meghana Nasre,Prajakta Nimbhorkar,Govind S. Sankar
title: Online Algorithms for Matchings with Proportional Fairness Constraints and Diversity Constraints
title_zh: 具有比例公平性约束和多样性约束的在线匹配算法
comment: 16 pages, Full version of a paper accepted in ECAI 2023
comments: 16 pages, Full version of a paper accepted in ECAI 2023
abstract: Matching problems with group-fairness constraints and diversity constraints have numerous applications such as in allocation problems, committee selection, school choice, etc. Moreover, online matching problems have lots of applications in ad allocations and other e-commerce problems like product recommendation in digital marketing. We study two problems involving assigning {\em items} to {\em platforms}, where items belong to various {\em groups} depending on their attributes; the set of items are available offline and the platforms arrive online. In the first problem, we study online matchings with {\em proportional fairness constraints}. Here, each platform on arrival should either be assigned a set of items in which the fraction of items from each group is within specified bounds or be assigned no items; the goal is to assign items to platforms in order to maximize the number of items assigned to platforms. In the second problem, we study online matchings with {\em diversity constraints}, i.e. for each platform, absolute lower bounds are specified for each group. Each platform on arrival should either be assigned a set of items that satisfy these bounds or be assigned no items; the goal is to maximize the set of platforms that get matched. We study approximation algorithms and hardness results for these problems. The technical core of our proofs is a new connection between these problems and the problem of matchings in hypergraphs. Our experimental evaluation shows the performance of our algorithms on real-world and synthetic datasets exceeds our theoretical guarantees.
summary: Matching problems with group-fairness constraints and diversity constraints have numerous applications such as in allocation problems, committee selection, school choice, etc. Moreover, online matching problems have lots of applications in ad allocations and other e-commerce problems like product recommendation in digital marketing. We study two problems involving assigning {\em items} to {\em platforms}, where items belong to various {\em groups} depending on their attributes; the set of items are available offline and the platforms arrive online. In the first problem, we study online matchings with {\em proportional fairness constraints}. Here, each platform on arrival should either be assigned a set of items in which the fraction of items from each group is within specified bounds or be assigned no items; the goal is to assign items to platforms in order to maximize the number of items assigned to platforms. In the second problem, we study online matchings with {\em diversity constraints}, i.e. for each platform, absolute lower bounds are specified for each group. Each platform on arrival should either be assigned a set of items that satisfy these bounds or be assigned no items; the goal is to maximize the set of platforms that get matched. We study approximation algorithms and hardness results for these problems. The technical core of our proofs is a new connection between these problems and the problem of matchings in hypergraphs. Our experimental evaluation shows the performance of our algorithms on real-world and synthetic datasets exceeds our theoretical guarantees.
abstract_zh: 具有群体公平约束和多样性约束的匹配问题有很多应用，例如分配问题、委员会选择、学校选择等。此外，在线匹配问题在广告分配和其他电子商务问题（例如数字营销中的产品推荐）中也有很多应用。我们研究了两个问题，涉及将{\em项目}分配到{\em平台}，其中项目根据其属性属于不同的{\em组}；该系列商品可离线购买，平台可在线购买。在第一个问题中，我们研究具有比例公平约束的在线匹配。在这里，每个到达的平台要么被分配一组物品，其中每组物品的比例在指定范围内，要么不分配任何物品；目标是将项目分配给平台，以最大化分配给平台的项目数量。在第二个问题中，我们研究具有多样性约束的在线匹配，即对于每个平台，为每个组指定绝对下限。每个到达的平台要么被分配一组满足这些界限的物品，要么不分配任何物品；目标是最大化匹配的平台集。我们研究这些问题的近似算法和硬度结果。我们证明的技术核心是这些问题与超图匹配问题之间的新联系。我们的实验评估表明，我们的算法在现实世界和合成数据集上的性能超出了我们的理论保证。

AI.tldr: 研究在线环境下满足比例公平性和多样性约束的匹配问题，设计相关算法以最大化匹配效率。
AI.motivation: 解决实际应用中资源分配的公平性与多样性需求，如广告分配、学校选择等场景下的在线匹配问题。
AI.method: 通过建立超图匹配问题的关联，提出近似算法并分析问题的理论硬度。
AI.result: 实验显示算法在真实和合成数据集上的表现超过理论保证，验证了算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 需在公平性与多样性约束间取得平衡，理论分析与实验验证对算法设计至关重要。

search_text: Online Algorithms for Matchings with Proportional Fairness Constraints and Diversity Constraints 具有比例公平性约束和多样性约束的在线匹配算法 Matching problems with group-fairness constraints and diversity constraints have numerous applications such as in allocation problems, committee selection, school choice, etc. Moreover, online matching problems have lots of applications in ad allocations and other e-commerce problems like product recommendation in digital marketing. We study two problems involving assigning {\em items} to {\em platforms}, where items belong to various {\em groups} depending on their attributes; the set of items are available offline and the platforms arrive online. In the first problem, we study online matchings with {\em proportional fairness constraints}. Here, each platform on arrival should either be assigned a set of items in which the fraction of items from each group is within specified bounds or be assigned no items; the goal is to assign items to platforms in order to maximize the number of items assigned to platforms. In the second problem, we study online matchings with {\em diversity constraints}, i.e. for each platform, absolute lower bounds are specified for each group. Each platform on arrival should either be assigned a set of items that satisfy these bounds or be assigned no items; the goal is to maximize the set of platforms that get matched. We study approximation algorithms and hardness results for these problems. The technical core of our proofs is a new connection between these problems and the problem of matchings in hypergraphs. Our experimental evaluation shows the performance of our algorithms on real-world and synthetic datasets exceeds our theoretical guarantees. 具有群体公平约束和多样性约束的匹配问题有很多应用，例如分配问题、委员会选择、学校选择等。此外，在线匹配问题在广告分配和其他电子商务问题（例如数字营销中的产品推荐）中也有很多应用。我们研究了两个问题，涉及将{\em项目}分配到{\em平台}，其中项目根据其属性属于不同的{\em组}；该系列商品可离线购买，平台可在线购买。在第一个问题中，我们研究具有比例公平约束的在线匹配。在这里，每个到达的平台要么被分配一组物品，其中每组物品的比例在指定范围内，要么不分配任何物品；目标是将项目分配给平台，以最大化分配给平台的项目数量。在第二个问题中，我们研究具有多样性约束的在线匹配，即对于每个平台，为每个组指定绝对下限。每个到达的平台要么被分配一组满足这些界限的物品，要么不分配任何物品；目标是最大化匹配的平台集。我们研究这些问题的近似算法和硬度结果。我们证明的技术核心是这些问题与超图匹配问题之间的新联系。我们的实验评估表明，我们的算法在现实世界和合成数据集上的性能超出了我们的理论保证。 研究在线环境下满足比例公平性和多样性约束的匹配问题，设计相关算法以最大化匹配效率。 Anand Louis,Meghana Nasre,Prajakta Nimbhorkar,Govind S. Sankar cs.DS

authors_text: Marcela Carvalho,Oussama Ennaffi,Sylvain Chateau,Samy Ait Bachir
title: On the Design of Privacy-Aware Cameras: a Study on Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 隐私感知相机的设计：深度神经网络的研究
comment: Accepted in ECCV 2022 International Workshop on Distributed Cameras
comments: Accepted in ECCV 2022 International Workshop on Distributed Cameras
abstract: In spite of the legal advances in personal data protection, the issue of private data being misused by unauthorized entities is still of utmost importance. To prevent this, Privacy by Design is often proposed as a solution for data protection. In this paper, the effect of camera distortions is studied using Deep Learning techniques commonly used to extract sensitive data. To do so, we simulate out-of-focus images corresponding to a realistic conventional camera with fixed focal length, aperture, and focus, as well as grayscale images coming from a monochrome camera. We then prove, through an experimental study, that we can build a privacy-aware camera that cannot extract personal information such as license plate numbers. At the same time, we ensure that useful non-sensitive data can still be extracted from distorted images. Code is available at https://github.com/upciti/privacy-by-design-semseg .
summary: In spite of the legal advances in personal data protection, the issue of private data being misused by unauthorized entities is still of utmost importance. To prevent this, Privacy by Design is often proposed as a solution for data protection. In this paper, the effect of camera distortions is studied using Deep Learning techniques commonly used to extract sensitive data. To do so, we simulate out-of-focus images corresponding to a realistic conventional camera with fixed focal length, aperture, and focus, as well as grayscale images coming from a monochrome camera. We then prove, through an experimental study, that we can build a privacy-aware camera that cannot extract personal information such as license plate numbers. At the same time, we ensure that useful non-sensitive data can still be extracted from distorted images. Code is available at https://github.com/upciti/privacy-by-design-semseg .
abstract_zh: 尽管在个人数据保护方面取得了法律进步，但未经授权的实体滥用私人数据的问题仍然至关重要。为了防止这种情况发生，隐私设计通常被提议作为数据保护的解决方案。在本文中，使用常用于提取敏感数据的深度学习技术来研究相机失真的影响。为此，我们模拟了与具有固定焦距、光圈和焦点的真实传统相机相对应的失焦图像，以及来自单色相机的灰度图像。然后，我们通过实验研究证明，我们可以构建一个具有隐私意识的相机，该相机无法提取车牌号等个人信息。同时，我们确保仍然可以从扭曲的图像中提取有用的非敏感数据。代码可在 https://github.com/upciti/privacy-by-design-semseg 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过深度学习技术设计隐私保护摄像头，防止敏感信息泄露。
AI.motivation: 尽管有法律保护，私人数据仍可能被滥用，需通过隐私设计防止敏感信息提取。
AI.method: 模拟传统摄像头的失焦和单色图像，利用深度学习验证隐私保护效果。
AI.result: 成功构建隐私保护摄像头，可阻止提取车牌等敏感信息，同时保留非敏感数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡隐私保护与数据实用性，为隐私设计提供可行方案。

authors_text: Philip Bille,Inge Li Gørtz,Simon J. Puglisi,Simon R. Tarnow
title: Hierarchical Relative Lempel-Ziv Compression
title_zh: 分层相对 Lempel-Ziv 压缩
abstract: Relative Lempel-Ziv (RLZ) parsing is a dictionary compression method in which a string $S$ is compressed relative to a second string $R$ (called the reference) by parsing $S$ into a sequence of substrings that occur in $R$. RLZ is particularly effective at compressing sets of strings that have a high degree of similarity to the reference string, such as a set of genomes of individuals from the same species. With the now cheap cost of DNA sequencing, such data sets have become extremely abundant and are rapidly growing. In this paper, instead of using a single reference string for the entire collection, we investigate the use of different reference strings for subsets of the collection, with the aim of improving compression. In particular, we form a rooted tree (or hierarchy) on the strings and then compressed each string using RLZ with parent as reference, storing only the root of the tree in plain text. To decompress, we traverse the tree in BFS order starting at the root, decompressing children with respect to their parent. We show that this approach leads to a twofold improvement in compression on bacterial genome data sets, with negligible effect on decompression time compared to the standard single reference approach. We show that an effective hierarchy for a given set of strings can be constructed by computing the optimal arborescence of a completed weighted digraph of the strings, with weights as the number of phrases in the RLZ parsing of the source and destination vertices. We further show that instead of computing the complete graph, a sparse graph derived using locality sensitive hashing can significantly reduce the cost of computing a good hierarchy, without adversely effecting compression performance.
summary: Relative Lempel-Ziv (RLZ) parsing is a dictionary compression method in which a string $S$ is compressed relative to a second string $R$ (called the reference) by parsing $S$ into a sequence of substrings that occur in $R$. RLZ is particularly effective at compressing sets of strings that have a high degree of similarity to the reference string, such as a set of genomes of individuals from the same species. With the now cheap cost of DNA sequencing, such data sets have become extremely abundant and are rapidly growing. In this paper, instead of using a single reference string for the entire collection, we investigate the use of different reference strings for subsets of the collection, with the aim of improving compression. In particular, we form a rooted tree (or hierarchy) on the strings and then compressed each string using RLZ with parent as reference, storing only the root of the tree in plain text. To decompress, we traverse the tree in BFS order starting at the root, decompressing children with respect to their parent. We show that this approach leads to a twofold improvement in compression on bacterial genome data sets, with negligible effect on decompression time compared to the standard single reference approach. We show that an effective hierarchy for a given set of strings can be constructed by computing the optimal arborescence of a completed weighted digraph of the strings, with weights as the number of phrases in the RLZ parsing of the source and destination vertices. We further show that instead of computing the complete graph, a sparse graph derived using locality sensitive hashing can significantly reduce the cost of computing a good hierarchy, without adversely effecting compression performance.
abstract_zh: 相对 Lempel-Ziv (RLZ) 解析是一种字典压缩方法，其中通过将 $S$ 解析为 $R$ 中出现的子字符串序列，将字符串 $S$ 相对于第二个字符串 $R$（称为引用）进行压缩。 RLZ 在压缩与参考字符串具有高度相似性的字符串集（例如来自同一物种的个体的一组基因组）方面特别有效。现在，随着 DNA 测序成本的降低，此类数据集变得极其丰富，并且正在迅速增长。在本文中，我们不是对整个集合使用单个引用字符串，而是研究对集合的子集使用不同的引用字符串，目的是提高压缩率。特别是，我们在字符串上形成一个有根树（或层次结构），然后使用 RLZ 以父级为参考压缩每个字符串，仅以纯文本形式存储树的根。为了解压缩，我们从根开始按 BFS 顺序遍历树，相对于其父级解压缩子级。我们表明，与标准的单一参考方法相比，这种方法可以使细菌基因组数据集的压缩提高两倍，并且对解压时间的影响可以忽略不计。我们证明，可以通过计算完整的字符串加权有向图的最佳树状结构来构建给定字符串集的有效层次结构，其中权重为源顶点和目标顶点的 RLZ 解析中的短语数量。我们进一步表明，使用局部敏感散列导出的稀疏图可以显着降低计算良好层次结构的成本，而不会对压缩性能产生不利影响，而不是计算完整的图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层结构的相对Lempel-Ziv压缩方法，通过为数据集的不同子集选择不同的参考字符串以提升压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 传统单参考字符串的RLZ压缩在处理高度相似的数据集（如细菌基因组）时存在局限性，需探索更高效的压缩策略以应对快速增长的生物数据。
AI.method: 构建字符串的有根树结构，使每个字符串以父节点为参考进行RLZ压缩，仅存储树根原文本。通过广度优先遍历实现解压，并利用图论中的最优树算法结合局部敏感哈希构建稀疏图以降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在细菌基因组数据集上实现压缩率两倍提升，且解压时间仅轻微增加。
AI.conclusion: 分层参考策略显著提升压缩性能，结合图算法与局部敏感哈希可高效构建优化的层次结构，为大规模相似数据压缩提供新思路。

We show that this approach leads to a twofold improvement in compression on bacterial genome data sets, with negligible effect on decompression time compared to the standard single reference approach. We show that an effective hierarchy for a given set of strings can be constructed by computing the optimal arborescence of a completed weighted digraph of the strings, with weights as the number of phrases in the RLZ parsing of the source and destination vertices. We further show that instead of computing the complete graph, a sparse graph derived using locality sensitive hashing can significantly reduce the cost of computing a good hierarchy, without adversely effecting compression performance. 相对 Lempel-Ziv (RLZ) 解析是一种字典压缩方法，其中通过将 $S$ 解析为 $R$ 中出现的子字符串序列，将字符串 $S$ 相对于第二个字符串 $R$（称为引用）进行压缩。 RLZ 在压缩与参考字符串具有高度相似性的字符串集（例如来自同一物种的个体的一组基因组）方面特别有效。现在，随着 DNA 测序成本的降低，此类数据集变得极其丰富，并且正在迅速增长。在本文中，我们不是对整个集合使用单个引用字符串，而是研究对集合的子集使用不同的引用字符串，目的是提高压缩率。特别是，我们在字符串上形成一个有根树（或层次结构），然后使用 RLZ 以父级为参考压缩每个字符串，仅以纯文本形式存储树的根。为了解压缩，我们从根开始按 BFS 顺序遍历树，相对于其父级解压缩子级。我们表明，与标准的单一参考方法相比，这种方法可以使细菌基因组数据集的压缩提高两倍，并且对解压时间的影响可以忽略不计。我们证明，可以通过计算完整的字符串加权有向图的最佳树状结构来构建给定字符串集的有效层次结构，其中权重为源顶点和目标顶点的 RLZ 解析中的短语数量。我们进一步表明，使用局部敏感散列导出的稀疏图可以显着降低计算良好层次结构的成本，而不会对压缩性能产生不利影响，而不是计算完整的图。 本文提出了一种基于分层结构的相对Lempel-Ziv压缩方法，通过为数据集的不同子集选择不同的参考字符串以提升压缩效率。 Philip Bille,Inge Li Gørtz,Simon J. Puglisi,Simon R. Tarnow cs.DS

title: Appraisal of a Random Bit Generator Utilizing Smartphone Sensors as Entropy Source
title_zh: 使用智能手机传感器作为熵源的随机位生成器的评估
comment: Submitted to (IEEE) International Conference on Electrical, Computer, Communications and Mechatronics Engineering - ICECCME'22; 16-18 November 2022, Maldives
comments: Submitted to (IEEE) International Conference on Electrical, Computer, Communications and Mechatronics Engineering - ICECCME'22; 16-18 November 2022, Maldives
abstract: We aim to access entropy sources available within smartphones in order to construct and evaluate a random number generator which is competitive in comparison with existing and proven random number generators. A prototype utilizing the herein proposed algorithm shall generate data that can be tested against the Statistical Test Suit provided by NIST. Although our initial intention of using cosmic radiation failed, we were able to extract randomness from incoming video and audio sources. We found that it is possible to access these sources of entropy utilizing sensors from smartphones resulting in 15 out of 15 successful passed tests within the Statistical Test Suit. We also found that wrong methods of sensor data collection using our prototype eventually generates weak random numbers and fails NIST's Statistical Test Suit. Finally, we suggest that in order to reach the initial goal of providing a smartphone-based true nondeterministic random number generator the detection of muons shall be researched.
summary: We aim to access entropy sources available within smartphones in order to construct and evaluate a random number generator which is competitive in comparison with existing and proven random number generators. A prototype utilizing the herein proposed algorithm shall generate data that can be tested against the Statistical Test Suit provided by NIST. Although our initial intention of using cosmic radiation failed, we were able to extract randomness from incoming video and audio sources. We found that it is possible to access these sources of entropy utilizing sensors from smartphones resulting in 15 out of 15 successful passed tests within the Statistical Test Suit. We also found that wrong methods of sensor data collection using our prototype eventually generates weak random numbers and fails NIST's Statistical Test Suit. Finally, we suggest that in order to reach the initial goal of providing a smartphone-based true nondeterministic random number generator the detection of muons shall be researched.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是访问智能手机中可用的熵源，以便构建和评估与现有且经过验证的随机数生成器相比具有竞争力的随机数生成器。利用此处提出的算法的原型应生成可针对 NIST 提供的统计测试套件进行测试的数据。尽管我们使用宇宙辐射的最初意图失败了，但我们能够从传入的视频和音频源中提取随机性。我们发现可以利用智能手机的传感器访问这些熵源，从而导致统计测试套件中 15 项测试中的 15 项成功通过。我们还发现，使用我们的原型收集传感器数据的错误方法最终会生成弱随机数，并且无法通过 NIST 的统计测试套件。最后，我们建议为了实现提供基于智能手机的真正的非确定性随机数生成器的最初目标，应对μ子的检测进行研究。

AI.tldr: 评估利用智能手机传感器作为熵源的随机数生成器的可行性
AI.motivation: 开发基于智能手机的高效且安全的随机数生成器，以替代传统方法
AI.method: 通过收集智能手机的视频和音频传感器数据作为熵源，并使用NIST统计测试套件验证生成的随机数质量
AI.result: 生成的随机数通过NIST所有15项统计测试，但错误的数据收集方法会导致测试失败
AI.conclusion: 智能手机传感器可作为有效熵源，但需优化数据收集方法；未来需研究缪子检测以实现更可靠的随机数生成

authors_text: Zijian Gao,Kele Xu,Yuanzhao Zhai,Dawei Feng,Bo Ding,XinJun Mao,Huaimin Wang
title: Self-Supervised Exploration via Temporal Inconsistency in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习中的时间不一致性进行自我监督探索
abstract: Under sparse extrinsic reward settings, reinforcement learning has remained challenging, despite surging interests in this field. Previous attempts suggest that intrinsic reward can alleviate the issue caused by sparsity. In this article, we present a novel intrinsic reward that is inspired by human learning, as humans evaluate curiosity by comparing current observations with historical knowledge. Our method involves training a self-supervised prediction model, saving snapshots of the model parameters, and using nuclear norm to evaluate the temporal inconsistency between the predictions of different snapshots as intrinsic rewards. We also propose a variational weighting mechanism to assign weight to different snapshots in an adaptive manner. Our experimental results on various benchmark environments demonstrate the efficacy of our method, which outperforms other intrinsic reward-based methods without additional training costs and with higher noise tolerance. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Copyright may be transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible.
summary: Under sparse extrinsic reward settings, reinforcement learning has remained challenging, despite surging interests in this field. Previous attempts suggest that intrinsic reward can alleviate the issue caused by sparsity. In this article, we present a novel intrinsic reward that is inspired by human learning, as humans evaluate curiosity by comparing current observations with historical knowledge. Our method involves training a self-supervised prediction model, saving snapshots of the model parameters, and using nuclear norm to evaluate the temporal inconsistency between the predictions of different snapshots as intrinsic rewards. We also propose a variational weighting mechanism to assign weight to different snapshots in an adaptive manner. Our experimental results on various benchmark environments demonstrate the efficacy of our method, which outperforms other intrinsic reward-based methods without additional training costs and with higher noise tolerance. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Copyright may be transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible.
abstract_zh: 在稀疏的外在奖励环境下，强化学习仍然具有挑战性，尽管人们对该领域的兴趣不断高涨。之前的尝试表明，内在奖励可以缓解稀疏性引起的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种受人类学习启发的新颖的内在奖励，因为人类通过将当前观察与历史知识进行比较来评估好奇心。我们的方法包括训练自监督预测模型，保存模型参数的快照，并使用核范数来评估不同快照的预测之间的时间不一致作为内在奖励。我们还提出了一种变分加权机制，以自适应的方式为不同的快照分配权重。我们在各种基准环境上的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性，该方法优于其他基于内在奖励的方法，无需额外的训练成本，并且具有更高的噪声容忍度。这项工作已提交给 IEEE 以便可能发表。版权可能会转让，恕不另行通知，此后该版本可能无法再访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间不一致性的自监督探索方法，用于解决强化学习中稀疏外部奖励下的探索难题。
AI.motivation: 稀疏外部奖励导致强化学习难以有效探索环境，传统内在奖励方法存在局限性，需借鉴人类通过比较新旧知识评估好奇心的机制。
AI.method: 训练自监督预测模型并保存参数快照，利用核范数衡量不同快照预测结果的时间不一致性作为内在奖励，结合变分加权机制自适应分配快照权重。
AI.result: 在多个基准环境中验证方法有效性，相比其他内在奖励方法无需额外训练成本且具有更高噪声容忍度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过时间不一致性度量成功提升稀疏奖励场景下的探索效率，兼具适应性与计算经济性。

authors_text: Gongjie Zhang,Zhipeng Luo,Zichen Tian,Jingyi Zhang,Xiaoqin Zhang,Shijian Lu
title: Towards Efficient Use of Multi-Scale Features in Transformer-Based Object Detectors
title_zh: 在基于 Transformer 的物体检测器中有效利用多尺度特征
abstract: Multi-scale features have been proven highly effective for object detection but often come with huge and even prohibitive extra computation costs, especially for the recent Transformer-based detectors. In this paper, we propose Iterative Multi-scale Feature Aggregation (IMFA) -- a generic paradigm that enables efficient use of multi-scale features in Transformer-based object detectors. The core idea is to exploit sparse multi-scale features from just a few crucial locations, and it is achieved with two novel designs. First, IMFA rearranges the Transformer encoder-decoder pipeline so that the encoded features can be iteratively updated based on the detection predictions. Second, IMFA sparsely samples scale-adaptive features for refined detection from just a few keypoint locations under the guidance of prior detection predictions. As a result, the sampled multi-scale features are sparse yet still highly beneficial for object detection. Extensive experiments show that the proposed IMFA boosts the performance of multiple Transformer-based object detectors significantly yet with only slight computational overhead.
summary: Multi-scale features have been proven highly effective for object detection but often come with huge and even prohibitive extra computation costs, especially for the recent Transformer-based detectors. In this paper, we propose Iterative Multi-scale Feature Aggregation (IMFA) -- a generic paradigm that enables efficient use of multi-scale features in Transformer-based object detectors. The core idea is to exploit sparse multi-scale features from just a few crucial locations, and it is achieved with two novel designs. First, IMFA rearranges the Transformer encoder-decoder pipeline so that the encoded features can be iteratively updated based on the detection predictions. Second, IMFA sparsely samples scale-adaptive features for refined detection from just a few keypoint locations under the guidance of prior detection predictions. As a result, the sampled multi-scale features are sparse yet still highly beneficial for object detection. Extensive experiments show that the proposed IMFA boosts the performance of multiple Transformer-based object detectors significantly yet with only slight computational overhead.
abstract_zh: 多尺度特征已被证明对于目标检测非常有效，但通常会带来巨大甚至令人望而却步的额外计算成本，特别是对于最近基于 Transformer 的检测器。在本文中，我们提出了迭代多尺度特征聚合（IMFA）——一种通用范例，可以在基于 Transformer 的目标检测器中有效使用多尺度特征。其核心思想是利用几个关键位置的稀疏多尺度特征，并通过两种新颖的设计来实现。首先，IMFA 重新排列 Transformer 编码器-解码器管道，以便可以根据检测预测迭代更新编码特征。其次，IMFA 在先前检测预测的指导下，对尺度自适应特征进行稀疏采样，以便仅从几个关键点位置进行精细检测。因此，采样的多尺度特征虽然稀疏，但对于目标检测仍然非常有益。大量实验表明，所提出的 IMFA 显着提高了多个基于 Transformer 的目标检测器的性能，但计算开销却很小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IMFA的迭代多尺度特征聚合方法，旨在提高基于Transformer的目标检测器中多尺度特征的使用效率。
AI.motivation: 多尺度特征在目标检测中效果显著，但传统方法计算成本高昂，尤其对基于Transformer的检测器而言，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过重构Transformer编码器-解码器流程实现迭代特征更新，并基于先验检测预测稀疏采样关键位置的尺度自适应特征，减少计算量。
AI.result: 实验表明，IMFA在多个Transformer检测器上显著提升性能，同时仅带来轻微的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: IMFA通过稀疏化多尺度特征利用，在保持检测精度的同时有效降低了计算成本，为高效目标检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Towards Efficient Use of Multi-Scale Features in Transformer-Based Object Detectors 在基于 Transformer 的物体检测器中有效利用多尺度特征 Multi-scale features have been proven highly effective for object detection but often come with huge and even prohibitive extra computation costs, especially for the recent Transformer-based detectors. In this paper, we propose Iterative Multi-scale Feature Aggregation (IMFA) -- a generic paradigm that enables efficient use of multi-scale features in Transformer-based object detectors. The core idea is to exploit sparse multi-scale features from just a few crucial locations, and it is achieved with two novel designs. First, IMFA rearranges the Transformer encoder-decoder pipeline so that the encoded features can be iteratively updated based on the detection predictions. Second, IMFA sparsely samples scale-adaptive features for refined detection from just a few keypoint locations under the guidance of prior detection predictions. As a result, the sampled multi-scale features are sparse yet still highly beneficial for object detection. Extensive experiments show that the proposed IMFA boosts the performance of multiple Transformer-based object detectors significantly yet with only slight computational overhead. 多尺度特征已被证明对于目标检测非常有效，但通常会带来巨大甚至令人望而却步的额外计算成本，特别是对于最近基于 Transformer 的检测器。在本文中，我们提出了迭代多尺度特征聚合（IMFA）——一种通用范例，可以在基于 Transformer 的目标检测器中有效使用多尺度特征。其核心思想是利用几个关键位置的稀疏多尺度特征，并通过两种新颖的设计来实现。首先，IMFA 重新排列 Transformer 编码器-解码器管道，以便可以根据检测预测迭代更新编码特征。其次，IMFA 在先前检测预测的指导下，对尺度自适应特征进行稀疏采样，以便仅从几个关键点位置进行精细检测。因此，采样的多尺度特征虽然稀疏，但对于目标检测仍然非常有益。大量实验表明，所提出的 IMFA 显着提高了多个基于 Transformer 的目标检测器的性能，但计算开销却很小。 本文提出了一种名为IMFA的迭代多尺度特征聚合方法，旨在提高基于Transformer的目标检测器中多尺度特征的使用效率。 Gongjie Zhang,Zhipeng Luo,Zichen Tian,Jingyi Zhang,Xiaoqin Zhang,Shijian Lu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM

title: A New Method on Mask-Wearing Detection for Natural Population Based on Improved YOLOv4
title_zh: 基于改进YOLOv4的自然人群戴口罩检测新方法
abstract: Recently, the domestic COVID-19 epidemic situation is serious, but in public places, some people do not wear masks or wear masks incorrectly, which requires the relevant staff to instantly remind and supervise them to wear masks correctly. However, in the face of such an important and complicated work, it is very necessary to carry out automated mask-wearing detection in public places. This paper proposes a new mask-wearing detection method based on improved YOLOv4. Specifically, firstly, we add the Coordinate Attention Module to the backbone to coordinate feature fusion and representation. Secondly, we conduct a series of network structural improvements to enhance the model performance and robustness. Thirdly, we adaptively deploy the K-means clustering algorithm to make the nine anchor boxes more suitable for our NPMD dataset. The experiments show that the improved YOLOv4 performs better, exceeding the baseline by 4.06\% AP with a comparable speed of 64.37 FPS.
summary: Recently, the domestic COVID-19 epidemic situation is serious, but in public places, some people do not wear masks or wear masks incorrectly, which requires the relevant staff to instantly remind and supervise them to wear masks correctly. However, in the face of such an important and complicated work, it is very necessary to carry out automated mask-wearing detection in public places. This paper proposes a new mask-wearing detection method based on improved YOLOv4. Specifically, firstly, we add the Coordinate Attention Module to the backbone to coordinate feature fusion and representation. Secondly, we conduct a series of network structural improvements to enhance the model performance and robustness. Thirdly, we adaptively deploy the K-means clustering algorithm to make the nine anchor boxes more suitable for our NPMD dataset. The experiments show that the improved YOLOv4 performs better, exceeding the baseline by 4.06\% AP with a comparable speed of 64.37 FPS.
abstract_zh: 近期，国内COVID-19疫情严重，但在公共场所，部分人群不戴口罩或戴口罩方式不正确，这就需要相关工作人员立即提醒并监督他们正确佩戴口罩。然而，面对如此重要而复杂的工作，在公共场所进行自动化口罩佩戴检测是非常有必要的。本文提出了一种基于改进的YOLOv4的新的口罩佩戴检测方法。具体来说，首先，我们在主干上添加坐标注意力模块来协调特征融合和表示。其次，我们进行了一系列网络结构改进，以增强模型性能和鲁棒性。第三，我们自适应地部署 K 均值聚类算法，使九个锚框更适合我们的 NPMD 数据集。实验表明，改进后的 YOLOv4 表现更好，超出基线 4.06\% AP，可比速度为 64.37 FPS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进YOLOv4的自然人群中口罩佩戴检测新方法，用于公共场所自动化监管。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情严峻形势下，公共场所部分人员未正确佩戴口罩，需自动化检测系统辅助工作人员实时提醒与监督。
AI.method: 在YOLOv4主干网络中加入坐标注意力模块优化特征融合，在网络结构上进行多处改进，并采用自适应K-means聚类优化九个锚框适配NPMD数据集。
AI.result: 改进后的YOLOv4在保持64.37 FPS速度的同时，较基线模型提升4.06%的平均精度（AP）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过网络结构优化和锚框自适应调整，在保证实时性的同时显著提升口罩检测精度，适用于公共场所实时监管场景。

title: Self-Filtering: A Noise-Aware Sample Selection for Label Noise with Confidence Penalization
title_zh: 自过滤：带有置信度惩罚的标签噪声的噪声感知样本选择
abstract: Sample selection is an effective strategy to mitigate the effect of label noise in robust learning. Typical strategies commonly apply the small-loss criterion to identify clean samples. However, those samples lying around the decision boundary with large losses usually entangle with noisy examples, which would be discarded with this criterion, leading to the heavy degeneration of the generalization performance. In this paper, we propose a novel selection strategy, \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{F}il\textbf{t}ering (SFT), that utilizes the fluctuation of noisy examples in historical predictions to filter them, which can avoid the selection bias of the small-loss criterion for the boundary examples. Specifically, we introduce a memory bank module that stores the historical predictions of each example and dynamically updates to support the selection for the subsequent learning iteration. Besides, to reduce the accumulated error of the sample selection bias of SFT, we devise a regularization term to penalize the confident output distribution. By increasing the weight of the misclassified categories with this term, the loss function is robust to label noise in mild conditions. We conduct extensive experiments on three benchmarks with variant noise types and achieve the new state-of-the-art. Ablation studies and further analysis verify the virtue of SFT for sample selection in robust learning.
summary: Sample selection is an effective strategy to mitigate the effect of label noise in robust learning. Typical strategies commonly apply the small-loss criterion to identify clean samples. However, those samples lying around the decision boundary with large losses usually entangle with noisy examples, which would be discarded with this criterion, leading to the heavy degeneration of the generalization performance. In this paper, we propose a novel selection strategy, \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{F}il\textbf{t}ering (SFT), that utilizes the fluctuation of noisy examples in historical predictions to filter them, which can avoid the selection bias of the small-loss criterion for the boundary examples. Specifically, we introduce a memory bank module that stores the historical predictions of each example and dynamically updates to support the selection for the subsequent learning iteration. Besides, to reduce the accumulated error of the sample selection bias of SFT, we devise a regularization term to penalize the confident output distribution. By increasing the weight of the misclassified categories with this term, the loss function is robust to label noise in mild conditions. We conduct extensive experiments on three benchmarks with variant noise types and achieve the new state-of-the-art. Ablation studies and further analysis verify the virtue of SFT for sample selection in robust learning.
abstract_zh: 样本选择是减轻鲁棒学习中标签噪声影响的有效策略。典型的策略通常应用小损失标准来识别干净样本。然而，那些位于决策边界周围且损失较大的样本通常与噪声样本纠缠在一起，使用此标准将丢弃这些样本，从而导致泛化性能严重退化。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的选择策略，\textbf{S}elf-\textbf{F}il\textbf{t}ering (SFT)，利用历史预测中噪声实例的波动对其进行过滤，这可以避免小损失标准对边界实例的选择偏差。具体来说，我们引入了一个内存库模块，该模块存储每个示例的历史预测并动态更新以支持后续学习迭代的选择。此外，为了减少 SFT 样本选择偏差的累积误差，我们设计了一个正则化项来惩罚置信输出分布。通过使用此项增加错误分类类别的权重，损失函数对于在温和条件下标记噪声具有鲁棒性。我们对不同噪声类型的三个基准进行了广泛的实验，并达到了新的最先进水平。消融研究和进一步分析验证了 SFT 在稳健学习中样本选择的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Self-Filtering (SFT)的样本选择策略，旨在缓解标签噪声对鲁棒学习的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有的小损失准则在识别干净样本时存在偏差，容易将决策边界附近的样本误判为噪声样本，从而影响模型的泛化性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于历史预测波动的样本选择策略，引入记忆库模块动态更新历史预测，并设计了一个正则化项以惩罚置信输出分布，从而减少样本选择偏差。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验，取得了新的最先进结果，进一步的消融研究和分析验证了SFT在鲁棒学习中的优势。
AI.conclusion: SFT策略有效缓解了标签噪声带来的问题，通过历史预测波动和置信惩罚项提升了模型的鲁棒性，并在多个基准数据集上取得了优异的性能。

We conduct extensive experiments on three benchmarks with variant noise types and achieve the new state-of-the-art. Ablation studies and further analysis verify the virtue of SFT for sample selection in robust learning. 样本选择是减轻鲁棒学习中标签噪声影响的有效策略。典型的策略通常应用小损失标准来识别干净样本。然而，那些位于决策边界周围且损失较大的样本通常与噪声样本纠缠在一起，使用此标准将丢弃这些样本，从而导致泛化性能严重退化。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的选择策略，\textbf{S}elf-\textbf{F}il\textbf{t}ering (SFT)，利用历史预测中噪声实例的波动对其进行过滤，这可以避免小损失标准对边界实例的选择偏差。具体来说，我们引入了一个内存库模块，该模块存储每个示例的历史预测并动态更新以支持后续学习迭代的选择。此外，为了减少 SFT 样本选择偏差的累积误差，我们设计了一个正则化项来惩罚置信输出分布。通过使用此项增加错误分类类别的权重，损失函数对于在温和条件下标记噪声具有鲁棒性。我们对不同噪声类型的三个基准进行了广泛的实验，并达到了新的最先进水平。消融研究和进一步分析验证了 SFT 在稳健学习中样本选择的优点。 本文提出了一种名为Self-Filtering (SFT)的样本选择策略，旨在缓解标签噪声对鲁棒学习的影响。 Qi Wei,Haoliang Sun,Xiankai Lu,Yilong Yin cs.CV

authors_text: Zijian Gao,YiYing Li,Kele Xu,Yuanzhao Zhai,Dawei Feng,Bo Ding,XinJun Mao,Huaimin Wang
title: Dynamic Memory-based Curiosity: A Bootstrap Approach for Exploration
title_zh: 基于动态内存的好奇心：探索的引导方法
abstract: The sparsity of extrinsic rewards poses a serious challenge for reinforcement learning (RL). Currently, many efforts have been made on curiosity which can provide a representative intrinsic reward for effective exploration. However, the challenge is still far from being solved. In this paper, we present a novel curiosity for RL, named DyMeCu, which stands for Dynamic Memory-based Curiosity. Inspired by human curiosity and information theory, DyMeCu consists of a dynamic memory and dual online learners. The curiosity arouses if memorized information can not deal with the current state, and the information gap between dual learners can be formulated as the intrinsic reward for agents, and then such state information can be consolidated into the dynamic memory. Compared with previous curiosity methods, DyMeCu can better mimic human curiosity with dynamic memory, and the memory module can be dynamically grown based on a bootstrap paradigm with dual learners. On multiple benchmarks including DeepMind Control Suite and Atari Suite, large-scale empirical experiments are conducted and the results demonstrate that DyMeCu outperforms competitive curiosity-based methods with or without extrinsic rewards. We will release the code to enhance reproducibility.
summary: The sparsity of extrinsic rewards poses a serious challenge for reinforcement learning (RL). Currently, many efforts have been made on curiosity which can provide a representative intrinsic reward for effective exploration. However, the challenge is still far from being solved. In this paper, we present a novel curiosity for RL, named DyMeCu, which stands for Dynamic Memory-based Curiosity. Inspired by human curiosity and information theory, DyMeCu consists of a dynamic memory and dual online learners. The curiosity arouses if memorized information can not deal with the current state, and the information gap between dual learners can be formulated as the intrinsic reward for agents, and then such state information can be consolidated into the dynamic memory. Compared with previous curiosity methods, DyMeCu can better mimic human curiosity with dynamic memory, and the memory module can be dynamically grown based on a bootstrap paradigm with dual learners. On multiple benchmarks including DeepMind Control Suite and Atari Suite, large-scale empirical experiments are conducted and the results demonstrate that DyMeCu outperforms competitive curiosity-based methods with or without extrinsic rewards. We will release the code to enhance reproducibility.
abstract_zh: 外部奖励的稀疏性给强化学习（RL）带来了严峻的挑战。目前，人们在好奇心方面做出了许多努力，好奇心可以为有效探索提供代表性的内在奖励。然而，挑战仍远未得到解决。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的强化学习好奇心，名为 DyMeCu，代表基于动态记忆的好奇心。受人类好奇心和信息论的启发，DyMeCu 由动态记忆和双重在线学习器组成。如果记忆的信息无法处理当前状态，就会激发好奇心，并且对偶学习器之间的信息差距可以表示为对代理的内在奖励，然后可以将这些状态信息巩固到动态记忆中。与之前的好奇心方法相比，DyMeCu 可以通过动态记忆更好地模仿人类的好奇心，并且记忆模块可以基于双学习器的引导范式动态增长。在包括 DeepMind Control Suite 和 Atari Suite 在内的多个基准上，进行了大规模实证实验，结果表明 DyMeCu 在有或没有外在奖励的情况下都优于基于好奇心的竞争方法。我们将发布代码以增强可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态记忆的新型好奇心机制DyMeCu，用于解决强化学习中稀疏外部奖励导致的探索难题。
AI.motivation: 稀疏的外部奖励是强化学习的重大挑战，现有好奇心驱动的探索方法仍存在局限性，需借鉴人类好奇心机制和信息论原理改进。
AI.method: DyMeCu包含动态记忆模块和双在线学习器，通过记忆信息与当前状态的差异及双学习器的信息差距生成内在奖励，并动态扩展记忆模块。
AI.result: 在DeepMind Control Suite和Atari Suite基准测试中，DyMeCu在有无外部奖励场景下均优于现有好奇心方法。
AI.conclusion: DyMeCu通过动态记忆机制有效模拟人类好奇心，提升了探索效率，实验验证了其广泛适用性，代码已开源以促进复现。

title: Formation control with connectivity assurance for missile swarm: a natural co-evolutionary strategy approach
title_zh: 导弹群连通性保证的编队控制：一种自然的协同进化策略方法
abstract: Formation control problem is one of the most concerned topics within the realm of swarm intelligence, which is usually solved by conventional mathematical approaches. In this paper, however, we presents a metaheuristic approach that leverages a natural co-evolutionary strategy to solve the formation control problem for a swarm of missiles. The missile swarm is modeled by a second-order system with heterogeneous reference target, and exponential error function is made to be the objective function such that the swarm converge to optimal equilibrium states satisfying certain formation requirements. Focusing on the issue of local optimum and unstable evolution, we incorporate a novel model-based policy constraint and a population adaptation strategies that greatly alleviates the performance degradation. With application of the Molloy-Reed criterion in the field of network communication, we developed an adaptive topology method that assure the connectivity under node failure and its effectiveness are validated both theoretically and experimentally. Experimental results valid the effectiveness of the proposed formation control approach. More significantly, we showed that it is feasible to treat generic formation control problem as Markov Decision Process(MDP) and solve it through iterative learning.
summary: Formation control problem is one of the most concerned topics within the realm of swarm intelligence, which is usually solved by conventional mathematical approaches. In this paper, however, we presents a metaheuristic approach that leverages a natural co-evolutionary strategy to solve the formation control problem for a swarm of missiles. The missile swarm is modeled by a second-order system with heterogeneous reference target, and exponential error function is made to be the objective function such that the swarm converge to optimal equilibrium states satisfying certain formation requirements. Focusing on the issue of local optimum and unstable evolution, we incorporate a novel model-based policy constraint and a population adaptation strategies that greatly alleviates the performance degradation. With application of the Molloy-Reed criterion in the field of network communication, we developed an adaptive topology method that assure the connectivity under node failure and its effectiveness are validated both theoretically and experimentally. Experimental results valid the effectiveness of the proposed formation control approach. More significantly, we showed that it is feasible to treat generic formation control problem as Markov Decision Process(MDP) and solve it through iterative learning.
abstract_zh: 编队控制问题是群体智能领域最受关注的课题之一，通常通过传统的数学方法来解决。然而，在本文中，我们提出了一种元启发式方法，利用自然共同进化策略来解决导弹群的编队控制问题。采用具有异构参考目标的二阶系统对导弹群进行建模，以指数误差函数为目标函数，使群收敛到满足一定编队要求的最优平衡状态。针对局部最优和不稳定演化问题，我们结合了一种新颖的基于模型的策略约束和群体适应策略，极大地缓解了性能下降。通过将Molloy-Reed准则应用于网络通信领域，我们开发了一种保证节点故障下连通性的自适应拓扑方法，并从理论上和实验上验证了其有效性。实验结果验证了所提出的编队控制方法的有效性。更重要的是，我们证明了将通用编队控制问题视为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）并通过迭代学习来解决它是可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自然协同进化策略的导弹群编队控制方法，确保连通性并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统数学方法在处理导弹群编队控制时存在局部最优和稳定性问题，需寻求更优解决方案。
AI.method: 采用自然协同进化策略，结合指数误差函数、模型策略约束、种群适应策略及Molloy-Reed准则的自适应拓扑方法。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在编队控制中的有效性，并证明将问题视为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的协同进化策略有效解决了导弹群编队控制问题，确保连通性且适用于通用场景。

title: ICANet: A Method of Short Video Emotion Recognition Driven by Multimodal Data
title_zh: ICANet：一种多模态数据驱动的短视频情感识别方法
abstract: With the fast development of artificial intelligence and short videos, emotion recognition in short videos has become one of the most important research topics in human-computer interaction. At present, most emotion recognition methods still stay in a single modality. However, in daily life, human beings will usually disguise their real emotions, which leads to the problem that the accuracy of single modal emotion recognition is relatively terrible. Moreover, it is not easy to distinguish similar emotions. Therefore, we propose a new approach denoted as ICANet to achieve multimodal short video emotion recognition by employing three different modalities of audio, video and optical flow, making up for the lack of a single modality and then improving the accuracy of emotion recognition in short videos. ICANet has a better accuracy of 80.77% on the IEMOCAP benchmark, exceeding the SOTA methods by 15.89%.
summary: With the fast development of artificial intelligence and short videos, emotion recognition in short videos has become one of the most important research topics in human-computer interaction. At present, most emotion recognition methods still stay in a single modality. However, in daily life, human beings will usually disguise their real emotions, which leads to the problem that the accuracy of single modal emotion recognition is relatively terrible. Moreover, it is not easy to distinguish similar emotions. Therefore, we propose a new approach denoted as ICANet to achieve multimodal short video emotion recognition by employing three different modalities of audio, video and optical flow, making up for the lack of a single modality and then improving the accuracy of emotion recognition in short videos. ICANet has a better accuracy of 80.77% on the IEMOCAP benchmark, exceeding the SOTA methods by 15.89%.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能和短视频的快速发展，短视频中的情感识别已成为人机交互中最重要的研究课题之一。目前，大多数情绪识别方法仍然停留在单一模态上。然而，在日常生活中，人类通常会掩饰自己的真实情绪，这就导致了单一模态情绪识别的准确率比较糟糕的问题。而且，区分相似的情绪并不容易。因此，我们提出了一种称为ICANet的新方法，通过采用音频、视频和光流三种不同模态来实现多模态短视频情感识别，弥补单一模态的不足，从而提高短视频情感识别的准确性。 ICANet 在 IEMOCAP 基准上的准确率更高，达到 80.77%，比 SOTA 方法高出 15.89%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ICANet的多模态数据驱动的短视频情绪识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单模态情绪识别方法在面对人类隐藏真实情绪的情况时准确率较低，且难以区分相似情绪。
AI.method: 通过融合音频、视频和光流三种模态数据，构建ICANet模型以弥补单模态缺陷。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP基准测试中达到80.77%的准确率，优于现有最优方法15.89%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合有效提升了短视频情绪识别的准确性，验证了ICANet方法的优越性。

search_text: ICANet: A Method of Short Video Emotion Recognition Driven by Multimodal Data ICANet：一种多模态数据驱动的短视频情感识别方法 With the fast development of artificial intelligence and short videos, emotion recognition in short videos has become one of the most important research topics in human-computer interaction. At present, most emotion recognition methods still stay in a single modality. However, in daily life, human beings will usually disguise their real emotions, which leads to the problem that the accuracy of single modal emotion recognition is relatively terrible. Moreover, it is not easy to distinguish similar emotions. Therefore, we propose a new approach denoted as ICANet to achieve multimodal short video emotion recognition by employing three different modalities of audio, video and optical flow, making up for the lack of a single modality and then improving the accuracy of emotion recognition in short videos. ICANet has a better accuracy of 80.77% on the IEMOCAP benchmark, exceeding the SOTA methods by 15.89%. 随着人工智能和短视频的快速发展，短视频中的情感识别已成为人机交互中最重要的研究课题之一。目前，大多数情绪识别方法仍然停留在单一模态上。然而，在日常生活中，人类通常会掩饰自己的真实情绪，这就导致了单一模态情绪识别的准确率比较糟糕的问题。而且，区分相似的情绪并不容易。因此，我们提出了一种称为ICANet的新方法，通过采用音频、视频和光流三种不同模态来实现多模态短视频情感识别，弥补单一模态的不足，从而提高短视频情感识别的准确性。 ICANet 在 IEMOCAP 基准上的准确率更高，达到 80.77%，比 SOTA 方法高出 15.89%。 本文提出了一种名为ICANet的多模态数据驱动的短视频情绪识别方法。 Xuecheng Wu,Mengmeng Tian,Lanhang Zhai cs.CV

title: Discovering Transferable Forensic Features for CNN-generated Images Detection
title_zh: 发现用于 CNN 生成图像检测的可转移取证特征
abstract: Visual counterfeits are increasingly causing an existential conundrum in mainstream media with rapid evolution in neural image synthesis methods. Though detection of such counterfeits has been a taxing problem in the image forensics community, a recent class of forensic detectors -- universal detectors -- are able to surprisingly spot counterfeit images regardless of generator architectures, loss functions, training datasets, and resolutions. This intriguing property suggests the possible existence of transferable forensic features (T-FF) in universal detectors. In this work, we conduct the first analytical study to discover and understand T-FF in universal detectors. Our contributions are 2-fold: 1) We propose a novel forensic feature relevance statistic (FF-RS) to quantify and discover T-FF in universal detectors and, 2) Our qualitative and quantitative investigations uncover an unexpected finding: color is a critical T-FF in universal detectors. Code and models are available at https://keshik6.github.io/transferable-forensic-features/
summary: Visual counterfeits are increasingly causing an existential conundrum in mainstream media with rapid evolution in neural image synthesis methods. Though detection of such counterfeits has been a taxing problem in the image forensics community, a recent class of forensic detectors -- universal detectors -- are able to surprisingly spot counterfeit images regardless of generator architectures, loss functions, training datasets, and resolutions. This intriguing property suggests the possible existence of transferable forensic features (T-FF) in universal detectors. In this work, we conduct the first analytical study to discover and understand T-FF in universal detectors. Our contributions are 2-fold: 1) We propose a novel forensic feature relevance statistic (FF-RS) to quantify and discover T-FF in universal detectors and, 2) Our qualitative and quantitative investigations uncover an unexpected finding: color is a critical T-FF in universal detectors. Code and models are available at https://keshik6.github.io/transferable-forensic-features/
abstract_zh: 随着神经图像合成方法的快速发展，视觉伪造品越来越多地在主流媒体中引发生存难题。尽管检测此类伪造品一直是图像取证界的一个艰巨问题，但最近一类取证检测器（通用检测器）能够令人惊讶地发现伪造图像，无论生成器架构、损失函数、训练数据集和分辨率如何。这一有趣的特性表明通用探测器中可能存在可转移的取证特征（T-FF）。在这项工作中，我们进行了首次分析研究，以发现和理解通用探测器中的 T-FF。我们的贡献有两方面：1）我们提出了一种新颖的法医特征相关性统计（FF-RS）来量化和发现通用探测器中的 T-FF，2）我们的定性和定量研究发现了一个意想不到的发现：颜色是通用探测器中的关键 T-FF。代码和模型可在 https://keshik6.github.io/transferable-forensic-features/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文旨在发现可用于检测CNN生成图像的可迁移取证特征（T-FF），并提出量化这些特征的新方法。
AI.motivation: 随着神经图像合成技术的快速发展，检测由不同生成器产生的伪造图像成为挑战。现有通用检测器能跨架构检测，但其背后的可迁移特征尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 提出一种新的取证特征相关性统计量（FF-RS）量化分析通用检测器中的T-FF，并通过定性和定量实验验证特征有效性。
AI.result: 发现颜色是通用检测器中关键的可迁移取证特征，该结论通过实验数据和模型分析得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 通过FF-RS方法成功识别出颜色作为核心T-FF，为构建跨生成器的通用图像取证系统提供了理论依据和实践工具。

title: Advanced Tools and Methods for Treewidth-Based Problem Solving -- Extended Abstract
title_zh: 基于树宽的问题解决的高级工具和方法——扩展摘要
comment: This is an extended abstract of a binational PhD thesis that has been awarded with the EurAI Dissertation Award 2021, see https://www.eurai.org/award/markus-hecher
comments: This is an extended abstract of a binational PhD thesis that has been awarded with the EurAI Dissertation Award 2021, see https://www.eurai.org/award/markus-hecher
abstract: Computer programs, so-called solvers, for solving the well-known Boolean satisfiability problem (Sat) have been improving for decades. Among the reasons, why these solvers are so fast, is the implicit usage of the formula's structural properties during solving. One of such structural indicators is the so-called treewidth, which tries to measure how close a formula instance is to being easy (tree-like). This work focuses on logic-based problems and treewidth-based methods and tools for solving them. Many of these problems are also relevant for knowledge representation and reasoning (KR) as well as artificial intelligence (AI) in general. We present a new type of problem reduction, which is referred to by decomposition-guided (DG). This reduction type forms the basis to solve a problem for quantified Boolean formulas (QBFs) of bounded treewidth that has been open since 2004. The solution of this problem then gives rise to a new methodology for proving precise lower bounds for a range of further formalisms in logic, KR, and AI. Despite the established lower bounds, we implement an algorithm for solving extensions of Sat efficiently, by directly using treewidth. Our implementation is based on finding abstractions of instances, which are then incrementally refined in the process. Thereby, our observations confirm that treewidth is an important measure that should be considered in the design of modern solvers.
summary: Computer programs, so-called solvers, for solving the well-known Boolean satisfiability problem (Sat) have been improving for decades. Among the reasons, why these solvers are so fast, is the implicit usage of the formula's structural properties during solving. One of such structural indicators is the so-called treewidth, which tries to measure how close a formula instance is to being easy (tree-like). This work focuses on logic-based problems and treewidth-based methods and tools for solving them. Many of these problems are also relevant for knowledge representation and reasoning (KR) as well as artificial intelligence (AI) in general. We present a new type of problem reduction, which is referred to by decomposition-guided (DG). This reduction type forms the basis to solve a problem for quantified Boolean formulas (QBFs) of bounded treewidth that has been open since 2004. The solution of this problem then gives rise to a new methodology for proving precise lower bounds for a range of further formalisms in logic, KR, and AI. Despite the established lower bounds, we implement an algorithm for solving extensions of Sat efficiently, by directly using treewidth. Our implementation is based on finding abstractions of instances, which are then incrementally refined in the process. Thereby, our observations confirm that treewidth is an important measure that should be considered in the design of modern solvers.
abstract_zh: 用于解决著名的布尔可满足性问题 (Sat) 的计算机程序，即所谓的求解器，几十年来一直在不断改进。这些求解器如此快的原因之一是在求解过程中隐式使用了公式的结构属性。此类结构指标之一是所谓的树宽，它试图衡量公式实例与简单（树状）的接近程度。这项工作重点关注基于逻辑的问题以及用于解决这些问题的基于树宽的方法和工具。其中许多问题也与知识表示和推理 (KR) 以及人工智能 (AI) 相关。我们提出了一种新型的问题简化方法，称为分解引导（DG）。这种归约类型构成了解决自 2004 年以来开放的有界树宽的量化布尔公式 (QBF) 问题的基础。该问题的解决方案随后产生了一种新的方法，用于证明逻辑、KR 和 AI 中一系列进一步形式主义的精确下界。尽管设定了下限，我们仍然通过直接使用树宽来实现一种算法，用于有效地解决 Sat 的扩展。我们的实现基于查找实例的抽象，然后在此过程中逐步完善。因此，我们的观察证实，树宽是现代求解器设计中应考虑的重要指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于树宽的分解引导（DG）问题约减方法，用于解决有界树宽量化布尔公式（QBF）问题，并探索其在逻辑、知识表示与人工智能中的应用。
AI.motivation: 布尔可满足性问题（SAT）求解器的性能高度依赖问题结构特性，而树宽作为衡量公式接近树状结构的指标，尚未被充分用于解决复杂逻辑问题及扩展形式。
AI.method: 设计分解引导（DG）约减技术，通过分解问题实例并逐步细化抽象，结合树宽直接求解扩展SAT问题，实现高效算法。
AI.result: 成功解决2004年以来未解的有界树宽QBF问题，并为逻辑、知识表示与AI领域提供精确下界证明方法，验证树宽在求解器设计中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 树宽是现代求解器设计的重要指标，分解引导方法为逻辑问题及AI相关领域提供了理论与实践价值的新范式。

Thereby, our observations confirm that treewidth is an important measure that should be considered in the design of modern solvers. 用于解决著名的布尔可满足性问题 (Sat) 的计算机程序，即所谓的求解器，几十年来一直在不断改进。这些求解器如此快的原因之一是在求解过程中隐式使用了公式的结构属性。此类结构指标之一是所谓的树宽，它试图衡量公式实例与简单（树状）的接近程度。这项工作重点关注基于逻辑的问题以及用于解决这些问题的基于树宽的方法和工具。其中许多问题也与知识表示和推理 (KR) 以及人工智能 (AI) 相关。我们提出了一种新型的问题简化方法，称为分解引导（DG）。这种归约类型构成了解决自 2004 年以来开放的有界树宽的量化布尔公式 (QBF) 问题的基础。该问题的解决方案随后产生了一种新的方法，用于证明逻辑、KR 和 AI 中一系列进一步形式主义的精确下界。尽管设定了下限，我们仍然通过直接使用树宽来实现一种算法，用于有效地解决 Sat 的扩展。我们的实现基于查找实例的抽象，然后在此过程中逐步完善。因此，我们的观察证实，树宽是现代求解器设计中应考虑的重要指标。 本文提出一种基于树宽的分解引导（DG）问题约减方法，用于解决有界树宽量化布尔公式（QBF）问题，并探索其在逻辑、知识表示与人工智能中的应用。 Markus Hecher cs.AI,cs.CC,cs.DB,cs.DS,cs.LO

authors_text: Marco Avvenuti,Marco Bongiovanni,Luca Ciampi,Fabrizio Falchi,Claudio Gennaro,Nicola Messina
title: A Spatio-Temporal Attentive Network for Video-Based Crowd Counting
title_zh: 用于基于视频的人群计数的时空注意力网络
abstract: Automatic people counting from images has recently drawn attention for urban monitoring in modern Smart Cities due to the ubiquity of surveillance camera networks. Current computer vision techniques rely on deep learning-based algorithms that estimate pedestrian densities in still, individual images. Only a bunch of works take advantage of temporal consistency in video sequences. In this work, we propose a spatio-temporal attentive neural network to estimate the number of pedestrians from surveillance videos. By taking advantage of the temporal correlation between consecutive frames, we lowered state-of-the-art count error by 5% and localization error by 7.5% on the widely-used FDST benchmark.
summary: Automatic people counting from images has recently drawn attention for urban monitoring in modern Smart Cities due to the ubiquity of surveillance camera networks. Current computer vision techniques rely on deep learning-based algorithms that estimate pedestrian densities in still, individual images. Only a bunch of works take advantage of temporal consistency in video sequences. In this work, we propose a spatio-temporal attentive neural network to estimate the number of pedestrians from surveillance videos. By taking advantage of the temporal correlation between consecutive frames, we lowered state-of-the-art count error by 5% and localization error by 7.5% on the widely-used FDST benchmark.
abstract_zh: 由于监控摄像头网络的普遍存在，根据图像自动进行人数统计最近引起了现代智慧城市城市监控的关注。当前的计算机视觉技术依赖于基于深度学习的算法来估计静止的单个图像中的行人密度。只有少数作品利用了视频序列的时间一致性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种时空注意力神经网络来估计监控视频中的行人数量。通过利用连续帧之间的时间相关性，我们在广泛使用的 FDST 基准上将最先进的计数误差降低了 5%，将定位误差降低了 7.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种时空注意力网络，用于从监控视频中估计行人数量，以提高视频人群计数的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的图像人群计数方法主要针对静态图像，未能充分利用视频序列中的时间一致性，导致计数误差较大。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合时空注意力机制的神经网络，通过捕捉连续帧之间的时序相关性，增强对视频中人群动态变化的建模能力。
AI.result: 在FDST基准数据集上，该方法将计数误差降低5%，定位误差降低7.5%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用时空注意力机制能有效提升视频人群计数的准确性，为智能城市监控提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: A Bayesian Variational principle for dynamic Self Organizing Maps
title_zh: 动态自组织映射的贝叶斯变分原理
abstract: We propose organisation conditions that yield a method for training SOM with adaptative neighborhood radius in a variational Bayesian framework. This method is validated on a non-stationary setting and compared in an high-dimensional setting with an other adaptative method.
summary: We propose organisation conditions that yield a method for training SOM with adaptative neighborhood radius in a variational Bayesian framework. This method is validated on a non-stationary setting and compared in an high-dimensional setting with an other adaptative method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出的组织条件产生了一种在变分贝叶斯框架中训练具有自适应邻域半径的​​ SOM 的方法。该方法在非平稳设置上进行了验证，并在高维设置中与其他自适应方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分贝叶斯框架的动态自组织映射训练方法，通过自适应邻域半径提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自组织映射在非平稳数据和高维场景下表现不足，需改进自适应机制以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在变分贝叶斯框架下设计组织条件，实现SOM的自适应邻域半径动态调整，并通过非平稳数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 方法在非平稳环境中表现稳定，且在高维数据对比实验中优于其他自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的变分贝叶斯动态SOM方法有效解决了非平稳和高维数据的建模挑战，具有实际应用价值。
