authors_text: Djibrilla Amadou Kountche,Fatma Raissi,Mandimby Ranaivo Rakotondravelona,Edoardo Bonetto,Daniele Brevi,Angel Martin,Oihana Otaegui,Gorka Velez
title: Monetisation of and Access to in-Vehicle data and resources: the 5GMETA approach
title_zh: 车载数据和资源的货币化和访问：5GMETA 方法
abstract: Today's vehicles are increasingly embedded with computers and sensors which produce huge amount of data. The data are exploited for internal purposes and with the development of connected infrastructures and smart cities, the vehicles interact with each other as well as with road users generating other types of data. The access to these data and in-vehicle resources and their monetisation faces many challenges which are presented in this paper. Furthermore, the most important commercial solution compared to the open and novel approach faced in the H2020 5GMETA project.
summary: Today's vehicles are increasingly embedded with computers and sensors which produce huge amount of data. The data are exploited for internal purposes and with the development of connected infrastructures and smart cities, the vehicles interact with each other as well as with road users generating other types of data. The access to these data and in-vehicle resources and their monetisation faces many challenges which are presented in this paper. Furthermore, the most important commercial solution compared to the open and novel approach faced in the H2020 5GMETA project.
abstract_zh: 当今的车辆越来越多地嵌入计算机和传感器，从而产生大量数据。这些数据被用于内部目的，并且随着互联基础设施和智能城市的发展，车辆之间以及与道路使用者之间的交互会生成其他类型的数据。这些数据和车载资源的获取及其货币化面临着本文提出的许多挑战。此外，与 H2020 5GMETA 项目中面临的开放和新颖的方法相比，这是最重要的商业解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文主要探讨如何通过5GMETA项目的方法解决车载数据和资源的访问与变现挑战。
AI.motivation: 现代车辆产生大量数据，但其访问和变现面临技术与商业挑战，需结合智能交通和车联网需求进行创新。
AI.method: 通过分析现有商业解决方案，提出H2020 5GMETA项目的开放性技术框架与创新方法。
AI.result: 明确了车载数据变现的关键挑战，并对比了5GMETA方法与传统方案的差异及优势。
AI.conclusion: 5GMETA项目为车载数据资源的高效利用和商业化提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Enhancing Deep Learning Performance of Massive MIMO CSI Feedback
title_zh: 增强大规模 MIMO CSI 反馈的深度学习性能
comment: This work has been accepted by IEEE ICC 2023. Copyright has been transferred to IEEE
comments: This work has been accepted by IEEE ICC 2023. Copyright has been transferred to IEEE
abstract: CSI feedback is an important problem of Massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) technology because the feedback overhead is proportional to the number of sub-channels and the number of antennas, both of which scale with the size of the Massive MIMO system. Deep learning-based CSI feedback methods have been widely adopted recently owing to their superior performance. Despite the success, current approaches have not fully exploited the relationship between the characteristics of CSI data and the deep learning framework. In this paper, we propose a jigsaw puzzles aided training strategy (JPTS) to enhance the deep learning-based Massive MIMO CSI feedback approaches by maximizing mutual information between the original CSI and the compressed CSI. We apply JPTS on top of existing state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results show that by adopting this training strategy, the accuracy can be boosted by 12.07% and 7.01% on average in indoor and outdoor environments, respectively. The proposed method is ready to adopt to existing deep learning frameworks of Massive MIMO CSI feedback. Codes of JPTS are available on GitHub for use.
summary: CSI feedback is an important problem of Massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) technology because the feedback overhead is proportional to the number of sub-channels and the number of antennas, both of which scale with the size of the Massive MIMO system. Deep learning-based CSI feedback methods have been widely adopted recently owing to their superior performance. Despite the success, current approaches have not fully exploited the relationship between the characteristics of CSI data and the deep learning framework. In this paper, we propose a jigsaw puzzles aided training strategy (JPTS) to enhance the deep learning-based Massive MIMO CSI feedback approaches by maximizing mutual information between the original CSI and the compressed CSI. We apply JPTS on top of existing state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results show that by adopting this training strategy, the accuracy can be boosted by 12.07% and 7.01% on average in indoor and outdoor environments, respectively. The proposed method is ready to adopt to existing deep learning frameworks of Massive MIMO CSI feedback. Codes of JPTS are available on GitHub for use.
abstract_zh: CSI反馈是大规模多输入多输出（MIMO）技术的一个重要问题，因为反馈开销与子信道数量和天线数量成正比，而子信道数量和天线数量都随着大规模MIMO系统的规模而变化。基于深度学习的CSI反馈方法由于其优越的性能最近被广泛采用。尽管取得了成功，但当前的方法尚未充分利用 CSI 数据特征与深度学习框架之间的关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种拼图辅助训练策略（JPTS），通过最大化原始 CSI 和压缩 CSI 之间的互信息来增强基于深度学习的 Massive MIMO CSI 反馈方法。我们在现有最先进的方法之上应用 JPTS。实验结果表明，采用该训练策略，在室内和室外环境下，准确率平均分别提高了12.07%和7.01%。所提出的方法已准备好采用现有的 Massive MIMO CSI 反馈深度学习框架。 JPTS的代码可以在GitHub上获取使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种拼图辅助训练策略（JPTS），以提升基于深度学习的Massive MIMO信道状态信息（CSI）反馈性能。
AI.motivation: Massive MIMO系统中CSI反馈的开销随子信道和天线数量增加而增大，现有深度学习方法未充分挖掘CSI数据特性与模型框架的关联性。
AI.method: 设计JPTS策略，通过最大化原始CSI与压缩CSI之间的互信息，增强深度学习模型对CSI特征的学习能力，并兼容现有先进方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，在室内外场景下，JPTS分别平均提升反馈准确率12.07%和7.01%，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: JPTS有效提升了CSI反馈性能，可无缝集成到现有深度学习框架中，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Enhancing Deep Learning Performance of Massive MIMO CSI Feedback 增强大规模 MIMO CSI 反馈的深度学习性能 CSI feedback is an important problem of Massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) technology because the feedback overhead is proportional to the number of sub-channels and the number of antennas, both of which scale with the size of the Massive MIMO system. Deep learning-based CSI feedback methods have been widely adopted recently owing to their superior performance. Despite the success, current approaches have not fully exploited the relationship between the characteristics of CSI data and the deep learning framework. In this paper, we propose a jigsaw puzzles aided training strategy (JPTS) to enhance the deep learning-based Massive MIMO CSI feedback approaches by maximizing mutual information between the original CSI and the compressed CSI. We apply JPTS on top of existing state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results show that by adopting this training strategy, the accuracy can be boosted by 12.07% and 7.01% on average in indoor and outdoor environments, respectively. The proposed method is ready to adopt to existing deep learning frameworks of Massive MIMO CSI feedback. Codes of JPTS are available on GitHub for use. title: K-Order Graph-oriented Transformer with GraAttention for 3D Pose and Shape Estimation
title_zh: 具有 GraAttention 的 K 阶面向图 Transformer，用于 3D 姿态和形状估计
abstract: We propose a novel attention-based 2D-to-3D pose estimation network for graph-structured data, named KOG-Transformer, and a 3D pose-to-shape estimation network for hand data, named GASE-Net. Previous 3D pose estimation methods have focused on various modifications to the graph convolution kernel, such as abandoning weight sharing or increasing the receptive field. Some of these methods employ attention-based non-local modules as auxiliary modules. In order to better model the relationship between nodes in graph-structured data and fuse the information of different neighbor nodes in a differentiated way, we make targeted modifications to the attention module and propose two modules designed for graph-structured data, graph relative positional encoding multi-head self-attention (GR-MSA) and K-order graph-oriented multi-head self-attention (KOG-MSA). By stacking GR-MSA and KOG-MSA, we propose a novel network KOG-Transformer for 2D-to-3D pose estimation. Furthermore, we propose a network for shape estimation on hand data, called GraAttention shape estimation network (GASE-Net), which takes a 3D pose as input and gradually models the shape of the hand from sparse to dense. We have empirically shown the superiority of KOG-Transformer through extensive experiments. Experimental results show that KOG-Transformer significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark dataset Human3.6M. We evaluate the effect of GASE-Net on two public available hand datasets, ObMan and InterHand2.6M. GASE-Net can predict the corresponding shape for input pose with strong generalization ability.
summary: We propose a novel attention-based 2D-to-3D pose estimation network for graph-structured data, named KOG-Transformer, and a 3D pose-to-shape estimation network for hand data, named GASE-Net. Previous 3D pose estimation methods have focused on various modifications to the graph convolution kernel, such as abandoning weight sharing or increasing the receptive field. Some of these methods employ attention-based non-local modules as auxiliary modules. In order to better model the relationship between nodes in graph-structured data and fuse the information of different neighbor nodes in a differentiated way, we make targeted modifications to the attention module and propose two modules designed for graph-structured data, graph relative positional encoding multi-head self-attention (GR-MSA) and K-order graph-oriented multi-head self-attention (KOG-MSA). By stacking GR-MSA and KOG-MSA, we propose a novel network KOG-Transformer for 2D-to-3D pose estimation. Furthermore, we propose a network for shape estimation on hand data, called GraAttention shape estimation network (GASE-Net), which takes a 3D pose as input and gradually models the shape of the hand from sparse to dense. We have empirically shown the superiority of KOG-Transformer through extensive experiments. Experimental results show that KOG-Transformer significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark dataset Human3.6M. We evaluate the effect of GASE-Net on two public available hand datasets, ObMan and InterHand2.6M. GASE-Net can predict the corresponding shape for input pose with strong generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 我们针对图结构数据提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的 2D 到 3D 姿势估计网络，名为 KOG-Transformer，以及针对手部数据的 3D 姿势到形状估计网络，名为 GASE-Net。之前的3D姿态估计方法主要集中在对图卷积核的各种修改上，例如放弃权重共享或增加感受野。其中一些方法采用基于注意力的非局部模块作为辅助模块。为了更好地建模图结构数据中节点之间的关系，差异化地融合不同邻居节点的信息，我们对注意力模块进行了针对性的修改，提出了两个针对图结构数据设计的模块：图相对位置编码多头自注意力（GR-MSA）和K阶面向图的多头自注意力（KOG-MSA）。通过叠加 GR-MSA 和 KOG-MSA，我们提出了一种用于 2D 到 3D 位姿估计的新型网络 KOG-Transformer。此外，我们提出了一种用于手部数据形状估计的网络，称为 GraAttention 形状估计网络（GASE-Net），该网络以 3D 姿势作为输入，并逐渐对手部形状进行从稀疏到密集的建模。我们通过大量的实验凭经验证明了 KOG-Transformer 的优越性。实验结果表明，KOG-Transformer 在基准数据集 Human3.6M 上显着优于之前最先进的方法。我们评估了 GASE-Net 在两个公开可用的手部数据集 ObMan 和 InterHand2.6M 上的效果。 GASE-Net可以预测输入姿态对应的形状，具有很强的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的2D到3D姿态估计网络KOG-Transformer和手部形状估计网络GASE-Net，用于处理图结构数据。
AI.motivation: 现有3D姿态估计方法主要通过改进图卷积核或引入非局部注意力模块，但未能有效建模图结构数据中节点关系并差异化融合邻域信息。
AI.method: 设计了图相对位置编码多头自注意力（GR-MSA）和K阶图导向多头自注意力（KOG-MSA）模块，堆叠构建KOG-Transformer网络；提出GASE-Net通过3D姿态逐步建模手部形状。
AI.result: KOG-Transformer在Human3.6M数据集上显著优于现有方法，GASE-Net在ObMan和InterHand2.6M数据集上表现出强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的图注意力模块和网络架构有效提升了3D姿态及手部形状估计性能，验证了方法的优越性。

title: Robust Motion Averaging for Multi-view Registration of Point Sets Based Maximum Correntropy Criterion
title_zh: 基于最大熵准则的点集多视图配准的鲁棒运动平均
abstract: As an efficient algorithm to solve the multi-view registration problem,the motion averaging (MA) algorithm has been extensively studied and many MA-based algorithms have been introduced. They aim at recovering global motions from relative motions and exploiting information redundancy to average accumulative errors. However, one property of these methods is that they use Guass-Newton method to solve a least squares problem for the increment of global motions, which may lead to low efficiency and poor robustness to outliers. In this paper, we propose a novel motion averaging framework for the multi-view registration with Laplacian kernel-based maximum correntropy criterion (LMCC). Utilizing the Lie algebra motion framework and the correntropy measure, we propose a new cost function that takes all constraints supplied by relative motions into account. Obtaining the increment used to correct the global motions, can further be formulated as an optimization problem aimed at maximizing the cost function. By virtue of the quadratic technique, the optimization problem can be solved by dividing into two subproblems, i.e., computing the weight for each relative motion according to the current residuals and solving a second-order cone program problem (SOCP) for the increment in the next iteration. We also provide a novel strategy for determining the kernel width which ensures that our method can efficiently exploit information redundancy supplied by relative motions in the presence of many outliers. Finally, we compare the proposed method with other MA-based multi-view registration methods to verify its performance. Experimental tests on synthetic and real data demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance in terms of efficiency, accuracy and robustness.
summary: As an efficient algorithm to solve the multi-view registration problem,the motion averaging (MA) algorithm has been extensively studied and many MA-based algorithms have been introduced. They aim at recovering global motions from relative motions and exploiting information redundancy to average accumulative errors. However, one property of these methods is that they use Guass-Newton method to solve a least squares problem for the increment of global motions, which may lead to low efficiency and poor robustness to outliers. In this paper, we propose a novel motion averaging framework for the multi-view registration with Laplacian kernel-based maximum correntropy criterion (LMCC). Utilizing the Lie algebra motion framework and the correntropy measure, we propose a new cost function that takes all constraints supplied by relative motions into account. Obtaining the increment used to correct the global motions, can further be formulated as an optimization problem aimed at maximizing the cost function. By virtue of the quadratic technique, the optimization problem can be solved by dividing into two subproblems, i.e., computing the weight for each relative motion according to the current residuals and solving a second-order cone program problem (SOCP) for the increment in the next iteration. We also provide a novel strategy for determining the kernel width which ensures that our method can efficiently exploit information redundancy supplied by relative motions in the presence of many outliers. Finally, we compare the proposed method with other MA-based multi-view registration methods to verify its performance. Experimental tests on synthetic and real data demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance in terms of efficiency, accuracy and robustness.
abstract_zh: 【摘要】：运动平均(MA)算法作为解决多视图配准问题的有效算法,得到了广泛的研究,并提出了许多基于MA的算法。他们的目标是从相对运动中恢复全局运动，并利用信息冗余来平均累积误差。然而，这些方法的一个特点是它们使用高斯-牛顿法来解决全局运动增量的最小二乘问题，这可能导致效率低下且对异常值的鲁棒性较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的运动平均框架，用于使用基于拉普拉斯核的最大相关熵准则（LMCC）进行多视图配准。利用李代数运动框架和相关熵度量，我们提出了一种新的成本函数，该函数考虑了相对运动提供的所有约束。获得用于校正全局运动的增量可以进一步表述为旨在最大化成本函数的优化问题。借助二次技术，可以将优化问题分解为两个子问题来求解，即根据当前残差计算每个相对运动的权重，并求解下一次迭代增量的二阶锥体规划问题（SOCP）。我们还提供了一种确定内核宽度的新颖策略，确保我们的方法可以在存在许多异常值的情况下有效地利用相对运动提供的信息冗余。最后，我们将所提出的方法与其他基于 MA 的多视图配准方法进行比较，以验证其性能。对合成数据和真实数据的实验测试表明，我们的方法在效率、准确性和鲁棒性方面实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大相关熵准则的鲁棒运动平均框架，用于多视角点集配准，以提高算法效率和抗异常值能力。
AI.motivation: 现有运动平均算法依赖高斯牛顿法求解最小二乘问题，存在效率低且对异常值鲁棒性差的问题，需改进方法以提升性能。
AI.method: 结合李代数运动框架与相关熵度量，构建考虑相对运动约束的新代价函数，并通过二次技术分解为权重计算和二阶锥规划子问题，同时提出自适应核宽确定策略。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上的实验表明，该方法在效率、精度和抗异常值能力方面优于其他基于运动平均的多视角配准方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过最大相关熵准则有效利用相对运动信息冗余，显著提升了多视角配准的鲁棒性和计算效率。

search_text: Robust Motion Averaging for Multi-view Registration of Point Sets Based Maximum Correntropy Criterion 基于最大熵准则的点集多视图配准的鲁棒运动平均 As an efficient algorithm to solve the multi-view registration problem,the motion averaging (MA) algorithm has been extensively studied and many MA-based algorithms have been introduced. They aim at recovering global motions from relative motions and exploiting information redundancy to average accumulative errors. However, one property of these methods is that they use Guass-Newton method to solve a least squares problem for the increment of global motions, which may lead to low efficiency and poor robustness to outliers. In this paper, we propose a novel motion averaging framework for the multi-view registration with Laplacian kernel-based maximum correntropy criterion (LMCC). Utilizing the Lie algebra motion framework and the correntropy measure, we propose a new cost function that takes all constraints supplied by relative motions into account. Obtaining the increment used to correct the global motions, can further be formulated as an optimization problem aimed at maximizing the cost function. By virtue of the quadratic technique, the optimization problem can be solved by dividing into two subproblems, i.e., computing the weight for each relative motion according to the current residuals and solving a second-order cone program problem (SOCP) for the increment in the next iteration. We also provide a novel strategy for determining the kernel width which ensures that our method can efficiently exploit information redundancy supplied by relative motions in the presence of many outliers. Finally, we compare the proposed method with other MA-based multi-view registration methods to verify its performance. Experimental tests on synthetic and real data demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance in terms of efficiency, accuracy and robustness. 【摘要】：运动平均(MA)算法作为解决多视图配准问题的有效算法,得到了广泛的研究,并提出了许多基于MA的算法。他们的目标是从相对运动中恢复全局运动，并利用信息冗余来平均累积误差。然而，这些方法的一个特点是它们使用高斯-牛顿法来解决全局运动增量的最小二乘问题，这可能导致效率低下且对异常值的鲁棒性较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的运动平均框架，用于使用基于拉普拉斯核的最大相关熵准则（LMCC）进行多视图配准。利用李代数运动框架和相关熵度量，我们提出了一种新的成本函数，该函数考虑了相对运动提供的所有约束。获得用于校正全局运动的增量可以进一步表述为旨在最大化成本函数的优化问题。借助二次技术，可以将优化问题分解为两个子问题来求解，即根据当前残差计算每个相对运动的权重，并求解下一次迭代增量的二阶锥体规划问题（SOCP）。我们还提供了一种确定内核宽度的新颖策略，确保我们的方法可以在存在许多异常值的情况下有效地利用相对运动提供的信息冗余。最后，我们将所提出的方法与其他基于 MA 的多视图配准方法进行比较，以验证其性能。对合成数据和真实数据的实验测试表明，我们的方法在效率、准确性和鲁棒性方面实现了卓越的性能。 本文提出一种基于最大相关熵准则的鲁棒运动平均框架，用于多视角点集配准，以提高算法效率和抗异常值能力。 Yugeng Huang,Haitao Liu,Tian Huang cs.CV

title: Fast Primal-Dual Update against Local Weight Update in Linear Assignment Problem and Its Application
title_zh: 线性分配问题中针对局部权重更新的快速原对偶更新及其应用
comment: Accepted by Information Processing Letters; 11 pages
comments: Accepted by Information Processing Letters; 11 pages
abstract: We consider a dynamic situation in the weighted bipartite matching problem: edge weights in the input graph are repeatedly updated and we are asked to maintain an optimal matching at any moment. A trivial approach is to compute an optimal matching from scratch each time an update occurs. In this paper, we show that if each update occurs locally around a single vertex, then a single execution of Dijkstra's algorithm is sufficient to preserve optimality with the aid of a dual solution. As an application of our result, we provide a faster implementation of the envy-cycle procedure for finding an envy-free allocation of indivisible items. Our algorithm runs in $\mathrm{O}(mn^2)$ time, while the known bound of the original one is $\mathrm{O}(mn^3)$, where $n$ and $m$ denote the numbers of agents and items, respectively.
summary: We consider a dynamic situation in the weighted bipartite matching problem: edge weights in the input graph are repeatedly updated and we are asked to maintain an optimal matching at any moment. A trivial approach is to compute an optimal matching from scratch each time an update occurs. In this paper, we show that if each update occurs locally around a single vertex, then a single execution of Dijkstra's algorithm is sufficient to preserve optimality with the aid of a dual solution. As an application of our result, we provide a faster implementation of the envy-cycle procedure for finding an envy-free allocation of indivisible items. Our algorithm runs in $\mathrm{O}(mn^2)$ time, while the known bound of the original one is $\mathrm{O}(mn^3)$, where $n$ and $m$ denote the numbers of agents and items, respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑加权二分匹配问题中的动态情况：输入图中的边权重被重复更新，并且要求我们随时保持最佳匹配。一种简单的方法是每次更新时从头开始计算最佳匹配。在本文中，我们表明，如果每次更新都发生在单个顶点周围，则单次执行 Dijkstra 算法就足以在对偶解决方案的帮助下保持最优性。作为我们结果的应用，我们提供了嫉妒循环过程的更快实现，以找到不可分割项目的无嫉妒分配。我们的算法运行时间为 $\mathrm{O}(mn^2)$，而原始算法的已知界限为 $\mathrm{O}(mn^3)$，其中 $n$ 和 $m$ 分别表示代理和项目的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了动态加权二分图匹配问题中局部权重更新的高效维护方法，并将其应用于改进公平分配算法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在每次权重更新后需从头计算最优匹配，效率低下。当更新仅发生在单个顶点附近时，需探索更高效的局部更新策略。
AI.method: 利用对偶解辅助，通过单次Dijkstra算法执行实现局部权重更新后的最优匹配维护，并应用于改进恩怨循环算法。
AI.result: 提出的时间复杂度为O(mn²)的算法，较原有O(mn³)方法提升了效率，成功用于不可分割物品的公平分配问题。
AI.conclusion: 针对局部权重更新场景，本文方法通过结合对偶理论与Dijkstra算法实现了动态匹配问题的高效求解，为公平分配问题提供了更优解决方案。

title: A convolutional plane wave model for sound field reconstruction
title_zh: 用于声场重建的卷积平面波模型
comment: Improve description of figures and figure labels, add code reference
comments: Improve description of figures and figure labels, add code reference
abstract: Spatial sound field interpolation relies on suitable models to both conform to available measurements and predict the sound field in the domain of interest. A suitable model can be difficult to determine when the spatial domain of interest is large compared to the wavelength or when spherical and planar wavefronts are present or the sound field is complex, as in the near-field. To span such complex sound fields, the global reconstruction task can be partitioned into local subdomain problems. Previous studies have shown that partitioning approaches rely on sufficient measurements within each domain, due to the higher number of model coefficients. This study proposes a joint analysis of all local subdomains, while enforcing self-similarity between neighbouring partitions. More specifically, the coefficients of local plane wave representations are sought to have spatially smooth magnitudes. A convolutional model of the sound field in terms of plane wave filters is formulated and the inverse reconstruction problem is solved via the alternating direction method of multipliers. The experiments on simulated and measured sound fields suggest, that the proposed method both retains the flexibility of local models to conform to complex sound fields and also preserves the global structure to reconstruct from fewer measurements.
summary: Spatial sound field interpolation relies on suitable models to both conform to available measurements and predict the sound field in the domain of interest. A suitable model can be difficult to determine when the spatial domain of interest is large compared to the wavelength or when spherical and planar wavefronts are present or the sound field is complex, as in the near-field. To span such complex sound fields, the global reconstruction task can be partitioned into local subdomain problems. Previous studies have shown that partitioning approaches rely on sufficient measurements within each domain, due to the higher number of model coefficients. This study proposes a joint analysis of all local subdomains, while enforcing self-similarity between neighbouring partitions. More specifically, the coefficients of local plane wave representations are sought to have spatially smooth magnitudes. A convolutional model of the sound field in terms of plane wave filters is formulated and the inverse reconstruction problem is solved via the alternating direction method of multipliers. The experiments on simulated and measured sound fields suggest, that the proposed method both retains the flexibility of local models to conform to complex sound fields and also preserves the global structure to reconstruct from fewer measurements.
abstract_zh: 空间声场插值依赖于合适的模型来符合可用的测量结果并预测感兴趣域中的声场。当感兴趣的空间域与波长相比较大时，或者当存在球形和平面波前或声场复杂（如在近场中）时，可能很难确定合适的模型。为了跨越如此复杂的声场，全局重建任务可以分为局部子域问题。先前的研究表明，由于模型系数的数量较多，划分方法依赖于每个域内的足够测量。本研究提出对所有局部子域进行联合分析，同时加强相邻分区之间的自相似性。更具体地，寻求局部平面波表示的系数具有空间平滑的幅度。建立了平面波滤波器的声场卷积模型，并通过乘法器交替方向法解决了逆重构问题。模拟和测量声场的实验表明，所提出的方法既保留了局部模型适应复杂声场的灵活性，又保留了全局结构以通过较少的测量进行重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积平面波模型的声场重建方法，通过局部子域划分与全局结构约束实现复杂声场的高效重建。
AI.motivation: 传统声场建模在处理大尺度区域或复杂波前（如近场）时面临模型选择困难，且分割方法依赖每个子域的充足测量数据。
AI.method: 将全局重建分解为局部子域问题，强制相邻子域自相似性，构建平面波滤波器的卷积模型，并采用交替方向乘子法求解逆问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持局部模型适应复杂声场灵活性的同时，能显著减少所需测量数据量并保留全局结构。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效融合局部灵活性与全局约束，为复杂声场的稀疏测量重建提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积平面波模型的声场重建方法，通过局部子域划分与全局结构约束实现复杂声场的高效重建。
motivation: 传统声场建模在处理大尺度区域或复杂波前（如近场）时面临模型选择困难，且分割方法依赖每个子域的充足测量数据。
method: 将全局重建分解为局部子域问题，强制相邻子域自相似性，构建平面波滤波器的卷积模型，并采用交替方向乘子法求解逆问题。
result: 实验表明，该方法在保持局部模型适应复杂声场灵活性的同时，能显著减少所需测量数据量并保留全局结构。
conclusion: 所提方法有效融合局部灵活性与全局约束，为复杂声场的稀疏测量重建提供了新思路。
search_text: A convolutional plane wave model for sound field reconstruction 用于声场重建的卷积平面波模型 Spatial sound field interpolation relies on suitable models to both conform to available measurements and predict the sound field in the domain of interest. A suitable model can be difficult to determine when the spatial domain of interest is large compared to the wavelength or when spherical and planar wavefronts are present or the sound field is complex, as in the near-field. To span such complex sound fields, the global reconstruction task can be partitioned into local subdomain problems. Previous studies have shown that partitioning approaches rely on sufficient measurements within each domain, due to the higher number of model coefficients. This study proposes a joint analysis of all local subdomains, while enforcing self-similarity between neighbouring partitions. More specifically, the coefficients of local plane wave representations are sought to have spatially smooth magnitudes. A convolutional model of the sound field in terms of plane wave filters is formulated and the inverse reconstruction problem is solved via the alternating direction method of multipliers. The experiments on simulated and measured sound fields suggest, that the proposed method both retains the flexibility of local models to conform to complex sound fields and also preserves the global structure to reconstruct from fewer measurements. 空间声场插值依赖于合适的模型来符合可用的测量结果并预测感兴趣域中的声场。当感兴趣的空间域与波长相比较大时，或者当存在球形和平面波前或声场复杂（如在近场中）时，可能很难确定合适的模型。为了跨越如此复杂的声场，全局重建任务可以分为局部子域问题。先前的研究表明，由于模型系数的数量较多，划分方法依赖于每个域内的足够测量。本研究提出对所有局部子域进行联合分析，同时加强相邻分区之间的自相似性。更具体地，寻求局部平面波表示的系数具有空间平滑的幅度。建立了平面波滤波器的声场卷积模型，并通过乘法器交替方向法解决了逆重构问题。模拟和测量声场的实验表明，所提出的方法既保留了局部模型适应复杂声场的灵活性，又保留了全局结构以通过较少的测量进行重建。 本文提出一种基于卷积平面波模型的声场重建方法，通过局部子域划分与全局结构约束实现复杂声场的高效重建。 Manuel Hahmann,Efren Fernandez-Grande eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Martinus Grady Naftali,Jason Sebastian Sulistyawan,Kelvin Julian
title: Comparison of Object Detection Algorithms for Street-level Objects
title_zh: 街道级物体的物体检测算法比较
abstract: Object detection for street-level objects can be applied to various use cases, from car and traffic detection to the self-driving car system. Therefore, finding the best object detection algorithm is essential to apply it effectively. Many object detection algorithms have been released, and many have compared object detection algorithms, but few have compared the latest algorithms, such as YOLOv5, primarily which focus on street-level objects. This paper compares various one-stage detector algorithms; SSD MobileNetv2 FPN-lite 320x320, YOLOv3, YOLOv4, YOLOv5l, and YOLOv5s for street-level object detection within real-time images. The experiment utilizes a modified Udacity Self Driving Car Dataset with 3,169 images. Dataset is split into train, validation, and test; Then, it is preprocessed and augmented using rescaling, hue shifting, and noise. Each algorithm is then trained and evaluated. Based on the experiments, the algorithms have produced decent results according to the inference time and the values of their precision, recall, F1-Score, and Mean Average Precision (mAP). The results also shows that YOLOv5l outperforms the other algorithms in terms of accuracy with a mAP@.5 of 0.593, MobileNetv2 FPN-lite has the fastest inference time among the others with only 3.20ms inference time. It is also found that YOLOv5s is the most efficient, with it having a YOLOv5l accuracy and a speed almost as quick as the MobileNetv2 FPN-lite. This shows that various algorithm are suitable for street-level object detection and viable enough to be used in self-driving car.

This paper compares various one-stage detector algorithms; SSD MobileNetv2 FPN-lite 320x320, YOLOv3, YOLOv4, YOLOv5l, and YOLOv5s for street-level object detection within real-time images. The experiment utilizes a modified Udacity Self Driving Car Dataset with 3,169 images. Dataset is split into train, validation, and test; Then, it is preprocessed and augmented using rescaling, hue shifting, and noise. Each algorithm is then trained and evaluated. Based on the experiments, the algorithms have produced decent results according to the inference time and the values of their precision, recall, F1-Score, and Mean Average Precision (mAP). The results also shows that YOLOv5l outperforms the other algorithms in terms of accuracy with a mAP@.5 of 0.593, MobileNetv2 FPN-lite has the fastest inference time among the others with only 3.20ms inference time. It is also found that YOLOv5s is the most efficient, with it having a YOLOv5l accuracy and a speed almost as quick as the MobileNetv2 FPN-lite. This shows that various algorithm are suitable for street-level object detection and viable enough to be used in self-driving car.
abstract_zh: 街道级物体的物体检测可应用于各种用例，从汽车和交通检测到自动驾驶汽车系统。因此，找到最佳的目标检测算法对于有效应用它至关重要。目前已经发布了很多物体检测算法，也有很多对物体检测算法进行了比较，但很少有对最新的算法进行比较，比如YOLOv5，主要关注街道级别的物体。本文比较了各种单级检测器算法； SSD MobileNetv2 FPN-lite 320x320、YOLOv3、YOLOv4、YOLOv5l 和 YOLOv5s，用于实时图像中的街道级物体检测。该实验使用了经过修改的 Udacity 自动驾驶汽车数据集，其中包含 3,169 张图像。数据集分为训练、验证和测试；然后，使用重新缩放、色调偏移和噪声对其进行预处理和增强。然后对每个算法进行训练和评估。根据实验，根据推理时间及其精度、召回率、F1 分数和平均精度 (mAP) 的值，算法产生了不错的结果。结果还表明，YOLOv5l 在准确率方面优于其他算法，mAP@.5 为 0.593，MobileNetv2 FPN-lite 的推理时间最快，仅为 3.20ms。我们还发现 YOLOv5s 是最高效的，它具有 YOLOv5l 的精度，并且速度几乎与 MobileNetv2 FPN-lite 一样快。这表明各种算法都适合街道级物体检测，并且足够可行，可以用于自动驾驶汽车。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了多种单阶段目标检测算法在街景级物体检测中的性能，包括YOLOv3、YOLOv4、YOLOv5l、YOLOv5s和SSD MobileNetv2 FPN-lite。
AI.motivation: 街景物体检测对自动驾驶等应用至关重要，但现有研究较少针对最新算法（如YOLOv5）在街景场景下的性能对比。
AI.method: 使用修改后的Udacity自动驾驶数据集（3,169张图像），按训练/验证/测试集划分后进行重缩放、色相偏移和噪声增强。对比算法在相同条件下训练并评估精度、召回率、F1分数、mAP及推理时间。
AI.result: YOLOv5l以mAP@.5=0.593精度最优，MobileNetv2 FPN-lite推理最快（3.20ms），YOLOv5s在精度与速度间取得最佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: 不同算法适用于不同场景需求，YOLOv5系列在街景检测中兼具准确性与效率，适合自动驾驶系统应用。

authors_text: Sumin Lee,Sangmin Woo,Yeonju Park,Muhammad Adi Nugroho,Changick Kim
title: Modality Mixer for Multi-modal Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于多模态动作识别的模态混合器
comment: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: In multi-modal action recognition, it is important to consider not only the complementary nature of different modalities but also global action content. In this paper, we propose a novel network, named Modality Mixer (M-Mixer) network, to leverage complementary information across modalities and temporal context of an action for multi-modal action recognition. We also introduce a simple yet effective recurrent unit, called Multi-modal Contextualization Unit (MCU), which is a core component of M-Mixer. Our MCU temporally encodes a sequence of one modality (e.g., RGB) with action content features of other modalities (e.g., depth, IR). This process encourages M-Mixer to exploit global action content and also to supplement complementary information of other modalities. As a result, our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and NW-UCLA datasets. Moreover, we demonstrate the effectiveness of M-Mixer by conducting comprehensive ablation studies.
summary: In multi-modal action recognition, it is important to consider not only the complementary nature of different modalities but also global action content. In this paper, we propose a novel network, named Modality Mixer (M-Mixer) network, to leverage complementary information across modalities and temporal context of an action for multi-modal action recognition. We also introduce a simple yet effective recurrent unit, called Multi-modal Contextualization Unit (MCU), which is a core component of M-Mixer. Our MCU temporally encodes a sequence of one modality (e.g., RGB) with action content features of other modalities (e.g., depth, IR). This process encourages M-Mixer to exploit global action content and also to supplement complementary information of other modalities. As a result, our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and NW-UCLA datasets. Moreover, we demonstrate the effectiveness of M-Mixer by conducting comprehensive ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 在多模态动作识别中，不仅要考虑不同模态的互补性，还要考虑全局动作内容。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为模态混合器（M-Mixer）网络的新颖网络，以利用跨模态和动作的时间上下文的补充信息来进行多模态动作识别。我们还介绍了一个简单而有效的循环单元，称为多模态上下文化单元（MCU），它是 M-Mixer 的核心组件。我们的 MCU 对一种模态（例如 RGB）的序列与其他模态（例如深度、IR）的动作内容特征进行时间编码。这一过程鼓励 M-Mixer 利用全球行动内容，并补充其他模式的补充信息。因此，我们提出的方法在 NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 NW-UCLA 数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。此外，我们通过进行全面的消融研究证明了 M-Mixer 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Modality Mixer（M-Mixer）的新型网络，用于多模态动作识别，通过融合不同模态的互补信息和动作全局内容提升识别效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态动作识别中未能充分结合不同模态的互补性与动作全局内容，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 设计M-Mixer网络及核心组件多模态上下文单元（MCU），通过递归机制将单一模态（如RGB）的时序信息与其它模态（如深度、红外）的动作特征进行跨模态融合。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120和NW-UCLA数据集上均优于现有最先进方法，并通过消融实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: M-Mixer通过跨模态时序融合机制有效提升了多模态动作识别性能，实验结果验证了其优越性。

method: 设计M-Mixer网络及核心组件多模态上下文单元（MCU），通过递归机制将单一模态（如RGB）的时序信息与其它模态（如深度、红外）的动作特征进行跨模态融合。
result: 在NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120和NW-UCLA数据集上均优于现有最先进方法，并通过消融实验验证了方法有效性。
conclusion: M-Mixer通过跨模态时序融合机制有效提升了多模态动作识别性能，实验结果验证了其优越性。
search_text: Modality Mixer for Multi-modal Action Recognition 用于多模态动作识别的模态混合器 In multi-modal action recognition, it is important to consider not only the complementary nature of different modalities but also global action content. In this paper, we propose a novel network, named Modality Mixer (M-Mixer) network, to leverage complementary information across modalities and temporal context of an action for multi-modal action recognition. We also introduce a simple yet effective recurrent unit, called Multi-modal Contextualization Unit (MCU), which is a core component of M-Mixer. Our MCU temporally encodes a sequence of one modality (e.g., RGB) with action content features of other modalities (e.g., depth, IR). This process encourages M-Mixer to exploit global action content and also to supplement complementary information of other modalities. As a result, our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and NW-UCLA datasets. Moreover, we demonstrate the effectiveness of M-Mixer by conducting comprehensive ablation studies. 在多模态动作识别中，不仅要考虑不同模态的互补性，还要考虑全局动作内容。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为模态混合器（M-Mixer）网络的新颖网络，以利用跨模态和动作的时间上下文的补充信息来进行多模态动作识别。我们还介绍了一个简单而有效的循环单元，称为多模态上下文化单元（MCU），它是 M-Mixer 的核心组件。我们的 MCU 对一种模态（例如 RGB）的序列与其他模态（例如深度、IR）的动作内容特征进行时间编码。这一过程鼓励 M-Mixer 利用全球行动内容，并补充其他模式的补充信息。因此，我们提出的方法在 NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 NW-UCLA 数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。此外，我们通过进行全面的消融研究证明了 M-Mixer 的有效性。 本文提出一种名为Modality Mixer（M-Mixer）的新型网络，用于多模态动作识别，通过融合不同模态的互补信息和动作全局内容提升识别效果。 Sumin Lee,Sangmin Woo,Yeonju Park,Muhammad Adi Nugroho,Changick Kim cs.CV

title: RZSR: Reference-based Zero-Shot Super-Resolution with Depth Guided Self-Exemplars
title_zh: RZSR：基于参考的零样本超分辨率，具有深度引导自范例
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM)
abstract: Recent methods for single image super-resolution (SISR) have demonstrated outstanding performance in generating high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) images. However, most of these methods show their superiority using synthetically generated LR images, and their generalizability to real-world images is often not satisfactory. In this paper, we pay attention to two well-known strategies developed for robust super-resolution (SR), i.e., reference-based SR (RefSR) and zero-shot SR (ZSSR), and propose an integrated solution, called reference-based zero-shot SR (RZSR). Following the principle of ZSSR, we train an image-specific SR network at test time using training samples extracted only from the input image itself. To advance ZSSR, we obtain reference image patches with rich textures and high-frequency details which are also extracted only from the input image using cross-scale matching. To this end, we construct an internal reference dataset and retrieve reference image patches from the dataset using depth information. Using LR patches and their corresponding HR reference patches, we train a RefSR network that is embodied with a non-local attention module. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed RZSR compared to the previous ZSSR methods and robustness to unseen images compared to other fully supervised SISR methods.
summary: Recent methods for single image super-resolution (SISR) have demonstrated outstanding performance in generating high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) images. However, most of these methods show their superiority using synthetically generated LR images, and their generalizability to real-world images is often not satisfactory. In this paper, we pay attention to two well-known strategies developed for robust super-resolution (SR), i.e., reference-based SR (RefSR) and zero-shot SR (ZSSR), and propose an integrated solution, called reference-based zero-shot SR (RZSR). Following the principle of ZSSR, we train an image-specific SR network at test time using training samples extracted only from the input image itself. To advance ZSSR, we obtain reference image patches with rich textures and high-frequency details which are also extracted only from the input image using cross-scale matching. To this end, we construct an internal reference dataset and retrieve reference image patches from the dataset using depth information. Using LR patches and their corresponding HR reference patches, we train a RefSR network that is embodied with a non-local attention module. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed RZSR compared to the previous ZSSR methods and robustness to unseen images compared to other fully supervised SISR methods.
abstract_zh: 最近的单图像超分辨率（SISR）方法在从低分辨率（LR）图像生成高分辨率（HR）图像方面表现出了出色的性能。然而，这些方法大多数都使用合成生成的 LR 图像来显示其优越性，并且它们对现实世界图像的泛化性往往不令人满意。在本文中，我们关注为鲁棒超分辨率（SR）开发的两种著名策略，即基于参考的SR（RefSR）和零样本SR（ZSSR），并提出了一种集成解决方案，称为基于参考的零样本SR（RZSR）。遵循 ZSSR 的原理，我们在测试时使用仅从输入图像本身提取的训练样本来训练特定于图像的 SR 网络。为了推进 ZSSR，我们获得了具有丰富纹理和高频细节的参考图像块，这些参考图像块也是使用跨尺度匹配仅从输入图像中提取的。为此，我们构建了一个内部参考数据集，并使用深度信息从数据集中检索参考图像块。使用 LR 补丁及其相应的 HR 参考补丁，我们训练一个包含非局部注意力模块的 RefSR 网络。实验结果证明了所提出的 RZSR 与之前的 ZSSR 方法相比的优越性，以及与其他完全监督的 SISR 方法相比对未见过图像的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参考的零样本超分辨率方法RZSR，通过结合参考图像和自例学习策略，提升真实场景下的图像超分辨率性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像超分辨率方法在合成低分辨率图像上表现优异，但难以泛化到真实世界图像，需探索无需外部数据且适应真实场景的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于ZSSR原理，从输入图像中提取训练样本并构建内部参考数据集，结合深度信息检索纹理丰富的参考块，训练带有非局部注意力模块的参考超分辨率网络。
AI.result: 实验表明RZSR相比传统零样本方法和全监督方法在真实图像上具有更优的超分辨率效果和更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RZSR通过整合参考图像与自例学习策略，结合深度引导的内部数据构建，有效提升了真实场景下的超分辨率能力。

authors_text: Rui Song,Dai Liu,Dave Zhenyu Chen,Andreas Festag,Carsten Trinitis,Martin Schulz,Alois Knoll
title: Federated Learning via Decentralized Dataset Distillation in Resource-Constrained Edge Environments
title_zh: 在资源受限的边缘环境中通过去中心化数据集蒸馏进行联邦学习
abstract: In federated learning, all networked clients contribute to the model training cooperatively. However, with model sizes increasing, even sharing the trained partial models often leads to severe communication bottlenecks in underlying networks, especially when communicated iteratively. In this paper, we introduce a federated learning framework FedD3 requiring only one-shot communication by integrating dataset distillation instances. Instead of sharing model updates in other federated learning approaches, FedD3 allows the connected clients to distill the local datasets independently, and then aggregates those decentralized distilled datasets (e.g. a few unrecognizable images) from networks for model training. Our experimental results show that FedD3 significantly outperforms other federated learning frameworks in terms of needed communication volumes, while it provides the additional benefit to be able to balance the trade-off between accuracy and communication cost, depending on usage scenario or target dataset. For instance, for training an AlexNet model on CIFAR-10 with 10 clients under non-independent and identically distributed (Non-IID) setting, FedD3 can either increase the accuracy by over 71% with a similar communication volume, or save 98% of communication volume, while reaching the same accuracy, compared to other one-shot federated learning approaches.
summary: In federated learning, all networked clients contribute to the model training cooperatively. However, with model sizes increasing, even sharing the trained partial models often leads to severe communication bottlenecks in underlying networks, especially when communicated iteratively. In this paper, we introduce a federated learning framework FedD3 requiring only one-shot communication by integrating dataset distillation instances. Instead of sharing model updates in other federated learning approaches, FedD3 allows the connected clients to distill the local datasets independently, and then aggregates those decentralized distilled datasets (e.g. a few unrecognizable images) from networks for model training. Our experimental results show that FedD3 significantly outperforms other federated learning frameworks in terms of needed communication volumes, while it provides the additional benefit to be able to balance the trade-off between accuracy and communication cost, depending on usage scenario or target dataset. For instance, for training an AlexNet model on CIFAR-10 with 10 clients under non-independent and identically distributed (Non-IID) setting, FedD3 can either increase the accuracy by over 71% with a similar communication volume, or save 98% of communication volume, while reaching the same accuracy, compared to other one-shot federated learning approaches.
abstract_zh: 在联邦学习中，所有联网客户端共同为模型训练做出贡献。然而，随着模型大小的增加，即使共享经过训练的部分模型也常常会导致底层网络中出现严重的通信瓶颈，尤其是在迭代通信时。在本文中，我们介绍了一种联邦学习框架 FedD3，通过集成数据集蒸馏实例，仅需要一次性通信。 FedD3 没有在其他联邦学习方法中共享模型更新，而是允许连接的客户端独立提取本地数据集，然后从网络聚合这些分散的提取数据集（例如一些无法识别的图像）以进行模型训练。我们的实验结果表明，FedD3 在所需通信量方面显着优于其他联邦学习框架，同时它还提供了额外的好处，能够根据使用场景或目标数据集平衡准确性和通信成本之间的权衡。例如，对于在非独立同分布（Non-IID）设置下在 CIFAR-10 上训练具有 10 个客户端的 AlexNet 模型，与其他一次性联邦学习方法相比，FedD3 可以在类似通信量的情况下将准确性提高 71% 以上，或者在达到相同准确性的情况下节省 98% 的通信量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FedD3的联邦学习框架，通过去中心化的数据集蒸馏技术，在资源受限的边缘环境中减少通信开销。
AI.motivation: 随着模型规模增大，传统联邦学习中频繁共享部分模型参数会导致通信瓶颈，尤其在迭代通信场景下问题更为严重。
AI.method: FedD3通过让客户端独立蒸馏本地数据集（生成少量不可识别图像），仅需一次通信即可聚合去中心化的蒸馏数据进行模型训练，而非共享模型更新。
AI.result: 实验表明，FedD3在通信量需求上显著优于其他联邦学习框架，例如在CIFAR-10数据集上训练AlexNet时，可在相似通信量下提升71%准确率，或在保持相同准确率时减少98%通信量。
AI.conclusion: FedD3通过数据集蒸馏有效平衡了通信成本与模型精度，为资源受限的边缘计算环境提供了高效的联邦学习解决方案。

Instead of sharing model updates in other federated learning approaches, FedD3 allows the connected clients to distill the local datasets independently, and then aggregates those decentralized distilled datasets (e.g. a few unrecognizable images) from networks for model training. Our experimental results show that FedD3 significantly outperforms other federated learning frameworks in terms of needed communication volumes, while it provides the additional benefit to be able to balance the trade-off between accuracy and communication cost, depending on usage scenario or target dataset. For instance, for training an AlexNet model on CIFAR-10 with 10 clients under non-independent and identically distributed (Non-IID) setting, FedD3 can either increase the accuracy by over 71% with a similar communication volume, or save 98% of communication volume, while reaching the same accuracy, compared to other one-shot federated learning approaches. 在联邦学习中，所有联网客户端共同为模型训练做出贡献。然而，随着模型大小的增加，即使共享经过训练的部分模型也常常会导致底层网络中出现严重的通信瓶颈，尤其是在迭代通信时。在本文中，我们介绍了一种联邦学习框架 FedD3，通过集成数据集蒸馏实例，仅需要一次性通信。 FedD3 没有在其他联邦学习方法中共享模型更新，而是允许连接的客户端独立提取本地数据集，然后从网络聚合这些分散的提取数据集（例如一些无法识别的图像）以进行模型训练。我们的实验结果表明，FedD3 在所需通信量方面显着优于其他联邦学习框架，同时它还提供了额外的好处，能够根据使用场景或目标数据集平衡准确性和通信成本之间的权衡。例如，对于在非独立同分布（Non-IID）设置下在 CIFAR-10 上训练具有 10 个客户端的 AlexNet 模型，与其他一次性联邦学习方法相比，FedD3 可以在类似通信量的情况下将准确性提高 71% 以上，或者在达到相同准确性的情况下节省 98% 的通信量。 本文提出了一种名为FedD3的联邦学习框架，通过去中心化的数据集蒸馏技术，在资源受限的边缘环境中减少通信开销。 Rui Song,Dai Liu,Dave Zhenyu Chen,Andreas Festag,Carsten Trinitis,Martin Schulz,Alois Knoll cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Evgenii Indenbom,Nicolae-Cătălin Ristea,Ando Saabas,Tanel Pärnamaa,Jegor Gužvin
title: Deep model with built-in cross-attention alignment for acoustic echo cancellation
title_zh: 具有内置交叉注意力对齐的深度模型，用于声学回声消除
abstract: With recent research advances, deep learning models have become an attractive choice for acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) in real-time teleconferencing applications. Since acoustic echo is one of the major sources of poor audio quality, a wide variety of deep models have been proposed. However, an important but often omitted requirement for good echo cancellation quality is the synchronization of the microphone and far end signals. Typically implemented using classical algorithms based on cross-correlation, the alignment module is a separate functional block with known design limitations. In our work we propose a deep learning architecture with built-in self-attention based alignment, which is able to handle unaligned inputs, improving echo cancellation performance while simplifying the communication pipeline. Moreover, we show that our approach achieves significant improvements for difficult delay estimation cases on real recordings from AEC Challenge data set.
summary: With recent research advances, deep learning models have become an attractive choice for acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) in real-time teleconferencing applications. Since acoustic echo is one of the major sources of poor audio quality, a wide variety of deep models have been proposed. However, an important but often omitted requirement for good echo cancellation quality is the synchronization of the microphone and far end signals. Typically implemented using classical algorithms based on cross-correlation, the alignment module is a separate functional block with known design limitations. In our work we propose a deep learning architecture with built-in self-attention based alignment, which is able to handle unaligned inputs, improving echo cancellation performance while simplifying the communication pipeline. Moreover, we show that our approach achieves significant improvements for difficult delay estimation cases on real recordings from AEC Challenge data set.
abstract_zh: 随着最近的研究进展，深度学习模型已成为实时电话会议应用中声学回声消除 (AEC) 的有吸引力的选择。由于声学回声是音频质量差的主要来源之一，因此人们提出了各种各样的深度模型。然而，对于良好的回声消除质量，一个重要但经常被忽略的要求是麦克风和远端信号的同步。对齐模块通常使用基于互相关的经典算法来实现，是一个具有已知设计限制的独立功能块。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种具有内置自注意力对齐的深度学习架构，它能够处理未对齐的输入，提高回声消除性能，同时简化通信管道。此外，我们还表明，我们的方法在 AEC 挑战数据集的真实记录上实现了困难的延迟估计情况的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种内置自注意力对齐的深度学习模型，用于改进声学回声消除中的信号同步问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐模块依赖传统算法，存在设计限制，需提升回声消除效果并简化流程。
AI.method: 设计深度学习架构，内置基于自注意力的对齐机制，处理未对齐输入，替代传统算法。
AI.result: 在AEC挑战数据集的实际录音中，方法在困难延迟估计情况下显著提升回声消除性能。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效解决同步问题，提升回声消除性能，简化通信流程。

authors_text: Qi Lv,Ziqiang Cao,Wenrui Xie,Derui Wang,Jingwen Wang,Zhiwei Hu,Tangkun Zhang,Ba Yuan,Yuanhang Li,Min Cao,Wenjie Li,Sujian Li,Guohong Fu
title: Visual Subtitle Feature Enhanced Video Outline Generation
title_zh: 视觉字幕功能增强视频轮廓生成
abstract: With the tremendously increasing number of videos, there is a great demand for techniques that help people quickly navigate to the video segments they are interested in. However, current works on video understanding mainly focus on video content summarization, while little effort has been made to explore the structure of a video. Inspired by textual outline generation, we introduce a novel video understanding task, namely video outline generation (VOG). This task is defined to contain two sub-tasks: (1) first segmenting the video according to the content structure and then (2) generating a heading for each segment. To learn and evaluate VOG, we annotate a 10k+ dataset, called DuVOG. Specifically, we use OCR tools to recognize subtitles of videos. Then annotators are asked to divide subtitles into chapters and title each chapter. In videos, highlighted text tends to be the headline since it is more likely to attract attention. Therefore we propose a Visual Subtitle feature Enhanced video outline generation model (VSENet) which takes as input the textual subtitles together with their visual font sizes and positions. We consider the VOG task as a sequence tagging problem that extracts spans where the headings are located and then rewrites them to form the final outlines. Furthermore, based on the similarity between video outlines and textual outlines, we use a large number of articles with chapter headings to pretrain our model. Experiments on DuVOG show that our model largely outperforms other baseline methods, achieving 77.1 of F1-score for the video segmentation level and 85.0 of ROUGE-L_F0.5 for the headline generation level.
summary: With the tremendously increasing number of videos, there is a great demand for techniques that help people quickly navigate to the video segments they are interested in. However, current works on video understanding mainly focus on video content summarization, while little effort has been made to explore the structure of a video. Inspired by textual outline generation, we introduce a novel video understanding task, namely video outline generation (VOG). This task is defined to contain two sub-tasks: (1) first segmenting the video according to the content structure and then (2) generating a heading for each segment. To learn and evaluate VOG, we annotate a 10k+ dataset, called DuVOG. Specifically, we use OCR tools to recognize subtitles of videos. Then annotators are asked to divide subtitles into chapters and title each chapter. In videos, highlighted text tends to be the headline since it is more likely to attract attention. Therefore we propose a Visual Subtitle feature Enhanced video outline generation model (VSENet) which takes as input the textual subtitles together with their visual font sizes and positions. We consider the VOG task as a sequence tagging problem that extracts spans where the headings are located and then rewrites them to form the final outlines. Furthermore, based on the similarity between video outlines and textual outlines, we use a large number of articles with chapter headings to pretrain our model. Experiments on DuVOG show that our model largely outperforms other baseline methods, achieving 77.1 of F1-score for the video segmentation level and 85.0 of ROUGE-L_F0.5 for the headline generation level.
abstract_zh: 随着视频数量的急剧增加，对帮助人们快速导航到他们感兴趣的视频片段的技术有很大的需求。然而，当前视频理解的工作主要集中在视频内容摘要上，而很少致力于探索视频的结构。受文本轮廓生成的启发，我们引入了一种新颖的视频理解任务，即视频轮廓生成（VOG）。该任务被定义为包含两个子任务：（1）首先根据内容结构对视频进行分段，然后（2）为每个分段生成标题。为了学习和评估 VOG，我们注释了一个超过 10k 的数据集，称为 DuVOG。具体来说，我们使用OCR工具来识别视频的字幕。然后要求注释者将字幕分为章节并为每个章节添加标题。在视频中，突出显示的文本往往是标题，因为它更容易吸引注意。因此，我们提出了一种视觉字幕功能增强视频轮廓生成模型（VSENet），它将文本字幕及其视觉字体大小和位置作为输入。我们将 VOG 任务视为一个序列标记问题，提取标题所在的范围，然后重写它们以形成最终的轮廓。此外，基于视频轮廓和文本轮廓之间的相似性，我们使用大量带有章节标题的文章来预训练我们的模型。 DuVOG 上的实验表明，我们的模型在很大程度上优于其他基线方法，在视频分割级别实现了 77.1 的 F1 分数，在标题生成级别实现了 85.0 的 ROUGE-L_F0.5。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为视频大纲生成（VOG）的新任务，通过结合视觉字幕特征和文本信息，实现视频内容的结构化分割与标题生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解技术主要关注内容摘要，而忽视了视频结构分析。通过借鉴文本大纲生成方法，本文旨在探索视频结构化表示，帮助用户快速定位感兴趣片段。
AI.method: 构建包含10k+视频的DuVOG数据集，利用OCR识别字幕并标注章节标题；设计VSENet模型融合字幕文本、字体大小和位置等视觉特征，将任务建模为序列标注问题，并通过文章章节标题预训练模型。
AI.result: 在DuVOG数据集上，模型在视频分割任务中达到77.1的F1分数，在标题生成任务中达到85.0的ROUGE-L_F0.5分数，显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合视觉字幕特征与文本预训练有效提升了视频大纲生成性能，验证了多模态特征融合与结构化表示在视频理解中的价值。

title: Improved Scheduling of Morphing Edge Drawing
title_zh: 改进变形边缘绘制的调度
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: Morphing edge drawing (MED), a graph drawing technique, is a dynamic extension of partial edge drawing (PED), where partially drawn edges (stubs) are repeatedly stretched and shrunk by morphing. Previous experimental evaluations have shown that the reading time with MED may be shorter than that with PED. The morphing scheduling method limits visual clutter by avoiding crossings between stubs. However, as the number of intersections increases, the overall morphing cycle tends to lengthen in this method, which is likely to have a negative effect on the reading time. In this paper, improved scheduling methods are presented to address this issue. The first method shortens the duration of a single cycle by overlapping a part of the current cycle with the succeeding one. The second method duplicates every morph by the allowable number of times in one cycle. The third method permits a specific number of simultaneous crossings per edge. The effective performances of these methods are demonstrated through experimental evaluations.
summary: Morphing edge drawing (MED), a graph drawing technique, is a dynamic extension of partial edge drawing (PED), where partially drawn edges (stubs) are repeatedly stretched and shrunk by morphing. Previous experimental evaluations have shown that the reading time with MED may be shorter than that with PED. The morphing scheduling method limits visual clutter by avoiding crossings between stubs. However, as the number of intersections increases, the overall morphing cycle tends to lengthen in this method, which is likely to have a negative effect on the reading time. In this paper, improved scheduling methods are presented to address this issue. The first method shortens the duration of a single cycle by overlapping a part of the current cycle with the succeeding one. The second method duplicates every morph by the allowable number of times in one cycle. The third method permits a specific number of simultaneous crossings per edge. The effective performances of these methods are demonstrated through experimental evaluations.
abstract_zh: 变形边缘绘制 (MED) 是一种图形绘制技术，是部分边缘绘制 (PED) 的动态扩展，其中部分绘制的边缘（存根）通过变形反复拉伸和收缩。之前的实验评估表明，MED 的阅读时间可能比 PED 更短。变形调度方法通过避免存根之间的交叉来限制视觉混乱。然而，随着交叉点数量的增加，该方法的整体变形周期往往会延长，这可能会对阅读时间产生负面影响。本文提出了改进的调度方法来解决这个问题。第一种方法通过将当前周期的一部分与后续周期重叠来缩短单个周期的持续时间。第二种方法在一个周期内按照允许的次数复制每个变形。第三种方法允许每个边同时交叉特定数量。通过实验评估证明了这些方法的有效性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的动态边绘制调度方法，以优化形态变换过程中的视觉杂乱问题。
AI.motivation: 现有形态变换边绘制（MED）方法在边交叉增多时会导致循环周期延长，可能影响阅读效率，需改进调度策略。
AI.method: 提出三种改进方法：1）重叠当前与下一循环；2）在单循环内重复形态变换；3）允许每条边有限数量的交叉。
AI.result: 实验验证三种方法均有效缩短循环时间并减少视觉杂乱，提升阅读效率。
AI.conclusion: 改进的调度方法优化了MED的形态变换周期，平衡了交叉限制与动态效果，增强了图表可读性。

title: Modeling Paragraph-Level Vision-Language Semantic Alignment for Multi-Modal Summarization
title_zh: 多模态摘要的段落级视觉语言语义对齐建模
abstract: Most current multi-modal summarization methods follow a cascaded manner, where an off-the-shelf object detector is first used to extract visual features, then these features are fused with language representations to generate the summary with an encoder-decoder model. The cascaded way cannot capture the semantic alignments between images and paragraphs, which are crucial to a precise summary. In this paper, we propose ViL-Sum to jointly model paragraph-level \textbf{Vi}sion-\textbf{L}anguage Semantic Alignment and Multi-Modal \textbf{Sum}marization. The core of ViL-Sum is a joint multi-modal encoder with two well-designed tasks, image reordering and image selection. The joint multi-modal encoder captures the interactions between modalities, where the reordering task guides the model to learn paragraph-level semantic alignment and the selection task guides the model to selected summary-related images in the final summary. Experimental results show that our proposed ViL-Sum significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods. In further analysis, we find that two well-designed tasks and joint multi-modal encoder can effectively guide the model to learn reasonable paragraphs-images and summary-images relations.
summary: Most current multi-modal summarization methods follow a cascaded manner, where an off-the-shelf object detector is first used to extract visual features, then these features are fused with language representations to generate the summary with an encoder-decoder model. The cascaded way cannot capture the semantic alignments between images and paragraphs, which are crucial to a precise summary. In this paper, we propose ViL-Sum to jointly model paragraph-level \textbf{Vi}sion-\textbf{L}anguage Semantic Alignment and Multi-Modal \textbf{Sum}marization. The core of ViL-Sum is a joint multi-modal encoder with two well-designed tasks, image reordering and image selection. The joint multi-modal encoder captures the interactions between modalities, where the reordering task guides the model to learn paragraph-level semantic alignment and the selection task guides the model to selected summary-related images in the final summary. Experimental results show that our proposed ViL-Sum significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods. In further analysis, we find that two well-designed tasks and joint multi-modal encoder can effectively guide the model to learn reasonable paragraphs-images and summary-images relations.
abstract_zh: 目前大多数多模态摘要方法都遵循级联方式，首先使用现成的目标检测器来提取视觉特征，然后将这些特征与语言表示融合，以使用编码器-解码器模型生成摘要。级联方式无法捕获图像和段落之间的语义对齐，而这对于精确摘要至关重要。在本文中，我们提出 ViL-Sum 来联合建模段落级 \textbf{Vi}sion-\textbf{L} 语言语义对齐和多模态 \textbf{Sum}marization。 ViL-Sum 的核心是一个联合多模态编码器，具有两个精心设计的任务：图像重新排序和图像选择。联合多模态编码器捕获模态之间的交互，其中重新排序任务引导模型学习段落级语义对齐，选择任务引导模型在最终摘要中选择与摘要相关的图像。实验结果表明，我们提出的 ViL-Sum 明显优于当前最先进的方法。在进一步分析中，我们发现两个精心设计的任务和联合多模态编码器可以有效指导模型学习合理的段落-图像和摘要-图像关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViL-Sum方法，通过联合建模段落级视觉-语言语义对齐与多模态摘要生成，改进当前多模态摘要方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用级联方式处理多模态摘要，无法捕捉图像与段落间的语义对齐关系，导致摘要不够精准。
AI.method: 设计包含图像重排序和图像选择任务的联合多模态编码器，通过两个任务引导模型学习段落级语义对齐并筛选相关图像。
AI.result: 实验表明ViL-Sum显著优于现有最先进方法，且分析证实所设计任务与编码器能有效建立段落-图像与摘要-图像关系。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模视觉-语言语义对齐与摘要生成的任务设计，能有效提升多模态摘要的准确性与相关性。

title: E-NeRF: Neural Radiance Fields from a Moving Event Camera
title_zh: E-NeRF：来自移动事件相机的神经辐射场
comment: revised RAL version + added suppl. material
comments: revised RAL version + added suppl. material
abstract: Estimating neural radiance fields (NeRFs) from "ideal" images has been extensively studied in the computer vision community. Most approaches assume optimal illumination and slow camera motion. These assumptions are often violated in robotic applications, where images may contain motion blur, and the scene may not have suitable illumination. This can cause significant problems for downstream tasks such as navigation, inspection, or visualization of the scene. To alleviate these problems, we present E-NeRF, the first method which estimates a volumetric scene representation in the form of a NeRF from a fast-moving event camera. Our method can recover NeRFs during very fast motion and in high-dynamic-range conditions where frame-based approaches fail. We show that rendering high-quality frames is possible by only providing an event stream as input. Furthermore, by combining events and frames, we can estimate NeRFs of higher quality than state-of-the-art approaches under severe motion blur. We also show that combining events and frames can overcome failure cases of NeRF estimation in scenarios where only a few input views are available without requiring additional regularization.
summary: Estimating neural radiance fields (NeRFs) from "ideal" images has been extensively studied in the computer vision community. Most approaches assume optimal illumination and slow camera motion. These assumptions are often violated in robotic applications, where images may contain motion blur, and the scene may not have suitable illumination. This can cause significant problems for downstream tasks such as navigation, inspection, or visualization of the scene. To alleviate these problems, we present E-NeRF, the first method which estimates a volumetric scene representation in the form of a NeRF from a fast-moving event camera. Our method can recover NeRFs during very fast motion and in high-dynamic-range conditions where frame-based approaches fail. We show that rendering high-quality frames is possible by only providing an event stream as input. Furthermore, by combining events and frames, we can estimate NeRFs of higher quality than state-of-the-art approaches under severe motion blur. We also show that combining events and frames can overcome failure cases of NeRF estimation in scenarios where only a few input views are available without requiring additional regularization.
abstract_zh: 从“理想”图像估计神经辐射场（NeRF）已在计算机视觉社区中得到广泛研究。大多数方法都假设最佳照明和缓慢的相机运动。这些假设在机器人应用中经常被违反，其中图像可能包含运动模糊，并且场景可能没有合适的照明。这可能会给下游任务（例如场景的导航、检查或可视化）带来严重问题。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了 E-NeRF，这是第一种从快速移动的事件摄像机以 NeRF 形式估计体积场景表示的方法。我们的方法可以在非常快的运动和基于帧的方法失败的高动态范围条件下恢复 NeRF。我们证明，仅通过提供事件流作为输入就可以渲染高质量的帧。此外，通过结合事件和帧，我们可以在严重运动模糊下估计比最先进的方法更高质量的 NeRF。我们还表明，在只有少数输入视图可用的情况下，组合事件和帧可以克服 NeRF 估计的失败情况，而无需额外的正则化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出E-NeRF方法，通过移动事件相机估计神经辐射场（NeRF），解决传统方法在高速运动和高动态范围场景下的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法依赖理想光照和慢速相机运动，但在机器人应用中常面临运动模糊和光照不足问题，影响导航等任务性能。
AI.method: 利用事件相机的事件流作为输入，结合事件与帧数据，提出E-NeRF方法，在高速运动和高动态范围场景下重建体积场景表示。
AI.result: 仅通过事件流即可渲染高质量帧，结合事件与帧数据可超越现有方法在严重运动模糊下的性能，并解决少量输入视角下的NeRF估计失败问题。
AI.conclusion: E-NeRF在高速运动和极端光照条件下实现了鲁棒的NeRF估计，为机器人应用中的场景重建提供了新解决方案。

search_text: E-NeRF: Neural Radiance Fields from a Moving Event Camera E-NeRF：来自移动事件相机的神经辐射场 Estimating neural radiance fields (NeRFs) from "ideal" images has been extensively studied in the computer vision community. Most approaches assume optimal illumination and slow camera motion. These assumptions are often violated in robotic applications, where images may contain motion blur, and the scene may not have suitable illumination. This can cause significant problems for downstream tasks such as navigation, inspection, or visualization of the scene. To alleviate these problems, we present E-NeRF, the first method which estimates a volumetric scene representation in the form of a NeRF from a fast-moving event camera. Our method can recover NeRFs during very fast motion and in high-dynamic-range conditions where frame-based approaches fail. We show that rendering high-quality frames is possible by only providing an event stream as input. Furthermore, by combining events and frames, we can estimate NeRFs of higher quality than state-of-the-art approaches under severe motion blur. We also show that combining events and frames can overcome failure cases of NeRF estimation in scenarios where only a few input views are available without requiring additional regularization. 从“理想”图像估计神经辐射场（NeRF）已在计算机视觉社区中得到广泛研究。大多数方法都假设最佳照明和缓慢的相机运动。这些假设在机器人应用中经常被违反，其中图像可能包含运动模糊，并且场景可能没有合适的照明。这可能会给下游任务（例如场景的导航、检查或可视化）带来严重问题。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了 E-NeRF，这是第一种从快速移动的事件摄像机以 NeRF 形式估计体积场景表示的方法。我们的方法可以在非常快的运动和基于帧的方法失败的高动态范围条件下恢复 NeRF。我们证明，仅通过提供事件流作为输入就可以渲染高质量的帧。此外，通过结合事件和帧，我们可以在严重运动模糊下估计比最先进的方法更高质量的 NeRF。我们还表明，在只有少数输入视图可用的情况下，组合事件和帧可以克服 NeRF 估计的失败情况，而无需额外的正则化。 本文提出E-NeRF方法，通过移动事件相机估计神经辐射场（NeRF），解决传统方法在高速运动和高动态范围场景下的局限性。 Simon Klenk,Lukas Koestler,Davide Scaramuzza,Daniel Cremers cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Spectral Telescope: Convergence Rate Bounds for Random-Scan Gibbs Samplers Based on a Hierarchical Structure
title_zh: 光谱望远镜：基于分层结构的随机扫描吉布斯采样器的收敛率界限
abstract: Random-scan Gibbs samplers possess a natural hierarchical structure. The structure connects Gibbs samplers targeting higher dimensional distributions to those targeting lower dimensional ones. This leads to a quasi-telescoping property of their spectral gaps. Based on this property, we derive three new bounds on the spectral gaps and convergence rates of Gibbs samplers on general domains. The three bounds relate a chain's spectral gap to, respectively, the correlation structure of the target distribution, a class of random walk chains, and a collection of influence matrices. Notably, one of our results generalizes the technique of spectral independence, which has received considerable attention for its success on finite domains, to general state spaces. We illustrate our methods through a sampler targeting the uniform distribution on a corner of an $n$-cube.
summary: Random-scan Gibbs samplers possess a natural hierarchical structure. The structure connects Gibbs samplers targeting higher dimensional distributions to those targeting lower dimensional ones. This leads to a quasi-telescoping property of their spectral gaps. Based on this property, we derive three new bounds on the spectral gaps and convergence rates of Gibbs samplers on general domains. The three bounds relate a chain's spectral gap to, respectively, the correlation structure of the target distribution, a class of random walk chains, and a collection of influence matrices. Notably, one of our results generalizes the technique of spectral independence, which has received considerable attention for its success on finite domains, to general state spaces. We illustrate our methods through a sampler targeting the uniform distribution on a corner of an $n$-cube.
abstract_zh: 随机扫描吉布斯采样器具有自然的层次结构。该结构将针对高维分布的吉布斯采样器与针对低维分布的吉布斯采样器连接起来。这导致了它们的光谱间隙的准伸缩特性。基于这一性质，我们得出了通用域上吉布斯采样器的谱间隙和收敛率的三个新界限。这三个界限分别将链的谱间隙与目标分布的相关结构、一类随机游走链以及影响矩阵的集合相关联。值得注意的是，我们的结果之一将谱独立性技术推广到了一般状态空间，该技术因其在有限域上的成功而受到广泛关注。我们通过针对 $n$ 立方体角上的均匀分布的采样器来说明我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于分层结构的随机扫描吉布斯采样器的收敛速率界，通过谱隙的准望远镜性质推导出三个新界限。
AI.motivation: 高维分布的吉布斯采样器收敛速率分析存在挑战，传统方法难以处理复杂相关结构和无限状态空间。
AI.method: 利用吉布斯采样器的分层结构，建立谱隙的准望远镜性质，结合目标分布的相关性、随机游走链及影响矩阵推导收敛速率界。
AI.result: 提出三个谱隙界：基于相关结构、随机游走链和影响矩阵，并将谱独立性技术推广至一般状态空间，通过超立方体角落均匀分布实例验证方法。
AI.conclusion: 分层结构分析为高维和无限状态空间的吉布斯采样器提供了新的收敛速率理论工具，具有广泛适用性。

title: Semi-Supervised and Unsupervised Deep Visual Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 半监督和无监督深度视觉学习：一项调查
comment: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2022
comments: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2022
abstract: State-of-the-art deep learning models are often trained with a large amount of costly labeled training data. However, requiring exhaustive manual annotations may degrade the model's generalizability in the limited-label regime. Semi-supervised learning and unsupervised learning offer promising paradigms to learn from an abundance of unlabeled visual data. Recent progress in these paradigms has indicated the strong benefits of leveraging unlabeled data to improve model generalization and provide better model initialization. In this survey, we review the recent advanced deep learning algorithms on semi-supervised learning (SSL) and unsupervised learning (UL) for visual recognition from a unified perspective. To offer a holistic understanding of the state-of-the-art in these areas, we propose a unified taxonomy. We categorize existing representative SSL and UL with comprehensive and insightful analysis to highlight their design rationales in different learning scenarios and applications in different computer vision tasks. Lastly, we discuss the emerging trends and open challenges in SSL and UL to shed light on future critical research directions.
summary: State-of-the-art deep learning models are often trained with a large amount of costly labeled training data. However, requiring exhaustive manual annotations may degrade the model's generalizability in the limited-label regime. Semi-supervised learning and unsupervised learning offer promising paradigms to learn from an abundance of unlabeled visual data. Recent progress in these paradigms has indicated the strong benefits of leveraging unlabeled data to improve model generalization and provide better model initialization. In this survey, we review the recent advanced deep learning algorithms on semi-supervised learning (SSL) and unsupervised learning (UL) for visual recognition from a unified perspective. To offer a holistic understanding of the state-of-the-art in these areas, we propose a unified taxonomy. We categorize existing representative SSL and UL with comprehensive and insightful analysis to highlight their design rationales in different learning scenarios and applications in different computer vision tasks. Lastly, we discuss the emerging trends and open challenges in SSL and UL to shed light on future critical research directions.
abstract_zh: 最先进的深度学习模型通常使用大量昂贵的标记训练数据进行训练。然而，需要详尽的手动注释可能会降低模型在有限标签体系中的通用性。半监督学习和无监督学习提供了从大量未标记的视觉数据中学习的有前途的范例。这些范例的最新进展表明，利用未标记的数据来改进模型泛化并提供更好的模型初始化具有巨大的好处。在本次调查中，我们从统一的角度回顾了最近用于视觉识别的半监督学习（SSL）和无监督学习（UL）方面的先进深度学习算法。为了全面了解这些领域的最新技术，我们提出了统一的分类法。我们对现有的代表性 SSL 和 UL 进行了全面而深入的分析，以突出它们在不同学习场景中的设计原理以及在不同计算机视觉任务中的应用。最后，我们讨论 SSL 和 UL 的新兴趋势和开放挑战，以阐明未来的关键研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了半监督学习和无监督学习在视觉识别领域的最新深度学习算法，并提出统一分类体系以系统分析其设计原理与应用。
AI.motivation: 标注数据成本高昂且限制模型泛化能力，需通过利用大量未标注数据提升视觉模型性能。
AI.method: 提出统一分类框架，对现有半监督/无监督学习方法进行系统归类，并分析其在不同场景与任务中的设计逻辑。
AI.result: 梳理了SSL/UL技术演进脉络，揭示了不同方法的适用场景与技术差异，总结了当前研究进展及未来挑战。
AI.conclusion: 统一分类体系为研究者提供技术路线参考，未来需关注自监督学习与生成模型的结合等新兴方向。

authors_text: Ziming Li,Yiming Luo,Jialin Wang,Yushan Pan,Lingyun Yu,Hai-Ning Liang
title: Collaborative Remote Control of Unmanned Ground Vehicles in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 虚拟现实中无人地面车辆的协同远程控制
abstract: Virtual reality (VR) technology is commonly used in entertainment applications; however, it has also been deployed in practical applications in more serious aspects of our lives, such as safety. To support people working in dangerous industries, VR can ensure operators manipulate standardized tasks and work collaboratively to deal with potential risks. Surprisingly, little research has focused on how people can collaboratively work in VR environments. Few studies have paid attention to the cognitive load of operators in their collaborative tasks. Once task demands become complex, many researchers focus on optimizing the design of the interaction interfaces to reduce the cognitive load on the operator. That approach could be of merit; however, it can actually subject operators to a more significant cognitive load and potentially more errors and a failure of collaboration. In this paper, we propose a new collaborative VR system to support two teleoperators working in the VR environment to remote control an uncrewed ground vehicle. We use a compared experiment to evaluate the collaborative VR systems, focusing on the time spent on tasks and the total number of operations. Our results show that the total number of processes and the cognitive load during operations were significantly lower in the two-person group than in the single-person group. Our study sheds light on designing VR systems to support collaborative work with respect to the flow of work of teleoperators instead of simply optimizing the design outcomes.
summary: Virtual reality (VR) technology is commonly used in entertainment applications; however, it has also been deployed in practical applications in more serious aspects of our lives, such as safety. To support people working in dangerous industries, VR can ensure operators manipulate standardized tasks and work collaboratively to deal with potential risks. Surprisingly, little research has focused on how people can collaboratively work in VR environments. Few studies have paid attention to the cognitive load of operators in their collaborative tasks. Once task demands become complex, many researchers focus on optimizing the design of the interaction interfaces to reduce the cognitive load on the operator. That approach could be of merit; however, it can actually subject operators to a more significant cognitive load and potentially more errors and a failure of collaboration. In this paper, we propose a new collaborative VR system to support two teleoperators working in the VR environment to remote control an uncrewed ground vehicle. We use a compared experiment to evaluate the collaborative VR systems, focusing on the time spent on tasks and the total number of operations. Our results show that the total number of processes and the cognitive load during operations were significantly lower in the two-person group than in the single-person group. Our study sheds light on designing VR systems to support collaborative work with respect to the flow of work of teleoperators instead of simply optimizing the design outcomes.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实（VR）技术常用于娱乐应用；然而，它也被部署在我们生活中更重要的方面的实际应用中，例如安全。为了支持危险行业的工作人员，VR 可以确保操作员操纵标准化任务并协同工作以应对潜在风险。令人惊讶的是，很少有研究关注人们如何在 VR 环境中协作工作。很少有研究关注操作员在协作任务中的认知负荷。一旦任务需求变得复杂，许多研究人员就会专注于优化交互界面的设计，以减少操作者的认知负担。这种方法可能是有价值的；然而，它实际上会让操作员承受更严重的认知负担，并可能导致更多错误和协作失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的协作 VR 系统，支持在 VR 环境中工作的两名远程操作员远程控制无人驾驶地面车辆。我们使用比较实验来评估协作 VR 系统，重点关注任务花费的时间和操作总数。我们的结果表明，两人组的进程总数和操作期间的认知负荷显着低于单人组。我们的研究揭示了设计 VR 系统以支持远程操作员工作流程的协作工作，而不是简单地优化设计结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种支持两名远程操作员在虚拟现实环境中协作控制无人地面车辆的新系统，并通过实验验证其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对VR协作任务中操作员认知负荷的关注，单纯优化交互界面可能反而增加认知负担，需探索协作模式对任务效率的影响。
AI.method: 设计并实现一个双人协作VR系统，通过对比实验分析单人组与双人组在任务耗时和操作次数上的差异，并评估认知负荷变化。
AI.result: 双人协作组的操作流程总数和认知负荷显著低于单人组，表明协作模式能有效降低操作复杂度和错误率。
AI.conclusion: VR系统设计应关注远程操作员的工作流程协作，而非仅优化界面交互，以提升复杂任务下的协作效率与安全性。
